## 8. WINDOWS PLATFORM - Win32Event

### Core/Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Event.h

```cpp
// Core/Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Event.h
#pragma once

#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include <Event/EventListener.h>
#include <Event/Event.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <Windows.h>
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

class Win32Window;

class Win32Event : public EventListener {
public:
    static Win32Event& UniqueInstance();
    
    void AddObserver(EventObserver observer) override;
    void RemoveObserver(const EventObserver& observer) override;
    std::vector<Event*> ProcessQueue() override;
    
    void Update();
    bool Empty();
    size_t Size();
    
    static LRESULT CALLBACK StaticProcedure(HWND hwnd, UINT msg, WPARAM wparam, LPARAM lparam);
    LRESULT Procedure(uint32 msg, WPARAM wparam, LPARAM lparam, Win32Window* window);
    
private:
    LRESULT PushEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    LRESULT FinalizePushEvent(Event* event, LRESULT info, MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    
    // Event handlers
    LRESULT HandleWindowCreateEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    LRESULT HandleWindowCloseEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    LRESULT HandleWindowFocusedEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, bool focused);
    LRESULT HandleWindowResizeEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, bool resizing);
    LRESULT HandleWindowMoveEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    LRESULT HandleWindowDpiEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    
    LRESULT HandleKeyboardEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, bool keydown);
    LRESULT HandleCharEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    
    LRESULT HandleMouseButtonEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, uint8 btn, bool pressed, bool dbclick);
    LRESULT HandleMouseMoveEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    LRESULT HandleMouseWheelEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, bool vertical);
    LRESULT HandleMouseLeaveEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window);
    
    void SetMouseTracking(bool track, Win32Window* window);
    
    Keyboard::Keycode TranslateKeyCode(WPARAM wParam);
    Keyboard::Scancode TranslateScanCode(LPARAM lParam);
    ModifierState GetModifierState();
    
    std::vector<Event*> m_EventQueue;
    std::vector<EventObserver> m_EventObservers;
    
    maths::Vector2i m_MousePosition;
    maths::Vector2i m_GlobalMousePosition;
    maths::Vector2i m_PreviousMousePosition;
};

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

## 9. WINDOWS PLATFORM - Win32Event.cpp

### Core/Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Event.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Event.cpp
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include "Win32Event.h"
#include "Win32Window.h"
#include <Event/WindowEvent.h>
#include <Event/KeyboardEvent.h>
#include <Event/MouseEvent.h>
#include <windowsx.h>

namespace nkentseu {

Win32Event& Win32Event::UniqueInstance() {
    static Win32Event instance;
    return instance;
}

void Win32Event::AddObserver(EventObserver observer) {
    if (!observer) return;
    
    auto it = std::find_if(m_EventObservers.begin(), m_EventObservers.end(),
        [&](const EventObserver& obs) {
            return obs.target<void(Event&)>() == observer.target<void(Event&)>();
        });
    
    if (it == m_EventObservers.end()) {
        m_EventObservers.push_back(observer);
    }
}

void Win32Event::RemoveObserver(const EventObserver& observer) {
    if (!observer) return;
    
    auto it = std::find_if(m_EventObservers.begin(), m_EventObservers.end(),
        [&](const EventObserver& obs) {
            return obs.target<void(Event&)>() == observer.target<void(Event&)>();
        });
    
    if (it != m_EventObservers.end()) {
        m_EventObservers.erase(it);
    }
}

std::vector<Event*> Win32Event::ProcessQueue() {
    // Clear old events
    for (auto* event : m_EventQueue) {
        delete event;
    }
    m_EventQueue.clear();
    
    // Process new events
    Update();
    
    return m_EventQueue;
}

void Win32Event::Update() {
    MSG msg = {};
    
    while (PeekMessage(&msg, nullptr, 0, 0, PM_REMOVE)) {
        TranslateMessage(&msg);
        DispatchMessage(&msg);
    }
}

bool Win32Event::Empty() {
    return m_EventQueue.empty();
}

size_t Win32Event::Size() {
    return m_EventQueue.size();
}

LRESULT CALLBACK Win32Event::StaticProcedure(HWND hwnd, UINT msg, WPARAM wparam, LPARAM lparam) {
    if (hwnd == nullptr) return 0;
    
    Win32Window* window = Win32Window::GetCurrent(hwnd);
    if (window == nullptr) {
        return DefWindowProc(hwnd, msg, wparam, lparam);
    }
    
    return Win32Event::UniqueInstance().Procedure(msg, wparam, lparam, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::Procedure(uint32 msg, WPARAM wparam, LPARAM lparam, Win32Window* window) {
    if (window == nullptr || window->GetData() == nullptr) {
        return DefWindowProc(window ? (HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle : nullptr, msg, wparam, lparam);
    }
    
    MSG message;
    message.hwnd = (HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle;
    message.lParam = lparam;
    message.wParam = wparam;
    message.message = msg;
    message.time = 0;
    
    LRESULT result = PushEvent(message, window);
    
    // Don't forward WM_CLOSE to prevent OS from destroying window
    if (msg == WM_CLOSE) return 0;
    
    // Don't forward menu system command (ALT, F10)
    if ((msg == WM_SYSCOMMAND) && (wparam == SC_KEYMENU)) return 0;
    
    if (result > 0) return result;
    
    return DefWindowProc((HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle, msg, wparam, lparam);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::PushEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    UINT message = msg.message;
    
    switch (message) {
        // Window events
        case WM_CREATE:
            return HandleWindowCreateEvent(msg, window);
        
        case WM_CLOSE:
        case WM_DESTROY:
            return HandleWindowCloseEvent(msg, window);
        
        case WM_SETFOCUS:
            return HandleWindowFocusedEvent(msg, window, true);
        
        case WM_KILLFOCUS:
            return HandleWindowFocusedEvent(msg, window, false);
        
        case WM_SIZE:
        case WM_SIZING:
            return HandleWindowResizeEvent(msg, window, message == WM_SIZING);
        
        case WM_MOVE:
        case WM_MOVING:
            return HandleWindowMoveEvent(msg, window);
        
        case WM_DPICHANGED:
            return HandleWindowDpiEvent(msg, window);
        
        case WM_SETCURSOR:
            if (LOWORD(msg.lParam) == HTCLIENT) {
                SetCursor(window->GetData()->isCursorVisible ? 
                    window->GetData()->lastCursor : nullptr);
            }
            break;
        
        // Keyboard events
        case WM_KEYDOWN:
        case WM_KEYUP:
        case WM_SYSKEYDOWN:
        case WM_SYSKEYUP:
            return HandleKeyboardEvent(msg, window, 
                (message == WM_KEYDOWN || message == WM_SYSKEYDOWN));
        
        case WM_CHAR:
        case WM_UNICHAR:
            return HandleCharEvent(msg, window);
        
        // Mouse button events
        case WM_LBUTTONDOWN:
        case WM_LBUTTONUP:
        case WM_LBUTTONDBLCLK:
            return HandleMouseButtonEvent(msg, window, Mouse::Buttons::Left,
                message == WM_LBUTTONDOWN, message == WM_LBUTTONDBLCLK);
        
        case WM_RBUTTONDOWN:
        case WM_RBUTTONUP:
        case WM_RBUTTONDBLCLK:
            return HandleMouseButtonEvent(msg, window, Mouse::Buttons::Right,
                message == WM_RBUTTONDOWN, message == WM_RBUTTONDBLCLK);
        
        case WM_MBUTTONDOWN:
        case WM_MBUTTONUP:
        case WM_MBUTTONDBLCLK:
            return HandleMouseButtonEvent(msg, window, Mouse::Buttons::Middle,
                message == WM_MBUTTONDOWN, message == WM_MBUTTONDBLCLK);
        
        case WM_XBUTTONDOWN:
        case WM_XBUTTONUP:
        case WM_XBUTTONDBLCLK: {
            uint8 btn = (HIWORD(msg.wParam) & XBUTTON1) ? 
                Mouse::Buttons::X1 : Mouse::Buttons::X2;
            return HandleMouseButtonEvent(msg, window, btn,
                message == WM_XBUTTONDOWN, message == WM_XBUTTONDBLCLK);
        }
        
        // Mouse movement
        case WM_MOUSEMOVE:
            return HandleMouseMoveEvent(msg, window);
        
        case WM_MOUSELEAVE:
            return HandleMouseLeaveEvent(msg, window);
        
        // Mouse wheel
        case WM_MOUSEWHEEL:
            return HandleMouseWheelEvent(msg, window, true);
        
        case WM_MOUSEHWHEEL:
            return HandleMouseWheelEvent(msg, window, false);
        
        default:
            break;
    }
    
    return 0;
}

LRESULT Win32Event::FinalizePushEvent(Event* event, LRESULT info, MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    if (event && event->GetEventType() != EventType::NotDefine) {
        m_EventQueue.push_back(event);
        
        // Notify observers
        for (auto& observer : m_EventObservers) {
            if (observer) {
                observer(*event);
            }
        }
    }
    
    return info;
}

// =====================================================================
// WINDOW EVENT HANDLERS
// =====================================================================

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleWindowCreateEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    Event* event = new WindowStatusEvent(window->ID(), WindowState::Created);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleWindowCloseEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    // Restore video mode if fullscreen
    ChangeDisplaySettings(nullptr, 0);
    
    // Show cursor
    window->ShowMouse(true);
    
    // Release mouse tracking
    SetMouseTracking(false, window);
    ReleaseCapture();
    
    Event* event = new WindowStatusEvent(window->ID(), WindowState::Closed);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleWindowFocusedEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, bool focused) {
    FocusState::Code state = focused ? FocusState::Focused : FocusState::Unfocused;
    Event* event = new WindowFocusedEvent(window->ID(), state);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleWindowResizeEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, bool resizing) {
    RECT rect;
    GetClientRect((HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle, &rect);
    
    uint32 width = rect.right - rect.left;
    uint32 height = rect.bottom - rect.top;
    
    float scaleFactor = window->GetDpiScale();
    if (scaleFactor == 0) scaleFactor = 1.0f;
    
    maths::Vector2u size(width / scaleFactor, height / scaleFactor);
    
    maths::Vector2u oldSize = window->GetSize();
    float oldArea = oldSize.x * oldSize.y;
    float newArea = size.x * size.y;
    
    ResizeState::Code state = ResizeState::NotChange;
    if (newArea > oldArea) {
        state = ResizeState::Expanded;
    } else if (newArea < oldArea) {
        state = ResizeState::Reduced;
    }
    
    if (state == ResizeState::NotChange) return 0;
    
    window->GetProps().size = size;
    
    Event* event = new WindowResizedEvent(window->ID(), state, size);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleWindowMoveEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    if (!window->GetProperties().movable) {
        window->SetPosition(window->GetPosition());
        return 0;
    }
    
    maths::Vector2i lastPos = window->GetPosition();
    
    float scaleFactor = window->GetDpiScale();
    if (scaleFactor == 0) scaleFactor = 1.0f;
    
    maths::Vector2i position(
        static_cast<int32>(LOWORD(msg.lParam)) / scaleFactor,
        static_cast<int32>(HIWORD(msg.lParam)) / scaleFactor
    );
    
    window->GetProps().position = position;
    
    Event* event = new WindowMovedEvent(window->ID(), position, lastPos);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleWindowDpiEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    WORD dpi = HIWORD(msg.wParam);
    float scale = static_cast<float>(dpi) / USER_DEFAULT_SCREEN_DPI;
    
    Event* event = new WindowDpiChangedEvent(window->ID(), scale);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

// =====================================================================
// KEYBOARD EVENT HANDLERS
// =====================================================================

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleKeyboardEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, bool keydown) {
    WPARAM keycode = msg.wParam;
    LPARAM flags = msg.lParam;
    
    Keyboard::Keycode ntsKeycode = TranslateKeyCode(keycode);
    Keyboard::Scancode ntsScancode = TranslateScanCode(flags);
    ModifierState modifiers = GetModifierState();
    
    ButtonState::Code state = keydown ? ButtonState::Pressed : ButtonState::Released;
    
    Event* event = new KeyboardEvent(window->ID(), state, ntsKeycode, ntsScancode, modifiers);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleCharEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    uint64 unicode = static_cast<uint64>(msg.wParam);
    
    // Convert to UTF-8
    std::string utf8;
    if (unicode <= 0x7F) {
        utf8 = static_cast<char>(unicode);
    } else if (unicode <= 0x7FF) {
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0xC0 | (unicode >> 6));
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0x80 | (unicode & 0x3F));
    } else if (unicode <= 0xFFFF) {
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0xE0 | (unicode >> 12));
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0x80 | ((unicode >> 6) & 0x3F));
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0x80 | (unicode & 0x3F));
    } else {
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0xF0 | (unicode >> 18));
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0x80 | ((unicode >> 12) & 0x3F));
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0x80 | ((unicode >> 6) & 0x3F));
        utf8 += static_cast<char>(0x80 | (unicode & 0x3F));
    }
    
    Event* event = new CharEnteredEvent(window->ID(), unicode, utf8);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

// =====================================================================
// MOUSE EVENT HANDLERS
// =====================================================================

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleMouseButtonEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, 
                                           uint8 btn, bool pressed, bool dbclick) {
    if (pressed) {
        SetCapture((HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle);
    } else {
        ReleaseCapture();
    }
    
    float scaleFactor = window->GetDpiScale();
    if (scaleFactor == 0) scaleFactor = 1.0f;
    
    maths::Vector2i position(
        GET_X_LPARAM(msg.lParam) / scaleFactor,
        GET_Y_LPARAM(msg.lParam) / scaleFactor
    );
    
    RECT area;
    GetClientRect((HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle, &area);
    MapWindowPoints((HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle, nullptr, 
                    reinterpret_cast<POINT*>(&area), 2);
    
    maths::Vector2i globalPos = position + maths::Vector2i(
        area.left / scaleFactor,
        area.top / scaleFactor
    );
    
    m_MousePosition = position;
    m_GlobalMousePosition = globalPos;
    
    short modifiers = LOWORD(msg.wParam);
    ModifierState mods(
        modifiers & MK_CONTROL,
        modifiers & MK_ALT,
        modifiers & MK_SHIFT,
        false
    );
    
    ButtonState::Code state = pressed ? ButtonState::Pressed : ButtonState::Released;
    
    Event* event = new MouseInputEvent(window->ID(), state, mods, btn, 
                                       dbclick, position, globalPos);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleMouseMoveEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    float scaleFactor = window->GetDpiScale();
    if (scaleFactor == 0) scaleFactor = 1.0f;
    
    maths::Vector2i position(
        GET_X_LPARAM(msg.lParam) / scaleFactor,
        GET_Y_LPARAM(msg.lParam) / scaleFactor
    );
    
    RECT area;
    GetClientRect((HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle, &area);
    
    // Check mouse enter/exit
    if ((position.x < area.left) || (position.x > area.right) ||
        (position.y < area.top) || (position.y > area.bottom)) {
        if (window->GetData()->isMouseInside) {
            window->GetData()->isMouseInside = false;
            SetMouseTracking(false, window);
            
            Event* exitEvent = new MouseWindowEvent(window->ID(), 
                RegionState::Exited, position);
            FinalizePushEvent(exitEvent, 0, msg, window);
        }
    } else {
        if (!window->GetData()->isMouseInside) {
            window->GetData()->isMouseInside = true;
            SetMouseTracking(true, window);
            
            Event* enterEvent = new MouseWindowEvent(window->ID(), 
                RegionState::Entered, position);
            FinalizePushEvent(enterEvent, 0, msg, window);
        }
    }
    
    MapWindowPoints((HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle, nullptr, 
                    reinterpret_cast<POINT*>(&area), 2);
    
    maths::Vector2i globalPos = position + maths::Vector2i(
        area.left / scaleFactor,
        area.top / scaleFactor
    );
    
    maths::Vector2i delta = position - m_PreviousMousePosition;
    m_PreviousMousePosition = position;
    m_MousePosition = position;
    m_GlobalMousePosition = globalPos;
    
    Event* event = new MouseMovedEvent(window->ID(), position, globalPos, delta);
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleMouseLeaveEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window) {
    if (window->GetData()->isMouseInside) {
        window->GetData()->isMouseInside = false;
        
        Event* event = new MouseWindowEvent(window->ID(), RegionState::Exited);
        return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
    }
    return 0;
}

LRESULT Win32Event::HandleMouseWheelEvent(MSG msg, Win32Window* window, bool vertical) {
    short modifiers = LOWORD(msg.wParam);
    float delta = GET_WHEEL_DELTA_WPARAM(msg.wParam) / static_cast<float>(WHEEL_DELTA);
    
    ModifierState mods(
        modifiers & MK_CONTROL,
        modifiers & MK_ALT,
        modifiers & MK_SHIFT,
        false
    );
    
    POINT position;
    position.x = static_cast<int16>(LOWORD(msg.lParam));
    position.y = static_cast<int16>(HIWORD(msg.lParam));
    ScreenToClient((HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle, &position);
    
    Mouse::Wheel wheel = vertical ? Mouse::Wheels::Vertical : Mouse::Wheels::Horizontal;
    
    Event* event = new MouseWheelEvent(window->ID(), wheel, delta, mods,
                                       maths::Vector2i(position.x, position.y));
    return FinalizePushEvent(event, 0, msg, window);
}

// =====================================================================
// HELPERS
// =====================================================================

void Win32Event::SetMouseTracking(bool track, Win32Window* window) {
    TRACKMOUSEEVENT mouseEvent;
    mouseEvent.cbSize = sizeof(TRACKMOUSEEVENT);
    mouseEvent.dwFlags = track ? TME_LEAVE : TME_CANCEL;
    mouseEvent.hwndTrack = (HWND)window->GetData()->windowHandle;
    mouseEvent.dwHoverTime = HOVER_DEFAULT;
    TrackMouseEvent(&mouseEvent);
}

Keyboard::Keycode Win32Event::TranslateKeyCode(WPARAM wParam) {
    // A-Z
    if (wParam >= 'A' && wParam <= 'Z')
        return static_cast<Keyboard::Keycode>(
            static_cast<int>(Keyboard::A) + (wParam - 'A'));
    
    // 0-9
    if (wParam >= '0' && wParam <= '9')
        return static_cast<Keyboard::Keycode>(
            static_cast<int>(Keyboard::Num0) + (wParam - '0'));
    
    // F1-F12
    if (wParam >= VK_F1 && wParam <= VK_F12)
        return static_cast<Keyboard::Keycode>(
            static_cast<int>(Keyboard::F1) + (wParam - VK_F1));
    
    // Special keys
    switch (wParam) {
        case VK_ESCAPE: return Keyboard::Escape;
        case VK_TAB: return Keyboard::Tab;
        case VK_BACK: return Keyboard::Backspace;
        case VK_RETURN: return Keyboard::Enter;
        case VK_INSERT: return Keyboard::Insert;
        case VK_DELETE: return Keyboard::Delete;
        case VK_HOME: return Keyboard::Home;
        case VK_END: return Keyboard::End;
        case VK_PRIOR: return Keyboard::PageUp;
        case VK_NEXT: return Keyboard::PageDown;
        case VK_LEFT: return Keyboard::Left;
        case VK_RIGHT: return Keyboard::Right;
        case VK_UP: return Keyboard::Up;
        case VK_DOWN: return Keyboard::Down;
        case VK_SPACE: return Keyboard::Space;
        case VK_LSHIFT: return Keyboard::ShiftLeft;
        case VK_RSHIFT: return Keyboard::ShiftRight;
        case VK_LCONTROL: return Keyboard::ControlLeft;
        case VK_RCONTROL: return Keyboard::ControlRight;
        case VK_LMENU: return Keyboard::AltLeft;
        case VK_RMENU: return Keyboard::AltRight;
        case VK_LWIN: return Keyboard::SuperLeft;
        case VK_RWIN: return Keyboard::SuperRight;
        case VK_CAPITAL: return Keyboard::CapsLock;
        case VK_NUMLOCK: return Keyboard::NumLock;
        case VK_SCROLL: return Keyboard::ScrollLock;
        case VK_SNAPSHOT: return Keyboard::PrintScreen;
        case VK_PAUSE: return Keyboard::Pause;
        case VK_APPS: return Keyboard::Menu;
        default: return Keyboard::NotDefine;
    }
}

Keyboard::Scancode Win32Event::TranslateScanCode(LPARAM lParam) {
    WORD scancode = (lParam >> 16) & 0xFF;
    bool extended = (lParam & (1 << 24)) != 0;
    
    if (extended) {
        scancode |= 0xE000;
    }
    
    return static_cast<Keyboard::Scancode>(scancode);
}

ModifierState Win32Event::GetModifierState() {
    return ModifierState(
        (GetKeyState(VK_CONTROL) & 0x8000) != 0,
        (GetKeyState(VK_MENU) & 0x8000) != 0,
        (GetKeyState(VK_SHIFT) & 0x8000) != 0,
        ((GetKeyState(VK_LWIN) & 0x8000) != 0) || 
        ((GetKeyState(VK_RWIN) & 0x8000) != 0)
    );
}

} // namespace nkentseu

// Global function for EventManager
void ProcessNativePlatformEvents() {
    nkentseu::Win32Event::UniqueInstance().Update();
}

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

# Suite - Win32Window Implementation

## 10. WINDOWS PLATFORM - Win32Window

### Core/Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Window.h

```cpp
// Core/Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Window.h
#pragma once

#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Window/WindowProperties.h>
#include <Window/WindowData.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Memory.h>
#include <Windows.h>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

class Win32Window : public Window {
public:
    Win32Window(const WindowProperties& properties);
    ~Win32Window() override;
    
    // Lifecycle
    bool Initialize() override;
    void Shutdown() override;
    
    // Properties
    std::string GetTitle() const override;
    void SetTitle(const std::string& title) override;
    
    maths::Vector2i GetPosition() const override;
    void SetPosition(int32 x, int32 y) override;
    void SetPosition(const maths::Vector2i& pos) override;
    
    maths::Vector2u GetSize() override;
    void SetSize(uint32 width, uint32 height) override;
    void SetSize(const maths::Vector2u& size) override;
    
    float GetDpiScale() const override;
    maths::Vector2f ConvertPixelToDpi(const maths::Vector2f& pixel) const override;
    
    // Display
    void Show() override;
    void Hide() override;
    void Minimize() override;
    void Maximize() override;
    
    // State
    bool IsOpen() override;
    bool IsClosed() override;
    void Close() override;
    
    // Mouse
    void ShowMouse(bool show) override;
    void ConfineMouse(bool confine) override;
    bool IsMouseInside() override;
    
    // Background
    maths::Color GetBackgroundColor() override;
    void SetBackgroundColor(const maths::Color& color) override;
    
    // Rendering
    void Clear(const maths::Color& color) override;
    void SwapBuffers() override;
    
    // Renderer
    Renderer* CreateRenderer() override;
    
    // Icon
    void SetIcon(const maths::Vector2u& size, const uint8* pixels) override;
    
    // Advanced
    void SetAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) override;
    void SetOpacity(float opacity) override;
    
    // ID
    uint64 ID() override { return m_WindowID; }
    
    // Properties access
    const WindowProperties& GetProperties() override { return m_Properties; }
    WindowProperties& GetProps() { return m_Properties; }
    WindowData* GetData() override { return m_Data.get(); }
    
    // Static access
    static Win32Window* GetCurrent(HWND hwnd);
    
private:
    bool CreateWin32Window();
    bool IsValidDisplay() const;
    
    DWORD GetWindowStyle() const;
    DWORD GetWindowExStyle() const;
    
    RECT UpdateWindowExtension(const maths::Vector2i& position, 
                               const maths::Vector2u& size, 
                               DWORD style, DWORD styleEx);
    
    void InitWindowPosition(const maths::Vector2i& position, 
                           const maths::Vector2u& size);
    
    Memory::Shared<WindowData> m_Data;
    WindowProperties m_Properties;
    
    bool m_IsWindowCreated = false;
    bool m_IsWindowClosed = true;
    
    static uint64 s_WindowIDCounter;
    uint64 m_WindowID;
    
    static std::unordered_map<HWND, Win32Window*> s_WindowMap;
};

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

### Core/Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Window.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Window.cpp
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include "Win32Window.h"
#include "Win32Event.h"
#include <Renderer/SoftwareRenderer.h>
#include <dwmapi.h>

#pragma comment(lib, "dwmapi.lib")

namespace nkentseu {

uint64 Win32Window::s_WindowIDCounter = 1;
std::unordered_map<HWND, Win32Window*> Win32Window::s_WindowMap;

static const wchar_t* WINDOW_CLASS_NAME = L"NkentseuWindowClass";
static bool g_ClassRegistered = false;

Win32Window::Win32Window(const WindowProperties& properties)
    : m_Properties(properties)
    , m_WindowID(s_WindowIDCounter++)
{
    m_Data = Memory::CreateShared<WindowData>();
    m_Data->hInstance = GetModuleHandle(nullptr);
}

Win32Window::~Win32Window() {
    Shutdown();
}

bool Win32Window::Initialize() {
    if (m_IsWindowCreated) return true;
    
    // Register window class
    if (!g_ClassRegistered) {
        WNDCLASSEXW wc = {};
        wc.cbSize = sizeof(WNDCLASSEXW);
        wc.style = CS_HREDRAW | CS_VREDRAW | CS_OWNDC;
        wc.lpfnWndProc = Win32Event::StaticProcedure;
        wc.cbClsExtra = 0;
        wc.cbWndExtra = 0;
        wc.hInstance = (HINSTANCE)m_Data->hInstance;
        wc.hIcon = LoadIcon(nullptr, IDI_APPLICATION);
        wc.hCursor = LoadCursor(nullptr, IDC_ARROW);
        wc.hbrBackground = (HBRUSH)GetStockObject(BLACK_BRUSH);
        wc.lpszMenuName = nullptr;
        wc.lpszClassName = WINDOW_CLASS_NAME;
        wc.hIconSm = LoadIcon(nullptr, IDI_APPLICATION);
        
        if (!RegisterClassExW(&wc)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        g_ClassRegistered = true;
    }
    
    if (!CreateWin32Window()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    m_Data->lastCursor = LoadCursor(nullptr, IDC_ARROW);
    m_Data->isCursorVisible = true;
    m_Data->isMouseInside = false;
    
    m_IsWindowCreated = true;
    m_IsWindowClosed = false;
    
    // Register in map
    s_WindowMap[(HWND)m_Data->windowHandle] = this;
    
    return true;
}

void Win32Window::Shutdown() {
    if (!m_IsWindowCreated) return;
    
    // Unregister from map
    if (m_Data->windowHandle) {
        s_WindowMap.erase((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle);
    }
    
    if (m_Data->deviceContext) {
        ReleaseDC((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, (HDC)m_Data->deviceContext);
        m_Data->deviceContext = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_Data->windowHandle) {
        DestroyWindow((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle);
        m_Data->windowHandle = nullptr;
    }
    
    m_IsWindowCreated = false;
    m_IsWindowClosed = true;
}

bool Win32Window::CreateWin32Window() {
    DWORD style = GetWindowStyle();
    DWORD exStyle = GetWindowExStyle();
    
    // Convert title to wide string
    int titleLen = MultiByteToWideChar(CP_UTF8, 0, 
        m_Properties.title.c_str(), -1, nullptr, 0);
    wchar_t* wTitle = new wchar_t[titleLen];
    MultiByteToWideChar(CP_UTF8, 0, m_Properties.title.c_str(), -1, 
        wTitle, titleLen);
    
    // Adjust window size for borders
    RECT rect = UpdateWindowExtension(m_Properties.position, 
                                      m_Properties.size, style, exStyle);
    
    int32 x = m_Properties.position.x;
    int32 y = m_Properties.position.y;
    uint32 width = rect.right - rect.left;
    uint32 height = rect.bottom - rect.top;
    
    // Center if position is (0, 0)
    if (x == 0 && y == 0) {
        int screenWidth = GetSystemMetrics(SM_CXSCREEN);
        int screenHeight = GetSystemMetrics(SM_CYSCREEN);
        x = (screenWidth - width) / 2;
        y = (screenHeight - height) / 2;
    }
    
    // Create window
    HWND hwnd = CreateWindowExW(
        exStyle,
        WINDOW_CLASS_NAME,
        wTitle,
        style,
        x, y,
        width, height,
        nullptr,
        nullptr,
        (HINSTANCE)m_Data->hInstance,
        this
    );
    
    delete[] wTitle;
    
    if (!hwnd) {
        return false;
    }
    
    m_Data->windowHandle = hwnd;
    m_Data->deviceContext = GetDC(hwnd);
    
    // Enable dark mode (Windows 10+)
    BOOL useDarkMode = TRUE;
    DwmSetWindowAttribute(hwnd, 20, &useDarkMode, sizeof(useDarkMode));
    
    // DPI awareness
    SetProcessDpiAwarenessContext(DPI_AWARENESS_CONTEXT_PER_MONITOR_AWARE_V2);
    
    return true;
}

bool Win32Window::IsValidDisplay() const {
    return m_Data->windowHandle != nullptr;
}

DWORD Win32Window::GetWindowStyle() const {
    DWORD style = 0;
    
    if (m_Properties.fullscreen) {
        style = WS_POPUP;
    } else {
        if (m_Properties.decorated) {
            style = WS_OVERLAPPED | WS_CAPTION | WS_SYSMENU | WS_MINIMIZEBOX;
            
            if (m_Properties.resizable) {
                style |= WS_THICKFRAME | WS_MAXIMIZEBOX;
            }
        } else {
            style = WS_POPUP;
        }
    }
    
    if (m_Properties.visible) {
        style |= WS_VISIBLE;
    }
    
    return style;
}

DWORD Win32Window::GetWindowExStyle() const {
    DWORD exStyle = WS_EX_APPWINDOW;
    
    if (!m_Properties.decorated && !m_Properties.fullscreen) {
        exStyle |= WS_EX_WINDOWEDGE;
    }
    
    return exStyle;
}

RECT Win32Window::UpdateWindowExtension(const maths::Vector2i& position,
                                        const maths::Vector2u& size,
                                        DWORD style, DWORD styleEx) {
    RECT rect = { 0, 0, (LONG)size.x, (LONG)size.y };
    AdjustWindowRectEx(&rect, style, FALSE, styleEx);
    
    m_Data->extend.x = rect.right - rect.left - size.x;
    m_Data->extend.y = rect.bottom - rect.top - size.y;
    
    return rect;
}

void Win32Window::InitWindowPosition(const maths::Vector2i& position,
                                     const maths::Vector2u& size) {
    DWORD style = GetWindowStyle();
    DWORD exStyle = GetWindowExStyle();
    
    RECT rect = UpdateWindowExtension(position, size, style, exStyle);
    
    int32 x = position.x;
    int32 y = position.y;
    
    if (x == 0 && y == 0) {
        int screenWidth = GetSystemMetrics(SM_CXSCREEN);
        int screenHeight = GetSystemMetrics(SM_CYSCREEN);
        x = (screenWidth - (rect.right - rect.left)) / 2;
        y = (screenHeight - (rect.bottom - rect.top)) / 2;
    }
    
    SetWindowPos((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, nullptr,
                 x, y,
                 rect.right - rect.left,
                 rect.bottom - rect.top,
                 SWP_NOZORDER | SWP_NOACTIVATE);
}

Win32Window* Win32Window::GetCurrent(HWND hwnd) {
    auto it = s_WindowMap.find(hwnd);
    if (it != s_WindowMap.end()) {
        return it->second;
    }
    return nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// PROPERTY GETTERS/SETTERS
// =====================================================================

std::string Win32Window::GetTitle() const {
    return m_Properties.title;
}

void Win32Window::SetTitle(const std::string& title) {
    m_Properties.title = title;
    
    if (IsValidDisplay()) {
        int titleLen = MultiByteToWideChar(CP_UTF8, 0, title.c_str(), -1, nullptr, 0);
        wchar_t* wTitle = new wchar_t[titleLen];
        MultiByteToWideChar(CP_UTF8, 0, title.c_str(), -1, wTitle, titleLen);
        
        SetWindowTextW((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, wTitle);
        
        delete[] wTitle;
    }
}

maths::Vector2i Win32Window::GetPosition() const {
    if (!IsValidDisplay()) return m_Properties.position;
    
    RECT rect;
    GetWindowRect((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, &rect);
    
    return maths::Vector2i(rect.left, rect.top);
}

void Win32Window::SetPosition(int32 x, int32 y) {
    SetPosition(maths::Vector2i(x, y));
}

void Win32Window::SetPosition(const maths::Vector2i& pos) {
    m_Properties.position = pos;
    
    if (IsValidDisplay()) {
        SetWindowPos((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, nullptr,
                     pos.x, pos.y, 0, 0,
                     SWP_NOSIZE | SWP_NOZORDER | SWP_NOACTIVATE);
    }
}

maths::Vector2u Win32Window::GetSize() {
    if (!IsValidDisplay()) return m_Properties.size;
    
    RECT rect;
    GetClientRect((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, &rect);
    
    return maths::Vector2u(rect.right - rect.left, rect.bottom - rect.top);
}

void Win32Window::SetSize(uint32 width, uint32 height) {
    SetSize(maths::Vector2u(width, height));
}

void Win32Window::SetSize(const maths::Vector2u& size) {
    m_Properties.size = size;
    
    if (IsValidDisplay()) {
        DWORD style = GetWindowStyle();
        DWORD exStyle = GetWindowExStyle();
        
        RECT rect = { 0, 0, (LONG)size.x, (LONG)size.y };
        AdjustWindowRectEx(&rect, style, FALSE, exStyle);
        
        SetWindowPos((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, nullptr,
                     0, 0,
                     rect.right - rect.left,
                     rect.bottom - rect.top,
                     SWP_NOMOVE | SWP_NOZORDER | SWP_NOACTIVATE);
    }
}

float Win32Window::GetDpiScale() const {
    if (!IsValidDisplay()) return 1.0f;
    
    UINT dpi = GetDpiForWindow((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle);
    return static_cast<float>(dpi) / USER_DEFAULT_SCREEN_DPI;
}

maths::Vector2f Win32Window::ConvertPixelToDpi(const maths::Vector2f& pixel) const {
    float scale = GetDpiScale();
    return pixel / scale;
}

// =====================================================================
// DISPLAY CONTROL
// =====================================================================

void Win32Window::Show() {
    if (IsValidDisplay()) {
        ShowWindow((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, SW_SHOW);
        UpdateWindow((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle);
        m_Properties.visible = true;
    }
}

void Win32Window::Hide() {
    if (IsValidDisplay()) {
        ShowWindow((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, SW_HIDE);
        m_Properties.visible = false;
    }
}

void Win32Window::Minimize() {
    if (IsValidDisplay()) {
        ShowWindow((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, SW_MINIMIZE);
    }
}

void Win32Window::Maximize() {
    if (IsValidDisplay()) {
        ShowWindow((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, SW_MAXIMIZE);
    }
}

bool Win32Window::IsOpen() {
    return m_IsWindowCreated && !m_IsWindowClosed;
}

bool Win32Window::IsClosed() {
    return m_IsWindowClosed;
}

void Win32Window::Close() {
    if (IsValidDisplay()) {
        PostMessage((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, WM_CLOSE, 0, 0);
        m_IsWindowClosed = true;
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// MOUSE CONTROL
// =====================================================================

void Win32Window::ShowMouse(bool show) {
    m_Data->isCursorVisible = show;
    
    if (show) {
        while (ShowCursor(TRUE) < 0);
        SetCursor(m_Data->lastCursor);
    } else {
        while (ShowCursor(FALSE) >= 0);
        SetCursor(nullptr);
    }
}

void Win32Window::ConfineMouse(bool confine) {
    if (!IsValidDisplay()) return;
    
    if (confine) {
        RECT rect;
        GetClientRect((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, &rect);
        MapWindowPoints((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, nullptr, 
                       reinterpret_cast<POINT*>(&rect), 2);
        ClipCursor(&rect);
    } else {
        ClipCursor(nullptr);
    }
}

bool Win32Window::IsMouseInside() {
    return m_Data->isMouseInside;
}

// =====================================================================
// BACKGROUND
// =====================================================================

maths::Color Win32Window::GetBackgroundColor() {
    return m_Properties.backgroundColor;
}

void Win32Window::SetBackgroundColor(const maths::Color& color) {
    m_Properties.backgroundColor = color;
}

// =====================================================================
// RENDERING
// =====================================================================

void Win32Window::Clear(const maths::Color& color) {
    if (!IsValidDisplay()) return;
    
    PAINTSTRUCT ps;
    HDC hdc = BeginPaint((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, &ps);
    
    RECT rect;
    GetClientRect((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, &rect);
    
    HBRUSH brush = CreateSolidBrush(RGB(
        static_cast<int>(color.r * 255),
        static_cast<int>(color.g * 255),
        static_cast<int>(color.b * 255)
    ));
    
    FillRect(hdc, &rect, brush);
    DeleteObject(brush);
    
    EndPaint((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, &ps);
}

void Win32Window::SwapBuffers() {
    if (m_Data->deviceContext) {
        ::SwapBuffers((HDC)m_Data->deviceContext);
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// RENDERER
// =====================================================================

Renderer* Win32Window::CreateRenderer() {
    // For now, always create software renderer
    // Later: check config and create OpenGL/DirectX/Vulkan
    return new SoftwareRenderer();
}

// =====================================================================
// ICON
// =====================================================================

void Win32Window::SetIcon(const maths::Vector2u& size, const uint8* pixels) {
    if (!IsValidDisplay() || !pixels) return;
    
    // Create HICON from pixel data
    BITMAPV5HEADER bi = {};
    bi.bV5Size = sizeof(BITMAPV5HEADER);
    bi.bV5Width = size.x;
    bi.bV5Height = -(int32)size.y; // Top-down
    bi.bV5Planes = 1;
    bi.bV5BitCount = 32;
    bi.bV5Compression = BI_BITFIELDS;
    bi.bV5RedMask = 0x00FF0000;
    bi.bV5GreenMask = 0x0000FF00;
    bi.bV5BlueMask = 0x000000FF;
    bi.bV5AlphaMask = 0xFF000000;
    
    HDC hdc = GetDC(nullptr);
    void* bits;
    HBITMAP hBitmap = CreateDIBSection(hdc, (BITMAPINFO*)&bi, 
                                       DIB_RGB_COLORS, &bits, nullptr, 0);
    ReleaseDC(nullptr, hdc);
    
    if (hBitmap) {
        memcpy(bits, pixels, size.x * size.y * 4);
        
        ICONINFO iconInfo = {};
        iconInfo.fIcon = TRUE;
        iconInfo.hbmColor = hBitmap;
        iconInfo.hbmMask = CreateBitmap(size.x, size.y, 1, 1, nullptr);
        
        HICON hIcon = CreateIconIndirect(&iconInfo);
        
        if (hIcon) {
            SendMessage((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, WM_SETICON, 
                       ICON_BIG, (LPARAM)hIcon);
            SendMessage((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, WM_SETICON, 
                       ICON_SMALL, (LPARAM)hIcon);
        }
        
        DeleteObject(iconInfo.hbmMask);
        DeleteObject(hBitmap);
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// ADVANCED
// =====================================================================

void Win32Window::SetAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) {
    if (!IsValidDisplay()) return;
    
    HWND insertAfter = alwaysOnTop ? HWND_TOPMOST : HWND_NOTOPMOST;
    SetWindowPos((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, insertAfter,
                 0, 0, 0, 0,
                 SWP_NOMOVE | SWP_NOSIZE | SWP_NOACTIVATE);
}

void Win32Window::SetOpacity(float opacity) {
    if (!IsValidDisplay()) return;
    
    m_Properties.opacity = opacity;
    
    BYTE alpha = static_cast<BYTE>(opacity * 255);
    
    LONG exStyle = GetWindowLong((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, GWL_EXSTYLE);
    
    if (opacity < 1.0f) {
        SetWindowLong((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, GWL_EXSTYLE, 
                     exStyle | WS_EX_LAYERED);
        SetLayeredWindowAttributes((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, 0, alpha, LWA_ALPHA);
    } else {
        SetWindowLong((HWND)m_Data->windowHandle, GWL_EXSTYLE, 
                     exStyle & ~WS_EX_LAYERED);
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

## 11. EVENT LISTENER IMPLEMENTATION

### Core/Event/EventListener.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Event/EventListener.cpp
#include "EventListener.h"

#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
    #include <Window/Platform/Win32/Win32Event.h>
#elif defined(NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX)
    #include <Window/Platform/Linux/XCBEvent.h>
#elif defined(NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_MACOS)
    #include <Window/Platform/macOS/CocoaEvent.h>
#endif

namespace nkentseu {

EventListener& EventListener::Instance() {
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
    return Win32Event::UniqueInstance();
#elif defined(NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX)
    return XCBEvent::UniqueInstance();
#elif defined(NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_MACOS)
    return CocoaEvent::UniqueInstance();
#else
    static EventListener* dummy = nullptr;
    return *dummy; // Will crash, but shouldn't reach here
#endif
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 12. ENTRY POINT

### Core/EntryPoint/WindowsMain.cpp

```cpp
// Core/EntryPoint/WindowsMain.cpp
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include <Windows.h>
#include <cstdio>

// User defines this
extern int nkmain(int argc, char* argv[]);

int WINAPI WinMain(HINSTANCE hInstance, HINSTANCE hPrevInstance, 
                   LPSTR lpCmdLine, int nShowCmd) {
    #ifdef NKENTSEU_DEBUG
    // Allocate console for debug builds
    AllocConsole();
    FILE* pCout = nullptr;
    FILE* pCerr = nullptr;
    freopen_s(&pCout, "CONOUT$", "w+", stdout);
    freopen_s(&pCerr, "CONOUT$", "w+", stderr);
    #endif
    
    // Simple argc/argv
    int argc = 1;
    char* argv[] = { (char*)"nkentseu.exe", nullptr };
    
    int result = nkmain(argc, argv);
    
    #ifdef NKENTSEU_DEBUG
    if (pCout) fclose(pCout);
    if (pCerr) fclose(pCerr);
    FreeConsole();
    #endif
    
    return result;
}

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

## 13. EXEMPLE COMPLET D'UTILISATION

### Sandbox/Main.cpp

```cpp
// Sandbox/Main.cpp
#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Event/EventListener.h>
#include <Event/WindowEvent.h>
#include <Event/KeyboardEvent.h>
#include <Event/MouseEvent.h>
#include <Renderer/SoftwareRenderer.h>
#include <Renderer/RendererAPI.h>

using namespace nkentseu;

int nkmain(int argc, char* argv[]) {
    // Create window
    WindowProperties props;
    props.title = "Nkentseu2D - Complete Architecture";
    props.size = maths::Vector2u(1280, 720);
    props.position = maths::Vector2i(100, 100);
    props.resizable = true;
    props.decorated = true;
    
    Window* window = Window::Create(props);
    if (!window || !window->Initialize()) {
        return 1;
    }
    
    window->Show();
    
    // Create renderer
    RendererConfig rendererCfg;
    rendererCfg.api = RendererAPI::Software;
    rendererCfg.vsync = true;
    
    SoftwareRenderer* renderer = static_cast<SoftwareRenderer*>(
        window->CreateRenderer()
    );
    
    if (!renderer || !renderer->Initialize(window, rendererCfg)) {
        delete window;
        return 1;
    }
    
    // Register event observers
    EventTracker.AddObserver([&](Event& event) {
        if (auto* resized = event.As<WindowResizedEvent>()) {
            printf("Window resized: %ux%u\n", 
                   resized->GetSize().x, resized->GetSize().y);
        }
    });
    
    bool running = true;
    float angle = 0.0f;
    
    // Main loop
    while (running && window->IsOpen()) {
        // Process events
        auto events = EventTracker.ProcessQueue();
        
        for (auto* event : events) {
            if (auto* closed = event->As<WindowStatusEvent>()) {
                if (closed->GetState() == WindowState::Closed) {
                    running = false;
                }
            }
            
            else if (auto* keyPressed = event->As<KeyboardEvent>()) {
                if (keyPressed->IsPressed()) {
                    if (keyPressed->GetKeycode() == Keyboard::Escape) {
                        running = false;
                    }
                    else if (keyPressed->GetKeycode() == Keyboard::F1) {
                        window->Hide();
                    }
                    else if (keyPressed->GetKeycode() == Keyboard::F2) {
                        window->Show();
                    }
                }
            }
            
            else if (auto* mouseBtn = event->As<MouseInputEvent>()) {
                printf("Mouse button %d %s at (%d, %d)\n",
                       mouseBtn->GetButton(),
                       mouseBtn->GetState() == ButtonState::Pressed ? "pressed" : "released",
                       mouseBtn->GetPosition().x,
                       mouseBtn->GetPosition().y);
            }
            
            else if (auto* mouseWheel = event->As<MouseWheelEvent>()) {
                printf("Mouse wheel: %.2f\n", mouseWheel->GetDelta());
            }
        }
        
        // Render
        renderer->BeginFrame();
        renderer->Clear(maths::Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.15f, 1.0f));
        
        // Draw some shapes
        renderer->FillRect(50, 50, 100, 80, maths::Color(1.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f));
        renderer->DrawRect(50, 50, 100, 80, maths::Color(1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f));
        
        renderer->FillCircle(250, 100, 50, maths::Color(0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f));
        
        renderer->DrawLine(400, 50, 500, 150, maths::Color(1.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f));
        
        // Animated circle
        int cx = 400 + static_cast<int>(100.0f * cos(angle));
        int cy = 400 + static_cast<int>(100.0f * sin(angle));
        renderer->FillCircle(cx, cy, 20, maths::Color(1.0f, 0.5f, 0.0f));
        
        angle += 0.05f;
        
        renderer->EndFrame();
        renderer->Present();
        
        // Sleep to cap framerate (~60 FPS)
        Sleep(16);
    }
    
    // Cleanup
    renderer->Shutdown();
    window->Shutdown();
    
    delete renderer;
    delete window;
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 14. CMakeLists.txt Example

```cmake
# CMakeLists.txt
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)
project(Nkentseu2D)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# Platform detection
if(WIN32)
    add_definitions(-DNKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
elseif(UNIX AND NOT APPLE)
    add_definitions(-DNKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX)
elseif(APPLE)
    add_definitions(-DNKENTSEU_PLATFORM_MACOS)
endif()

# Core library
file(GLOB_RECURSE CORE_SOURCES
    "Core/*.cpp"
    "Core/*.h"
)

add_library(Nkentseu2DCore STATIC ${CORE_SOURCES})

target_include_directories(Nkentseu2DCore PUBLIC
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Core
)

# Platform libraries
if(WIN32)
    target_link_libraries(Nkentseu2DCore PUBLIC
        dwmapi
        user32
        gdi32
    )
endif()

# Sandbox executable
add_executable(Sandbox
    Sandbox/Main.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(Sandbox PRIVATE Nkentseu2DCore)

if(WIN32)
    set_target_properties(Sandbox PROPERTIES
        WIN32_EXECUTABLE TRUE
    )
endif()
```

## 15. LINUX PLATFORM - XCB

### Core/Window/Platform/Linux/XCBEvent.h

```cpp
// Core/Window/Platform/Linux/XCBEvent.h
#pragma once

#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX

#include <Event/EventListener.h>
#include <Event/Event.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <xcb/xcb.h>
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

class XCBWindow;

class XCBEvent : public EventListener {
public:
    static XCBEvent& UniqueInstance();
    
    void AddObserver(EventObserver observer) override;
    void RemoveObserver(const EventObserver& observer) override;
    std::vector<Event*> ProcessQueue() override;
    
    void Update();
    bool Empty();
    size_t Size();
    
    void ProcessWindowEvents(XCBWindow* window);
    
private:
    void HandleEvent(xcb_generic_event_t* event, XCBWindow* window);
    
    Keyboard::Keycode TranslateKeyCode(xcb_keycode_t keycode);
    Keyboard::Scancode TranslateScanCode(xcb_keycode_t keycode);
    ModifierState GetModifierState(uint16_t state);
    
    std::vector<Event*> m_EventQueue;
    std::vector<EventObserver> m_EventObservers;
    
    maths::Vector2i m_MousePosition;
    maths::Vector2i m_GlobalMousePosition;
    maths::Vector2i m_PreviousMousePosition;
};

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX
```

### Core/Window/Platform/Linux/XCBEvent.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Window/Platform/Linux/XCBEvent.cpp
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX

#include "XCBEvent.h"
#include "XCBWindow.h"
#include <Event/WindowEvent.h>
#include <Event/KeyboardEvent.h>
#include <Event/MouseEvent.h>
#include <xcb/xcb_icccm.h>

namespace nkentseu {

XCBEvent& XCBEvent::UniqueInstance() {
    static XCBEvent instance;
    return instance;
}

void XCBEvent::AddObserver(EventObserver observer) {
    if (!observer) return;
    
    auto it = std::find_if(m_EventObservers.begin(), m_EventObservers.end(),
        [&](const EventObserver& obs) {
            return obs.target<void(Event&)>() == observer.target<void(Event&)>();
        });
    
    if (it == m_EventObservers.end()) {
        m_EventObservers.push_back(observer);
    }
}

void XCBEvent::RemoveObserver(const EventObserver& observer) {
    if (!observer) return;
    
    auto it = std::find_if(m_EventObservers.begin(), m_EventObservers.end(),
        [&](const EventObserver& obs) {
            return obs.target<void(Event&)>() == observer.target<void(Event&)>();
        });
    
    if (it != m_EventObservers.end()) {
        m_EventObservers.erase(it);
    }
}

std::vector<Event*> XCBEvent::ProcessQueue() {
    for (auto* event : m_EventQueue) {
        delete event;
    }
    m_EventQueue.clear();
    
    Update();
    
    return m_EventQueue;
}

void XCBEvent::Update() {
    // Events are processed per-window in XCBWindow
}

bool XCBEvent::Empty() {
    return m_EventQueue.empty();
}

size_t XCBEvent::Size() {
    return m_EventQueue.size();
}

void XCBEvent::ProcessWindowEvents(XCBWindow* window) {
    if (!window || !window->GetData()->connection) return;
    
    xcb_generic_event_t* event;
    while ((event = xcb_poll_for_event(window->GetData()->connection))) {
        HandleEvent(event, window);
        free(event);
    }
}

void XCBEvent::HandleEvent(xcb_generic_event_t* event, XCBWindow* window) {
    if (!event) return;
    
    uint8_t response_type = event->response_type & ~0x80;
    
    switch (response_type) {
        case XCB_CLIENT_MESSAGE: {
            auto* cm = reinterpret_cast<xcb_client_message_event_t*>(event);
            if (cm->data.data32[0] == window->GetData()->deleteWindowAtom) {
                Event* evt = new WindowStatusEvent(window->ID(), WindowState::Closed);
                m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
                
                for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                    if (obs) obs(*evt);
                }
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case XCB_CONFIGURE_NOTIFY: {
            auto* cfg = reinterpret_cast<xcb_configure_notify_event_t*>(event);
            
            maths::Vector2u oldSize = window->GetSize();
            maths::Vector2u newSize(cfg->width, cfg->height);
            
            if (newSize != oldSize) {
                window->GetProps().size = newSize;
                
                float oldArea = oldSize.x * oldSize.y;
                float newArea = newSize.x * newSize.y;
                
                ResizeState::Code state = ResizeState::NotChange;
                if (newArea > oldArea) state = ResizeState::Expanded;
                else if (newArea < oldArea) state = ResizeState::Reduced;
                
                if (state != ResizeState::NotChange) {
                    Event* evt = new WindowResizedEvent(window->ID(), state, newSize);
                    m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
                    
                    for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                        if (obs) obs(*evt);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            maths::Vector2i pos(cfg->x, cfg->y);
            if (pos != window->GetPosition()) {
                maths::Vector2i lastPos = window->GetPosition();
                window->GetProps().position = pos;
                
                Event* evt = new WindowMovedEvent(window->ID(), pos, lastPos);
                m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
                
                for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                    if (obs) obs(*evt);
                }
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case XCB_KEY_PRESS:
        case XCB_KEY_RELEASE: {
            auto* key = reinterpret_cast<xcb_key_press_event_t*>(event);
            
            Keyboard::Keycode keycode = TranslateKeyCode(key->detail);
            Keyboard::Scancode scancode = TranslateScanCode(key->detail);
            ModifierState mods = GetModifierState(key->state);
            
            ButtonState::Code state = (response_type == XCB_KEY_PRESS) ? 
                ButtonState::Pressed : ButtonState::Released;
            
            Event* evt = new KeyboardEvent(window->ID(), state, keycode, scancode, mods);
            m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
            
            for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                if (obs) obs(*evt);
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case XCB_BUTTON_PRESS:
        case XCB_BUTTON_RELEASE: {
            auto* btn = reinterpret_cast<xcb_button_press_event_t*>(event);
            
            // Buttons 1-3 are mouse buttons, 4-5 are scroll wheel
            if (btn->detail >= 1 && btn->detail <= 3) {
                Mouse::Button button = static_cast<Mouse::Button>(btn->detail - 1);
                ButtonState::Code state = (response_type == XCB_BUTTON_PRESS) ?
                    ButtonState::Pressed : ButtonState::Released;
                
                ModifierState mods = GetModifierState(btn->state);
                maths::Vector2i pos(btn->event_x, btn->event_y);
                maths::Vector2i globalPos(btn->root_x, btn->root_y);
                
                Event* evt = new MouseInputEvent(window->ID(), state, mods, 
                    button, false, pos, globalPos);
                m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
                
                for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                    if (obs) obs(*evt);
                }
            }
            else if (btn->detail == 4 || btn->detail == 5) {
                // Scroll wheel
                float delta = (btn->detail == 4) ? 1.0f : -1.0f;
                ModifierState mods = GetModifierState(btn->state);
                maths::Vector2i pos(btn->event_x, btn->event_y);
                
                Event* evt = new MouseWheelEvent(window->ID(), 
                    Mouse::Wheels::Vertical, delta, mods, pos);
                m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
                
                for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                    if (obs) obs(*evt);
                }
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case XCB_MOTION_NOTIFY: {
            auto* motion = reinterpret_cast<xcb_motion_notify_event_t*>(event);
            
            maths::Vector2i pos(motion->event_x, motion->event_y);
            maths::Vector2i globalPos(motion->root_x, motion->root_y);
            maths::Vector2i delta = pos - m_PreviousMousePosition;
            
            m_PreviousMousePosition = pos;
            m_MousePosition = pos;
            m_GlobalMousePosition = globalPos;
            
            Event* evt = new MouseMovedEvent(window->ID(), pos, globalPos, delta);
            m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
            
            for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                if (obs) obs(*evt);
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case XCB_ENTER_NOTIFY: {
            auto* enter = reinterpret_cast<xcb_enter_notify_event_t*>(event);
            maths::Vector2i pos(enter->event_x, enter->event_y);
            
            Event* evt = new MouseWindowEvent(window->ID(), RegionState::Entered, pos);
            m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
            
            for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                if (obs) obs(*evt);
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case XCB_LEAVE_NOTIFY: {
            auto* leave = reinterpret_cast<xcb_leave_notify_event_t*>(event);
            maths::Vector2i pos(leave->event_x, leave->event_y);
            
            Event* evt = new MouseWindowEvent(window->ID(), RegionState::Exited, pos);
            m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
            
            for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                if (obs) obs(*evt);
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case XCB_FOCUS_IN: {
            Event* evt = new WindowFocusedEvent(window->ID(), FocusState::Focused);
            m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
            
            for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                if (obs) obs(*evt);
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case XCB_FOCUS_OUT: {
            Event* evt = new WindowFocusedEvent(window->ID(), FocusState::Unfocused);
            m_EventQueue.push_back(evt);
            
            for (auto& obs : m_EventObservers) {
                if (obs) obs(*evt);
            }
            break;
        }
    }
}

Keyboard::Keycode XCBEvent::TranslateKeyCode(xcb_keycode_t keycode) {
    // XCB keycodes are hardware-dependent
    // For proper translation, use XKB extension
    // This is a simplified mapping
    
    if (keycode >= 10 && keycode <= 19)
        return static_cast<Keyboard::Keycode>(
            static_cast<int>(Keyboard::Num0) + (keycode - 10));
    
    if (keycode >= 24 && keycode <= 33)
        return static_cast<Keyboard::Keycode>(
            static_cast<int>(Keyboard::A) + (keycode - 24));
    
    switch (keycode) {
        case 9: return Keyboard::Escape;
        case 36: return Keyboard::Enter;
        case 23: return Keyboard::Tab;
        case 22: return Keyboard::Backspace;
        case 119: return Keyboard::Delete;
        case 110: return Keyboard::Home;
        case 115: return Keyboard::End;
        case 112: return Keyboard::PageUp;
        case 117: return Keyboard::PageDown;
        case 113: return Keyboard::Left;
        case 114: return Keyboard::Right;
        case 111: return Keyboard::Up;
        case 116: return Keyboard::Down;
        case 65: return Keyboard::Space;
        case 50: return Keyboard::ShiftLeft;
        case 62: return Keyboard::ShiftRight;
        case 37: return Keyboard::ControlLeft;
        case 105: return Keyboard::ControlRight;
        case 64: return Keyboard::AltLeft;
        case 108: return Keyboard::AltRight;
        case 133: return Keyboard::SuperLeft;
        case 134: return Keyboard::SuperRight;
        default: return Keyboard::NotDefine;
    }
}

Keyboard::Scancode XCBEvent::TranslateScanCode(xcb_keycode_t keycode) {
    return static_cast<Keyboard::Scancode>(keycode);
}

ModifierState XCBEvent::GetModifierState(uint16_t state) {
    return ModifierState(
        (state & XCB_MOD_MASK_CONTROL) != 0,
        (state & XCB_MOD_MASK_1) != 0, // Alt
        (state & XCB_MOD_MASK_SHIFT) != 0,
        (state & XCB_MOD_MASK_4) != 0  // Super
    );
}

} // namespace nkentseu

void ProcessNativePlatformEvents() {
    // Processed per-window in XCB
}

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX
```

### Core/Window/Platform/Linux/XCBWindow.h

```cpp
// Core/Window/Platform/Linux/XCBWindow.h
#pragma once

#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX

#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Window/WindowProperties.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Memory.h>
#include <xcb/xcb.h>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

struct XCBWindowData {
    xcb_connection_t* connection = nullptr;
    xcb_window_t window = 0;
    xcb_screen_t* screen = nullptr;
    xcb_gcontext_t gc = 0;
    xcb_atom_t deleteWindowAtom = 0;
    bool isMouseInside = false;
};

class XCBWindow : public Window {
public:
    XCBWindow(const WindowProperties& properties);
    ~XCBWindow() override;
    
    bool Initialize() override;
    void Shutdown() override;
    
    std::string GetTitle() const override;
    void SetTitle(const std::string& title) override;
    
    maths::Vector2i GetPosition() const override;
    void SetPosition(int32 x, int32 y) override;
    void SetPosition(const maths::Vector2i& pos) override;
    
    maths::Vector2u GetSize() override;
    void SetSize(uint32 width, uint32 height) override;
    void SetSize(const maths::Vector2u& size) override;
    
    float GetDpiScale() const override;
    maths::Vector2f ConvertPixelToDpi(const maths::Vector2f& pixel) const override;
    
    void Show() override;
    void Hide() override;
    void Minimize() override;
    void Maximize() override;
    
    bool IsOpen() override;
    bool IsClosed() override;
    void Close() override;
    
    void ShowMouse(bool show) override;
    void ConfineMouse(bool confine) override;
    bool IsMouseInside() override;
    
    maths::Color GetBackgroundColor() override;
    void SetBackgroundColor(const maths::Color& color) override;
    
    void Clear(const maths::Color& color) override;
    void SwapBuffers() override;
    
    Renderer* CreateRenderer() override;
    
    void SetIcon(const maths::Vector2u& size, const uint8* pixels) override;
    void SetAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) override;
    void SetOpacity(float opacity) override;
    
    uint64 ID() override { return m_WindowID; }
    
    const WindowProperties& GetProperties() override { return m_Properties; }
    WindowProperties& GetProps() { return m_Properties; }
    XCBWindowData* GetData() { return m_Data.get(); }
    
    static XCBWindow* GetCurrent(xcb_window_t window);
    
private:
    bool CreateXCBWindow();
    
    Memory::Shared<XCBWindowData> m_Data;
    WindowProperties m_Properties;
    
    bool m_IsWindowCreated = false;
    bool m_IsWindowClosed = true;
    
    static uint64 s_WindowIDCounter;
    uint64 m_WindowID;
    
    static std::unordered_map<xcb_window_t, XCBWindow*> s_WindowMap;
};

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX
```

### Core/Window/Platform/Linux/XCBWindow.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Window/Platform/Linux/XCBWindow.cpp
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX

#include "XCBWindow.h"
#include "XCBEvent.h"
#include <Renderer/SoftwareRenderer.h>
#include <xcb/xcb_icccm.h>

namespace nkentseu {

uint64 XCBWindow::s_WindowIDCounter = 1;
std::unordered_map<xcb_window_t, XCBWindow*> XCBWindow::s_WindowMap;

XCBWindow::XCBWindow(const WindowProperties& properties)
    : m_Properties(properties)
    , m_WindowID(s_WindowIDCounter++)
{
    m_Data = Memory::CreateShared<XCBWindowData>();
}

XCBWindow::~XCBWindow() {
    Shutdown();
}

bool XCBWindow::Initialize() {
    if (m_IsWindowCreated) return true;
    
    if (!CreateXCBWindow()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    m_IsWindowCreated = true;
    m_IsWindowClosed = false;
    
    s_WindowMap[m_Data->window] = this;
    
    return true;
}

void XCBWindow::Shutdown() {
    if (!m_IsWindowCreated) return;
    
    if (m_Data->window) {
        s_WindowMap.erase(m_Data->window);
    }
    
    if (m_Data->connection) {
        if (m_Data->gc) {
            xcb_free_gc(m_Data->connection, m_Data->gc);
            m_Data->gc = 0;
        }
        
        if (m_Data->window) {
            xcb_destroy_window(m_Data->connection, m_Data->window);
            m_Data->window = 0;
        }
        
        xcb_disconnect(m_Data->connection);
        m_Data->connection = nullptr;
    }
    
    m_IsWindowCreated = false;
    m_IsWindowClosed = true;
}

bool XCBWindow::CreateXCBWindow() {
    m_Data->connection = xcb_connect(nullptr, nullptr);
    
    if (xcb_connection_has_error(m_Data->connection)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    const xcb_setup_t* setup = xcb_get_setup(m_Data->connection);
    xcb_screen_iterator_t iter = xcb_setup_roots_iterator(setup);
    m_Data->screen = iter.data;
    
    m_Data->window = xcb_generate_id(m_Data->connection);
    
    uint32_t mask = XCB_CW_BACK_PIXEL | XCB_CW_EVENT_MASK;
    uint32_t values[2] = {
        m_Data->screen->white_pixel,
        XCB_EVENT_MASK_EXPOSURE | XCB_EVENT_MASK_KEY_PRESS | 
        XCB_EVENT_MASK_KEY_RELEASE | XCB_EVENT_MASK_BUTTON_PRESS |
        XCB_EVENT_MASK_BUTTON_RELEASE | XCB_EVENT_MASK_POINTER_MOTION |
        XCB_EVENT_MASK_STRUCTURE_NOTIFY | XCB_EVENT_MASK_FOCUS_CHANGE |
        XCB_EVENT_MASK_ENTER_WINDOW | XCB_EVENT_MASK_LEAVE_WINDOW
    };
    
    xcb_create_window(
        m_Data->connection,
        XCB_COPY_FROM_PARENT,
        m_Data->window,
        m_Data->screen->root,
        m_Properties.position.x,
        m_Properties.position.y,
        m_Properties.size.x,
        m_Properties.size.y,
        1,
        XCB_WINDOW_CLASS_INPUT_OUTPUT,
        m_Data->screen->root_visual,
        mask,
        values
    );
    
    // Set title
    xcb_change_property(
        m_Data->connection,
        XCB_PROP_MODE_REPLACE,
        m_Data->window,
        XCB_ATOM_WM_NAME,
        XCB_ATOM_STRING,
        8,
        m_Properties.title.length(),
        m_Properties.title.c_str()
    );
    
    // WM_DELETE_WINDOW protocol
    xcb_intern_atom_cookie_t cookie = xcb_intern_atom(
        m_Data->connection, 1, 12, "WM_PROTOCOLS");
    xcb_intern_atom_reply_t* reply = xcb_intern_atom_reply(
        m_Data->connection, cookie, nullptr);
    
    xcb_intern_atom_cookie_t cookie2 = xcb_intern_atom(
        m_Data->connection, 0, 16, "WM_DELETE_WINDOW");
    xcb_intern_atom_reply_t* reply2 = xcb_intern_atom_reply(
        m_Data->connection, cookie2, nullptr);
    
    m_Data->deleteWindowAtom = reply2->atom;
    
    xcb_change_property(
        m_Data->connection,
        XCB_PROP_MODE_REPLACE,
        m_Data->window,
        reply->atom,
        4, 32, 1,
        &reply2->atom
    );
    
    free(reply);
    free(reply2);
    
    // Create GC
    m_Data->gc = xcb_generate_id(m_Data->connection);
    xcb_create_gc(m_Data->connection, m_Data->gc, m_Data->window, 0, nullptr);
    
    xcb_flush(m_Data->connection);
    
    return true;
}

XCBWindow* XCBWindow::GetCurrent(xcb_window_t window) {
    auto it = s_WindowMap.find(window);
    if (it != s_WindowMap.end()) {
        return it->second;
    }
    return nullptr;
}

std::string XCBWindow::GetTitle() const {
    return m_Properties.title;
}

void XCBWindow::SetTitle(const std::string& title) {
    m_Properties.title = title;
    
    if (m_Data->connection && m_Data->window) {
        xcb_change_property(
            m_Data->connection,
            XCB_PROP_MODE_REPLACE,
            m_Data->window,
            XCB_ATOM_WM_NAME,
            XCB_ATOM_STRING,
            8,
            title.length(),
            title.c_str()
        );
        xcb_flush(m_Data->connection);
    }
}

maths::Vector2i XCBWindow::GetPosition() const {
    return m_Properties.position;
}

void XCBWindow::SetPosition(int32 x, int32 y) {
    SetPosition(maths::Vector2i(x, y));
}

void XCBWindow::SetPosition(const maths::Vector2i& pos) {
    m_Properties.position = pos;
    
    if (m_Data->connection && m_Data->window) {
        uint32_t values[] = { static_cast<uint32_t>(pos.x), static_cast<uint32_t>(pos.y) };
        xcb_configure_window(
            m_Data->connection,
            m_Data->window,
            XCB_CONFIG_WINDOW_X | XCB_CONFIG_WINDOW_Y,
            values
        );
        xcb_flush(m_Data->connection);
    }
}

maths::Vector2u XCBWindow::GetSize() {
    return m_Properties.size;
}

void XCBWindow::SetSize(uint32 width, uint32 height) {
    SetSize(maths::Vector2u(width, height));
}

void XCBWindow::SetSize(const maths::Vector2u& size) {
    m_Properties.size = size;
    
    if (m_Data->connection && m_Data->window) {
        uint32_t values[] = { size.x, size.y };
        xcb_configure_window(
            m_Data->connection,
            m_Data->window,
            XCB_CONFIG_WINDOW_WIDTH | XCB_CONFIG_WINDOW_HEIGHT,
            values
        );
        xcb_flush(m_Data->connection);
    }
}

float XCBWindow::GetDpiScale() const {
    // TODO: Implement DPI detection for X11
    return 1.0f;
}

maths::Vector2f XCBWindow::ConvertPixelToDpi(const maths::Vector2f& pixel) const {
    return pixel;
}

void XCBWindow::Show() {
    if (m_Data->connection && m_Data->window) {
        xcb_map_window(m_Data->connection, m_Data->window);
        xcb_flush(m_Data->connection);
        m_Properties.visible = true;
    }
}

void XCBWindow::Hide() {
    if (m_Data->connection && m_Data->window) {
        xcb_unmap_window(m_Data->connection, m_Data->window);
        xcb_flush(m_Data->connection);
        m_Properties.visible = false;
    }
}

void XCBWindow::Minimize() {
    // TODO: Implement using _NET_WM_STATE
}

void XCBWindow::Maximize() {
    // TODO: Implement using _NET_WM_STATE
}

bool XCBWindow::IsOpen() {
    return m_IsWindowCreated && !m_IsWindowClosed;
}

bool XCBWindow::IsClosed() {
    return m_IsWindowClosed;
}

void XCBWindow::Close() {
    m_IsWindowClosed = true;
}

void XCBWindow::ShowMouse(bool show) {
    // TODO: Implement cursor visibility
}

void XCBWindow::ConfineMouse(bool confine) {
    // TODO: Implement cursor confinement using xcb_grab_pointer
}

bool XCBWindow::IsMouseInside() {
    return m_Data->isMouseInside;
}

maths::Color XCBWindow::GetBackgroundColor() {
    return m_Properties.backgroundColor;
}

void XCBWindow::SetBackgroundColor(const maths::Color& color) {
    m_Properties.backgroundColor = color;
}

void XCBWindow::Clear(const maths::Color& color) {
    if (!m_Data->connection || !m_Data->window) return;
    
    uint32_t pixel = (static_cast<uint32_t>(color.r * 255) << 16) |
                     (static_cast<uint32_t>(color.g * 255) << 8) |
                     (static_cast<uint32_t>(color.b * 255));
    
    xcb_change_gc(m_Data->connection, m_Data->gc, XCB_GC_FOREGROUND, &pixel);
    
    xcb_rectangle_t rect = { 0, 0, 
        static_cast<uint16_t>(m_Properties.size.x), 
        static_cast<uint16_t>(m_Properties.size.y) };
    
    xcb_poly_fill_rectangle(m_Data->connection, m_Data->window, m_Data->gc, 1, &rect);
    xcb_flush(m_Data->connection);
}

void XCBWindow::SwapBuffers() {
    if (m_Data->connection) {
        xcb_flush(m_Data->connection);
    }
}

Renderer* XCBWindow::CreateRenderer() {
    return new SoftwareRenderer();
}

void XCBWindow::SetIcon(const maths::Vector2u& size, const uint8* pixels) {
    // TODO: Implement using _NET_WM_ICON
}

void XCBWindow::SetAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) {
    // TODO: Implement using _NET_WM_STATE_ABOVE
}

void XCBWindow::SetOpacity(float opacity) {
    // TODO: Implement using _NET_WM_WINDOW_OPACITY
}

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_LINUX
```
