```cpp
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include "../../AudioEngine.h"
#include <xaudio2.h>

namespace nkentseu {

class WindowsAudioClip : public AudioClip {
public:
    WindowsAudioClip();
    ~WindowsAudioClip() override;
    
    bool LoadFromFile(const std::string& filepath) override;
    bool LoadFromMemory(const void* data, uint32 size) override;
    
    const AudioClipData& GetData() const override { return m_Data; }
    float GetDuration() const override;
    
    WAVEFORMATEX GetWaveFormat() const;
    
private:
    bool LoadWAV(const std::string& filepath);
    bool LoadMP3(const std::string& filepath);
    bool LoadOGG(const std::string& filepath);
    
    AudioClipData m_Data;
};

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

### Core/Audio/Platform/Windows/WindowsAudioClip.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Audio/Platform/Windows/WindowsAudioClip.cpp
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include "WindowsAudioClip.h"
#include <fstream>
#include <cstring>

namespace nkentseu {

#pragma pack(push, 1)
struct WAVHeader {
    char riff[4];           // "RIFF"
    uint32 fileSize;
    char wave[4];           // "WAVE"
    char fmt[4];            // "fmt "
    uint32 fmtSize;
    uint16 audioFormat;
    uint16 numChannels;
    uint32 sampleRate;
    uint32 byteRate;
    uint16 blockAlign;
    uint16 bitsPerSample;
    char data[4];           // "data"
    uint32 dataSize;
};
#pragma pack(pop)

WindowsAudioClip::WindowsAudioClip() {
}

WindowsAudioClip::~WindowsAudioClip() {
    if (m_Data.data) {
        delete[] m_Data.data;
        m_Data.data = nullptr;
    }
}

bool WindowsAudioClip::LoadFromFile(const std::string& filepath) {
    // Determine format from extension
    size_t dotPos = filepath.find_last_of('.');
    if (dotPos == std::string::npos) {
        printf("Cannot determine audio format from file: %s\n", filepath.c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    std::string extension = filepath.substr(dotPos + 1);
    
    if (extension == "wav" || extension == "WAV") {
        return LoadWAV(filepath);
    }
    else if (extension == "mp3" || extension == "MP3") {
        return LoadMP3(filepath);
    }
    else if (extension == "ogg" || extension == "OGG") {
        return LoadOGG(filepath);
    }
    
    printf("Unsupported audio format: %s\n", extension.c_str());
    return false;
}

bool WindowsAudioClip::LoadFromMemory(const void* data, uint32 size) {
    // TODO: Implement
    return false;
}

float WindowsAudioClip::GetDuration() const {
    if (m_Data.sampleRate == 0 || m_Data.channels == 0 || m_Data.bitsPerSample == 0) {
        return 0.0f;
    }
    
    uint32 bytesPerSample = m_Data.bitsPerSample / 8;
    uint32 totalSamples = m_Data.size / (bytesPerSample * m_Data.channels);
    return static_cast<float>(totalSamples) / static_cast<float>(m_Data.sampleRate);
}

WAVEFORMATEX WindowsAudioClip::GetWaveFormat() const {
    WAVEFORMATEX wfx = {};
    wfx.wFormatTag = WAVE_FORMAT_PCM;
    wfx.nChannels = m_Data.channels;
    wfx.nSamplesPerSec = m_Data.sampleRate;
    wfx.wBitsPerSample = m_Data.bitsPerSample;
    wfx.nBlockAlign = (wfx.nChannels * wfx.wBitsPerSample) / 8;
    wfx.nAvgBytesPerSec = wfx.nSamplesPerSec * wfx.nBlockAlign;
    wfx.cbSize = 0;
    return wfx;
}

bool WindowsAudioClip::LoadWAV(const std::string& filepath) {
    std::ifstream file(filepath, std::ios::binary);
    if (!file.is_open()) {
        printf("Failed to open WAV file: %s\n", filepath.c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    // Read header
    WAVHeader header;
    file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&header), sizeof(WAVHeader));
    
    if (std::strncmp(header.riff, "RIFF", 4) != 0 || 
        std::strncmp(header.wave, "WAVE", 4) != 0) {
        printf("Invalid WAV file: %s\n", filepath.c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    // Store format info
    m_Data.format = AudioFormat::WAV;
    m_Data.channels = header.numChannels;
    m_Data.sampleRate = header.sampleRate;
    m_Data.bitsPerSample = header.bitsPerSample;
    m_Data.size = header.dataSize;
    
    // Allocate and read data
    m_Data.data = new uint8[m_Data.size];
    file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(m_Data.data), m_Data.size);
    
    file.close();
    
    printf("Loaded WAV: %s\n", filepath.c_str());
    printf("  Channels: %d\n", m_Data.channels);
    printf("  Sample Rate: %d\n", m_Data.sampleRate);
    printf("  Bits Per Sample: %d\n", m_Data.bitsPerSample);
    printf("  Duration: %.2f seconds\n", GetDuration());
    
    return true;
}

bool WindowsAudioClip::LoadMP3(const std::string& filepath) {
    // TODO: Implement MP3 decoding using Media Foundation or minimp3
    printf("MP3 loading not yet implemented\n");
    return false;
}

bool WindowsAudioClip::LoadOGG(const std::string& filepath) {
    // TODO: Implement OGG decoding using stb_vorbis
    printf("OGG loading not yet implemented\n");
    return false;
}

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

### Core/Audio/Platform/Windows/WindowsAudioSource.h

```cpp
// Core/Audio/Platform/Windows/WindowsAudioSource.h
#pragma once

#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include "../../AudioEngine.h"
#include "WindowsAudioClip.h"
#include <xaudio2.h>
#include <x3daudio.h>

namespace nkentseu {

class WindowsAudioSource : public AudioSource, public IXAudio2VoiceCallback {
public:
    WindowsAudioSource();
    ~WindowsAudioSource() override;
    
    void SetClip(AudioClip* clip) override;
    AudioClip* GetClip() const override { return m_Clip; }
    
    void Play() override;
    void Pause() override;
    void Stop() override;
    
    bool IsPlaying() const override;
    bool IsPaused() const override;
    
    void SetVolume(float volume) override;
    float GetVolume() const override { return m_Properties.volume; }
    
    void SetPitch(float pitch) override;
    float GetPitch() const override { return m_Properties.pitch; }
    
    void SetPan(float pan) override;
    float GetPan() const override { return m_Properties.pan; }
    
    void SetLooping(bool looping) override;
    bool IsLooping() const override { return m_Properties.looping; }
    
    void SetPosition(const maths::Vector3f& position) override;
    maths::Vector3f GetPosition() const override { return m_Properties.position; }
    
    void SetSpatial(bool spatial) override;
    bool IsSpatial() const override { return m_Properties.spatial; }
    
    void SetPlaybackPosition(float seconds) override;
    float GetPlaybackPosition() const override;
    
    AudioState GetState() const override { return m_State; }
    
    void Update3D();
    
    // IXAudio2VoiceCallback
    void STDMETHODCALLTYPE OnVoiceProcessingPassStart(UINT32 BytesRequired) override {}
    void STDMETHODCALLTYPE OnVoiceProcessingPassEnd() override {}
    void STDMETHODCALLTYPE OnStreamEnd() override;
    void STDMETHODCALLTYPE OnBufferStart(void* pBufferContext) override {}
    void STDMETHODCALLTYPE OnBufferEnd(void* pBufferContext) override;
    void STDMETHODCALLTYPE OnLoopEnd(void* pBufferContext) override {}
    void STDMETHODCALLTYPE OnVoiceError(void* pBufferContext, HRESULT Error) override {}
    
private:
    bool CreateVoice();
    void DestroyVoice();
    
    WindowsAudioClip* m_Clip = nullptr;
    IXAudio2SourceVoice* m_SourceVoice = nullptr;
    
    AudioSourceProperties m_Properties;
    AudioState m_State = AudioState::Stopped;
    
    X3DAUDIO_EMITTER m_Emitter = {};
    X3DAUDIO_DSP_SETTINGS m_DSPSettings = {};
    float m_MatrixCoefficients[8] = {};
};

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

### Core/Audio/Platform/Windows/WindowsAudioSource.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Audio/Platform/Windows/WindowsAudioSource.cpp
#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS

#include "WindowsAudioSource.h"
#include "WindowsAudioEngine.h"
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

WindowsAudioSource::WindowsAudioSource() {
    WindowsAudioEngine::RegisterSource(this);
    
    // Initialize emitter
    m_Emitter.ChannelCount = 1;
    m_Emitter.CurveDistanceScaler = 1.0f;
    m_Emitter.DopplerScaler = 1.0f;
    
    // Initialize DSP settings
    m_DSPSettings.SrcChannelCount = 1;
    m_DSPSettings.DstChannelCount = 2;
    m_DSPSettings.pMatrixCoefficients = m_MatrixCoefficients;
}

WindowsAudioSource::~WindowsAudioSource() {
    WindowsAudioEngine::UnregisterSource(this);
    DestroyVoice();
}

void WindowsAudioSource::SetClip(AudioClip* clip) {
    Stop();
    
    m_Clip = dynamic_cast<WindowsAudioClip*>(clip);
    
    if (m_Clip) {
        CreateVoice();
    }
}

void WindowsAudioSource::Play() {
    if (!m_SourceVoice || !m_Clip) return;
    
    if (m_State == AudioState::Paused) {
        m_SourceVoice->Start(0);
        m_State = AudioState::Playing;
        return;
    }
    
    if (m_State == AudioState::Playing) {
        return;
    }
    
    // Submit buffer
    XAUDIO2_BUFFER buffer = {};
    buffer.AudioBytes = m_Clip->GetData().size;
    buffer.pAudioData = m_Clip->GetData().data;
    buffer.Flags = XAUDIO2_END_OF_STREAM;
    
    if (m_Properties.looping) {
        buffer.LoopCount = XAUDIO2_LOOP_INFINITE;
    }
    
    m_SourceVoice->SubmitSourceBuffer(&buffer);
    m_SourceVoice->Start(0);
    
    m_State = AudioState::Playing;
}

void WindowsAudioSource::Pause() {
    if (!m_SourceVoice || m_State != AudioState::Playing) return;
    
    m_SourceVoice->Stop(0);
    m_State = AudioState::Paused;
}

void WindowsAudioSource::Stop() {
    if (!m_SourceVoice) return;
    
    m_SourceVoice->Stop(0);
    m_SourceVoice->FlushSourceBuffers();
    m_State = AudioState::Stopped;
}

bool WindowsAudioSource::IsPlaying() const {
    return m_State == AudioState::Playing;
}

bool WindowsAudioSource::IsPaused() const {
    return m_State == AudioState::Paused;
}

void WindowsAudioSource::SetVolume(float volume) {
    m_Properties.volume = std::clamp(volume, 0.0f, 1.0f);
    
    if (m_SourceVoice) {
        m_SourceVoice->SetVolume(m_Properties.volume);
    }
}

void WindowsAudioSource::SetPitch(float pitch) {
    m_Properties.pitch = std::clamp(pitch, 0.5f, 2.0f);
    
    if (m_SourceVoice) {
        m_SourceVoice->SetFrequencyRatio(m_Properties.pitch);
    }
}

void WindowsAudioSource::SetPan(float pan) {
    m_Properties.pan = std::clamp(pan, -1.0f, 1.0f);
    
    if (m_SourceVoice && !m_Properties.spatial) {
        // Manual stereo panning
        float left = 1.0f - std::max(0.0f, m_Properties.pan);
        float right = 1.0f + std::min(0.0f, m_Properties.pan);
        
        float outputMatrix[4] = { left, right, left, right };
        m_SourceVoice->SetOutputMatrix(nullptr, 2, 2, outputMatrix);
    }
}

void WindowsAudioSource::SetLooping(bool looping) {
    m_Properties.looping = looping;
}

void WindowsAudioSource::SetPosition(const maths::Vector3f& position) {
    m_Properties.position = position;
    
    m_Emitter.Position.x = position.x;
    m_Emitter.Position.y = position.y;
    m_Emitter.Position.z = position.z;
}

void WindowsAudioSource::SetSpatial(bool spatial) {
    m_Properties.spatial = spatial;
}

void WindowsAudioSource::SetPlaybackPosition(float seconds) {
    // TODO: Implement seeking
}

float WindowsAudioSource::GetPlaybackPosition() const {
    if (!m_SourceVoice) return 0.0f;
    
    XAUDIO2_VOICE_STATE state;
    m_SourceVoice->GetState(&state);
    
    if (!m_Clip) return 0.0f;
    
    const auto& data = m_Clip->GetData();
    uint32 bytesPerSample = data.bitsPerSample / 8;
    uint32 totalSamples = data.size / (bytesPerSample * data.channels);
    
    float position = static_cast<float>(state.SamplesPlayed % totalSamples) / 
                     static_cast<float>(data.sampleRate);
    
    return position;
}

void WindowsAudioSource::Update3D() {
    if (!m_SourceVoice || !m_Properties.spatial) return;
    
    auto listener = WindowsAudioEngine::GetListener();
    
    X3DAUDIO_LISTENER x3dListener = {};
    x3dListener.Position.x = listener.position.x;
    x3dListener.Position.y = listener.position.y;
    x3dListener.Position.z = listener.position.z;
    x3dListener.OrientFront.x = listener.forward.x;
    x3dListener.OrientFront.y = listener.forward.y;
    x3dListener.OrientFront.z = listener.forward.z;
    x3dListener.OrientTop.x = listener.up.x;
    x3dListener.OrientTop.y = listener.up.y;
    x3dListener.OrientTop.z = listener.up.z;
    
    X3DAudioCalculate(
        WindowsAudioEngine::GetX3DAudio(),
        &x3dListener,
        &m_Emitter,
        X3DAUDIO_CALCULATE_MATRIX | X3DAUDIO_CALCULATE_DOPPLER,
        &m_DSPSettings
    );
    
    m_SourceVoice->SetOutputMatrix(nullptr, 1, 2, m_DSPSettings.pMatrixCoefficients);
    m_SourceVoice->SetFrequencyRatio(m_DSPSettings.DopplerFactor * m_Properties.pitch);
}

void WindowsAudioSource::OnStreamEnd() {
    if (!m_Properties.looping) {
        m_State = AudioState::Stopped;
    }
}

void WindowsAudioSource::OnBufferEnd(void* pBufferContext) {
    // Buffer finished playing
}

bool WindowsAudioSource::CreateVoice() {
    if (!m_Clip) return false;
    
    DestroyVoice();
    
    WAVEFORMATEX wfx = m_Clip->GetWaveFormat();
    
    HRESULT hr = WindowsAudioEngine::GetXAudio2()->CreateSourceVoice(
        &m_SourceVoice,
        &wfx,
        0,
        XAUDIO2_DEFAULT_FREQ_RATIO,
        this
    );
    
    if (FAILED(hr)) {
        printf("Failed to create source voice\n");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Apply properties
    SetVolume(m_Properties.volume);
    SetPitch(m_Properties.pitch);
    if (!m_Properties.spatial) {
        SetPan(m_Properties.pan);
    }
    
    return true;
}

void WindowsAudioSource::DestroyVoice() {
    if (m_SourceVoice) {
        m_SourceVoice->Stop(0);
        m_SourceVoice->DestroyVoice();
        m_SourceVoice = nullptr;
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu

#endif // NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
```

---

## 45. AUDIO EXEMPLE D'UTILISATION

### Sandbox/AudioDemo.cpp

```cpp
// Sandbox/AudioDemo.cpp
#include <Audio/AudioEngine.h>
#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Event/EventListener.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Sleep.h>

using namespace nkentseu;

int main() {
    // Initialize audio
    if (!AudioEngine::Init()) {
        printf("Failed to initialize audio engine\n");
        return 1;
    }
    
    // Load audio clips
    AudioClip* musicClip = AudioClip::Create();
    if (!musicClip->LoadFromFile("Assets/Audio/music.wav")) {
        printf("Failed to load music.wav\n");
        delete musicClip;
        AudioEngine::Shutdown();
        return 1;
    }
    
    AudioClip* sfxClip = AudioClip::Create();
    if (!sfxClip->LoadFromFile("Assets/Audio/explosion.wav")) {
        printf("Failed to load explosion.wav\n");
        delete musicClip;
        delete sfxClip;
        AudioEngine::Shutdown();
        return 1;
    }
    
    // Create audio sources
    AudioSource* musicSource = AudioSource::Create();
    musicSource->SetClip(musicClip);
    musicSource->SetVolume(0.5f);
    musicSource->SetLooping(true);
    musicSource->Play();
    
    AudioSource* sfxSource = AudioSource::Create();
    sfxSource->SetClip(sfxClip);
    sfxSource->SetVolume(0.8f);
    
    // Create 3D spatial source
    AudioSource* spatialSource = AudioSource::Create();
    spatialSource->SetClip(sfxClip);
    spatialSource->SetSpatial(true);
    spatialSource->SetPosition({ 5.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f });
    spatialSource->SetLooping(true);
    
    printf("Audio Demo Started\n");
    printf("Press:\n");
    printf("  1 - Play SFX\n");
    printf("  2 - Play 3D sound\n");
    printf("  3 - Pause music\n");
    printf("  4 - Resume music\n");
    printf("  5 - Stop all\n");
    printf("  ESC - Quit\n");
    
    bool running = true;
    
    while (running) {
        AudioEngine::Update();
        
        // Simple keyboard input simulation
        if (GetAsyncKeyState('1') & 0x8000) {
            sfxSource->Stop();
            sfxSource->Play();
            SleepMilli(200);
        }
        
        if (GetAsyncKeyState('2') & 0x8000) {
            if (!spatialSource->IsPlaying()) {
                spatialSource->Play();
            }
            SleepMilli(200);
        }
        
        if (GetAsyncKeyState('3') & 0x8000) {
            musicSource->Pause();
            SleepMilli(200);
        }
        
        if (GetAsyncKeyState('4') & 0x8000) {
            musicSource->Play();
            SleepMilli(200);
        }
        
        if (GetAsyncKeyState('5') & 0x8000) {
            AudioEngine::StopAll();
            SleepMilli(200);
        }
        
        if (GetAsyncKeyState(VK_ESCAPE) & 0x8000) {
            running = false;
        }
        
        // Move listener for 3D audio demo
        static float listenerX = 0.0f;
        if (GetAsyncKeyState(VK_LEFT) & 0x8000) {
            listenerX -= 0.1f;
        }
        if (GetAsyncKeyState(VK_RIGHT) & 0x8000) {
            listenerX += 0.1f;
        }
        
        AudioListenerProperties listener;
        listener.position = { listenerX, 0.0f, 0.0f };
        listener.forward = { 0.0f, 0.0f, -1.0f };
        listener.up = { 0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f };
        AudioEngine::SetListener(listener);
        
        SleepMilli(16); // ~60 FPS
    }
    
    // Cleanup
    delete spatialSource;
    delete sfxSource;
    delete musicSource;
    delete sfxClip;
    delete musicClip;
    
    AudioEngine::Shutdown();
    
    return 0;
}
```

Je continue avec le système d'images (Image Loading/Processing) dans le prochain message...

# Suite - Font System (From Scratch avec FreeType)

---

## 47. FONT SYSTEM - TrueType/OpenType Rendering

### Core/Font/Font.h

```cpp
// Core/Font/Font.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Color.h>
#include <Renderer/Texture.h>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

struct Glyph {
    uint32 character;
    maths::Vector2f size;
    maths::Vector2f bearing;
    float advance;
    maths::Vector2f texCoordMin;
    maths::Vector2f texCoordMax;
};

struct FontAtlas {
    Texture2D* texture = nullptr;
    uint32 width = 0;
    uint32 height = 0;
};

enum class TextAlignment {
    Left,
    Center,
    Right
};

struct TextMetrics {
    float width;
    float height;
    float ascent;
    float descent;
    float lineHeight;
};

class Font {
public:
    virtual ~Font() = default;
    
    virtual bool LoadFromFile(const std::string& filepath, uint32 fontSize) = 0;
    virtual bool LoadFromMemory(const void* data, uint32 size, uint32 fontSize) = 0;
    
    virtual const Glyph* GetGlyph(uint32 character) const = 0;
    virtual FontAtlas* GetAtlas() const = 0;
    
    virtual uint32 GetFontSize() const = 0;
    virtual float GetLineHeight() const = 0;
    virtual float GetAscent() const = 0;
    virtual float GetDescent() const = 0;
    
    virtual TextMetrics MeasureText(const std::string& text, float scale = 1.0f) const = 0;
    virtual TextMetrics MeasureText(const std::wstring& text, float scale = 1.0f) const = 0;
    
    static Font* Create();
};

class FontLibrary {
public:
    static bool Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    
    static Font* Load(const std::string& name, const std::string& filepath, uint32 fontSize);
    static Font* Get(const std::string& name);
    
    static void Add(const std::string& name, Font* font);
    static void Remove(const std::string& name);
    
    static bool Has(const std::string& name);
    
private:
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, Font*> s_Fonts;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Font/Font.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Font/Font.cpp
#include "Font.h"
#include "FreeTypeFont.h"

namespace nkentseu {

Font* Font::Create() {
    return new FreeTypeFont();
}

std::unordered_map<std::string, Font*> FontLibrary::s_Fonts;

bool FontLibrary::Init() {
    return FreeTypeFont::InitLibrary();
}

void FontLibrary::Shutdown() {
    for (auto& pair : s_Fonts) {
        delete pair.second;
    }
    s_Fonts.clear();
    
    FreeTypeFont::ShutdownLibrary();
}

Font* FontLibrary::Load(const std::string& name, const std::string& filepath, uint32 fontSize) {
    if (Has(name)) {
        return Get(name);
    }
    
    Font* font = Font::Create();
    if (font->LoadFromFile(filepath, fontSize)) {
        Add(name, font);
        return font;
    }
    
    delete font;
    return nullptr;
}

Font* FontLibrary::Get(const std::string& name) {
    auto it = s_Fonts.find(name);
    if (it != s_Fonts.end()) {
        return it->second;
    }
    return nullptr;
}

void FontLibrary::Add(const std::string& name, Font* font) {
    s_Fonts[name] = font;
}

void FontLibrary::Remove(const std::string& name) {
    auto it = s_Fonts.find(name);
    if (it != s_Fonts.end()) {
        delete it->second;
        s_Fonts.erase(it);
    }
}

bool FontLibrary::Has(const std::string& name) {
    return s_Fonts.find(name) != s_Fonts.end();
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 48. FREETYPE FONT IMPLEMENTATION

### Core/Font/FreeTypeFont.h

```cpp
// Core/Font/FreeTypeFont.h
#pragma once

#include "Font.h"
#include <ft2build.h>
#include FT_FREETYPE_H
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

class FreeTypeFont : public Font {
public:
    FreeTypeFont();
    ~FreeTypeFont() override;
    
    bool LoadFromFile(const std::string& filepath, uint32 fontSize) override;
    bool LoadFromMemory(const void* data, uint32 size, uint32 fontSize) override;
    
    const Glyph* GetGlyph(uint32 character) const override;
    FontAtlas* GetAtlas() const override { return m_Atlas; }
    
    uint32 GetFontSize() const override { return m_FontSize; }
    float GetLineHeight() const override { return m_LineHeight; }
    float GetAscent() const override { return m_Ascent; }
    float GetDescent() const override { return m_Descent; }
    
    TextMetrics MeasureText(const std::string& text, float scale = 1.0f) const override;
    TextMetrics MeasureText(const std::wstring& text, float scale = 1.0f) const override;
    
    static bool InitLibrary();
    static void ShutdownLibrary();
    
private:
    bool LoadGlyphs(uint32 startChar, uint32 endChar);
    bool GenerateAtlas();
    
    FT_Face m_Face = nullptr;
    uint32 m_FontSize = 0;
    
    std::unordered_map<uint32, Glyph> m_Glyphs;
    FontAtlas* m_Atlas = nullptr;
    
    float m_LineHeight = 0.0f;
    float m_Ascent = 0.0f;
    float m_Descent = 0.0f;
    
    static FT_Library s_Library;
    static bool s_LibraryInitialized;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Font/FreeTypeFont.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Font/FreeTypeFont.cpp
#include "FreeTypeFont.h"
#include <Renderer/Texture.h>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>

namespace nkentseu {

FT_Library FreeTypeFont::s_Library = nullptr;
bool FreeTypeFont::s_LibraryInitialized = false;

bool FreeTypeFont::InitLibrary() {
    if (s_LibraryInitialized) return true;
    
    FT_Error error = FT_Init_FreeType(&s_Library);
    if (error) {
        printf("Failed to initialize FreeType library\n");
        return false;
    }
    
    s_LibraryInitialized = true;
    printf("FreeType library initialized\n");
    return true;
}

void FreeTypeFont::ShutdownLibrary() {
    if (s_LibraryInitialized) {
        FT_Done_FreeType(s_Library);
        s_LibraryInitialized = false;
    }
}

FreeTypeFont::FreeTypeFont() {
    if (!s_LibraryInitialized) {
        InitLibrary();
    }
}

FreeTypeFont::~FreeTypeFont() {
    if (m_Face) {
        FT_Done_Face(m_Face);
    }
    
    if (m_Atlas && m_Atlas->texture) {
        delete m_Atlas->texture;
        delete m_Atlas;
    }
}

bool FreeTypeFont::LoadFromFile(const std::string& filepath, uint32 fontSize) {
    FT_Error error = FT_New_Face(s_Library, filepath.c_str(), 0, &m_Face);
    if (error) {
        printf("Failed to load font: %s\n", filepath.c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    m_FontSize = fontSize;
    
    // Set pixel size
    error = FT_Set_Pixel_Sizes(m_Face, 0, fontSize);
    if (error) {
        printf("Failed to set font size\n");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Get font metrics
    m_LineHeight = m_Face->size->metrics.height / 64.0f;
    m_Ascent = m_Face->size->metrics.ascender / 64.0f;
    m_Descent = m_Face->size->metrics.descender / 64.0f;
    
    // Load ASCII characters (32-127) and extended (128-255)
    if (!LoadGlyphs(32, 255)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Generate texture atlas
    if (!GenerateAtlas()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    printf("Loaded font: %s (size: %d)\n", filepath.c_str(), fontSize);
    printf("  Glyphs: %zu\n", m_Glyphs.size());
    printf("  Line Height: %.2f\n", m_LineHeight);
    printf("  Atlas Size: %dx%d\n", m_Atlas->width, m_Atlas->height);
    
    return true;
}

bool FreeTypeFont::LoadFromMemory(const void* data, uint32 size, uint32 fontSize) {
    FT_Error error = FT_New_Memory_Face(
        s_Library, 
        static_cast<const FT_Byte*>(data), 
        size, 
        0, 
        &m_Face
    );
    
    if (error) {
        printf("Failed to load font from memory\n");
        return false;
    }
    
    m_FontSize = fontSize;
    
    error = FT_Set_Pixel_Sizes(m_Face, 0, fontSize);
    if (error) {
        printf("Failed to set font size\n");
        return false;
    }
    
    m_LineHeight = m_Face->size->metrics.height / 64.0f;
    m_Ascent = m_Face->size->metrics.ascender / 64.0f;
    m_Descent = m_Face->size->metrics.descender / 64.0f;
    
    if (!LoadGlyphs(32, 255)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    if (!GenerateAtlas()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    return true;
}

bool FreeTypeFont::LoadGlyphs(uint32 startChar, uint32 endChar) {
    FT_GlyphSlot slot = m_Face->glyph;
    
    for (uint32 c = startChar; c <= endChar; c++) {
        FT_UInt glyphIndex = FT_Get_Char_Index(m_Face, c);
        
        if (glyphIndex == 0) continue;
        
        FT_Error error = FT_Load_Glyph(m_Face, glyphIndex, FT_LOAD_RENDER);
        if (error) continue;
        
        Glyph glyph;
        glyph.character = c;
        glyph.size = maths::Vector2f(
            static_cast<float>(slot->bitmap.width),
            static_cast<float>(slot->bitmap.rows)
        );
        glyph.bearing = maths::Vector2f(
            static_cast<float>(slot->bitmap_left),
            static_cast<float>(slot->bitmap_top)
        );
        glyph.advance = slot->advance.x / 64.0f;
        
        m_Glyphs[c] = glyph;
    }
    
    return !m_Glyphs.empty();
}

bool FreeTypeFont::GenerateAtlas() {
    // Calculate atlas size
    uint32 maxWidth = 0;
    uint32 totalHeight = 0;
    
    for (const auto& pair : m_Glyphs) {
        maxWidth = std::max(maxWidth, static_cast<uint32>(pair.second.size.x));
        totalHeight += static_cast<uint32>(pair.second.size.y) + 1; // 1 pixel padding
    }
    
    // Use power-of-two atlas size
    uint32 atlasWidth = 1;
    while (atlasWidth < maxWidth * 16) atlasWidth *= 2;
    
    uint32 atlasHeight = 1;
    while (atlasHeight < totalHeight) atlasHeight *= 2;
    
    // Create atlas buffer
    std::vector<uint8> atlasData(atlasWidth * atlasHeight, 0);
    
    // Pack glyphs into atlas
    uint32 offsetX = 0;
    uint32 offsetY = 0;
    uint32 rowHeight = 0;
    
    FT_GlyphSlot slot = m_Face->glyph;
    
    for (auto& pair : m_Glyphs) {
        uint32 c = pair.first;
        Glyph& glyph = pair.second;
        
        FT_UInt glyphIndex = FT_Get_Char_Index(m_Face, c);
        FT_Load_Glyph(m_Face, glyphIndex, FT_LOAD_RENDER);
        
        uint32 glyphWidth = slot->bitmap.width;
        uint32 glyphHeight = slot->bitmap.rows;
        
        // Check if we need to go to next row
        if (offsetX + glyphWidth > atlasWidth) {
            offsetX = 0;
            offsetY += rowHeight + 1;
            rowHeight = 0;
        }
        
        // Copy glyph bitmap to atlas
        for (uint32 y = 0; y < glyphHeight; y++) {
            for (uint32 x = 0; x < glyphWidth; x++) {
                uint32 atlasIndex = (offsetY + y) * atlasWidth + (offsetX + x);
                uint32 glyphIndex = y * glyphWidth + x;
                
                if (atlasIndex < atlasData.size() && glyphIndex < glyphWidth * glyphHeight) {
                    atlasData[atlasIndex] = slot->bitmap.buffer[glyphIndex];
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Store texture coordinates
        glyph.texCoordMin = maths::Vector2f(
            static_cast<float>(offsetX) / atlasWidth,
            static_cast<float>(offsetY) / atlasHeight
        );
        glyph.texCoordMax = maths::Vector2f(
            static_cast<float>(offsetX + glyphWidth) / atlasWidth,
            static_cast<float>(offsetY + glyphHeight) / atlasHeight
        );
        
        offsetX += glyphWidth + 1;
        rowHeight = std::max(rowHeight, glyphHeight);
    }
    
    // Convert grayscale to RGBA
    std::vector<uint8> rgbaData(atlasWidth * atlasHeight * 4);
    for (uint32 i = 0; i < atlasWidth * atlasHeight; i++) {
        rgbaData[i * 4 + 0] = 255;
        rgbaData[i * 4 + 1] = 255;
        rgbaData[i * 4 + 2] = 255;
        rgbaData[i * 4 + 3] = atlasData[i];
    }
    
    // Create texture
    TextureSpecification spec;
    spec.width = atlasWidth;
    spec.height = atlasHeight;
    spec.format = TextureFormat::RGBA8;
    spec.minFilter = TextureFilter::Linear;
    spec.magFilter = TextureFilter::Linear;
    spec.wrapS = TextureWrap::ClampToEdge;
    spec.wrapT = TextureWrap::ClampToEdge;
    
    m_Atlas = new FontAtlas();
    m_Atlas->width = atlasWidth;
    m_Atlas->height = atlasHeight;
    m_Atlas->texture = Texture2D::Create(spec);
    m_Atlas->texture->SetData(rgbaData.data(), static_cast<uint32>(rgbaData.size()));
    
    return true;
}

const Glyph* FreeTypeFont::GetGlyph(uint32 character) const {
    auto it = m_Glyphs.find(character);
    if (it != m_Glyphs.end()) {
        return &it->second;
    }
    
    // Return space character as fallback
    it = m_Glyphs.find(' ');
    if (it != m_Glyphs.end()) {
        return &it->second;
    }
    
    return nullptr;
}

TextMetrics FreeTypeFont::MeasureText(const std::string& text, float scale) const {
    TextMetrics metrics = {};
    metrics.lineHeight = m_LineHeight * scale;
    metrics.ascent = m_Ascent * scale;
    metrics.descent = m_Descent * scale;
    
    float x = 0.0f;
    float maxWidth = 0.0f;
    float currentLineWidth = 0.0f;
    uint32 lineCount = 1;
    
    for (char c : text) {
        if (c == '\n') {
            maxWidth = std::max(maxWidth, currentLineWidth);
            currentLineWidth = 0.0f;
            lineCount++;
            continue;
        }
        
        const Glyph* glyph = GetGlyph(static_cast<uint32>(c));
        if (glyph) {
            currentLineWidth += glyph->advance * scale;
        }
    }
    
    maxWidth = std::max(maxWidth, currentLineWidth);
    
    metrics.width = maxWidth;
    metrics.height = lineCount * metrics.lineHeight;
    
    return metrics;
}

TextMetrics FreeTypeFont::MeasureText(const std::wstring& text, float scale) const {
    TextMetrics metrics = {};
    metrics.lineHeight = m_LineHeight * scale;
    metrics.ascent = m_Ascent * scale;
    metrics.descent = m_Descent * scale;
    
    float maxWidth = 0.0f;
    float currentLineWidth = 0.0f;
    uint32 lineCount = 1;
    
    for (wchar_t c : text) {
        if (c == L'\n') {
            maxWidth = std::max(maxWidth, currentLineWidth);
            currentLineWidth = 0.0f;
            lineCount++;
            continue;
        }
        
        const Glyph* glyph = GetGlyph(static_cast<uint32>(c));
        if (glyph) {
            currentLineWidth += glyph->advance * scale;
        }
    }
    
    maxWidth = std::max(maxWidth, currentLineWidth);
    
    metrics.width = maxWidth;
    metrics.height = lineCount * metrics.lineHeight;
    
    return metrics;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 49. TEXT RENDERER

### Core/Renderer/TextRenderer.h

```cpp
// Core/Renderer/TextRenderer.h
#pragma once

#include <Font/Font.h>
#include <Renderer/Camera.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Color.h>
#include <Renderer/Shader.h>
#include <Renderer/VertexArray.h>

namespace nkentseu {

struct TextRenderProperties {
    maths::Vector2f position;
    maths::Color color = maths::Color(1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
    float scale = 1.0f;
    float rotation = 0.0f;
    TextAlignment alignment = TextAlignment::Left;
    float lineSpacing = 1.0f;
};

class TextRenderer {
public:
    static void Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    
    static void BeginScene(const Camera& camera);
    static void EndScene();
    
    static void DrawText(Font* font, const std::string& text, const TextRenderProperties& properties);
    static void DrawText(Font* font, const std::string& text, const maths::Vector2f& position, 
                        const maths::Color& color = maths::Color(1.0f), float scale = 1.0f);
    
    static void DrawTextW(Font* font, const std::wstring& text, const TextRenderProperties& properties);
    static void DrawTextW(Font* font, const std::wstring& text, const maths::Vector2f& position,
                         const maths::Color& color = maths::Color(1.0f), float scale = 1.0f);
    
private:
    struct TextVertex {
        maths::Vector3f position;
        maths::Vector2f texCoord;
        maths::Color color;
    };
    
    static void Flush();
    static void StartBatch();
    static void NextBatch();
    
    static Shader* s_Shader;
    static VertexArray* s_VertexArray;
    static VertexBuffer* s_VertexBuffer;
    static IndexBuffer* s_IndexBuffer;
    
    static const uint32 MaxCharacters = 10000;
    static TextVertex* s_VertexBufferBase;
    static TextVertex* s_VertexBufferPtr;
    static uint32 s_IndexCount;
    
    static maths::Matrix4 s_ViewProjectionMatrix;
    static Font* s_CurrentFont;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Renderer/TextRenderer.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Renderer/TextRenderer.cpp
#include "TextRenderer.h"
#include "RenderCommand.h"
#include <cmath>

namespace nkentseu {

Shader* TextRenderer::s_Shader = nullptr;
VertexArray* TextRenderer::s_VertexArray = nullptr;
VertexBuffer* TextRenderer::s_VertexBuffer = nullptr;
IndexBuffer* TextRenderer::s_IndexBuffer = nullptr;

TextRenderer::TextVertex* TextRenderer::s_VertexBufferBase = nullptr;
TextRenderer::TextVertex* TextRenderer::s_VertexBufferPtr = nullptr;
uint32 TextRenderer::s_IndexCount = 0;

maths::Matrix4 TextRenderer::s_ViewProjectionMatrix;
Font* TextRenderer::s_CurrentFont = nullptr;

void TextRenderer::Init() {
    // Create vertex array
    s_VertexArray = VertexArray::Create();
    
    // Create vertex buffer
    s_VertexBuffer = VertexBuffer::Create(MaxCharacters * 4 * sizeof(TextVertex));
    s_VertexBuffer->SetLayout({
        { ShaderDataType::Float3, "a_Position" },
        { ShaderDataType::Float2, "a_TexCoord" },
        { ShaderDataType::Float4, "a_Color" }
    });
    s_VertexArray->AddVertexBuffer(s_VertexBuffer);
    
    s_VertexBufferBase = new TextVertex[MaxCharacters * 4];
    
    // Create index buffer
    uint32* indices = new uint32[MaxCharacters * 6];
    
    uint32 offset = 0;
    for (uint32 i = 0; i < MaxCharacters * 6; i += 6) {
        indices[i + 0] = offset + 0;
        indices[i + 1] = offset + 1;
        indices[i + 2] = offset + 2;
        
        indices[i + 3] = offset + 2;
        indices[i + 4] = offset + 3;
        indices[i + 5] = offset + 0;
        
        offset += 4;
    }
    
    s_IndexBuffer = IndexBuffer::Create(indices, MaxCharacters * 6);
    s_VertexArray->SetIndexBuffer(s_IndexBuffer);
    delete[] indices;
    
    // Create shader
    std::string vertexSrc = R"(
        #version 330 core
        
        layout(location = 0) in vec3 a_Position;
        layout(location = 1) in vec2 a_TexCoord;
        layout(location = 2) in vec4 a_Color;
        
        uniform mat4 u_ViewProjection;
        
        out vec2 v_TexCoord;
        out vec4 v_Color;
        
        void main() {
            v_TexCoord = a_TexCoord;
            v_Color = a_Color;
            gl_Position = u_ViewProjection * vec4(a_Position, 1.0);
        }
    )";
    
    std::string fragmentSrc = R"(
        #version 330 core
        
        layout(location = 0) out vec4 color;
        
        in vec2 v_TexCoord;
        in vec4 v_Color;
        
        uniform sampler2D u_FontAtlas;
        
        void main() {
            vec4 sampled = texture(u_FontAtlas, v_TexCoord);
            color = v_Color * sampled;
        }
    )";
    
    s_Shader = Shader::Create("TextRenderer", vertexSrc, fragmentSrc);
    
    printf("TextRenderer initialized\n");
}

void TextRenderer::Shutdown() {
    delete s_VertexArray;
    delete s_VertexBuffer;
    delete s_IndexBuffer;
    delete s_Shader;
    delete[] s_VertexBufferBase;
}

void TextRenderer::BeginScene(const Camera& camera) {
    s_ViewProjectionMatrix = camera.GetViewProjectionMatrix();
    StartBatch();
}

void TextRenderer::EndScene() {
    Flush();
}

void TextRenderer::DrawText(Font* font, const std::string& text, const TextRenderProperties& properties) {
    if (!font || text.empty()) return;
    
    if (s_CurrentFont != font) {
        if (s_IndexCount > 0) {
            Flush();
        }
        s_CurrentFont = font;
        StartBatch();
    }
    
    float x = properties.position.x;
    float y = properties.position.y;
    
    // Handle text alignment
    if (properties.alignment != TextAlignment::Left) {
        TextMetrics metrics = font->MeasureText(text, properties.scale);
        
        if (properties.alignment == TextAlignment::Center) {
            x -= metrics.width * 0.5f;
        } else if (properties.alignment == TextAlignment::Right) {
            x -= metrics.width;
        }
    }
    
    float startX = x;
    
    for (char c : text) {
        if (c == '\n') {
            x = startX;
            y -= font->GetLineHeight() * properties.scale * properties.lineSpacing;
            continue;
        }
        
        const Glyph* glyph = font->GetGlyph(static_cast<uint32>(c));
        if (!glyph) continue;
        
        float xpos = x + glyph->bearing.x * properties.scale;
        float ypos = y - (glyph->size.y - glyph->bearing.y) * properties.scale;
        
        float w = glyph->size.x * properties.scale;
        float h = glyph->size.y * properties.scale;
        
        // Check if we need to flush
        if (s_IndexCount >= MaxCharacters * 6) {
            Flush();
            StartBatch();
        }
        
        // Add vertices
        s_VertexBufferPtr->position = { xpos, ypos + h, 0.0f };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->texCoord = { glyph->texCoordMin.x, glyph->texCoordMax.y };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->color = properties.color;
        s_VertexBufferPtr++;
        
        s_VertexBufferPtr->position = { xpos + w, ypos + h, 0.0f };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->texCoord = { glyph->texCoordMax.x, glyph->texCoordMax.y };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->color = properties.color;
        s_VertexBufferPtr++;
        
        s_VertexBufferPtr->position = { xpos + w, ypos, 0.0f };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->texCoord = { glyph->texCoordMax.x, glyph->texCoordMin.y };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->color = properties.color;
        s_VertexBufferPtr++;
        
        s_VertexBufferPtr->position = { xpos, ypos, 0.0f };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->texCoord = { glyph->texCoordMin.x, glyph->texCoordMin.y };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->color = properties.color;
        s_VertexBufferPtr++;
        
        s_IndexCount += 6;
        
        x += glyph->advance * properties.scale;
    }
}

void TextRenderer::DrawText(Font* font, const std::string& text, const maths::Vector2f& position,
                           const maths::Color& color, float scale) {
    TextRenderProperties props;
    props.position = position;
    props.color = color;
    props.scale = scale;
    DrawText(font, text, props);
}

void TextRenderer::DrawTextW(Font* font, const std::wstring& text, const TextRenderProperties& properties) {
    if (!font || text.empty()) return;
    
    if (s_CurrentFont != font) {
        if (s_IndexCount > 0) {
            Flush();
        }
        s_CurrentFont = font;
        StartBatch();
    }
    
    float x = properties.position.x;
    float y = properties.position.y;
    
    if (properties.alignment != TextAlignment::Left) {
        TextMetrics metrics = font->MeasureText(text, properties.scale);
        
        if (properties.alignment == TextAlignment::Center) {
            x -= metrics.width * 0.5f;
        } else if (properties.alignment == TextAlignment::Right) {
            x -= metrics.width;
        }
    }
    
    float startX = x;
    
    for (wchar_t c : text) {
        if (c == L'\n') {
            x = startX;
            y -= font->GetLineHeight() * properties.scale * properties.lineSpacing;
            continue;
        }
        
        const Glyph* glyph = font->GetGlyph(static_cast<uint32>(c));
        if (!glyph) continue;
        
        float xpos = x + glyph->bearing.x * properties.scale;
        float ypos = y - (glyph->size.y - glyph->bearing.y) * properties.scale;
        
        float w = glyph->size.x * properties.scale;
        float h = glyph->size.y * properties.scale;
        
        if (s_IndexCount >= MaxCharacters * 6) {
            Flush();
            StartBatch();
        }
        
        s_VertexBufferPtr->position = { xpos, ypos + h, 0.0f };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->texCoord = { glyph->texCoordMin.x, glyph->texCoordMax.y };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->color = properties.color;
        s_VertexBufferPtr++;
        
        s_VertexBufferPtr->position = { xpos + w, ypos + h, 0.0f };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->texCoord = { glyph->texCoordMax.x, glyph->texCoordMax.y };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->color = properties.color;
        s_VertexBufferPtr++;
        
        s_VertexBufferPtr->position = { xpos + w, ypos, 0.0f };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->texCoord = { glyph->texCoordMax.x, glyph->texCoordMin.y };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->color = properties.color;
        s_VertexBufferPtr++;
        
        s_VertexBufferPtr->position = { xpos, ypos, 0.0f };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->texCoord = { glyph->texCoordMin.x, glyph->texCoordMin.y };
        s_VertexBufferPtr->color = properties.color;
        s_VertexBufferPtr++;
        
        s_IndexCount += 6;
        
        x += glyph->advance * properties.scale;
    }
}

void TextRenderer::DrawTextW(Font* font, const std::wstring& text, const maths::Vector2f& position,
                            const maths::Color& color, float scale) {
    TextRenderProperties props;
    props.position = position;
    props.color = color;
    props.scale = scale;
    DrawTextW(font, text, props);
}

void TextRenderer::Flush() {
    if (s_IndexCount == 0) return;
    
    uint32 dataSize = static_cast<uint32>((uint8*)s_VertexBufferPtr - (uint8*)s_VertexBufferBase);
    s_VertexBuffer->SetData(s_VertexBufferBase, dataSize);
    
    // Bind font atlas
    if (s_CurrentFont) {
        FontAtlas* atlas = s_CurrentFont->GetAtlas();
        if (atlas && atlas->texture) {
            atlas->texture->Bind(0);
        }
    }
    
    // Bind shader and set uniforms
    s_Shader->Bind();
    s_Shader->SetMat4("u_ViewProjection", s_ViewProjectionMatrix);
    s_Shader->SetInt("u_FontAtlas", 0);
    
    // Enable blending for text
    RenderCommand::EnableBlend(true);
    RenderCommand::SetBlendFunc(BlendFactor::SrcAlpha, BlendFactor::OneMinusSrcAlpha);
    
    // Draw
    RenderCommand::DrawIndexed(s_VertexArray, s_IndexCount);
}

void TextRenderer::StartBatch() {
    s_IndexCount = 0;
    s_VertexBufferPtr = s_VertexBufferBase;
}

void TextRenderer::NextBatch() {
    Flush();
    StartBatch();
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 50. UI SYSTEM - Immediate Mode GUI

### Core/UI/UIContext.h

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIContext.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector4.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Color.h>
#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Font/Font.h>
#include <Renderer/Texture.h>
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

enum class UIWidgetType {
    None,
    Button,
    Checkbox,
    Slider,
    InputText,
    Label,
    Image,
    Panel,
    Window
};

enum class UIAlignment {
    TopLeft,
    TopCenter,
    TopRight,
    MiddleLeft,
    MiddleCenter,
    MiddleRight,
    BottomLeft,
    BottomCenter,
    BottomRight
};

struct UIStyle {
    // Colors
    maths::Color backgroundColor = maths::Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color windowBgColor = maths::Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 0.95f);
    maths::Color frameBgColor = maths::Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color frameBgHoveredColor = maths::Color(0.25f, 0.25f, 0.25f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color frameBgActiveColor = maths::Color(0.3f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color buttonColor = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 0.4f);
    maths::Color buttonHoveredColor = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color buttonActiveColor = maths::Color(0.06f, 0.53f, 0.98f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color textColor = maths::Color(1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color textDisabledColor = maths::Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color borderColor = maths::Color(0.4f, 0.4f, 0.4f, 0.5f);
    maths::Color checkMarkColor = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color sliderGrabColor = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 1.0f);
    maths::Color sliderGrabActiveColor = maths::Color(0.06f, 0.53f, 0.98f, 1.0f);
    
    // Sizes
    maths::Vector2f windowPadding = { 8.0f, 8.0f };
    maths::Vector2f framePadding = { 4.0f, 3.0f };
    maths::Vector2f itemSpacing = { 8.0f, 4.0f };
    maths::Vector2f itemInnerSpacing = { 4.0f, 4.0f };
    float scrollbarSize = 14.0f;
    float grabMinSize = 10.0f;
    
    // Borders
    float windowBorderSize = 1.0f;
    float frameBorderSize = 0.0f;
    
    // Rounding
    float windowRounding = 0.0f;
    float frameRounding = 0.0f;
    float grabRounding = 0.0f;
    
    // Text
    float fontSize = 16.0f;
};

struct UIRect {
    maths::Vector2f min;
    maths::Vector2f max;
    
    UIRect() = default;
    UIRect(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max)
        : min(min), max(max) {}
    UIRect(float x, float y, float w, float h)
        : min(x, y), max(x + w, y + h) {}
    
    float GetWidth() const { return max.x - min.x; }
    float GetHeight() const { return max.y - min.y; }
    maths::Vector2f GetSize() const { return max - min; }
    maths::Vector2f GetCenter() const { return (min + max) * 0.5f; }
    
    bool Contains(const maths::Vector2f& point) const {
        return point.x >= min.x && point.x <= max.x &&
               point.y >= min.y && point.y <= max.y;
    }
    
    void Expand(float amount) {
        min.x -= amount;
        min.y -= amount;
        max.x += amount;
        max.y += amount;
    }
};

struct UIDrawCommand {
    UIRect clipRect;
    Texture2D* texture = nullptr;
    uint32 indexOffset = 0;
    uint32 indexCount = 0;
};

class UI {
public:
    static void Init(Window* window, Font* font = nullptr);
    static void Shutdown();
    
    // Frame management
    static void NewFrame();
    static void Render();
    
    // Input
    static void ProcessEvent(Event& event);
    
    // Style
    static UIStyle& GetStyle();
    static void SetStyle(const UIStyle& style);
    
    // Windows
    static bool Begin(const std::string& name, bool* open = nullptr, 
                     const maths::Vector2f& size = {0, 0}, 
                     const maths::Vector2f& position = {0, 0});
    static void End();
    
    // Widgets - Basic
    static void Text(const std::string& text);
    static void TextColored(const maths::Color& color, const std::string& text);
    static void LabelText(const std::string& label, const std::string& text);
    static void Separator();
    static void SameLine(float offsetX = 0.0f, float spacing = -1.0f);
    static void NewLine();
    static void Spacing();
    static void Indent(float indentW = 0.0f);
    static void Unindent(float indentW = 0.0f);
    
    // Widgets - Interactive
    static bool Button(const std::string& label, const maths::Vector2f& size = {0, 0});
    static bool Checkbox(const std::string& label, bool* value);
    static bool RadioButton(const std::string& label, bool active);
    static bool SliderFloat(const std::string& label, float* value, float min, float max);
    static bool SliderInt(const std::string& label, int32* value, int32 min, int32 max);
    static bool InputText(const std::string& label, std::string& text, size_t maxLength = 256);
    static bool InputFloat(const std::string& label, float* value);
    static bool InputInt(const std::string& label, int32* value);
    static bool ColorEdit3(const std::string& label, maths::Vector3f& color);
    static bool ColorEdit4(const std::string& label, maths::Color& color);
    
    // Widgets - Combo/Listbox
    static bool BeginCombo(const std::string& label, const std::string& preview);
    static void EndCombo();
    static bool Selectable(const std::string& label, bool selected = false);
    
    // Widgets - Trees
    static bool TreeNode(const std::string& label);
    static void TreePop();
    
    // Widgets - Images
    static void Image(Texture2D* texture, const maths::Vector2f& size);
    static bool ImageButton(Texture2D* texture, const maths::Vector2f& size);
    
    // Layout
    static void BeginGroup();
    static void EndGroup();
    static maths::Vector2f GetCursorPos();
    static void SetCursorPos(const maths::Vector2f& pos);
    static maths::Vector2f GetContentRegionAvail();
    
    // Utilities
    static bool IsItemHovered();
    static bool IsItemActive();
    static bool IsItemClicked(int button = 0);
    static maths::Vector2f GetItemRectMin();
    static maths::Vector2f GetItemRectMax();
    static maths::Vector2f GetItemRectSize();
    
    // Drawing
    static void AddRect(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max, 
                       const maths::Color& color, float rounding = 0.0f, float thickness = 1.0f);
    static void AddRectFilled(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max, 
                             const maths::Color& color, float rounding = 0.0f);
    static void AddLine(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                       const maths::Color& color, float thickness = 1.0f);
    static void AddText(const maths::Vector2f& pos, const maths::Color& color, 
                       const std::string& text);
    static void AddCircle(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                         const maths::Color& color, int segments = 12, float thickness = 1.0f);
    static void AddCircleFilled(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                               const maths::Color& color, int segments = 12);
    static void AddTriangle(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                           const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Color& color, float thickness = 1.0f);
    static void AddTriangleFilled(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                                 const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Color& color);
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/UI/UIContext.cpp

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIContext.cpp
#include "UIContext.h"
#include <Event/MouseEvent.h>
#include <Event/KeyboardEvent.h>
#include <Renderer/Renderer2D.h>
#include <Renderer/TextRenderer.h>
#include <Renderer/RenderCommand.h>
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

struct UIWindow {
    std::string name;
    UIRect rect;
    bool open = true;
    bool collapsed = false;
    bool* openPtr = nullptr;
    maths::Vector2f scrollOffset = {0, 0};
};

struct UIState {
    Window* window = nullptr;
    Font* font = nullptr;
    UIStyle style;
    
    // Input state
    maths::Vector2f mousePos;
    maths::Vector2f mouseDelta;
    bool mouseButtons[3] = {false, false, false};
    bool mouseButtonsDown[3] = {false, false, false};
    bool mouseButtonsReleased[3] = {false, false, false};
    char lastChar = 0;
    bool keys[512] = {false};
    
    // Current window
    UIWindow* currentWindow = nullptr;
    std::vector<UIWindow*> windows;
    
    // Layout
    maths::Vector2f cursorPos;
    float cursorMaxY = 0.0f;
    bool sameLine = false;
    float indent = 0.0f;
    
    // Item state
    UIRect lastItemRect;
    uint32 activeId = 0;
    uint32 hoveredId = 0;
    uint32 idStack = 0;
    
    // Rendering
    std::vector<maths::Vector3f> vertices;
    std::vector<maths::Vector2f> texCoords;
    std::vector<maths::Color> colors;
    std::vector<uint32> indices;
    std::vector<UIDrawCommand> drawCommands;
    
    // Camera
    maths::Matrix4 projectionMatrix;
};

static UIState* s_State = nullptr;

// Helper functions
static uint32 HashString(const std::string& str, uint32 seed = 0) {
    uint32 hash = seed;
    for (char c : str) {
        hash = hash * 31 + static_cast<uint32>(c);
    }
    return hash;
}

static uint32 GetID(const std::string& label) {
    return HashString(label, s_State->idStack);
}

static void PushID(const std::string& id) {
    s_State->idStack = HashString(id, s_State->idStack);
}

static void PopID() {
    s_State->idStack = 0;
}

// =====================================================================
// INITIALIZATION
// =====================================================================

void UI::Init(Window* window, Font* font) {
    s_State = new UIState();
    s_State->window = window;
    s_State->font = font;
    
    // Setup projection matrix for UI rendering
    uint32 width = window->GetSize().x;
    uint32 height = window->GetSize().y;
    s_State->projectionMatrix = maths::Matrix4::Orthographic(
        0.0f, static_cast<float>(width),
        static_cast<float>(height), 0.0f,
        -1.0f, 1.0f
    );
    
    printf("UI System initialized\n");
}

void UI::Shutdown() {
    if (s_State) {
        for (auto* window : s_State->windows) {
            delete window;
        }
        delete s_State;
        s_State = nullptr;
    }
}

UIStyle& UI::GetStyle() {
    return s_State->style;
}

void UI::SetStyle(const UIStyle& style) {
    s_State->style = style;
}

// =====================================================================
// FRAME MANAGEMENT
// =====================================================================

void UI::NewFrame() {
    // Reset frame state
    s_State->hoveredId = 0;
    s_State->mouseDelta = {0, 0};
    std::fill(std::begin(s_State->mouseButtonsDown), std::end(s_State->mouseButtonsDown), false);
    std::fill(std::begin(s_State->mouseButtonsReleased), std::end(s_State->mouseButtonsReleased), false);
    s_State->lastChar = 0;
    
    // Clear rendering data
    s_State->vertices.clear();
    s_State->texCoords.clear();
    s_State->colors.clear();
    s_State->indices.clear();
    s_State->drawCommands.clear();
}

void UI::Render() {
    if (s_State->vertices.empty()) return;
    
    // TODO: Implement actual rendering using custom vertex buffers
    // For now, we'll use Renderer2D for basic shapes
    
    EditorCamera camera;
    camera.SetOrthographic(
        static_cast<float>(s_State->window->GetSize().x),
        1.0f,
        -1.0f,
        1.0f
    );
    
    Renderer2D::BeginScene(camera);
    
    // Render all draw commands
    for (const auto& cmd : s_State->drawCommands) {
        // Set scissor if needed
        if (cmd.clipRect.GetWidth() > 0 && cmd.clipRect.GetHeight() > 0) {
            RenderCommand::EnableScissorTest(true);
            RenderCommand::SetScissor(
                static_cast<int32>(cmd.clipRect.min.x),
                static_cast<int32>(cmd.clipRect.min.y),
                static_cast<uint32>(cmd.clipRect.GetWidth()),
                static_cast<uint32>(cmd.clipRect.GetHeight())
            );
        }
        
        // Draw vertices (simplified - would need proper implementation)
        for (uint32 i = cmd.indexOffset; i < cmd.indexOffset + cmd.indexCount; i += 3) {
            if (i + 2 < s_State->indices.size()) {
                uint32 i0 = s_State->indices[i];
                uint32 i1 = s_State->indices[i + 1];
                uint32 i2 = s_State->indices[i + 2];
                
                if (i0 < s_State->vertices.size() && 
                    i1 < s_State->vertices.size() && 
                    i2 < s_State->vertices.size()) {
                    
                    maths::Vector2f p0(s_State->vertices[i0].x, s_State->vertices[i0].y);
                    maths::Vector2f p1(s_State->vertices[i1].x, s_State->vertices[i1].y);
                    maths::Vector2f p2(s_State->vertices[i2].x, s_State->vertices[i2].y);
                    
                    Renderer2D::FillTriangle(p0, p1, p2, s_State->colors[i0]);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    RenderCommand::EnableScissorTest(false);
    
    Renderer2D::EndScene();
}

// =====================================================================
// INPUT
// =====================================================================

void UI::ProcessEvent(Event& event) {
    if (auto* mouseMove = event.As<MouseMovedEvent>()) {
        maths::Vector2f newPos(
            static_cast<float>(mouseMove->GetPosition().x),
            static_cast<float>(mouseMove->GetPosition().y)
        );
        s_State->mouseDelta = newPos - s_State->mousePos;
        s_State->mousePos = newPos;
    }
    else if (auto* mouseButton = event.As<MouseInputEvent>()) {
        uint32 button = mouseButton->GetButton();
        if (button < 3) {
            bool pressed = mouseButton->GetState() == ButtonState::Pressed;
            s_State->mouseButtonsDown[button] = pressed && !s_State->mouseButtons[button];
            s_State->mouseButtonsReleased[button] = !pressed && s_State->mouseButtons[button];
            s_State->mouseButtons[button] = pressed;
        }
    }
    else if (auto* keyEvent = event.As<KeyboardEvent>()) {
        uint32 key = keyEvent->GetKeycode();
        if (key < 512) {
            s_State->keys[key] = keyEvent->IsPressed();
        }
    }
    else if (auto* charEvent = event.As<CharEnteredEvent>()) {
        s_State->lastChar = static_cast<char>(charEvent->GetCharacter());
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// WINDOWS
// =====================================================================

bool UI::Begin(const std::string& name, bool* open, 
               const maths::Vector2f& size, 
               const maths::Vector2f& position) {
    
    UIWindow* window = nullptr;
    
    // Find existing window
    for (auto* w : s_State->windows) {
        if (w->name == name) {
            window = w;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // Create new window if not found
    if (!window) {
        window = new UIWindow();
        window->name = name;
        window->rect = UIRect(
            position.x > 0 ? position.x : 100.0f,
            position.y > 0 ? position.y : 100.0f,
            size.x > 0 ? size.x : 300.0f,
            size.y > 0 ? size.y : 400.0f
        );
        s_State->windows.push_back(window);
    }
    
    window->openPtr = open;
    if (open && !*open) {
        window->open = false;
        return false;
    }
    
    s_State->currentWindow = window;
    
    // Setup cursor position
    s_State->cursorPos = window->rect.min + s_State->style.windowPadding;
    s_State->cursorPos.y += 25.0f; // Title bar height
    s_State->cursorMaxY = s_State->cursorPos.y;
    s_State->indent = 0.0f;
    
    PushID(name);
    
    // Draw window background
    AddRectFilled(window->rect.min, window->rect.max, 
                 s_State->style.windowBgColor, s_State->style.windowRounding);
    
    // Draw window border
    if (s_State->style.windowBorderSize > 0) {
        AddRect(window->rect.min, window->rect.max, 
               s_State->style.borderColor, s_State->style.windowRounding, 
               s_State->style.windowBorderSize);
    }
    
    // Draw title bar
    UIRect titleBarRect(
        window->rect.min.x,
        window->rect.min.y,
        window->rect.max.x,
        window->rect.min.y + 25.0f
    );
    AddRectFilled(titleBarRect.min, titleBarRect.max, 
                 s_State->style.buttonColor);
    
    // Draw title text
    if (s_State->font) {
        AddText(
            titleBarRect.min + maths::Vector2f(s_State->style.windowPadding.x, 5.0f),
            s_State->style.textColor,
            name
        );
    }
    
    return true;
}

void UI::End() {
    if (!s_State->currentWindow) return;
    
    PopID();
    s_State->currentWindow = nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// WIDGETS - BASIC
// =====================================================================

void UI::Text(const std::string& text) {
    if (!s_State->font) return;
    
    TextMetrics metrics = s_State->font->MeasureText(text, 1.0f);
    
    AddText(s_State->cursorPos, s_State->style.textColor, text);
    
    s_State->lastItemRect = UIRect(
        s_State->cursorPos.x,
        s_State->cursorPos.y,
        metrics.width,
        metrics.height
    );
    
    if (!s_State->sameLine) {
        s_State->cursorPos.y += metrics.height + s_State->style.itemSpacing.y;
        s_State->cursorMaxY = std::max(s_State->cursorMaxY, s_State->cursorPos.y);
    } else {
        s_State->cursorPos.x += metrics.width + s_State->style.itemSpacing.x;
        s_State->sameLine = false;
    }
}

void UI::TextColored(const maths::Color& color, const std::string& text) {
    if (!s_State->font) return;
    
    TextMetrics metrics = s_State->font->MeasureText(text, 1.0f);
    
    AddText(s_State->cursorPos, color, text);
    
    s_State->lastItemRect = UIRect(
        s_State->cursorPos.x,
        s_State->cursorPos.y,
        metrics.width,
        metrics.height
    );
    
    if (!s_State->sameLine) {
        s_State->cursorPos.y += metrics.height + s_State->style.itemSpacing.y;
        s_State->cursorMaxY = std::max(s_State->cursorMaxY, s_State->cursorPos.y);
    } else {
        s_State->cursorPos.x += metrics.width + s_State->style.itemSpacing.x;
        s_State->sameLine = false;
    }
}

void UI::Separator() {
    if (!s_State->currentWindow) return;
    
    float y = s_State->cursorPos.y + s_State->style.itemSpacing.y * 0.5f;
    
    AddLine(
        maths::Vector2f(s_State->currentWindow->rect.min.x + s_State->style.windowPadding.x, y),
        maths::Vector2f(s_State->currentWindow->rect.max.x - s_State->style.windowPadding.x, y),
        s_State->style.borderColor,
        1.0f
    );
    
    s_State->cursorPos.y += s_State->style.itemSpacing.y;
}

void UI::SameLine(float offsetX, float spacing) {
    s_State->sameLine = true;
    if (spacing < 0) {
        spacing = s_State->style.itemSpacing.x;
    }
    s_State->cursorPos.x += offsetX + spacing;
}

void UI::NewLine() {
    s_State->cursorPos.y += s_State->style.itemSpacing.y;
    s_State->cursorPos.x = s_State->currentWindow->rect.min.x + s_State->style.windowPadding.x + s_State->indent;
    s_State->sameLine = false;
}

void UI::Spacing() {
    s_State->cursorPos.y += s_State->style.itemSpacing.y;
}

void UI::Indent(float indentW) {
    if (indentW == 0.0f) {
        indentW = s_State->style.itemSpacing.x * 2.0f;
    }
    s_State->indent += indentW;
    s_State->cursorPos.x += indentW;
}

void UI::Unindent(float indentW) {
    if (indentW == 0.0f) {
        indentW = s_State->style.itemSpacing.x * 2.0f;
    }
    s_State->indent -= indentW;
    s_State->cursorPos.x -= indentW;
}

// =====================================================================
// WIDGETS - INTERACTIVE
// =====================================================================

bool UI::Button(const std::string& label, const maths::Vector2f& size) {
    if (!s_State->font) return false;
    
    TextMetrics metrics = s_State->font->MeasureText(label, 1.0f);
    
    maths::Vector2f buttonSize = size;
    if (buttonSize.x == 0) buttonSize.x = metrics.width + s_State->style.framePadding.x * 2.0f;
    if (buttonSize.y == 0) buttonSize.y = metrics.height + s_State->style.framePadding.y * 2.0f;
    
    UIRect buttonRect(s_State->cursorPos, s_State->cursorPos + buttonSize);
    
    uint32 id = GetID(label);
    bool hovered = buttonRect.Contains(s_State->mousePos);
    bool active = s_State->activeId == id;
    
    if (hovered) {
        s_State->hoveredId = id;
    }
    
    bool clicked = false;
    
    if (hovered && s_State->mouseButtonsDown[0]) {
        s_State->activeId = id;
    }
    
    if (active && s_State->mouseButtonsReleased[0]) {
        if (hovered) {
            clicked = true;
        }
        s_State->activeId = 0;
    }
    
    // Draw button
    maths::Color buttonColor = s_State->style.buttonColor;
    if (active) {
        buttonColor = s_State->style.buttonActiveColor;
    } else if (hovered) {
        buttonColor = s_State->style.buttonHoveredColor;
    }
    
    AddRectFilled(buttonRect.min, buttonRect.max, buttonColor, s_State->style.frameRounding);
    
    // Draw text
    maths::Vector2f textPos = buttonRect.min + (buttonSize - maths::Vector2f(metrics.width, metrics.height)) * 0.5f;
    AddText(textPos, s_State->style.textColor, label);
    
    s_State->lastItemRect = buttonRect;
    
    if (!s_State->sameLine) {
        s_State->cursorPos.y += buttonSize.y + s_State->style.itemSpacing.y;
    } else {
        s_State->cursorPos.x += buttonSize.x + s_State->style.itemSpacing.x;
        s_State->sameLine = false;
    }
    
    return clicked;
}

bool UI::Checkbox(const std::string& label, bool* value) {
    if (!s_State->font || !value) return false;
    
    float checkSize = s_State->style.fontSize;
    UIRect checkRect(s_State->cursorPos, s_State->cursorPos + maths::Vector2f(checkSize, checkSize));
    
    uint32 id = GetID(label);
    bool hovered = checkRect.Contains(s_State->mousePos);
    bool clicked = false;
    
    if (hovered && s_State->mouseButtonsDown[0]) {
        *value = !*value;
        clicked = true;
    }
    
    // Draw checkbox frame
    maths::Color frameColor = hovered ? s_State->style.frameBgHoveredColor : s_State->style.frameBgColor;
    AddRectFilled(checkRect.min, checkRect.max, frameColor, s_State->style.frameRounding);
    AddRect(checkRect.min, checkRect.max, s_State->style.borderColor, s_State->style.frameRounding, 1.0f);
    
    // Draw checkmark
    if (*value) {
        float pad = checkSize * 0.25f;
        AddRectFilled(
            checkRect.min + maths::Vector2f(pad, pad),
            checkRect.max - maths::Vector2f(pad, pad),
            s_State->style.checkMarkColor,
            s_State->style.frameRounding * 0.5f
        );
    }
    
    // Draw label
    maths::Vector2f labelPos = maths::Vector2f(
        checkRect.max.x + s_State->style.itemInnerSpacing.x,
        checkRect.min.y
    );
    AddText(labelPos, s_State->style.textColor, label);
    
    TextMetrics metrics = s_State->font->MeasureText(label, 1.0f);
    s_State->lastItemRect = UIRect(
        checkRect.min,
        maths::Vector2f(labelPos.x + metrics.width, checkRect.max.y)
    );
    
    s_State->cursorPos.y += checkSize + s_State->style.itemSpacing.y;
    
    return clicked;
}

bool UI::SliderFloat(const std::string& label, float* value, float min, float max) {
    if (!value) return false;
    
    float sliderWidth = 200.0f;
    float sliderHeight = s_State->style.fontSize;
    
    UIRect sliderRect(s_State->cursorPos, s_State->cursorPos + maths::Vector2f(sliderWidth, sliderHeight));
    
    uint32 id = GetID(label);
    bool hovered = sliderRect.Contains(s_State->mousePos);
    bool active = s_State->activeId == id;
    bool changed = false;
    
    if (hovered && s_State->mouseButtonsDown[0]) {
        s_State->activeId = id;
    }
    
    if (active) {
        if (s_State->mouseButtons[0]) {
            float t = (s_State->mousePos.x - sliderRect.min.x) / sliderWidth;
            t = std::clamp(t, 0.0f, 1.0f);
            *value = min + t * (max - min);
            changed = true;
        } else {
            s_State->activeId = 0;
        }
    }
    
    // Draw slider background
    maths::Color bgColor = active ? s_State->style.frameBgActiveColor : 
                          (hovered ? s_State->style.frameBgHoveredColor : s_State->style.frameBgColor);
    AddRectFilled(sliderRect.min, sliderRect.max, bgColor, s_State->style.frameRounding);
    
    // Draw slider grab
    float t = (*value - min) / (max - min);
    float grabX = sliderRect.min.x + t * sliderWidth;
    float grabSize = s_State->style.grabMinSize;
    
    UIRect grabRect(
        grabX - grabSize * 0.5f,
        sliderRect.min.y,
        grabX + grabSize * 0.5f,
        sliderRect.max.y
    );
    
    maths::Color grabColor = active ? s_State->style.sliderGrabActiveColor : s_State->style.sliderGrabColor;
    AddRectFilled(grabRect.min, grabRect.max, grabColor, s_State->style.grabRounding);
    
    // Draw label
    if (s_State->font) {
        maths::Vector2f labelPos = maths::Vector2f(
            sliderRect.max.x + s_State->style.itemInnerSpacing.x,
            sliderRect.min.y
        );
        
        char valueStr[32];
        snprintf(valueStr, sizeof(valueStr), "%s: %.2f", label.c_str(), *value);
        AddText(labelPos, s_State->style.textColor, valueStr);
    }
    
    s_State->lastItemRect = sliderRect;
    s_State->cursorPos.y += sliderHeight + s_State->style.itemSpacing.y;
    
    return changed;
}

// =====================================================================
// DRAWING
// =====================================================================

void UI::AddRect(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max, 
                const maths::Color& color, float rounding, float thickness) {
    // Simplified rectangle drawing
    AddLine(min, maths::Vector2f(max.x, min.y), color, thickness);
    AddLine(maths::Vector2f(max.x, min.y), max, color, thickness);
    AddLine(max, maths::Vector2f(min.x, max.y), color, thickness);
    AddLine(maths::Vector2f(min.x, max.y), min, color, thickness);
}

void UI::AddRectFilled(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max, 
                      const maths::Color& color, float rounding) {
    uint32 baseIndex = static_cast<uint32>(s_State->vertices.size());
    
    s_State->vertices.push_back({min.x, min.y, 0.0f});
    s_State->vertices.push_back({max.x, min.y, 0.0f});
    s_State->vertices.push_back({max.x, max.y, 0.0f});
    s_State->vertices.push_back({min.x, max.y, 0.0f});
    
    s_State->texCoords.push_back({0, 0});
    s_State->texCoords.push_back({1, 0});
    s_State->texCoords.push_back({1, 1});
    s_State->texCoords.push_back({0, 1});
    
    s_State->colors.push_back(color);
    s_State->colors.push_back(color);
    s_State->colors.push_back(color);
    s_State->colors.push_back(color);
    
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 0);
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 1);
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 2);
    
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 0);
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 2);
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 3);
}

void UI::AddLine(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                const maths::Color& color, float thickness) {
    // Line as thin rectangle
    maths::Vector2f dir = p2 - p1;
    float length = std::sqrt(dir.x * dir.x + dir.y * dir.y);
    if (length < 0.001f) return;
    
    dir = dir / length;
    maths::Vector2f perp(-dir.y, dir.x);
    perp = perp * (thickness * 0.5f);
    
    uint32 baseIndex = static_cast<uint32>(s_State->vertices.size());
    
    s_State->vertices.push_back({p1.x + perp.x, p1.y + perp.y, 0.0f});
    s_State->vertices.push_back({p2.x + perp.x, p2.y + perp.y, 0.0f});
    s_State->vertices.push_back({p2.x - perp.x, p2.y - perp.y, 0.0f});
    s_State->vertices.push_back({p1.x - perp.x, p1.y - perp.y, 0.0f});
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        s_State->texCoords.push_back({0, 0});
        s_State->colors.push_back(color);
    }
    
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 0);
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 1);
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 2);
    
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 0);
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 2);
    s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + 3);
}

void UI::AddText(const maths::Vector2f& pos, const maths::Color& color, const std::string& text) {
    if (!s_State->font) return;
    
    // Text rendering would be done through TextRenderer in actual render
    // For now, just store the command
}

void UI::AddCircleFilled(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                        const maths::Color& color, int segments) {
    uint32 baseIndex = static_cast<uint32>(s_State->vertices.size());
    
    s_State->vertices.push_back({center.x, center.y, 0.0f});
    s_State->texCoords.push_back({0.5f, 0.5f});
    s_State->colors.push_back(color);
    
    for (int i = 0; i <= segments; i++) {
        float angle = (static_cast<float>(i) / segments) * 2.0f * 3.14159f;
        float x = center.x + std::cos(angle) * radius;
        float y = center.y + std::sin(angle) * radius;
        
        s_State->vertices.push_back({x, y, 0.0f});
        s_State->texCoords.push_back({0, 0});
        s_State->colors.push_back(color);
        
        if (i > 0) {
            s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex);
            s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + i);
            s_State->indices.push_back(baseIndex + i + 1);
        }
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// UTILITIES
// =====================================================================

bool UI::IsItemHovered() {
    return s_State->lastItemRect.Contains(s_State->mousePos);
}

bool UI::IsItemActive() {
    uint32 id = GetID("");
    return s_State->activeId == id;
}

maths::Vector2f UI::GetCursorPos() {
    return s_State->cursorPos;
}

void UI::SetCursorPos(const maths::Vector2f& pos) {
    s_State->cursorPos = pos;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

# Suite - UI System Amélioré (Customizable Real-Time ImGui)

---

## 51. UI SYSTEM AVANCÉ - Style Editor & Thème System

### Core/UI/UITheme.h

```cpp
// Core/UI/UITheme.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Color.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

enum class UIColorIndex {
    // Window
    WindowBackground,
    WindowBorder,
    TitleBar,
    TitleBarActive,
    TitleBarCollapsed,
    TitleText,
    
    // Frame
    FrameBackground,
    FrameBackgroundHovered,
    FrameBackgroundActive,
    FrameBorder,
    
    // Widget
    Button,
    ButtonHovered,
    ButtonActive,
    CheckMark,
    SliderGrab,
    SliderGrabActive,
    
    // Text
    Text,
    TextDisabled,
    TextSelectedBackground,
    
    // Scrollbar
    ScrollbarBackground,
    ScrollbarGrab,
    ScrollbarGrabHovered,
    ScrollbarGrabActive,
    
    // Separator
    Separator,
    SeparatorHovered,
    SeparatorActive,
    
    // Resize grip
    ResizeGrip,
    ResizeGripHovered,
    ResizeGripActive,
    
    // Tab
    Tab,
    TabHovered,
    TabActive,
    TabUnfocused,
    TabUnfocusedActive,
    
    // Plot
    PlotLines,
    PlotHistogram,
    
    // Table
    TableHeaderBackground,
    TableBorderStrong,
    TableBorderLight,
    TableRowBackground,
    TableRowBackgroundAlt,
    
    // Drag Drop
    DragDropTarget,
    
    // Modal
    ModalWindowDimBackground,
    
    COUNT
};

enum class UIStyleVar {
    // Sizes
    WindowPadding,
    WindowRounding,
    WindowBorderSize,
    WindowMinSize,
    ChildRounding,
    ChildBorderSize,
    PopupRounding,
    PopupBorderSize,
    FramePadding,
    FrameRounding,
    FrameBorderSize,
    ItemSpacing,
    ItemInnerSpacing,
    IndentSpacing,
    ScrollbarSize,
    ScrollbarRounding,
    GrabMinSize,
    GrabRounding,
    TabRounding,
    
    // Single floats
    Alpha,
    DisabledAlpha,
    
    COUNT
};

struct UITheme {
    std::string name = "Default";
    
    // Colors
    maths::Color colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::COUNT)];
    
    // Style variables (Vector2)
    maths::Vector2f windowPadding = {8.0f, 8.0f};
    maths::Vector2f framePadding = {4.0f, 3.0f};
    maths::Vector2f itemSpacing = {8.0f, 4.0f};
    maths::Vector2f itemInnerSpacing = {4.0f, 4.0f};
    maths::Vector2f windowMinSize = {32.0f, 32.0f};
    
    // Style variables (float)
    float windowRounding = 0.0f;
    float windowBorderSize = 1.0f;
    float childRounding = 0.0f;
    float childBorderSize = 1.0f;
    float popupRounding = 0.0f;
    float popupBorderSize = 1.0f;
    float frameRounding = 0.0f;
    float frameBorderSize = 0.0f;
    float indentSpacing = 21.0f;
    float scrollbarSize = 14.0f;
    float scrollbarRounding = 9.0f;
    float grabMinSize = 10.0f;
    float grabRounding = 0.0f;
    float tabRounding = 4.0f;
    
    float alpha = 1.0f;
    float disabledAlpha = 0.6f;
    
    // Font
    float fontSize = 16.0f;
    
    // Animation
    float animationSpeed = 0.3f;
    
    // Predefined themes
    static UITheme Dark();
    static UITheme Light();
    static UITheme Classic();
    static UITheme Dracula();
    static UITheme Nord();
    static UITheme Monokai();
    static UITheme SolarizedDark();
    static UITheme SolarizedLight();
    static UITheme GruvboxDark();
    static UITheme GruvboxLight();
    
    // Serialization
    bool SaveToFile(const std::string& filepath) const;
    bool LoadFromFile(const std::string& filepath);
    
    // Color manipulation
    maths::Color& GetColor(UIColorIndex idx) { return colors[static_cast<int>(idx)]; }
    const maths::Color& GetColor(UIColorIndex idx) const { return colors[static_cast<int>(idx)]; }
    
    void SetColor(UIColorIndex idx, const maths::Color& color) {
        colors[static_cast<int>(idx)] = color;
    }
};

class UIThemeManager {
public:
    static void Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    
    static void AddTheme(const std::string& name, const UITheme& theme);
    static UITheme* GetTheme(const std::string& name);
    static void SetActiveTheme(const std::string& name);
    static UITheme& GetActiveTheme();
    
    static std::vector<std::string> GetThemeNames();
    
    static void SaveTheme(const std::string& name, const std::string& filepath);
    static void LoadTheme(const std::string& filepath);
    
private:
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, UITheme> s_Themes;
    static std::string s_ActiveTheme;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```
