### Core/UI/UITheme.cpp

```cpp
// Core/UI/UITheme.cpp
#include "UITheme.h"
#include <fstream>

namespace nkentseu {

std::unordered_map<std::string, UITheme> UIThemeManager::s_Themes;
std::string UIThemeManager::s_ActiveTheme = "Dark";

// =====================================================================
// PREDEFINED THEMES
// =====================================================================

UITheme UITheme::Dark() {
    UITheme theme;
    theme.name = "Dark";
    
    // Window
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::WindowBackground)] = maths::Color(0.06f, 0.06f, 0.06f, 0.94f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::WindowBorder)] = maths::Color(0.43f, 0.43f, 0.50f, 0.50f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TitleBar)] = maths::Color(0.04f, 0.04f, 0.04f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TitleBarActive)] = maths::Color(0.16f, 0.29f, 0.48f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TitleText)] = maths::Color(1.00f, 1.00f, 1.00f, 1.00f);
    
    // Frame
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBackground)] = maths::Color(0.16f, 0.29f, 0.48f, 0.54f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBackgroundHovered)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 0.40f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBackgroundActive)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 0.67f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBorder)] = maths::Color(0.43f, 0.43f, 0.50f, 0.50f);
    
    // Button
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Button)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 0.40f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ButtonHovered)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ButtonActive)] = maths::Color(0.06f, 0.53f, 0.98f, 1.00f);
    
    // CheckMark & Slider
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::CheckMark)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::SliderGrab)] = maths::Color(0.24f, 0.52f, 0.88f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::SliderGrabActive)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 1.00f);
    
    // Text
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Text)] = maths::Color(1.00f, 1.00f, 1.00f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TextDisabled)] = maths::Color(0.50f, 0.50f, 0.50f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TextSelectedBackground)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 0.35f);
    
    // Scrollbar
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ScrollbarBackground)] = maths::Color(0.02f, 0.02f, 0.02f, 0.53f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ScrollbarGrab)] = maths::Color(0.31f, 0.31f, 0.31f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ScrollbarGrabHovered)] = maths::Color(0.41f, 0.41f, 0.41f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ScrollbarGrabActive)] = maths::Color(0.51f, 0.51f, 0.51f, 1.00f);
    
    // Separator
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Separator)] = maths::Color(0.43f, 0.43f, 0.50f, 0.50f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::SeparatorHovered)] = maths::Color(0.10f, 0.40f, 0.75f, 0.78f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::SeparatorActive)] = maths::Color(0.10f, 0.40f, 0.75f, 1.00f);
    
    return theme;
}

UITheme UITheme::Light() {
    UITheme theme;
    theme.name = "Light";
    
    // Window
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::WindowBackground)] = maths::Color(0.94f, 0.94f, 0.94f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::WindowBorder)] = maths::Color(0.00f, 0.00f, 0.00f, 0.30f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TitleBar)] = maths::Color(0.96f, 0.96f, 0.96f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TitleBarActive)] = maths::Color(0.82f, 0.82f, 0.82f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TitleText)] = maths::Color(0.00f, 0.00f, 0.00f, 1.00f);
    
    // Frame
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBackground)] = maths::Color(1.00f, 1.00f, 1.00f, 0.94f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBackgroundHovered)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 0.40f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBackgroundActive)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 0.67f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBorder)] = maths::Color(0.00f, 0.00f, 0.00f, 0.30f);
    
    // Button
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Button)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 0.40f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ButtonHovered)] = maths::Color(0.26f, 0.59f, 0.98f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ButtonActive)] = maths::Color(0.06f, 0.53f, 0.98f, 1.00f);
    
    // Text
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Text)] = maths::Color(0.00f, 0.00f, 0.00f, 1.00f);
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TextDisabled)] = maths::Color(0.60f, 0.60f, 0.60f, 1.00f);
    
    return theme;
}

UITheme UITheme::Dracula() {
    UITheme theme;
    theme.name = "Dracula";
    
    maths::Color background(0.117f, 0.121f, 0.172f, 1.0f);  // #282a36
    maths::Color current(0.172f, 0.184f, 0.254f, 1.0f);     // #44475a
    maths::Color foreground(0.945f, 0.945f, 0.945f, 1.0f);  // #f8f8f2
    maths::Color cyan(0.545f, 0.913f, 0.992f, 1.0f);        // #8be9fd
    maths::Color green(0.313f, 0.980f, 0.482f, 1.0f);       // #50fa7b
    maths::Color orange(1.0f, 0.733f, 0.471f, 1.0f);        // #ffb86c
    maths::Color pink(1.0f, 0.475f, 0.776f, 1.0f);          // #ff79c6
    maths::Color purple(0.741f, 0.576f, 0.976f, 1.0f);      // #bd93f9
    maths::Color red(1.0f, 0.333f, 0.333f, 1.0f);           // #ff5555
    maths::Color yellow(0.945f, 0.980f, 0.549f, 1.0f);      // #f1fa8c
    
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::WindowBackground)] = background;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::TitleBarActive)] = current;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Button)] = purple;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ButtonHovered)] = pink;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ButtonActive)] = red;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Text)] = foreground;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::CheckMark)] = green;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::SliderGrab)] = cyan;
    
    return theme;
}

UITheme UITheme::Nord() {
    UITheme theme;
    theme.name = "Nord";
    
    // Nord palette
    maths::Color nord0(0.180f, 0.204f, 0.251f, 1.0f);   // #2e3440
    maths::Color nord1(0.231f, 0.259f, 0.322f, 1.0f);   // #3b4252
    maths::Color nord3(0.298f, 0.337f, 0.416f, 1.0f);   // #4c566a
    maths::Color nord4(0.847f, 0.871f, 0.914f, 1.0f);   // #d8dee9
    maths::Color nord8(0.533f, 0.753f, 0.816f, 1.0f);   // #88c0d0
    maths::Color nord9(0.506f, 0.631f, 0.757f, 1.0f);   // #81a1c1
    maths::Color nord10(0.369f, 0.506f, 0.675f, 1.0f);  // #5e81ac
    
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::WindowBackground)] = nord0;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::FrameBackground)] = nord1;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Button)] = nord10;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ButtonHovered)] = nord9;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::ButtonActive)] = nord8;
    theme.colors[static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::Text)] = nord4;
    
    theme.windowRounding = 8.0f;
    theme.frameRounding = 4.0f;
    theme.grabRounding = 4.0f;
    
    return theme;
}

// =====================================================================
// THEME MANAGER
// =====================================================================

void UIThemeManager::Init() {
    s_Themes["Dark"] = UITheme::Dark();
    s_Themes["Light"] = UITheme::Light();
    s_Themes["Classic"] = UITheme::Classic();
    s_Themes["Dracula"] = UITheme::Dracula();
    s_Themes["Nord"] = UITheme::Nord();
    
    s_ActiveTheme = "Dark";
}

void UIThemeManager::Shutdown() {
    s_Themes.clear();
}

void UIThemeManager::AddTheme(const std::string& name, const UITheme& theme) {
    s_Themes[name] = theme;
}

UITheme* UIThemeManager::GetTheme(const std::string& name) {
    auto it = s_Themes.find(name);
    if (it != s_Themes.end()) {
        return &it->second;
    }
    return nullptr;
}

void UIThemeManager::SetActiveTheme(const std::string& name) {
    if (s_Themes.find(name) != s_Themes.end()) {
        s_ActiveTheme = name;
    }
}

UITheme& UIThemeManager::GetActiveTheme() {
    return s_Themes[s_ActiveTheme];
}

std::vector<std::string> UIThemeManager::GetThemeNames() {
    std::vector<std::string> names;
    for (const auto& pair : s_Themes) {
        names.push_back(pair.first);
    }
    return names;
}

bool UITheme::SaveToFile(const std::string& filepath) const {
    std::ofstream file(filepath);
    if (!file.is_open()) return false;
    
    file << "# UI Theme: " << name << "\n\n";
    
    // Save colors
    file << "[Colors]\n";
    for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(UIColorIndex::COUNT); i++) {
        file << i << " = " 
             << colors[i].r << " " 
             << colors[i].g << " " 
             << colors[i].b << " " 
             << colors[i].a << "\n";
    }
    
    // Save style vars
    file << "\n[Style]\n";
    file << "WindowPadding = " << windowPadding.x << " " << windowPadding.y << "\n";
    file << "FramePadding = " << framePadding.x << " " << framePadding.y << "\n";
    file << "ItemSpacing = " << itemSpacing.x << " " << itemSpacing.y << "\n";
    file << "WindowRounding = " << windowRounding << "\n";
    file << "FrameRounding = " << frameRounding << "\n";
    file << "GrabRounding = " << grabRounding << "\n";
    
    file.close();
    return true;
}

bool UITheme::LoadFromFile(const std::string& filepath) {
    std::ifstream file(filepath);
    if (!file.is_open()) return false;
    
    // TODO: Implement theme file parsing
    
    file.close();
    return true;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 52. UI STYLE EDITOR - Real-Time Customization

### Core/UI/UIStyleEditor.h

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIStyleEditor.h
#pragma once

#include "UITheme.h"
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

class UIStyleEditor {
public:
    static void Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    
    // Show the style editor window
    static void Show(bool* open = nullptr);
    
    // Callback when theme changes
    using ThemeChangeCallback = std::function<void(const UITheme&)>;
    static void SetThemeChangeCallback(ThemeChangeCallback callback);
    
    // Export/Import
    static void ExportCurrentTheme(const std::string& filepath);
    static void ImportTheme(const std::string& filepath);
    
private:
    static void ShowColorEditor();
    static void ShowStyleEditor();
    static void ShowThemeSelector();
    static void ShowPreview();
    
    static bool s_ShowColorEditor;
    static bool s_ShowStyleEditor;
    static bool s_ShowPreview;
    static ThemeChangeCallback s_Callback;
    static UITheme s_EditingTheme;
    static std::string s_ThemeName;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/UI/UIStyleEditor.cpp

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIStyleEditor.cpp
#include "UIStyleEditor.h"
#include "UIContext.h"

namespace nkentseu {

bool UIStyleEditor::s_ShowColorEditor = true;
bool UIStyleEditor::s_ShowStyleEditor = true;
bool UIStyleEditor::s_ShowPreview = true;
UIStyleEditor::ThemeChangeCallback UIStyleEditor::s_Callback = nullptr;
UITheme UIStyleEditor::s_EditingTheme;
std::string UIStyleEditor::s_ThemeName = "Custom";

void UIStyleEditor::Init() {
    s_EditingTheme = UIThemeManager::GetActiveTheme();
}

void UIStyleEditor::Shutdown() {
}

void UIStyleEditor::Show(bool* open) {
    if (!UI::Begin("UI Style Editor", open, {800, 600})) {
        UI::End();
        return;
    }
    
    // Theme selector
    ShowThemeSelector();
    
    UI::Separator();
    
    // Tabs
    static int activeTab = 0;
    
    if (UI::Button("Colors")) activeTab = 0;
    UI::SameLine();
    if (UI::Button("Style")) activeTab = 1;
    UI::SameLine();
    if (UI::Button("Preview")) activeTab = 2;
    
    UI::Separator();
    
    if (activeTab == 0) {
        ShowColorEditor();
    } else if (activeTab == 1) {
        ShowStyleEditor();
    } else if (activeTab == 2) {
        ShowPreview();
    }
    
    UI::Separator();
    
    // Actions
    if (UI::Button("Apply")) {
        UIThemeManager::GetActiveTheme() = s_EditingTheme;
        if (s_Callback) {
            s_Callback(s_EditingTheme);
        }
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    if (UI::Button("Save As...")) {
        // TODO: Show save dialog
        UIThemeManager::AddTheme(s_ThemeName, s_EditingTheme);
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    if (UI::Button("Export")) {
        ExportCurrentTheme("theme.uitheme");
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    if (UI::Button("Import")) {
        ImportTheme("theme.uitheme");
    }
    
    UI::End();
}

void UIStyleEditor::ShowColorEditor() {
    UI::Text("Color Customization");
    UI::Separator();
    
    // Window colors
    if (UI::TreeNode("Window")) {
        maths::Color& windowBg = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::WindowBackground);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Window Background", windowBg);
        
        maths::Color& border = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::WindowBorder);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Window Border", border);
        
        maths::Color& titleBar = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::TitleBar);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Title Bar", titleBar);
        
        maths::Color& titleBarActive = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::TitleBarActive);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Title Bar Active", titleBarActive);
        
        maths::Color& titleText = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::TitleText);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Title Text", titleText);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
    
    // Frame colors
    if (UI::TreeNode("Frame")) {
        maths::Color& frameBg = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::FrameBackground);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Frame Background", frameBg);
        
        maths::Color& frameBgHovered = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::FrameBackgroundHovered);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Frame Hovered", frameBgHovered);
        
        maths::Color& frameBgActive = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::FrameBackgroundActive);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Frame Active", frameBgActive);
        
        maths::Color& frameBorder = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::FrameBorder);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Frame Border", frameBorder);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
    
    // Button colors
    if (UI::TreeNode("Button")) {
        maths::Color& button = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::Button);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Button", button);
        
        maths::Color& buttonHovered = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::ButtonHovered);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Button Hovered", buttonHovered);
        
        maths::Color& buttonActive = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::ButtonActive);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Button Active", buttonActive);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
    
    // Text colors
    if (UI::TreeNode("Text")) {
        maths::Color& text = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::Text);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Text", text);
        
        maths::Color& textDisabled = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::TextDisabled);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Text Disabled", textDisabled);
        
        maths::Color& textSelected = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::TextSelectedBackground);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Text Selected", textSelected);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
    
    // Widget colors
    if (UI::TreeNode("Widgets")) {
        maths::Color& checkMark = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::CheckMark);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Check Mark", checkMark);
        
        maths::Color& sliderGrab = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::SliderGrab);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Slider Grab", sliderGrab);
        
        maths::Color& sliderGrabActive = s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::SliderGrabActive);
        UI::ColorEdit4("Slider Grab Active", sliderGrabActive);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
}

void UIStyleEditor::ShowStyleEditor() {
    UI::Text("Style Variables");
    UI::Separator();
    
    // Padding & Spacing
    if (UI::TreeNode("Padding & Spacing")) {
        UI::SliderFloat("Window Padding X", &s_EditingTheme.windowPadding.x, 0.0f, 20.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Window Padding Y", &s_EditingTheme.windowPadding.y, 0.0f, 20.0f);
        
        UI::SliderFloat("Frame Padding X", &s_EditingTheme.framePadding.x, 0.0f, 20.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Frame Padding Y", &s_EditingTheme.framePadding.y, 0.0f, 20.0f);
        
        UI::SliderFloat("Item Spacing X", &s_EditingTheme.itemSpacing.x, 0.0f, 20.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Item Spacing Y", &s_EditingTheme.itemSpacing.y, 0.0f, 20.0f);
        
        UI::SliderFloat("Item Inner Spacing X", &s_EditingTheme.itemInnerSpacing.x, 0.0f, 20.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Item Inner Spacing Y", &s_EditingTheme.itemInnerSpacing.y, 0.0f, 20.0f);
        
        UI::SliderFloat("Indent Spacing", &s_EditingTheme.indentSpacing, 0.0f, 30.0f);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
    
    // Rounding
    if (UI::TreeNode("Rounding")) {
        UI::SliderFloat("Window Rounding", &s_EditingTheme.windowRounding, 0.0f, 12.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Child Rounding", &s_EditingTheme.childRounding, 0.0f, 12.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Frame Rounding", &s_EditingTheme.frameRounding, 0.0f, 12.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Popup Rounding", &s_EditingTheme.popupRounding, 0.0f, 12.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Scrollbar Rounding", &s_EditingTheme.scrollbarRounding, 0.0f, 12.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Grab Rounding", &s_EditingTheme.grabRounding, 0.0f, 12.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Tab Rounding", &s_EditingTheme.tabRounding, 0.0f, 12.0f);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
    
    // Borders
    if (UI::TreeNode("Borders")) {
        UI::SliderFloat("Window Border Size", &s_EditingTheme.windowBorderSize, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Child Border Size", &s_EditingTheme.childBorderSize, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Popup Border Size", &s_EditingTheme.popupBorderSize, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Frame Border Size", &s_EditingTheme.frameBorderSize, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
    
    // Sizes
    if (UI::TreeNode("Sizes")) {
        UI::SliderFloat("Scrollbar Size", &s_EditingTheme.scrollbarSize, 1.0f, 20.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Grab Min Size", &s_EditingTheme.grabMinSize, 1.0f, 20.0f);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
    
    // Alpha
    if (UI::TreeNode("Alpha")) {
        UI::SliderFloat("Global Alpha", &s_EditingTheme.alpha, 0.2f, 1.0f);
        UI::SliderFloat("Disabled Alpha", &s_EditingTheme.disabledAlpha, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        
        UI::TreePop();
    }
}

void UIStyleEditor::ShowThemeSelector() {
    UI::Text("Theme:");
    UI::SameLine();
    
    std::vector<std::string> themes = UIThemeManager::GetThemeNames();
    std::string current = UIThemeManager::GetActiveTheme().name;
    
    if (UI::BeginCombo("##theme", current)) {
        for (const auto& theme : themes) {
            bool selected = (theme == current);
            if (UI::Selectable(theme, selected)) {
                UIThemeManager::SetActiveTheme(theme);
                s_EditingTheme = UIThemeManager::GetActiveTheme();
            }
        }
        UI::EndCombo();
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    UI::InputText("##themename", s_ThemeName);
}

void UIStyleEditor::ShowPreview() {
    UI::Text("Preview");
    UI::Separator();
    
    // Window preview
    UI::Text("Window Example:");
    if (UI::Begin("Preview Window", nullptr, {400, 300})) {
        UI::Text("This is a preview window");
        UI::Separator();
        
        static bool checkbox = false;
        UI::Checkbox("Checkbox", &checkbox);
        
        if (UI::Button("Button")) {
            UI::Text("Button clicked!");
        }
        
        static float slider = 0.5f;
        UI::SliderFloat("Slider", &slider, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        
        static std::string input = "Input text";
        UI::InputText("Input", input);
        
        UI::TextColored(s_EditingTheme.GetColor(UIColorIndex::Button), "Colored Text");
        
        UI::End();
    }
}

void UIStyleEditor::SetThemeChangeCallback(ThemeChangeCallback callback) {
    s_Callback = callback;
}

void UIStyleEditor::ExportCurrentTheme(const std::string& filepath) {
    s_EditingTheme.SaveToFile(filepath);
}

void UIStyleEditor::ImportTheme(const std::string& filepath) {
    UITheme imported;
    if (imported.LoadFromFile(filepath)) {
        s_EditingTheme = imported;
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 53. EXEMPLE D'UTILISATION - UI Customizable

### Sandbox/UIDemo.cpp

```cpp
// Sandbox/UIDemo.cpp
#include <UI/UIContext.h>
#include <UI/UITheme.h>
#include <UI/UIStyleEditor.h>
#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Event/EventListener.h>
#include <Renderer/Renderer2D.h>
#include <Font/Font.h>

using namespace nkentseu;

int main() {
    // Create window
    WindowProperties props;
    props.title = "UI Customization Demo";
    props.size = maths::Vector2u(1600, 900);
    
    Window* window = Window::Create(props);
    window->Initialize();
    window->Show();
    
    // Initialize rendering
    RendererConfig cfg;
    cfg.api = RendererAPI::OpenGL;
    Renderer* renderer = window->CreateRenderer(cfg);
    renderer->Initialize(window, cfg);
    
    RenderCommand::SetRenderer(renderer);
    RenderCommand::Init();
    Renderer2D::Init();
    
    // Load font
    FontLibrary::Init();
    Font* font = FontLibrary::Load("default", "Assets/Fonts/Roboto-Regular.ttf", 16);
    
    // Initialize UI
    UIThemeManager::Init();
    UI::Init(window, font);
    UIStyleEditor::Init();
    
    // State
    bool running = true;
    bool showStyleEditor = true;
    bool showDemoWindow = true;
    
    // Custom UI state
    static float customValue = 0.5f;
    static bool customCheckbox = false;
    static std::string customInput = "Type here...";
    
    // Event handling
    EventTracker.AddObserver([&](Event& e) {
        UI::ProcessEvent(e);
        
        if (auto* closed = e.As<WindowStatusEvent>()) {
            if (closed->GetState() == WindowState::Closed) {
                running = false;
            }
        }
        else if (auto* key = e.As<KeyboardEvent>()) {
            if (key->IsPressed() && key->GetKeycode() == Keyboard::Escape) {
                running = false;
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Set theme change callback
    UIStyleEditor::SetThemeChangeCallback([](const UITheme& theme) {
        printf("Theme changed to: %s\n", theme.name.c_str());
    });
    
    // Main loop
    while (running && window->IsOpen()) {
        EventTracker.ProcessQueue();
        
        renderer->BeginFrame();
        RenderCommand::Clear();
        
        // Begin UI frame
        UI::NewFrame();
        
        // Style editor
        if (showStyleEditor) {
            UIStyleEditor::Show(&showStyleEditor);
        }
        
        // Demo window
        if (showDemoWindow) {
            if (UI::Begin("Demo Window", &showDemoWindow, {600, 400})) {
                UI::Text("Welcome to the UI Customization Demo!");
                UI::Separator();
                
                if (UI::Button("Show Style Editor")) {
                    showStyleEditor = true;
                }
                
                UI::Separator();
                UI::Text("Widgets:");
                
                UI::Checkbox("Checkbox", &customCheckbox);
                UI::SliderFloat("Slider", &customValue, 0.0f, 1.0f);
                UI::InputText("Input", customInput);
                
                UI::Separator();
                UI::Text("Colors:");
                
                maths::Color redText(1.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f);
                UI::TextColored(redText, "Red colored text");
                
                maths::Color greenText(0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f);
                UI::TextColored(greenText, "Green colored text");
                
                maths::Color blueText(0.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
                UI::TextColored(blueText, "Blue colored text");
                
                UI::Separator();
                UI::Text("Theme Selector:");
                
                std::vector<std::string> themes = UIThemeManager::GetThemeNames();
                std::string current = UIThemeManager::GetActiveTheme().name;
                
                if (UI::BeginCombo("Theme", current)) {
                    for (const auto& theme : themes) {
                        if (UI::Selectable(theme, theme == current)) {
                            UIThemeManager::SetActiveTheme(theme);
                        }
                    }
                    UI::EndCombo();
                }
                
                UI::End();
            }
        }
        
        // Render UI
        UI::Render();
        
        renderer->EndFrame();
        renderer->Present();
    }
    
    // Cleanup
    UIStyleEditor::Shutdown();
    UI::Shutdown();
    FontLibrary::Shutdown();
    Renderer2D::Shutdown();
    RenderCommand::Shutdown();
    
    renderer->Shutdown();
    window->Shutdown();
    
    delete renderer;
    delete window;
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 54. UI CUSTOM SHAPES & DRAWING API

### Core/UI/UIDrawList.h

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIDrawList.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Color.h>
#include <Renderer/Texture.h>
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

struct UIVertex {
    maths::Vector2f position;
    maths::Vector2f texCoord;
    maths::Color color;
};

enum class UIDrawCornerFlags {
    None = 0,
    TopLeft = 1 << 0,
    TopRight = 1 << 1,
    BottomLeft = 1 << 2,
    BottomRight = 1 << 3,
    Top = TopLeft | TopRight,
    Bottom = BottomLeft | BottomRight,
    Left = TopLeft | BottomLeft,
    Right = TopRight | BottomRight,
    All = 0xF
};

class UIDrawList {
public:
    UIDrawList();
    ~UIDrawList();
    
    // Primitives - Lines
    void AddLine(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                 const maths::Color& color, float thickness = 1.0f);
    void AddPolyline(const maths::Vector2f* points, int count, 
                     const maths::Color& color, bool closed, float thickness = 1.0f);
    void AddBezierCubic(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                        const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Vector2f& p4, 
                        const maths::Color& color, float thickness = 1.0f, int segments = 0);
    void AddBezierQuadratic(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                            const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Color& color, 
                            float thickness = 1.0f, int segments = 0);
    
    // Primitives - Filled
    void AddRect(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max, 
                 const maths::Color& color, float rounding = 0.0f, 
                 int cornerFlags = static_cast<int>(UIDrawCornerFlags::All), 
                 float thickness = 1.0f);
    void AddRectFilled(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max, 
                       const maths::Color& color, float rounding = 0.0f, 
                       int cornerFlags = static_cast<int>(UIDrawCornerFlags::All));
    void AddRectFilledMultiColor(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max,
                                  const maths::Color& topLeft, const maths::Color& topRight,
                                  const maths::Color& bottomRight, const maths::Color& bottomLeft);
    
    void AddQuad(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                 const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Vector2f& p4, 
                 const maths::Color& color, float thickness = 1.0f);
    void AddQuadFilled(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                       const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Vector2f& p4, 
                       const maths::Color& color);
    
    void AddTriangle(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                     const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Color& color, 
                     float thickness = 1.0f);
    void AddTriangleFilled(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                           const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Color& color);
    
    void AddCircle(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                   const maths::Color& color, int segments = 0, float thickness = 1.0f);
    void AddCircleFilled(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                         const maths::Color& color, int segments = 0);
    
    void AddNgon(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                 const maths::Color& color, int numSegments, float thickness = 1.0f);
    void AddNgonFilled(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                       const maths::Color& color, int numSegments);
    
    void AddEllipse(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radiusX, float radiusY,
                    const maths::Color& color, float rotation = 0.0f, 
                    int segments = 0, float thickness = 1.0f);
    void AddEllipseFilled(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radiusX, float radiusY,
                          const maths::Color& color, float rotation = 0.0f, int segments = 0);
    
    // Custom shapes
    void AddConvexPolyFilled(const maths::Vector2f* points, int count, 
                             const maths::Color& color);
    void AddConcavePolyFilled(const maths::Vector2f* points, int count, 
                              const maths::Color& color);
    
    // Path API (for complex shapes)
    void PathClear();
    void PathLineTo(const maths::Vector2f& pos);
    void PathLineToMergeDuplicate(const maths::Vector2f& pos);
    void PathFillConvex(const maths::Color& color);
    void PathStroke(const maths::Color& color, bool closed, float thickness = 1.0f);
    void PathArcTo(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                   float amin, float amax, int segments = 0);
    void PathArcToFast(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                       int amin12, int amax12);
    void PathBezierCubicCurveTo(const maths::Vector2f& p2, const maths::Vector2f& p3, 
                                 const maths::Vector2f& p4, int segments = 0);
    void PathBezierQuadraticCurveTo(const maths::Vector2f& p2, const maths::Vector2f& p3, 
                                     int segments = 0);
    void PathRect(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max, 
                  float rounding = 0.0f, int cornerFlags = static_cast<int>(UIDrawCornerFlags::All));
    
    // Image
    void AddImage(Texture2D* texture, const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max,
                  const maths::Vector2f& uvMin = {0, 0}, const maths::Vector2f& uvMax = {1, 1},
                  const maths::Color& tintColor = maths::Color(1, 1, 1, 1));
    void AddImageQuad(Texture2D* texture, 
                      const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2,
                      const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Vector2f& p4,
                      const maths::Vector2f& uv1 = {0, 0}, const maths::Vector2f& uv2 = {1, 0},
                      const maths::Vector2f& uv3 = {1, 1}, const maths::Vector2f& uv4 = {0, 1},
                      const maths::Color& color = maths::Color(1, 1, 1, 1));
    void AddImageRounded(Texture2D* texture, const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max,
                         const maths::Vector2f& uvMin, const maths::Vector2f& uvMax,
                         const maths::Color& color, float rounding, int cornerFlags = static_cast<int>(UIDrawCornerFlags::All));
    
    // Text (if font provided)
    void AddText(const maths::Vector2f& pos, const maths::Color& color, 
                 const char* textBegin, const char* textEnd = nullptr);
    
    // Advanced
    void PushClipRect(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max, 
                      bool intersectWithCurrentClip = false);
    void PushClipRectFullScreen();
    void PopClipRect();
    void PushTextureID(Texture2D* texture);
    void PopTextureID();
    
    // Low-level
    void PrimReserve(int idxCount, int vtxCount);
    void PrimUnreserve(int idxCount, int vtxCount);
    void PrimRect(const maths::Vector2f& a, const maths::Vector2f& b, const maths::Color& color);
    void PrimRectUV(const maths::Vector2f& a, const maths::Vector2f& b, 
                    const maths::Vector2f& uvA, const maths::Vector2f& uvB, 
                    const maths::Color& color);
    void PrimQuadUV(const maths::Vector2f& a, const maths::Vector2f& b, 
                    const maths::Vector2f& c, const maths::Vector2f& d,
                    const maths::Vector2f& uvA, const maths::Vector2f& uvB, 
                    const maths::Vector2f& uvC, const maths::Vector2f& uvD,
                    const maths::Color& color);
    void PrimWriteVtx(const maths::Vector2f& pos, const maths::Vector2f& uv, 
                      const maths::Color& color);
    void PrimWriteIdx(uint32 idx);
    void PrimVtx(const maths::Vector2f& pos, const maths::Vector2f& uv, 
                 const maths::Color& color);
    
    // Data access
    const std::vector<UIVertex>& GetVertices() const { return m_Vertices; }
    const std::vector<uint32>& GetIndices() const { return m_Indices; }
    
    void Clear();
    
private:
    std::vector<UIVertex> m_Vertices;
    std::vector<uint32> m_Indices;
    std::vector<maths::Vector2f> m_Path;
    
    std::vector<maths::Vector4f> m_ClipRectStack;
    std::vector<Texture2D*> m_TextureIdStack;
    
    maths::Vector4f m_CurrentClipRect;
    Texture2D* m_CurrentTexture = nullptr;
    
    void AddDrawCmd();
    void PathArcToN(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius, 
                    float amin, float amax, int segments);
    int CalcCircleAutoSegmentCount(float radius) const;
};

// Global draw list for custom drawing
class UICanvas {
public:
    static UIDrawList* GetForegroundDrawList();
    static UIDrawList* GetBackgroundDrawList();
    static UIDrawList* GetWindowDrawList();
    
    static void Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    static void NewFrame();
    static void Render();
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/UI/UIDrawList.cpp

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIDrawList.cpp
#include "UIDrawList.h"
#include <cmath>
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

static UIDrawList* s_ForegroundDrawList = nullptr;
static UIDrawList* s_BackgroundDrawList = nullptr;
static UIDrawList* s_WindowDrawList = nullptr;

UIDrawList::UIDrawList() {
    m_CurrentClipRect = {-8192.0f, -8192.0f, 8192.0f, 8192.0f};
}

UIDrawList::~UIDrawList() {
}

void UIDrawList::Clear() {
    m_Vertices.clear();
    m_Indices.clear();
    m_Path.clear();
    m_ClipRectStack.clear();
    m_TextureIdStack.clear();
}

// =====================================================================
// LINES
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::AddLine(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2, 
                         const maths::Color& color, float thickness) {
    if ((color.a == 0) || thickness <= 0.0f) return;
    
    PathLineTo(p1 + maths::Vector2f(0.5f, 0.5f));
    PathLineTo(p2 + maths::Vector2f(0.5f, 0.5f));
    PathStroke(color, false, thickness);
}

void UIDrawList::AddPolyline(const maths::Vector2f* points, int count, 
                             const maths::Color& color, bool closed, float thickness) {
    if (count < 2 || color.a == 0) return;
    
    PathClear();
    for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        PathLineTo(points[i]);
    }
    PathStroke(color, closed, thickness);
}

void UIDrawList::AddBezierCubic(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2,
                                const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Vector2f& p4,
                                const maths::Color& color, float thickness, int segments) {
    if (color.a == 0 || thickness <= 0.0f) return;
    
    PathLineTo(p1);
    PathBezierCubicCurveTo(p2, p3, p4, segments);
    PathStroke(color, false, thickness);
}

void UIDrawList::AddBezierQuadratic(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2,
                                    const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Color& color,
                                    float thickness, int segments) {
    if (color.a == 0 || thickness <= 0.0f) return;
    
    PathLineTo(p1);
    PathBezierQuadraticCurveTo(p2, p3, segments);
    PathStroke(color, false, thickness);
}

// =====================================================================
// RECTANGLES
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::AddRect(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max,
                         const maths::Color& color, float rounding, int cornerFlags, 
                         float thickness) {
    if (color.a == 0 || thickness <= 0.0f) return;
    
    if (rounding > 0.0f) {
        PathRect(min + maths::Vector2f(0.5f, 0.5f), max - maths::Vector2f(0.5f, 0.5f), 
                rounding, cornerFlags);
        PathStroke(color, true, thickness);
    } else {
        PathRect(min + maths::Vector2f(0.5f, 0.5f), max - maths::Vector2f(0.5f, 0.5f), 
                0.0f, cornerFlags);
        PathStroke(color, true, thickness);
    }
}

void UIDrawList::AddRectFilled(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max,
                               const maths::Color& color, float rounding, int cornerFlags) {
    if (color.a == 0) return;
    
    if (rounding > 0.0f) {
        PathRect(min, max, rounding, cornerFlags);
        PathFillConvex(color);
    } else {
        PrimReserve(6, 4);
        PrimRect(min, max, color);
    }
}

void UIDrawList::AddRectFilledMultiColor(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max,
                                         const maths::Color& topLeft, const maths::Color& topRight,
                                         const maths::Color& bottomRight, const maths::Color& bottomLeft) {
    PrimReserve(6, 4);
    PrimWriteIdx(static_cast<uint32>(m_Vertices.size()));
    PrimWriteIdx(static_cast<uint32>(m_Vertices.size() + 1));
    PrimWriteIdx(static_cast<uint32>(m_Vertices.size + 2));
    PrimWriteIdx(static_cast<uint32>(m_Vertices.size()));
    PrimWriteIdx(static_cast<uint32>(m_Vertices.size + 2));
    PrimWriteIdx(static_cast<uint32>(m_Vertices.size() + 3));
    PrimWriteVtx(min, {0, 0}, topLeft);
    PrimWriteVtx({max.x, min.y}, {1, 0}, topRight);
    PrimWriteVtx(max, {1, 1}, bottomRight);
    PrimWriteVtx({min.x, max.y}, {0, 1}, bottomLeft);
}

// =====================================================================
// TRIANGLES
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::AddTriangle(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2,
                             const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Color& color, 
                             float thickness) {
    if (color.a == 0 || thickness <= 0.0f) return;
    
    PathLineTo(p1);
    PathLineTo(p2);
    PathLineTo(p3);
    PathStroke(color, true, thickness);
}

void UIDrawList::AddTriangleFilled(const maths::Vector2f& p1, const maths::Vector2f& p2,
                                   const maths::Vector2f& p3, const maths::Color& color) {
    if (color.a == 0) return;
    
    PathLineTo(p1);
    PathLineTo(p2);
    PathLineTo(p3);
    PathFillConvex(color);
}

// =====================================================================
// CIRCLES
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::AddCircle(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius,
                           const maths::Color& color, int segments, float thickness) {
    if (color.a == 0 || radius <= 0.0f || thickness <= 0.0f) return;
    
    if (segments <= 0) {
        segments = CalcCircleAutoSegmentCount(radius);
    }
    
    PathArcToFast(center, radius - 0.5f, 0, segments);
    PathStroke(color, true, thickness);
}

void UIDrawList::AddCircleFilled(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius,
                                 const maths::Color& color, int segments) {
    if (color.a == 0 || radius <= 0.0f) return;
    
    if (segments <= 0) {
        segments = CalcCircleAutoSegmentCount(radius);
    }
    
    PathArcToFast(center, radius, 0, segments);
    PathFillConvex(color);
}

// =====================================================================
// ELLIPSE
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::AddEllipse(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radiusX, float radiusY,
                            const maths::Color& color, float rotation, int segments, 
                            float thickness) {
    if (color.a == 0 || thickness <= 0.0f) return;
    
    if (segments <= 0) {
        segments = CalcCircleAutoSegmentCount(std::max(radiusX, radiusY));
    }
    
    PathClear();
    
    for (int i = 0; i <= segments; i++) {
        float angle = (static_cast<float>(i) / segments) * 2.0f * 3.14159265f;
        float x = std::cos(angle) * radiusX;
        float y = std::sin(angle) * radiusY;
        
        // Apply rotation
        float cosR = std::cos(rotation);
        float sinR = std::sin(rotation);
        float rotX = x * cosR - y * sinR;
        float rotY = x * sinR + y * cosR;
        
        PathLineTo(center + maths::Vector2f(rotX, rotY));
    }
    
    PathStroke(color, true, thickness);
}

void UIDrawList::AddEllipseFilled(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radiusX, float radiusY,
                                  const maths::Color& color, float rotation, int segments) {
    if (color.a == 0) return;
    
    if (segments <= 0) {
        segments = CalcCircleAutoSegmentCount(std::max(radiusX, radiusY));
    }
    
    PathClear();
    
    for (int i = 0; i < segments; i++) {
        float angle = (static_cast<float>(i) / segments) * 2.0f * 3.14159265f;
        float x = std::cos(angle) * radiusX;
        float y = std::sin(angle) * radiusY;
        
        float cosR = std::cos(rotation);
        float sinR = std::sin(rotation);
        float rotX = x * cosR - y * sinR;
        float rotY = x * sinR + y * cosR;
        
        PathLineTo(center + maths::Vector2f(rotX, rotY));
    }
    
    PathFillConvex(color);
}

// =====================================================================
// N-GON
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::AddNgon(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius,
                         const maths::Color& color, int numSegments, float thickness) {
    if (color.a == 0 || numSegments < 3 || thickness <= 0.0f) return;
    
    PathClear();
    
    for (int i = 0; i < numSegments; i++) {
        float angle = (static_cast<float>(i) / numSegments) * 2.0f * 3.14159265f;
        PathLineTo(center + maths::Vector2f(std::cos(angle), std::sin(angle)) * radius);
    }
    
    PathStroke(color, true, thickness);
}

void UIDrawList::AddNgonFilled(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius,
                               const maths::Color& color, int numSegments) {
    if (color.a == 0 || numSegments < 3) return;
    
    PathClear();
    
    for (int i = 0; i < numSegments; i++) {
        float angle = (static_cast<float>(i) / numSegments) * 2.0f * 3.14159265f;
        PathLineTo(center + maths::Vector2f(std::cos(angle), std::sin(angle)) * radius);
    }
    
    PathFillConvex(color);
}

// =====================================================================
// CONVEX POLYGON
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::AddConvexPolyFilled(const maths::Vector2f* points, int count,
                                     const maths::Color& color) {
    if (count < 3 || color.a == 0) return;
    
    PathClear();
    for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        PathLineTo(points[i]);
    }
    PathFillConvex(color);
}

// =====================================================================
// PATH API
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::PathClear() {
    m_Path.clear();
}

void UIDrawList::PathLineTo(const maths::Vector2f& pos) {
    m_Path.push_back(pos);
}

void UIDrawList::PathLineToMergeDuplicate(const maths::Vector2f& pos) {
    if (m_Path.empty() || m_Path.back() != pos) {
        m_Path.push_back(pos);
    }
}

void UIDrawList::PathFillConvex(const maths::Color& color) {
    if (m_Path.size() < 3) return;
    
    uint32 vtxBase = static_cast<uint32>(m_Vertices.size());
    
    for (const auto& point : m_Path) {
        PrimWriteVtx(point, {0, 0}, color);
    }
    
    for (int i = 2; i < static_cast<int>(m_Path.size()); i++) {
        PrimWriteIdx(vtxBase);
        PrimWriteIdx(vtxBase + i - 1);
        PrimWriteIdx(vtxBase + i);
    }
    
    m_Path.clear();
}

void UIDrawList::PathStroke(const maths::Color& color, bool closed, float thickness) {
    if (m_Path.size() < 2) return;
    
    // Simplified line rendering
    for (size_t i = 0; i < m_Path.size() - 1; i++) {
        AddLine(m_Path[i], m_Path[i + 1], color, thickness);
    }
    
    if (closed && m_Path.size() > 2) {
        AddLine(m_Path.back(), m_Path.front(), color, thickness);
    }
    
    m_Path.clear();
}

void UIDrawList::PathRect(const maths::Vector2f& min, const maths::Vector2f& max,
                          float rounding, int cornerFlags) {
    if (rounding <= 0.0f || cornerFlags == 0) {
        PathLineTo(min);
        PathLineTo({max.x, min.y});
        PathLineTo(max);
        PathLineTo({min.x, max.y});
    } else {
        // Rounded rect implementation
        // Simplified version - full implementation would handle each corner
        float r = std::min(rounding, std::min(max.x - min.x, max.y - min.y) * 0.5f);
        
        // Top-left
        if (cornerFlags & static_cast<int>(UIDrawCornerFlags::TopLeft)) {
            PathArcToFast({min.x + r, min.y + r}, r, 6, 9);
        } else {
            PathLineTo(min);
        }
        
        // Top-right
        if (cornerFlags & static_cast<int>(UIDrawCornerFlags::TopRight)) {
            PathArcToFast({max.x - r, min.y + r}, r, 9, 12);
        } else {
            PathLineTo({max.x, min.y});
        }
        
        // Bottom-right
        if (cornerFlags & static_cast<int>(UIDrawCornerFlags::BottomRight)) {
            PathArcToFast({max.x - r, max.y - r}, r, 0, 3);
        } else {
            PathLineTo(max);
        }
        
        // Bottom-left
        if (cornerFlags & static_cast<int>(UIDrawCornerFlags::BottomLeft)) {
            PathArcToFast({min.x + r, max.y - r}, r, 3, 6);
        } else {
            PathLineTo({min.x, max.y});
        }
    }
}

void UIDrawList::PathArcToFast(const maths::Vector2f& center, float radius,
                               int amin12, int amax12) {
    static const maths::Vector2f circle12[12] = {
        {1.0f, 0.0f}, {0.866f, 0.5f}, {0.5f, 0.866f}, {0.0f, 1.0f},
        {-0.5f, 0.866f}, {-0.866f, 0.5f}, {-1.0f, 0.0f}, {-0.866f, -0.5f},
        {-0.5f, -0.866f}, {0.0f, -1.0f}, {0.5f, -0.866f}, {0.866f, -0.5f}
    };
    
    for (int a = amin12; a <= amax12; a++) {
        PathLineTo(center + circle12[a % 12] * radius);
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// PRIMITIVES
// =====================================================================

void UIDrawList::PrimReserve(int idxCount, int vtxCount) {
    m_Vertices.reserve(m_Vertices.size() + vtxCount);
    m_Indices.reserve(m_Indices.size() + idxCount);
}

void UIDrawList::PrimRect(const maths::Vector2f& a, const maths::Vector2f& b,
                          const maths::Color& color) {
    maths::Vector2f c(b.x, a.y);
    maths::Vector2f d(a.x, b.y);
    
    uint32 idx = static_cast<uint32>(m_Vertices.size());
    PrimWriteIdx(idx); PrimWriteIdx(idx + 1); PrimWriteIdx(idx + 2);
    PrimWriteIdx(idx); PrimWriteIdx(idx + 2); PrimWriteIdx(idx + 3);
    PrimWriteVtx(a, {0, 0}, color);
    PrimWriteVtx(c, {1, 0}, color);
    PrimWriteVtx(b, {1, 1}, color);
    PrimWriteVtx(d, {0, 1}, color);
}

void UIDrawList::PrimWriteVtx(const maths::Vector2f& pos, const maths::Vector2f& uv,
                               const maths::Color& color) {
    m_Vertices.push_back({pos, uv, color});
}

void UIDrawList::PrimWriteIdx(uint32 idx) {
    m_Indices.push_back(idx);
}

int UIDrawList::CalcCircleAutoSegmentCount(float radius) const {
    int segmentCount = static_cast<int>(3.14159265f * 2.0f / std::acos((radius - 0.5f) / radius));
    return std::clamp(segmentCount, 12, 512);
}

// =====================================================================
// UI CANVAS
// =====================================================================

void UICanvas::Init() {
    s_ForegroundDrawList = new UIDrawList();
    s_BackgroundDrawList = new UIDrawList();
    s_WindowDrawList = new UIDrawList();
}

void UICanvas::Shutdown() {
    delete s_ForegroundDrawList;
    delete s_BackgroundDrawList;
    delete s_WindowDrawList;
}

void UICanvas::NewFrame() {
    s_ForegroundDrawList->Clear();
    s_BackgroundDrawList->Clear();
    s_WindowDrawList->Clear();
}

UIDrawList* UICanvas::GetForegroundDrawList() {
    return s_ForegroundDrawList;
}

UIDrawList* UICanvas::GetBackgroundDrawList() {
    return s_BackgroundDrawList;
}

UIDrawList* UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList() {
    return s_WindowDrawList;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 55. FLOATING WINDOWS SYSTEM

### Core/UI/UIFloatingWindow.h

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIFloatingWindow.h
#pragma once

#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <string>
#include <functional>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

struct UIFloatingWindowProperties {
    std::string title = "Floating Window";
    maths::Vector2i position = {100, 100};
    maths::Vector2u size = {400, 300};
    bool resizable = true;
    bool decorated = true;
    bool alwaysOnTop = false;
    bool transparent = false;
    float opacity = 1.0f;
};

class UIFloatingWindowManager;

class UIFloatingWindow {
public:
    using RenderCallback = std::function<void()>;
    
    UIFloatingWindow(const UIFloatingWindowProperties& props);
    ~UIFloatingWindow();
    
    bool Initialize();
    void Shutdown();
    
    void Show();
    void Hide();
    void Focus();
    
    bool IsVisible() const { return m_Visible; }
    bool IsFocused() const;
    
    void SetPosition(const maths::Vector2i& position);
    maths::Vector2i GetPosition() const;
    
    void SetSize(const maths::Vector2u& size);
    maths::Vector2u GetSize() const;
    
    void SetTitle(const std::string& title);
    const std::string& GetTitle() const { return m_Properties.title; }
    
    void SetOpacity(float opacity);
    float GetOpacity() const { return m_Properties.opacity; }
    
    void SetAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop);
    bool IsAlwaysOnTop() const { return m_Properties.alwaysOnTop; }
    
    void SetRenderCallback(RenderCallback callback) { m_RenderCallback = callback; }
    
    Window* GetWindow() const { return m_Window; }
    
    void Render();
    
private:
    UIFloatingWindowProperties m_Properties;
    Window* m_Window = nullptr;
    Renderer* m_Renderer = nullptr;
    bool m_Visible = false;
    RenderCallback m_RenderCallback;
    
    friend class UIFloatingWindowManager;
};

class UIFloatingWindowManager {
public:
    static void Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    
    static UIFloatingWindow* CreateFloatingWindow(const UIFloatingWindowProperties& props);
    static void DestroyFloatingWindow(UIFloatingWindow* window);
    
    static void UpdateAll();
    static void RenderAll();
    
    static bool IsEnabled() { return s_Enabled; }
    static void SetEnabled(bool enabled) { s_Enabled = enabled; }
    
    static std::vector<UIFloatingWindow*> GetWindows();
    
private:
    static std::vector<UIFloatingWindow*> s_Windows;
    static bool s_Enabled;
};

// Helper for UI system integration
namespace UI {
    bool BeginFloating(const std::string& name, bool* open = nullptr,
                      const maths::Vector2f& size = {0, 0},
                      const maths::Vector2f& position = {0, 0});
    void EndFloating();
    
    void EnableFloatingWindows(bool enabled);
    bool AreFloatingWindowsEnabled();
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```
