## 56. UI FLOATING WINDOWS IMPLEMENTATION

### Core/UI/UIFloatingWindow.cpp

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIFloatingWindow.cpp
#include "UIFloatingWindow.h"
#include <Renderer/RenderCommand.h>
#include <Renderer/Renderer2D.h>

namespace nkentseu {

std::vector<UIFloatingWindow*> UIFloatingWindowManager::s_Windows;
bool UIFloatingWindowManager::s_Enabled = false;

UIFloatingWindow::UIFloatingWindow(const UIFloatingWindowProperties& props)
    : m_Properties(props) {
}

UIFloatingWindow::~UIFloatingWindow() {
    Shutdown();
}

bool UIFloatingWindow::Initialize() {
    WindowProperties windowProps;
    windowProps.title = m_Properties.title;
    windowProps.size = m_Properties.size;
    windowProps.decorated = m_Properties.decorated;
    windowProps.resizable = m_Properties.resizable;
    windowProps.transparent = m_Properties.transparent;
    
    m_Window = Window::Create(windowProps);
    if (!m_Window || !m_Window->Initialize()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    m_Window->SetPosition(m_Properties.position);
    m_Window->SetOpacity(m_Properties.opacity);
    
    if (m_Properties.alwaysOnTop) {
        m_Window->SetAlwaysOnTop(true);
    }
    
    // Create renderer
    RendererConfig cfg;
    cfg.api = RendererAPI::OpenGL;
    cfg.vsync = true;
    
    m_Renderer = m_Window->CreateRenderer(cfg);
    if (!m_Renderer || !m_Renderer->Initialize(m_Window, cfg)) {
        delete m_Window;
        m_Window = nullptr;
        return false;
    }
    
    return true;
}

void UIFloatingWindow::Shutdown() {
    if (m_Renderer) {
        m_Renderer->Shutdown();
        delete m_Renderer;
        m_Renderer = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->Shutdown();
        delete m_Window;
        m_Window = nullptr;
    }
}

void UIFloatingWindow::Show() {
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->Show();
        m_Visible = true;
    }
}

void UIFloatingWindow::Hide() {
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->Hide();
        m_Visible = false;
    }
}

void UIFloatingWindow::Focus() {
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->Focus();
    }
}

bool UIFloatingWindow::IsFocused() const {
    return m_Window ? m_Window->IsFocused() : false;
}

void UIFloatingWindow::SetPosition(const maths::Vector2i& position) {
    m_Properties.position = position;
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->SetPosition(position);
    }
}

maths::Vector2i UIFloatingWindow::GetPosition() const {
    return m_Window ? m_Window->GetPosition() : m_Properties.position;
}

void UIFloatingWindow::SetSize(const maths::Vector2u& size) {
    m_Properties.size = size;
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->SetSize(size);
    }
}

maths::Vector2u UIFloatingWindow::GetSize() const {
    return m_Window ? m_Window->GetSize() : m_Properties.size;
}

void UIFloatingWindow::SetTitle(const std::string& title) {
    m_Properties.title = title;
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->SetTitle(title);
    }
}

void UIFloatingWindow::SetOpacity(float opacity) {
    m_Properties.opacity = opacity;
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->SetOpacity(opacity);
    }
}

void UIFloatingWindow::SetAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) {
    m_Properties.alwaysOnTop = alwaysOnTop;
    if (m_Window) {
        m_Window->SetAlwaysOnTop(alwaysOnTop);
    }
}

void UIFloatingWindow::Render() {
    if (!m_Window || !m_Renderer || !m_Visible) return;
    
    m_Renderer->BeginFrame();
    
    RenderCommand::SetClearColor(maths::Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 1.0f));
    RenderCommand::Clear();
    
    if (m_RenderCallback) {
        m_RenderCallback();
    }
    
    m_Renderer->EndFrame();
    m_Renderer->Present();
}

// =====================================================================
// FLOATING WINDOW MANAGER
// =====================================================================

void UIFloatingWindowManager::Init() {
    s_Enabled = false;
}

void UIFloatingWindowManager::Shutdown() {
    for (auto* window : s_Windows) {
        delete window;
    }
    s_Windows.clear();
}

UIFloatingWindow* UIFloatingWindowManager::CreateFloatingWindow(const UIFloatingWindowProperties& props) {
    if (!s_Enabled) return nullptr;
    
    UIFloatingWindow* window = new UIFloatingWindow(props);
    if (window->Initialize()) {
        s_Windows.push_back(window);
        return window;
    }
    
    delete window;
    return nullptr;
}

void UIFloatingWindowManager::DestroyFloatingWindow(UIFloatingWindow* window) {
    auto it = std::find(s_Windows.begin(), s_Windows.end(), window);
    if (it != s_Windows.end()) {
        delete *it;
        s_Windows.erase(it);
    }
}

void UIFloatingWindowManager::UpdateAll() {
    for (auto* window : s_Windows) {
        if (window->GetWindow()) {
            EventTracker.ProcessQueue();
        }
    }
}

void UIFloatingWindowManager::RenderAll() {
    for (auto* window : s_Windows) {
        window->Render();
    }
}

std::vector<UIFloatingWindow*> UIFloatingWindowManager::GetWindows() {
    return s_Windows;
}

// =====================================================================
// UI INTEGRATION
// =====================================================================

static UIFloatingWindow* s_CurrentFloatingWindow = nullptr;

bool UI::BeginFloating(const std::string& name, bool* open,
                      const maths::Vector2f& size,
                      const maths::Vector2f& position) {
    if (!UIFloatingWindowManager::IsEnabled()) {
        return Begin(name, open, size, position);
    }
    
    // Find or create floating window
    for (auto* window : UIFloatingWindowManager::GetWindows()) {
        if (window->GetTitle() == name) {
            s_CurrentFloatingWindow = window;
            if (open && !*open) {
                window->Hide();
                return false;
            }
            if (!window->IsVisible()) {
                window->Show();
            }
            return true;
        }
    }
    
    // Create new floating window
    UIFloatingWindowProperties props;
    props.title = name;
    props.size = maths::Vector2u(
        size.x > 0 ? static_cast<uint32>(size.x) : 400,
        size.y > 0 ? static_cast<uint32>(size.y) : 300
    );
    props.position = maths::Vector2i(
        static_cast<int32>(position.x),
        static_cast<int32>(position.y)
    );
    
    s_CurrentFloatingWindow = UIFloatingWindowManager::CreateFloatingWindow(props);
    
    if (s_CurrentFloatingWindow) {
        s_CurrentFloatingWindow->Show();
        return true;
    }
    
    return false;
}

void UI::EndFloating() {
    if (s_CurrentFloatingWindow) {
        s_CurrentFloatingWindow = nullptr;
    } else {
        End();
    }
}

void UI::EnableFloatingWindows(bool enabled) {
    UIFloatingWindowManager::SetEnabled(enabled);
}

bool UI::AreFloatingWindowsEnabled() {
    return UIFloatingWindowManager::IsEnabled();
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 57. UI DOCKING SYSTEM

### Core/UI/UIDocking.h

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIDocking.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Color.h>
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

enum class UIDockNodeFlags {
    None = 0,
    KeepAliveOnly = 1 << 0,
    NoDockingInCentralNode = 1 << 1,
    PassthruCentralNode = 1 << 2,
    NoSplit = 1 << 3,
    NoResize = 1 << 4,
    AutoHideTabBar = 1 << 5
};

enum class UIDockDir {
    None = -1,
    Left = 0,
    Right = 1,
    Top = 2,
    Bottom = 3,
    Center = 4
};

struct UIDockNode {
    uint32 id = 0;
    UIDockNodeFlags flags = UIDockNodeFlags::None;
    
    UIDockNode* parent = nullptr;
    UIDockNode* childNodes[2] = {nullptr, nullptr};
    
    std::vector<std::string> windows;
    int selectedTabIndex = 0;
    
    maths::Vector2f position;
    maths::Vector2f size;
    
    UIDockDir splitAxis = UIDockDir::None;
    float splitRatio = 0.5f;
    
    bool isVisible = true;
    bool isFocused = false;
    bool isCentralNode = false;
    
    // Tab bar
    float tabBarHeight = 25.0f;
    bool showTabBar = true;
    
    // Resizing
    bool isResizing = false;
    maths::Vector2f resizeStartSize;
    maths::Vector2f resizeStartMousePos;
};

struct UIDockSpace {
    uint32 id = 0;
    maths::Vector2f position;
    maths::Vector2f size;
    UIDockNode* rootNode = nullptr;
    UIDockNode* centralNode = nullptr;
    
    bool isVisible = true;
};

class UIDockingSystem {
public:
    static void Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    
    // DockSpace
    static void BeginDockSpace(const std::string& name, 
                               const maths::Vector2f& size = {0, 0});
    static void EndDockSpace();
    
    // Window docking
    static void DockWindow(const std::string& windowName, 
                           const std::string& dockSpaceName,
                           UIDockDir direction = UIDockDir::Center);
    
    static void UndockWindow(const std::string& windowName);
    
    static bool IsWindowDocked(const std::string& windowName);
    
    // Dock node manipulation
    static void SplitNode(UIDockNode* node, UIDockDir direction, float ratio = 0.5f);
    static void MergeNodes(UIDockNode* node1, UIDockNode* node2);
    
    // Layout
    static void SaveLayout(const std::string& filepath);
    static void LoadLayout(const std::string& filepath);
    static void ResetLayout();
    
    // Rendering
    static void RenderDockSpaces();
    static void HandleInput();
    
    // Query
    static UIDockSpace* GetDockSpace(const std::string& name);
    static UIDockNode* GetDockNode(uint32 id);
    static UIDockNode* FindNodeForWindow(const std::string& windowName);
    
private:
    static void RenderDockSpace(UIDockSpace* dockSpace);
    static void RenderDockNode(UIDockNode* node);
    static void RenderTabBar(UIDockNode* node);
    static void RenderDragPreview();
    
    static UIDockNode* CreateNode(UIDockNode* parent = nullptr);
    static void DestroyNode(UIDockNode* node);
    
    static void UpdateNodeBounds(UIDockNode* node);
    
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, UIDockSpace*> s_DockSpaces;
    static std::unordered_map<uint32, UIDockNode*> s_Nodes;
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, UIDockNode*> s_WindowToNode;
    
    static UIDockSpace* s_CurrentDockSpace;
    static UIDockNode* s_DraggingNode;
    static std::string s_DraggingWindow;
    static maths::Vector2f s_DragStartPos;
    
    static uint32 s_NextNodeID;
};

// Helper macros
namespace UI {
    void DockSpaceOverViewport();
    
    void SetNextWindowDockID(uint32 dockID, int condition = 0);
    uint32 GetWindowDockID();
    
    bool IsWindowDocked();
    
    void BeginDockSpace(const std::string& name);
    void EndDockSpace();
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/UI/UIDocking.cpp

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIDocking.cpp
#include "UIDocking.h"
#include "UIContext.h"
#include "UIDrawList.h"
#include <fstream>

namespace nkentseu {

std::unordered_map<std::string, UIDockSpace*> UIDockingSystem::s_DockSpaces;
std::unordered_map<uint32, UIDockNode*> UIDockingSystem::s_Nodes;
std::unordered_map<std::string, UIDockNode*> UIDockingSystem::s_WindowToNode;

UIDockSpace* UIDockingSystem::s_CurrentDockSpace = nullptr;
UIDockNode* UIDockingSystem::s_DraggingNode = nullptr;
std::string UIDockingSystem::s_DraggingWindow;
maths::Vector2f UIDockingSystem::s_DragStartPos;

uint32 UIDockingSystem::s_NextNodeID = 1;

void UIDockingSystem::Init() {
    s_NextNodeID = 1;
}

void UIDockingSystem::Shutdown() {
    for (auto& pair : s_DockSpaces) {
        if (pair.second->rootNode) {
            DestroyNode(pair.second->rootNode);
        }
        delete pair.second;
    }
    s_DockSpaces.clear();
    s_Nodes.clear();
    s_WindowToNode.clear();
}

// =====================================================================
// DOCK SPACE
// =====================================================================

void UIDockingSystem::BeginDockSpace(const std::string& name, const maths::Vector2f& size) {
    UIDockSpace* dockSpace = nullptr;
    
    auto it = s_DockSpaces.find(name);
    if (it != s_DockSpaces.end()) {
        dockSpace = it->second;
    } else {
        dockSpace = new UIDockSpace();
        dockSpace->id = s_NextNodeID++;
        dockSpace->size = size;
        
        // Create root node
        dockSpace->rootNode = CreateNode();
        dockSpace->rootNode->position = {0, 0};
        dockSpace->rootNode->size = size;
        dockSpace->rootNode->isCentralNode = true;
        
        dockSpace->centralNode = dockSpace->rootNode;
        
        s_DockSpaces[name] = dockSpace;
    }
    
    s_CurrentDockSpace = dockSpace;
    
    // Update size if different
    if (size.x > 0 && size.y > 0) {
        dockSpace->size = size;
        if (dockSpace->rootNode) {
            dockSpace->rootNode->size = size;
        }
    }
}

void UIDockingSystem::EndDockSpace() {
    if (s_CurrentDockSpace) {
        RenderDockSpace(s_CurrentDockSpace);
    }
    s_CurrentDockSpace = nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// WINDOW DOCKING
// =====================================================================

void UIDockingSystem::DockWindow(const std::string& windowName,
                                 const std::string& dockSpaceName,
                                 UIDockDir direction) {
    UIDockSpace* dockSpace = GetDockSpace(dockSpaceName);
    if (!dockSpace) return;
    
    UIDockNode* targetNode = nullptr;
    
    if (direction == UIDockDir::Center) {
        targetNode = dockSpace->centralNode;
    } else {
        // Split from central node
        if (!dockSpace->centralNode->windows.empty() || 
            dockSpace->centralNode->childNodes[0] != nullptr) {
            SplitNode(dockSpace->centralNode, direction, 0.3f);
            
            if (direction == UIDockDir::Left || direction == UIDockDir::Top) {
                targetNode = dockSpace->centralNode->childNodes[0];
            } else {
                targetNode = dockSpace->centralNode->childNodes[1];
            }
        } else {
            targetNode = dockSpace->centralNode;
        }
    }
    
    if (targetNode) {
        // Remove from previous node
        UndockWindow(windowName);
        
        // Add to new node
        targetNode->windows.push_back(windowName);
        s_WindowToNode[windowName] = targetNode;
    }
}

void UIDockingSystem::UndockWindow(const std::string& windowName) {
    auto it = s_WindowToNode.find(windowName);
    if (it != s_WindowToNode.end()) {
        UIDockNode* node = it->second;
        
        auto& windows = node->windows;
        windows.erase(std::remove(windows.begin(), windows.end(), windowName), windows.end());
        
        s_WindowToNode.erase(it);
    }
}

bool UIDockingSystem::IsWindowDocked(const std::string& windowName) {
    return s_WindowToNode.find(windowName) != s_WindowToNode.end();
}

// =====================================================================
// NODE MANIPULATION
// =====================================================================

void UIDockingSystem::SplitNode(UIDockNode* node, UIDockDir direction, float ratio) {
    if (!node || node->childNodes[0] != nullptr) return;
    
    node->splitAxis = direction;
    node->splitRatio = ratio;
    
    // Create two child nodes
    node->childNodes[0] = CreateNode(node);
    node->childNodes[1] = CreateNode(node);
    
    // Distribute windows
    if (!node->windows.empty()) {
        size_t mid = node->windows.size() / 2;
        
        node->childNodes[0]->windows.assign(
            node->windows.begin(),
            node->windows.begin() + mid
        );
        
        node->childNodes[1]->windows.assign(
            node->windows.begin() + mid,
            node->windows.end()
        );
        
        // Update window->node mapping
        for (const auto& window : node->childNodes[0]->windows) {
            s_WindowToNode[window] = node->childNodes[0];
        }
        for (const auto& window : node->childNodes[1]->windows) {
            s_WindowToNode[window] = node->childNodes[1];
        }
        
        node->windows.clear();
    }
    
    UpdateNodeBounds(node);
}

void UIDockingSystem::MergeNodes(UIDockNode* node1, UIDockNode* node2) {
    if (!node1 || !node2 || node1->parent != node2->parent) return;
    
    // Merge windows into node1
    node1->windows.insert(node1->windows.end(), 
                         node2->windows.begin(), 
                         node2->windows.end());
    
    // Update mapping
    for (const auto& window : node2->windows) {
        s_WindowToNode[window] = node1;
    }
    
    // Remove node2
    UIDockNode* parent = node1->parent;
    if (parent) {
        if (parent->childNodes[0] == node2) {
            parent->childNodes[0] = node1;
        } else if (parent->childNodes[1] == node2) {
            parent->childNodes[1] = node1;
        }
    }
    
    DestroyNode(node2);
}

// =====================================================================
// NODE MANAGEMENT
// =====================================================================

UIDockNode* UIDockingSystem::CreateNode(UIDockNode* parent) {
    UIDockNode* node = new UIDockNode();
    node->id = s_NextNodeID++;
    node->parent = parent;
    
    s_Nodes[node->id] = node;
    
    return node;
}

void UIDockingSystem::DestroyNode(UIDockNode* node) {
    if (!node) return;
    
    // Remove windows from mapping
    for (const auto& window : node->windows) {
        s_WindowToNode.erase(window);
    }
    
    // Recursively destroy children
    if (node->childNodes[0]) DestroyNode(node->childNodes[0]);
    if (node->childNodes[1]) DestroyNode(node->childNodes[1]);
    
    s_Nodes.erase(node->id);
    delete node;
}

void UIDockingSystem::UpdateNodeBounds(UIDockNode* node) {
    if (!node) return;
    
    if (node->childNodes[0] && node->childNodes[1]) {
        if (node->splitAxis == UIDockDir::Left || node->splitAxis == UIDockDir::Right) {
            // Vertical split
            float splitX = node->position.x + node->size.x * node->splitRatio;
            
            node->childNodes[0]->position = node->position;
            node->childNodes[0]->size = {
                node->size.x * node->splitRatio,
                node->size.y
            };
            
            node->childNodes[1]->position = {splitX, node->position.y};
            node->childNodes[1]->size = {
                node->size.x * (1.0f - node->splitRatio),
                node->size.y
            };
        } else {
            // Horizontal split
            float splitY = node->position.y + node->size.y * node->splitRatio;
            
            node->childNodes[0]->position = node->position;
            node->childNodes[0]->size = {
                node->size.x,
                node->size.y * node->splitRatio
            };
            
            node->childNodes[1]->position = {node->position.x, splitY};
            node->childNodes[1]->size = {
                node->size.x,
                node->size.y * (1.0f - node->splitRatio)
            };
        }
        
        UpdateNodeBounds(node->childNodes[0]);
        UpdateNodeBounds(node->childNodes[1]);
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// RENDERING
// =====================================================================

void UIDockingSystem::RenderDockSpace(UIDockSpace* dockSpace) {
    if (!dockSpace || !dockSpace->isVisible) return;
    
    // Update root node bounds
    if (dockSpace->rootNode) {
        dockSpace->rootNode->position = dockSpace->position;
        dockSpace->rootNode->size = dockSpace->size;
        UpdateNodeBounds(dockSpace->rootNode);
        
        RenderDockNode(dockSpace->rootNode);
    }
    
    RenderDragPreview();
}

void UIDockingSystem::RenderDockNode(UIDockNode* node) {
    if (!node || !node->isVisible) return;
    
    // Render children if split
    if (node->childNodes[0] && node->childNodes[1]) {
        RenderDockNode(node->childNodes[0]);
        RenderDockNode(node->childNodes[1]);
        
        // Render splitter
        UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
        
        maths::Color splitterColor(0.3f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1.0f);
        float splitterSize = 4.0f;
        
        if (node->splitAxis == UIDockDir::Left || node->splitAxis == UIDockDir::Right) {
            float splitX = node->position.x + node->size.x * node->splitRatio;
            drawList->AddRectFilled(
                {splitX - splitterSize * 0.5f, node->position.y},
                {splitX + splitterSize * 0.5f, node->position.y + node->size.y},
                splitterColor
            );
        } else {
            float splitY = node->position.y + node->size.y * node->splitRatio;
            drawList->AddRectFilled(
                {node->position.x, splitY - splitterSize * 0.5f},
                {node->position.x + node->size.x, splitY + splitterSize * 0.5f},
                splitterColor
            );
        }
        
        return;
    }
    
    // Render node content
    if (!node->windows.empty()) {
        UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
        
        // Draw background
        maths::Color bgColor = node->isFocused ? 
            maths::Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f, 1.0f) :
            maths::Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 1.0f);
        
        drawList->AddRectFilled(node->position, 
                               node->position + node->size,
                               bgColor);
        
        // Draw border
        drawList->AddRect(node->position,
                         node->position + node->size,
                         maths::Color(0.4f, 0.4f, 0.4f, 1.0f),
                         0.0f, 1.0f);
        
        // Render tab bar if multiple windows
        if (node->windows.size() > 1 && node->showTabBar) {
            RenderTabBar(node);
        }
    }
}

void UIDockingSystem::RenderTabBar(UIDockNode* node) {
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    
    float tabBarY = node->position.y;
    float tabX = node->position.x;
    float tabWidth = 150.0f;
    float tabHeight = node->tabBarHeight;
    
    // Draw tab bar background
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        {node->position.x, tabBarY},
        {node->position.x + node->size.x, tabBarY + tabHeight},
        maths::Color(0.08f, 0.08f, 0.08f, 1.0f)
    );
    
    // Draw tabs
    for (size_t i = 0; i < node->windows.size(); i++) {
        bool isSelected = (static_cast<int>(i) == node->selectedTabIndex);
        
        maths::Color tabColor = isSelected ?
            maths::Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1.0f) :
            maths::Color(0.12f, 0.12f, 0.12f, 1.0f);
        
        maths::Vector2f tabMin(tabX, tabBarY);
        maths::Vector2f tabMax(tabX + tabWidth, tabBarY + tabHeight);
        
        drawList->AddRectFilled(tabMin, tabMax, tabColor, 2.0f);
        
        // Draw tab text
        maths::Vector2f textPos(tabX + 10.0f, tabBarY + 5.0f);
        drawList->AddText(textPos, maths::Color(1, 1, 1, 1), node->windows[i].c_str());
        
        tabX += tabWidth;
    }
}

void UIDockingSystem::RenderDragPreview() {
    if (s_DraggingWindow.empty()) return;
    
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetForegroundDrawList();
    
    // Draw drag preview
    maths::Vector2f mousePos = UI::GetCursorPos();
    maths::Vector2f previewSize(200, 150);
    
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        mousePos,
        mousePos + previewSize,
        maths::Color(0.3f, 0.3f, 0.8f, 0.5f),
        4.0f
    );
    
    drawList->AddText(
        mousePos + maths::Vector2f(10, 10),
        maths::Color(1, 1, 1, 1),
        s_DraggingWindow.c_str()
    );
}

// =====================================================================
// LAYOUT PERSISTENCE
// =====================================================================

void UIDockingSystem::SaveLayout(const std::string& filepath) {
    std::ofstream file(filepath);
    if (!file.is_open()) return;
    
    file << "# UI Docking Layout\n\n";
    
    for (const auto& pair : s_DockSpaces) {
        file << "[DockSpace:" << pair.first << "]\n";
        file << "ID = " << pair.second->id << "\n";
        file << "Size = " << pair.second->size.x << " " << pair.second->size.y << "\n";
        file << "\n";
    }
    
    file.close();
}

void UIDockingSystem::LoadLayout(const std::string& filepath) {
    // TODO: Implement layout loading from file
}

void UIDockingSystem::ResetLayout() {
    for (auto& pair : s_DockSpaces) {
        if (pair.second->rootNode) {
            DestroyNode(pair.second->rootNode);
            pair.second->rootNode = CreateNode();
            pair.second->centralNode = pair.second->rootNode;
        }
    }
    s_WindowToNode.clear();
}

// =====================================================================
// QUERY
// =====================================================================

UIDockSpace* UIDockingSystem::GetDockSpace(const std::string& name) {
    auto it = s_DockSpaces.find(name);
    return it != s_DockSpaces.end() ? it->second : nullptr;
}

UIDockNode* UIDockingSystem::GetDockNode(uint32 id) {
    auto it = s_Nodes.find(id);
    return it != s_Nodes.end() ? it->second : nullptr;
}

UIDockNode* UIDockingSystem::FindNodeForWindow(const std::string& windowName) {
    auto it = s_WindowToNode.find(windowName);
    return it != s_WindowToNode.end() ? it->second : nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// UI HELPERS
// =====================================================================

void UI::DockSpaceOverViewport() {
    maths::Vector2f viewportSize = GetContentRegionAvail();
    UIDockingSystem::BeginDockSpace("MainDockSpace", viewportSize);
    UIDockingSystem::EndDockSpace();
}

void UI::BeginDockSpace(const std::string& name) {
    UIDockingSystem::BeginDockSpace(name);
}

void UI::EndDockSpace() {
    UIDockingSystem::EndDockSpace();
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

Je continue avec les conteneurs, layouts et un exemple d'utilisation complet dans le prochain message...

# Suite - UI Containers, Layouts & Demo Complet

---

## 58. UI CONTAINERS & LAYOUTS

### Core/UI/UIContainers.h

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIContainers.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Color.h>
#include <string>
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

// =====================================================================
// LAYOUT TYPES
// =====================================================================

enum class UILayoutType {
    Vertical,
    Horizontal,
    Grid,
    Stack,
    Flex
};

enum class UIAlignment {
    Start,
    Center,
    End,
    Stretch
};

enum class UIJustify {
    Start,
    Center,
    End,
    SpaceBetween,
    SpaceAround,
    SpaceEvenly
};

struct UILayoutProperties {
    UILayoutType type = UILayoutType::Vertical;
    UIAlignment alignment = UIAlignment::Start;
    UIJustify justify = UIJustify::Start;
    
    maths::Vector2f spacing = {4.0f, 4.0f};
    maths::Vector2f padding = {8.0f, 8.0f};
    
    // Grid specific
    uint32 columns = 2;
    uint32 rows = 0; // Auto if 0
    
    // Flex specific
    bool wrap = false;
    float flexGrow = 0.0f;
    float flexShrink = 1.0f;
};

// =====================================================================
// CONTAINERS
// =====================================================================

namespace UI {
    
    // Basic container with background
    bool BeginContainer(const std::string& id, 
                       const maths::Vector2f& size = {0, 0},
                       const maths::Color& backgroundColor = maths::Color(0, 0, 0, 0));
    void EndContainer();
    
    // Scrollable container
    bool BeginScrollContainer(const std::string& id,
                             const maths::Vector2f& size,
                             maths::Vector2f* scrollOffset = nullptr);
    void EndScrollContainer();
    
    // Collapsible header/group
    bool BeginCollapsible(const std::string& label, bool* open = nullptr);
    void EndCollapsible();
    
    // Tab container
    bool BeginTabBar(const std::string& id);
    void EndTabBar();
    bool BeginTabItem(const std::string& label, bool* open = nullptr);
    void EndTabItem();
    
    // Split container (resizable)
    void BeginHorizontalSplit(const std::string& id, float* splitRatio);
    void SplitNext();
    void EndHorizontalSplit();
    
    void BeginVerticalSplit(const std::string& id, float* splitRatio);
    void EndVerticalSplit();
    
    // Layouts
    void BeginLayout(const UILayoutProperties& props);
    void EndLayout();
    
    void BeginHorizontalLayout(float spacing = 4.0f);
    void EndHorizontalLayout();
    
    void BeginVerticalLayout(float spacing = 4.0f);
    void EndVerticalLayout();
    
    void BeginGridLayout(uint32 columns, float spacingX = 4.0f, float spacingY = 4.0f);
    void NextGridCell();
    void EndGridLayout();
    
    // Child windows
    bool BeginChild(const std::string& id, 
                   const maths::Vector2f& size = {0, 0},
                   bool border = false,
                   bool scrollable = true);
    void EndChild();
    
    // Panels
    void BeginPanel(const std::string& title,
                   const maths::Vector2f& size = {0, 0},
                   bool* collapsed = nullptr);
    void EndPanel();
    
    // Card (styled container)
    void BeginCard(const maths::Vector2f& size = {0, 0},
                  float rounding = 4.0f);
    void EndCard();
    
    // Tooltip
    void BeginTooltip();
    void EndTooltip();
    void SetTooltip(const std::string& text);
    
    // Popup
    bool BeginPopup(const std::string& id);
    void EndPopup();
    void OpenPopup(const std::string& id);
    void CloseCurrentPopup();
    
    // Modal
    bool BeginModal(const std::string& title, bool* open = nullptr);
    void EndModal();
    
    // Menu
    bool BeginMenuBar();
    void EndMenuBar();
    bool BeginMenu(const std::string& label);
    void EndMenu();
    bool MenuItem(const std::string& label, const std::string& shortcut = "", 
                 bool* selected = nullptr, bool enabled = true);
    
    // Context menu
    bool BeginContextMenu();
    void EndContextMenu();
    
    // Drag & Drop
    bool BeginDragDropSource();
    void EndDragDropSource();
    void SetDragDropPayload(const std::string& type, const void* data, size_t size);
    
    bool BeginDragDropTarget();
    void EndDragDropTarget();
    const void* AcceptDragDropPayload(const std::string& type, size_t* outSize = nullptr);
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/UI/UIContainers.cpp

```cpp
// Core/UI/UIContainers.cpp
#include "UIContainers.h"
#include "UIContext.h"
#include "UIDrawList.h"
#include <stack>

namespace nkentseu {

struct UILayoutState {
    UILayoutProperties props;
    maths::Vector2f startPos;
    maths::Vector2f currentPos;
    uint32 itemCount = 0;
    uint32 currentColumn = 0;
    uint32 currentRow = 0;
};

static std::stack<UILayoutState> s_LayoutStack;
static std::stack<maths::Vector2f> s_CursorStack;

// =====================================================================
// BASIC CONTAINER
// =====================================================================

bool UI::BeginContainer(const std::string& id, const maths::Vector2f& size,
                        const maths::Color& backgroundColor) {
    maths::Vector2f actualSize = size;
    if (actualSize.x == 0) actualSize.x = GetContentRegionAvail().x;
    if (actualSize.y == 0) actualSize.y = 200.0f;
    
    maths::Vector2f pos = GetCursorPos();
    
    if (backgroundColor.a > 0) {
        UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
        drawList->AddRectFilled(pos, pos + actualSize, backgroundColor, 4.0f);
    }
    
    s_CursorStack.push(GetCursorPos());
    SetCursorPos(pos + maths::Vector2f(8, 8));
    
    return true;
}

void UI::EndContainer() {
    if (!s_CursorStack.empty()) {
        maths::Vector2f startPos = s_CursorStack.top();
        s_CursorStack.pop();
        
        maths::Vector2f currentPos = GetCursorPos();
        SetCursorPos({startPos.x, currentPos.y + 8});
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// SCROLLABLE CONTAINER
// =====================================================================

bool UI::BeginScrollContainer(const std::string& id, const maths::Vector2f& size,
                              maths::Vector2f* scrollOffset) {
    // TODO: Implement actual scrolling
    return BeginChild(id, size, true, true);
}

void UI::EndScrollContainer() {
    EndChild();
}

// =====================================================================
// COLLAPSIBLE
// =====================================================================

bool UI::BeginCollapsible(const std::string& label, bool* open) {
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, bool> s_OpenStates;
    
    bool isOpen = true;
    
    if (open) {
        isOpen = *open;
    } else {
        auto it = s_OpenStates.find(label);
        if (it != s_OpenStates.end()) {
            isOpen = it->second;
        }
    }
    
    maths::Vector2f pos = GetCursorPos();
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    
    // Draw arrow
    float arrowSize = 10.0f;
    maths::Vector2f arrowPos = pos + maths::Vector2f(5, 5);
    
    if (isOpen) {
        // Down arrow
        drawList->AddTriangleFilled(
            arrowPos,
            arrowPos + maths::Vector2f(arrowSize, 0),
            arrowPos + maths::Vector2f(arrowSize * 0.5f, arrowSize),
            maths::Color(1, 1, 1, 1)
        );
    } else {
        // Right arrow
        drawList->AddTriangleFilled(
            arrowPos,
            arrowPos + maths::Vector2f(0, arrowSize),
            arrowPos + maths::Vector2f(arrowSize, arrowSize * 0.5f),
            maths::Color(1, 1, 1, 1)
        );
    }
    
    // Label
    Text(label);
    
    // Handle click
    if (IsItemClicked()) {
        isOpen = !isOpen;
        if (open) {
            *open = isOpen;
        } else {
            s_OpenStates[label] = isOpen;
        }
    }
    
    if (isOpen) {
        Indent();
        return true;
    }
    
    return false;
}

void UI::EndCollapsible() {
    Unindent();
}

// =====================================================================
// TAB BAR
// =====================================================================

static int s_CurrentTabIndex = -1;
static int s_TabBarTabCount = 0;

bool UI::BeginTabBar(const std::string& id) {
    s_TabBarTabCount = 0;
    s_CurrentTabIndex = -1;
    
    // Draw tab bar background
    maths::Vector2f pos = GetCursorPos();
    float height = 30.0f;
    float width = GetContentRegionAvail().x;
    
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        pos,
        pos + maths::Vector2f(width, height),
        maths::Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 1.0f)
    );
    
    SetCursorPos(pos + maths::Vector2f(0, height));
    
    return true;
}

void UI::EndTabBar() {
}

bool UI::BeginTabItem(const std::string& label, bool* open) {
    int tabIndex = s_TabBarTabCount++;
    
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, int> s_SelectedTabs;
    
    auto it = s_SelectedTabs.find(label);
    int selectedTab = (it != s_SelectedTabs.end()) ? it->second : 0;
    
    bool isSelected = (selectedTab == tabIndex);
    
    // Draw tab button
    maths::Vector2f pos = GetCursorPos();
    float tabWidth = 120.0f;
    float tabHeight = 28.0f;
    
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    
    maths::Color tabColor = isSelected ? 
        maths::Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1.0f) :
        maths::Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f, 1.0f);
    
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        pos,
        pos + maths::Vector2f(tabWidth, tabHeight),
        tabColor,
        2.0f
    );
    
    // Draw text
    drawList->AddText(
        pos + maths::Vector2f(10, 7),
        maths::Color(1, 1, 1, 1),
        label.c_str()
    );
    
    // Check for click
    UIRect tabRect(pos, pos + maths::Vector2f(tabWidth, tabHeight));
    if (tabRect.Contains(GetCursorPos()) && IsItemClicked()) {
        s_SelectedTabs[label] = tabIndex;
        isSelected = true;
    }
    
    SameLine();
    
    return isSelected;
}

void UI::EndTabItem() {
}

// =====================================================================
// LAYOUTS
// =====================================================================

void UI::BeginLayout(const UILayoutProperties& props) {
    UILayoutState state;
    state.props = props;
    state.startPos = GetCursorPos();
    state.currentPos = state.startPos + props.padding;
    
    SetCursorPos(state.currentPos);
    
    s_LayoutStack.push(state);
}

void UI::EndLayout() {
    if (s_LayoutStack.empty()) return;
    
    UILayoutState state = s_LayoutStack.top();
    s_LayoutStack.pop();
    
    maths::Vector2f currentPos = GetCursorPos();
    SetCursorPos({state.startPos.x, currentPos.y + state.props.padding.y});
}

void UI::BeginHorizontalLayout(float spacing) {
    UILayoutProperties props;
    props.type = UILayoutType::Horizontal;
    props.spacing = {spacing, 0};
    BeginLayout(props);
}

void UI::EndHorizontalLayout() {
    EndLayout();
}

void UI::BeginVerticalLayout(float spacing) {
    UILayoutProperties props;
    props.type = UILayoutType::Vertical;
    props.spacing = {0, spacing};
    BeginLayout(props);
}

void UI::EndVerticalLayout() {
    EndLayout();
}

void UI::BeginGridLayout(uint32 columns, float spacingX, float spacingY) {
    UILayoutProperties props;
    props.type = UILayoutType::Grid;
    props.columns = columns;
    props.spacing = {spacingX, spacingY};
    BeginLayout(props);
}

void UI::NextGridCell() {
    if (s_LayoutStack.empty()) return;
    
    UILayoutState& state = s_LayoutStack.top();
    
    state.currentColumn++;
    if (state.currentColumn >= state.props.columns) {
        state.currentColumn = 0;
        state.currentRow++;
        
        state.currentPos.x = state.startPos.x + state.props.padding.x;
        state.currentPos.y += 50.0f + state.props.spacing.y;
    } else {
        state.currentPos.x += 200.0f + state.props.spacing.x;
    }
    
    SetCursorPos(state.currentPos);
}

void UI::EndGridLayout() {
    EndLayout();
}

// =====================================================================
// CHILD WINDOW
// =====================================================================

bool UI::BeginChild(const std::string& id, const maths::Vector2f& size,
                   bool border, bool scrollable) {
    maths::Vector2f actualSize = size;
    if (actualSize.x == 0) actualSize.x = GetContentRegionAvail().x;
    if (actualSize.y == 0) actualSize.y = 200.0f;
    
    maths::Vector2f pos = GetCursorPos();
    
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    
    // Background
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        pos,
        pos + actualSize,
        maths::Color(0.08f, 0.08f, 0.08f, 1.0f)
    );
    
    // Border
    if (border) {
        drawList->AddRect(
            pos,
            pos + actualSize,
            maths::Color(0.4f, 0.4f, 0.4f, 1.0f),
            0.0f,
            1.0f
        );
    }
    
    // Set clipping region
    drawList->PushClipRect(pos, pos + actualSize);
    
    s_CursorStack.push(GetCursorPos());
    SetCursorPos(pos + maths::Vector2f(8, 8));
    
    return true;
}

void UI::EndChild() {
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    drawList->PopClipRect();
    
    if (!s_CursorStack.empty()) {
        maths::Vector2f startPos = s_CursorStack.top();
        s_CursorStack.pop();
        
        maths::Vector2f currentPos = GetCursorPos();
        SetCursorPos({startPos.x, currentPos.y + 8});
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// PANEL
// =====================================================================

void UI::BeginPanel(const std::string& title, const maths::Vector2f& size,
                   bool* collapsed) {
    bool isCollapsed = collapsed ? *collapsed : false;
    
    maths::Vector2f pos = GetCursorPos();
    maths::Vector2f actualSize = size;
    if (actualSize.x == 0) actualSize.x = GetContentRegionAvail().x;
    if (actualSize.y == 0) actualSize.y = 300.0f;
    
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    
    // Panel background
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        pos,
        pos + actualSize,
        maths::Color(0.12f, 0.12f, 0.12f, 1.0f),
        4.0f
    );
    
    // Title bar
    float titleHeight = 30.0f;
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        pos,
        pos + maths::Vector2f(actualSize.x, titleHeight),
        maths::Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1.0f),
        4.0f
    );
    
    // Title text
    drawList->AddText(
        pos + maths::Vector2f(10, 8),
        maths::Color(1, 1, 1, 1),
        title.c_str()
    );
    
    if (!isCollapsed) {
        s_CursorStack.push(GetCursorPos());
        SetCursorPos(pos + maths::Vector2f(8, titleHeight + 8));
    }
}

void UI::EndPanel() {
    if (!s_CursorStack.empty()) {
        maths::Vector2f startPos = s_CursorStack.top();
        s_CursorStack.pop();
        
        maths::Vector2f currentPos = GetCursorPos();
        SetCursorPos({startPos.x, currentPos.y + 8});
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// CARD
// =====================================================================

void UI::BeginCard(const maths::Vector2f& size, float rounding) {
    maths::Vector2f actualSize = size;
    if (actualSize.x == 0) actualSize.x = GetContentRegionAvail().x;
    if (actualSize.y == 0) actualSize.y = 150.0f;
    
    maths::Vector2f pos = GetCursorPos();
    
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    
    // Card background with shadow effect
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        pos + maths::Vector2f(2, 2),
        pos + actualSize + maths::Vector2f(2, 2),
        maths::Color(0, 0, 0, 0.3f),
        rounding
    );
    
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        pos,
        pos + actualSize,
        maths::Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f, 1.0f),
        rounding
    );
    
    s_CursorStack.push(GetCursorPos());
    SetCursorPos(pos + maths::Vector2f(12, 12));
}

void UI::EndCard() {
    if (!s_CursorStack.empty()) {
        maths::Vector2f startPos = s_CursorStack.top();
        s_CursorStack.pop();
        
        maths::Vector2f currentPos = GetCursorPos();
        SetCursorPos({startPos.x, currentPos.y + 12});
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// TOOLTIP
// =====================================================================

static bool s_TooltipActive = false;

void UI::BeginTooltip() {
    if (!IsItemHovered()) return;
    
    s_TooltipActive = true;
    
    maths::Vector2f mousePos = GetCursorPos();
    
    // TODO: Implement proper tooltip positioning
    BeginCard({200, 0}, 4.0f);
}

void UI::EndTooltip() {
    if (s_TooltipActive) {
        EndCard();
        s_TooltipActive = false;
    }
}

void UI::SetTooltip(const std::string& text) {
    if (IsItemHovered()) {
        BeginTooltip();
        Text(text);
        EndTooltip();
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// MENU BAR
// =====================================================================

bool UI::BeginMenuBar() {
    maths::Vector2f pos = GetCursorPos();
    float height = 25.0f;
    float width = GetContentRegionAvail().x;
    
    UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
    drawList->AddRectFilled(
        pos,
        pos + maths::Vector2f(width, height),
        maths::Color(0.12f, 0.12f, 0.12f, 1.0f)
    );
    
    SetCursorPos(pos + maths::Vector2f(5, 5));
    
    return true;
}

void UI::EndMenuBar() {
    NewLine();
}

bool UI::BeginMenu(const std::string& label) {
    if (Button(label, {80, 20})) {
        // TODO: Open menu popup
        return true;
    }
    SameLine();
    return false;
}

void UI::EndMenu() {
}

bool UI::MenuItem(const std::string& label, const std::string& shortcut,
                 bool* selected, bool enabled) {
    bool clicked = false;
    
    if (enabled) {
        if (Button(label)) {
            clicked = true;
            if (selected) {
                *selected = !*selected;
            }
        }
    } else {
        TextColored(maths::Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1.0f), label);
    }
    
    if (!shortcut.empty()) {
        SameLine();
        TextColored(maths::Color(0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f, 1.0f), shortcut);
    }
    
    return clicked;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 59. DEMO COMPLET - UI SYSTEM

### Sandbox/UICompleteDemo.cpp

```cpp
// Sandbox/UICompleteDemo.cpp
#include <UI/UIContext.h>
#include <UI/UITheme.h>
#include <UI/UIStyleEditor.h>
#include <UI/UIDrawList.h>
#include <UI/UIDocking.h>
#include <UI/UIFloatingWindow.h>
#include <UI/UIContainers.h>
#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Renderer/Renderer2D.h>
#include <Font/Font.h>

using namespace nkentseu;

class UICompleteDemo {
public:
    void Run() {
        // Initialize
        if (!Initialize()) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Main loop
        while (m_Running && m_Window->IsOpen()) {
            EventTracker.ProcessQueue();
            Update();
            Render();
        }
        
        Shutdown();
    }
    
private:
    bool Initialize() {
        // Create main window
        WindowProperties props;
        props.title = "Complete UI System Demo";
        props.size = maths::Vector2u(1920, 1080);
        
        m_Window = Window::Create(props);
        if (!m_Window->Initialize()) {
            return false;
        }
        m_Window->Show();
        
        // Initialize renderer
        RendererConfig cfg;
        cfg.api = RendererAPI::OpenGL;
        cfg.vsync = true;
        
        m_Renderer = m_Window->CreateRenderer(cfg);
        if (!m_Renderer->Initialize(m_Window, cfg)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        RenderCommand::SetRenderer(m_Renderer);
        RenderCommand::Init();
        Renderer2D::Init();
        
        // Load font
        FontLibrary::Init();
        m_Font = FontLibrary::Load("default", "Assets/Fonts/Roboto-Regular.ttf", 16);
        
        // Initialize UI systems
        UIThemeManager::Init();
        UI::Init(m_Window, m_Font);
        UIStyleEditor::Init();
        UICanvas::Init();
        UIDockingSystem::Init();
        UIFloatingWindowManager::Init();
        
        // Set default theme
        UIThemeManager::SetActiveTheme("Dark");
        
        // Enable floating windows
        UI::EnableFloatingWindows(true);
        
        // Setup event handling
        EventTracker.AddObserver([this](Event& e) {
            UI::ProcessEvent(e);
            HandleEvent(e);
        });
        
        printf("UI Demo initialized successfully!\n");
        return true;
    }
    
    void Shutdown() {
        UIFloatingWindowManager::Shutdown();
        UIDockingSystem::Shutdown();
        UICanvas::Shutdown();
        UIStyleEditor::Shutdown();
        UI::Shutdown();
        UIThemeManager::Shutdown();
        
        FontLibrary::Shutdown();
        Renderer2D::Shutdown();
        RenderCommand::Shutdown();
        
        m_Renderer->Shutdown();
        m_Window->Shutdown();
        
        delete m_Renderer;
        delete m_Window;
    }
    
    void HandleEvent(Event& e) {
        if (auto* closed = e.As<WindowStatusEvent>()) {
            if (closed->GetState() == WindowState::Closed) {
                m_Running = false;
            }
        }
        else if (auto* key = e.As<KeyboardEvent>()) {
            if (key->IsPressed() && key->GetKeycode() == Keyboard::Escape) {
                m_Running = false;
            }
        }
    }
    
    void Update() {
        UIFloatingWindowManager::UpdateAll();
    }
    
    void Render() {
        m_Renderer->BeginFrame();
        RenderCommand::SetClearColor(maths::Color(0.05f, 0.05f, 0.05f, 1.0f));
        RenderCommand::Clear();
        
        // Begin UI frame
        UI::NewFrame();
        UICanvas::NewFrame();
        
        // Main menu bar
        RenderMenuBar();
        
        // Docking space
        UI::DockSpaceOverViewport();
        
        // Windows
        RenderMainWindow();
        RenderShapesWindow();
        RenderLayoutsWindow();
        RenderContainersWindow();
        RenderCustomDrawingWindow();
        
        if (m_ShowStyleEditor) {
            UIStyleEditor::Show(&m_ShowStyleEditor);
        }
        
        if (m_ShowDemoWindow) {
            RenderDemoWindow();
        }
        
        // Render UI
        UIDockingSystem::RenderDockSpaces();
        UI::Render();
        UICanvas::Render();
        
        // Render floating windows
        UIFloatingWindowManager::RenderAll();
        
        m_Renderer->EndFrame();
        m_Renderer->Present();
    }
    
    void RenderMenuBar() {
        if (UI::BeginMenuBar()) {
            if (UI::BeginMenu("File")) {
                if (UI::MenuItem("New", "Ctrl+N")) {
                    printf("New file\n");
                }
                if (UI::MenuItem("Open", "Ctrl+O")) {
                    printf("Open file\n");
                }
                if (UI::MenuItem("Save", "Ctrl+S")) {
                    printf("Save file\n");
                }
                UI::Separator();
                if (UI::MenuItem("Exit", "Alt+F4")) {
                    m_Running = false;
                }
                UI::EndMenu();
            }
            
            if (UI::BeginMenu("View")) {
                UI::MenuItem("Style Editor", "", &m_ShowStyleEditor);
                UI::MenuItem("Demo Window", "", &m_ShowDemoWindow);
                UI::MenuItem("Shapes", "", &m_ShowShapesWindow);
                UI::MenuItem("Layouts", "", &m_ShowLayoutsWindow);
                UI::EndMenu();
            }
            
            if (UI::BeginMenu("Theme")) {
                auto themes = UIThemeManager::GetThemeNames();
                for (const auto& theme : themes) {
                    bool isActive = (UIThemeManager::GetActiveTheme().name == theme);
                    if (UI::MenuItem(theme, "", &isActive)) {
                        UIThemeManager::SetActiveTheme(theme);
                    }
                }
                UI::EndMenu();
            }
            
            UI::EndMenuBar();
        }
    }
    
    void RenderMainWindow() {
        if (UI::Begin("Main Control Panel", nullptr, {400, 600})) {
            UI::Text("Welcome to the Complete UI System!");
            UI::Separator();
            
            UI::BeginCard({0, 100});
            UI::Text("System Status");
            UI::TextColored(maths::Color(0, 1, 0, 1), "All systems operational");
            UI::EndCard();
            
            UI::Spacing();
            
            if (UI::BeginCollapsible("Settings")) {
                UI::Checkbox("Enable Floating Windows", &m_FloatingEnabled);
                UI::Checkbox("Show FPS", &m_ShowFPS);
                UI::SliderFloat("Master Volume", &m_Volume, 0.0f, 1.0f);
                UI::EndCollapsible();
            }
            
            UI::Spacing();
            
            if (UI::Button("Create Floating Window")) {
                CreateFloatingWindow();
            }
            
            UI::SameLine();
            
            if (UI::Button("Reset Layout")) {
                UIDockingSystem::ResetLayout();
            }
            
            UI::End();
        }
    }
    
    void RenderShapesWindow() {
        if (!m_ShowShapesWindow) return;
        
        if (UI::Begin("Custom Shapes", &m_ShowShapesWindow, {500, 600})) {
            UI::Text("Draw custom shapes using UIDrawList");
            UI::Separator();
            
            UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
            maths::Vector2f canvasPos = UI::GetCursorPos();
            maths::Vector2f canvasSize = UI::GetContentRegionAvail();
            
            // Draw background
            drawList->AddRectFilled(
                canvasPos,
                canvasPos + canvasSize,
                maths::Color(0.08f, 0.08f, 0.08f, 1.0f)
            );
            
            // Draw various shapes
            maths::Vector2f center = canvasPos + canvasSize * 0.5f;
            
            // Circle
            drawList->AddCircleFilled(
                center + maths::Vector2f(-150, -100),
                40,
                maths::Color(1, 0, 0, 1)
            );
            
            // Rectangle
            drawList->AddRectFilled(
                center + maths::Vector2f(-50, -120),
                center + maths::Vector2f(50, -80),
                maths::Color(0, 1, 0, 1),
                8.0f
            );
            
            // Triangle
            drawList->AddTriangleFilled(
                center + maths::Vector2f(100, -120),
                center + maths::Vector2f(150, -80),
                center + maths::Vector2f(125, -80),
                maths::Color(0, 0, 1, 1)
            );
            
            // Ellipse
            drawList->AddEllipseFilled(
                center + maths::Vector2f(-150, 50),
                60, 30,
                maths::Color(1, 1, 0, 1),
                0.785f // 45 degrees
            );
            
            // N-gon (hexagon)
            drawList->AddNgonFilled(
                center + maths::Vector2f(0, 50),
                40,
                maths::Color(1, 0, 1, 1),
                6
            );
            
            // Bezier curve
            drawList->AddBezierCubic(
                center + maths::Vector2f(100, 0),
                center + maths::Vector2f(150, -50),
                center + maths::Vector2f(150, 50),
                center + maths::Vector2f(100, 100),
                maths::Color(0, 1, 1, 1),
                2.0f
            );
            
            // Custom polygon using Path API
            drawList->PathClear();
            for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                float angle = (i * 2.0f * 3.14159f / 5.0f) - 1.57f;
                float x = std::cos(angle) * 50;
                float y = std::sin(angle) * 50;
                drawList->PathLineTo(center + maths::Vector2f(x - 150, y + 200));
            }
            drawList->PathFillConvex(maths::Color(1, 0.5f, 0, 1));
            
            UI::End();
        }
    }
    
    void RenderLayoutsWindow() {
        if (!m_ShowLayoutsWindow) return;
        
        if (UI::Begin("Layouts Demo", &m_ShowLayoutsWindow, {600, 700})) {
            UI::Text("Layout Examples");
            UI::Separator();
            
            // Horizontal layout
            UI::Text("Horizontal Layout:");
            UI::BeginHorizontalLayout(8.0f);
            for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                if (UI::Button(("Button " + std::to_string(i)).c_str(), {80, 30})) {
                    printf("Clicked button %d\n", i);
                }
            }
            UI::EndHorizontalLayout();
            
            UI::Spacing();
            UI::Separator();
            
            // Vertical layout
            UI::Text("Vertical Layout:");
            UI::BeginVerticalLayout(4.0f);
            UI::Text("Item 1");
            UI::Text("Item 2");
            UI::Text("Item 3");
            UI::EndVerticalLayout();
            
            UI::Spacing();
            UI::Separator();
            
            // Grid layout
            UI::Text("Grid Layout (2 columns):");
            UI::BeginGridLayout(2, 8.0f, 8.0f);
            
            for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                UI::BeginCard({180, 100});
                UI::Text(("Card " + std::to_string(i)).c_str());
                UI::Text("Some content here");
                UI::EndCard();
                UI::NextGridCell();
            }
            
            UI::EndGridLayout();
            
            UI::End();
        }
    }
    
    void RenderContainersWindow() {
        if (UI::Begin("Containers", nullptr, {500, 700})) {
            // Tab bar
            if (UI::BeginTabBar("ContainerTabs")) {
                if (UI::BeginTabItem("Panels")) {
                    UI::BeginPanel("Panel 1", {0, 200});
                    UI::Text("Panel content here");
                    UI::Button("Action Button");
                    UI::EndPanel();
                    
                    UI::BeginPanel("Panel 2", {0, 200});
                    UI::Text("Another panel");
                    static float value = 0.5f;
                    UI::SliderFloat("Value", &value, 0.0f, 1.0f);
                    UI::EndPanel();
                    
                    UI::EndTabItem();
                }
                
                if (UI::BeginTabItem("Cards")) {
                    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                        UI::BeginCard({0, 120});
                        UI::Text(("Card Title " + std::to_string(i)).c_str());
                        UI::Separator();
                        UI::Text("Card content with some text");
                        UI::Button("Card Action");
                        UI::EndCard();
                        
                        UI::Spacing();
                    }
                    
                    UI::EndTabItem();
                }
                
                if (UI::BeginTabItem("Child Windows")) {
                    UI::Text("Scrollable child window:");
                    
                    if (UI::BeginChild("ScrollableChild", {0, 300}, true)) {
                        for (int i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                            UI::Text(("Line " + std::to_string(i)).c_str());
                        }
                        UI::EndChild();
                    }
                    
                    UI::EndTabItem();
                }
                
                UI::EndTabBar();
            }
            
            UI::End();
        }
    }
    
    void RenderCustomDrawingWindow() {
        if (UI::Begin("Custom Drawing", nullptr, {600, 600})) {
            UI::Text("Interactive drawing canvas");
            
            UIDrawList* drawList = UICanvas::GetWindowDrawList();
            maths::Vector2f canvasPos = UI::GetCursorPos();
            maths::Vector2f canvasSize = {550, 500};
            
            // Canvas background
            drawList->AddRectFilled(
                canvasPos,
                canvasPos + canvasSize,
                maths::Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 1.0f)
            );
            
            // Grid
            for (float x = 0; x < canvasSize.x; x += 50) {
                drawList->AddLine(
                    canvasPos + maths::Vector2f(x, 0),
                    canvasPos + maths::Vector2f(x, canvasSize.y),
                    maths::Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1.0f)
                );
            }
            for (float y = 0; y < canvasSize.y; y += 50) {
                drawList->AddLine(
                    canvasPos + maths::Vector2f(0, y),
                    canvasPos + maths::Vector2f(canvasSize.x, y),
                    maths::Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1.0f)
                );
            }
            
            // Animated shapes
            static float time = 0.0f;
            time += 0.016f;
            
            maths::Vector2f center = canvasPos + canvasSize * 0.5f;
            
            // Rotating pentagon
            drawList->PathClear();
            for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                float angle = time + (i * 2.0f * 3.14159f / 5.0f);
                drawList->PathLineTo(center + maths::Vector2f(
                    std::cos(angle) * 100,
                    std::sin(angle) * 100
                ));
            }
            drawList->PathStroke(maths::Color(1, 0, 0, 1), true, 3.0f);
            
            UI::End();
        }
    }
    
    void RenderDemoWindow() {
        if (UI::Begin("Demo Window", &m_ShowDemoWindow, {800, 900})) {
            UI::Text("Comprehensive UI Demo");
            UI::Separator();
            
            // All widget types
            static bool checkbox1 = false;
            static bool checkbox2 = true;
            static float slider1 = 0.5f;
            static int slider2 = 50;
            static std::string input1 = "Text input";
            
            UI::Checkbox("Checkbox 1", &checkbox1);
            UI::Checkbox("Checkbox 2", &checkbox2);
            
            UI::SliderFloat("Float Slider", &slider1, 0.0f, 1.0f);
            UI::SliderInt("Int Slider", &slider2, 0, 100);
            
            UI::InputText("Text Input", input1);
            
            UI::Separator();
            
            if (UI::Button("Primary Button", {150, 30})) {
                printf("Primary button clicked\n");
            }
            
            UI::SameLine();
            
            if (UI::Button("Secondary", {150, 30})) {
                printf("Secondary button clicked\n");
            }
            
            UI::End();
        }
    }
    
    void CreateFloatingWindow() {
        UIFloatingWindowProperties props;
        props.title = "Floating Window " + std::to_string(m_FloatingWindowCount++);
        props.size = {400, 300};
        props.position = {200 + m_FloatingWindowCount * 30, 200 + m_FloatingWindowCount * 30};
        
        UIFloatingWindow* window = UIFloatingWindowManager::CreateFloatingWindow(props);
        
        if (window) {
            window->SetRenderCallback([this, window]() {
                UI::NewFrame();
                
                if (UI::Begin("Content", nullptr, {380, 250})) {
                    UI::Text("This is a floating window!");
                    UI::Text("It can move outside the main window");
                    
                    if (UI::Button("Close")) {
                        UIFloatingWindowManager::DestroyFloatingWindow(window);
                    }
                    
                    UI::End();
                }
                
                UI::Render();
            });
            
            window->Show();
        }
    }
    
    Window* m_Window = nullptr;
    Renderer* m_Renderer = nullptr;
    Font* m_Font = nullptr;
    
    bool m_Running = true;
    bool m_ShowStyleEditor = false;
    bool m_ShowDemoWindow = true;
    bool m_ShowShapesWindow = true;
    bool m_ShowLayoutsWindow = true;
    bool m_FloatingEnabled = true;
    bool m_ShowFPS = true;
    float m_Volume = 0.7f;
    
    uint32 m_FloatingWindowCount = 0;
};

int nkmain(int argc, char* argv[]) {
    UICompleteDemo demo;
    demo.Run();
    return 0;
}
```

# Suite - UDP Socket, HTTP Client & Network Servers

---

## 62. UDP SOCKET

### Core/Network/UDPSocket.h

```cpp
// Core/Network/UDPSocket.h
#pragma once

#include "NetworkCore.h"

namespace nkentseu {

class UDPSocket {
public:
    UDPSocket();
    ~UDPSocket();
    
    // Binding
    NetworkError Bind(const EndPoint& endpoint);
    NetworkError Bind(uint16 port);
    
    // I/O
    int SendTo(const void* data, size_t size, const EndPoint& destination);
    int ReceiveFrom(void* buffer, size_t bufferSize, EndPoint* outSender = nullptr);
    
    // Connected UDP (optional - filters packets)
    NetworkError Connect(const EndPoint& endpoint);
    int Send(const void* data, size_t size);
    int Receive(void* buffer, size_t bufferSize);
    
    // Options
    NetworkError SetBlocking(bool blocking);
    bool IsBlocking() const { return m_Blocking; }
    
    NetworkError SetBroadcast(bool broadcast);
    NetworkError SetMulticastTTL(uint8 ttl);
    NetworkError JoinMulticastGroup(const IPAddress& groupAddress);
    NetworkError LeaveMulticastGroup(const IPAddress& groupAddress);
    
    NetworkError SetSendBufferSize(int size);
    NetworkError SetReceiveBufferSize(int size);
    
    // Info
    EndPoint GetLocalEndPoint() const;
    EndPoint GetRemoteEndPoint() const { return m_RemoteEndpoint; }
    int GetNativeSocket() const { return m_Socket; }
    
    bool IsBound() const { return m_Bound; }
    bool IsConnected() const { return m_Connected; }
    
    int Available() const;
    NetworkError GetLastError() const { return m_LastError; }
    
private:
    void Close();
    
    int m_Socket = -1;
    bool m_Bound = false;
    bool m_Connected = false;
    bool m_Blocking = true;
    EndPoint m_RemoteEndpoint;
    NetworkError m_LastError;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Network/UDPSocket.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Network/UDPSocket.cpp
#include "UDPSocket.h"
#include <cstring>

#ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
    #include <WinSock2.h>
    #include <WS2tcpip.h>
    #define CLOSE_SOCKET closesocket
#else
    #include <sys/socket.h>
    #include <netinet/in.h>
    #include <arpa/inet.h>
    #include <unistd.h>
    #include <fcntl.h>
    #include <sys/ioctl.h>
    #define CLOSE_SOCKET close
    #define INVALID_SOCKET -1
    #define SOCKET_ERROR -1
#endif

namespace nkentseu {

UDPSocket::UDPSocket() {
    if (!NetworkSystem::IsInitialized()) {
        NetworkSystem::Init();
    }
    
    m_Socket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_DGRAM, IPPROTO_UDP);
    if (m_Socket == INVALID_SOCKET) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        printf("Failed to create UDP socket: %s\n", m_LastError.GetMessage().c_str());
    }
}

UDPSocket::~UDPSocket() {
    Close();
}

void UDPSocket::Close() {
    if (m_Socket != INVALID_SOCKET) {
        CLOSE_SOCKET(m_Socket);
        m_Socket = INVALID_SOCKET;
    }
    m_Bound = false;
    m_Connected = false;
}

// =====================================================================
// BINDING
// =====================================================================

NetworkError UDPSocket::Bind(const EndPoint& endpoint) {
    if (m_Socket == INVALID_SOCKET) {
        return NetworkError(NetworkError::InvalidArgument, "Invalid socket");
    }
    
    struct sockaddr_in addr = {};
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(endpoint.port);
    std::memcpy(&addr.sin_addr, endpoint.address.bytes, 4);
    
    if (bind(m_Socket, reinterpret_cast<struct sockaddr*>(&addr), sizeof(addr)) == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    
    m_Bound = true;
    return NetworkError();
}

NetworkError UDPSocket::Bind(uint16 port) {
    return Bind(EndPoint(IPAddress::Any(), port));
}

// =====================================================================
// I/O - UNCONNECTED
// =====================================================================

int UDPSocket::SendTo(const void* data, size_t size, const EndPoint& destination) {
    if (m_Socket == INVALID_SOCKET) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError(NetworkError::InvalidArgument, "Invalid socket");
        return -1;
    }
    
    struct sockaddr_in addr = {};
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(destination.port);
    std::memcpy(&addr.sin_addr, destination.address.bytes, 4);
    
    int result = sendto(m_Socket, 
                       static_cast<const char*>(data), 
                       static_cast<int>(size), 
                       0,
                       reinterpret_cast<struct sockaddr*>(&addr), 
                       sizeof(addr));
    
    if (result == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return -1;
    }
    
    return result;
}

int UDPSocket::ReceiveFrom(void* buffer, size_t bufferSize, EndPoint* outSender) {
    if (m_Socket == INVALID_SOCKET) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError(NetworkError::InvalidArgument, "Invalid socket");
        return -1;
    }
    
    struct sockaddr_in addr = {};
    socklen_t addrLen = sizeof(addr);
    
    int result = recvfrom(m_Socket,
                         static_cast<char*>(buffer),
                         static_cast<int>(bufferSize),
                         0,
                         reinterpret_cast<struct sockaddr*>(&addr),
                         &addrLen);
    
    if (result == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return -1;
    }
    
    if (outSender) {
        outSender->address.family = AddressFamily::IPv4;
        std::memcpy(outSender->address.bytes, &addr.sin_addr, 4);
        outSender->port = ntohs(addr.sin_port);
    }
    
    return result;
}

// =====================================================================
// I/O - CONNECTED
// =====================================================================

NetworkError UDPSocket::Connect(const EndPoint& endpoint) {
    if (m_Socket == INVALID_SOCKET) {
        return NetworkError(NetworkError::InvalidArgument, "Invalid socket");
    }
    
    struct sockaddr_in addr = {};
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(endpoint.port);
    std::memcpy(&addr.sin_addr, endpoint.address.bytes, 4);
    
    if (connect(m_Socket, reinterpret_cast<struct sockaddr*>(&addr), sizeof(addr)) == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    
    m_Connected = true;
    m_RemoteEndpoint = endpoint;
    return NetworkError();
}

int UDPSocket::Send(const void* data, size_t size) {
    if (!m_Connected) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError(NetworkError::NotConnected, "Socket not connected");
        return -1;
    }
    
    int result = send(m_Socket, static_cast<const char*>(data), static_cast<int>(size), 0);
    
    if (result == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return -1;
    }
    
    return result;
}

int UDPSocket::Receive(void* buffer, size_t bufferSize) {
    if (!m_Connected) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError(NetworkError::NotConnected, "Socket not connected");
        return -1;
    }
    
    int result = recv(m_Socket, static_cast<char*>(buffer), static_cast<int>(bufferSize), 0);
    
    if (result == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return -1;
    }
    
    return result;
}

// =====================================================================
// OPTIONS
// =====================================================================

NetworkError UDPSocket::SetBlocking(bool blocking) {
    #ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
    u_long mode = blocking ? 0 : 1;
    if (ioctlsocket(m_Socket, FIONBIO, &mode) != 0) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    #else
    int flags = fcntl(m_Socket, F_GETFL, 0);
    if (flags == -1) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    
    flags = blocking ? (flags & ~O_NONBLOCK) : (flags | O_NONBLOCK);
    
    if (fcntl(m_Socket, F_SETFL, flags) != 0) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    #endif
    
    m_Blocking = blocking;
    return NetworkError();
}

NetworkError UDPSocket::SetBroadcast(bool broadcast) {
    int flag = broadcast ? 1 : 0;
    if (setsockopt(m_Socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_BROADCAST,
                   reinterpret_cast<char*>(&flag), sizeof(flag)) != 0) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    return NetworkError();
}

NetworkError UDPSocket::SetMulticastTTL(uint8 ttl) {
    int ttlValue = ttl;
    if (setsockopt(m_Socket, IPPROTO_IP, IP_MULTICAST_TTL,
                   reinterpret_cast<char*>(&ttlValue), sizeof(ttlValue)) != 0) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    return NetworkError();
}

NetworkError UDPSocket::JoinMulticastGroup(const IPAddress& groupAddress) {
    struct ip_mreq mreq = {};
    std::memcpy(&mreq.imr_multiaddr, groupAddress.bytes, 4);
    mreq.imr_interface.s_addr = INADDR_ANY;
    
    if (setsockopt(m_Socket, IPPROTO_IP, IP_ADD_MEMBERSHIP,
                   reinterpret_cast<char*>(&mreq), sizeof(mreq)) != 0) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    return NetworkError();
}

NetworkError UDPSocket::LeaveMulticastGroup(const IPAddress& groupAddress) {
    struct ip_mreq mreq = {};
    std::memcpy(&mreq.imr_multiaddr, groupAddress.bytes, 4);
    mreq.imr_interface.s_addr = INADDR_ANY;
    
    if (setsockopt(m_Socket, IPPROTO_IP, IP_DROP_MEMBERSHIP,
                   reinterpret_cast<char*>(&mreq), sizeof(mreq)) != 0) {
        m_LastError = NetworkError::FromSystemError();
        return m_LastError;
    }
    return NetworkError();
}

// =====================================================================
// INFO
// =====================================================================

EndPoint UDPSocket::GetLocalEndPoint() const {
    struct sockaddr_in addr = {};
    socklen_t addrLen = sizeof(addr);
    
    if (getsockname(m_Socket, reinterpret_cast<struct sockaddr*>(&addr), &addrLen) == 0) {
        IPAddress ip;
        ip.family = AddressFamily::IPv4;
        std::memcpy(ip.bytes, &addr.sin_addr, 4);
        return EndPoint(ip, ntohs(addr.sin_port));
    }
    
    return EndPoint();
}

int UDPSocket::Available() const {
    #ifdef NKENTSEU_PLATFORM_WINDOWS
    u_long available = 0;
    ioctlsocket(m_Socket, FIONREAD, &available);
    return static_cast<int>(available);
    #else
    int available = 0;
    ioctl(m_Socket, FIONREAD, &available);
    return available;
    #endif
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```
