## 63. HTTP CLIENT

### Core/Network/HTTPClient.h

```cpp
// Core/Network/HTTPClient.h
#pragma once

#include "NetworkCore.h"
#include "TCPSocket.h"
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

enum class HTTPMethod {
    GET,
    POST,
    PUT,
    DELETE,
    HEAD,
    PATCH,
    OPTIONS
};

struct HTTPHeader {
    std::string name;
    std::string value;
};

struct HTTPRequest {
    HTTPMethod method = HTTPMethod::GET;
    std::string url;
    std::string path = "/";
    std::string host;
    uint16 port = 80;
    
    std::vector<HTTPHeader> headers;
    std::string body;
    
    uint32 timeoutMs = 10000;
    bool followRedirects = true;
    uint32 maxRedirects = 5;
    
    void AddHeader(const std::string& name, const std::string& value) {
        headers.push_back({name, value});
    }
    
    void SetContentType(const std::string& contentType) {
        AddHeader("Content-Type", contentType);
    }
    
    void SetUserAgent(const std::string& userAgent) {
        AddHeader("User-Agent", userAgent);
    }
};

struct HTTPResponse {
    int statusCode = 0;
    std::string statusMessage;
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> headers;
    std::string body;
    
    bool success = false;
    std::string errorMessage;
    
    std::string GetHeader(const std::string& name) const {
        auto it = headers.find(name);
        return it != headers.end() ? it->second : "";
    }
    
    bool HasHeader(const std::string& name) const {
        return headers.find(name) != headers.end();
    }
};

class HTTPClient {
public:
    HTTPClient();
    ~HTTPClient();
    
    // Simple requests
    HTTPResponse GET(const std::string& url);
    HTTPResponse POST(const std::string& url, const std::string& body, 
                     const std::string& contentType = "application/json");
    HTTPResponse PUT(const std::string& url, const std::string& body,
                    const std::string& contentType = "application/json");
    HTTPResponse DELETE(const std::string& url);
    
    // Advanced request
    HTTPResponse Request(const HTTPRequest& request);
    
    // Configuration
    void SetDefaultHeader(const std::string& name, const std::string& value);
    void SetTimeout(uint32 timeoutMs) { m_DefaultTimeout = timeoutMs; }
    void SetUserAgent(const std::string& userAgent) { m_UserAgent = userAgent; }
    void SetFollowRedirects(bool follow) { m_FollowRedirects = follow; }
    
private:
    HTTPResponse SendRequest(const HTTPRequest& request);
    bool ParseURL(const std::string& url, std::string& host, uint16& port, std::string& path);
    std::string BuildRequestString(const HTTPRequest& request);
    HTTPResponse ParseResponse(const std::string& responseData);
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> m_DefaultHeaders;
    std::string m_UserAgent = "Nkentseu HTTP Client/1.0";
    uint32 m_DefaultTimeout = 10000;
    bool m_FollowRedirects = true;
    uint32 m_MaxRedirects = 5;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Network/HTTPClient.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Network/HTTPClient.cpp
#include "HTTPClient.h"
#include <sstream>
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

HTTPClient::HTTPClient() {
    m_DefaultHeaders["User-Agent"] = m_UserAgent;
    m_DefaultHeaders["Accept"] = "*/*";
    m_DefaultHeaders["Connection"] = "close";
}

HTTPClient::~HTTPClient() {
}

// =====================================================================
// SIMPLE REQUESTS
// =====================================================================

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::GET(const std::string& url) {
    HTTPRequest request;
    request.method = HTTPMethod::GET;
    request.url = url;
    return Request(request);
}

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::POST(const std::string& url, const std::string& body,
                              const std::string& contentType) {
    HTTPRequest request;
    request.method = HTTPMethod::POST;
    request.url = url;
    request.body = body;
    request.SetContentType(contentType);
    return Request(request);
}

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::PUT(const std::string& url, const std::string& body,
                             const std::string& contentType) {
    HTTPRequest request;
    request.method = HTTPMethod::PUT;
    request.url = url;
    request.body = body;
    request.SetContentType(contentType);
    return Request(request);
}

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::DELETE(const std::string& url) {
    HTTPRequest request;
    request.method = HTTPMethod::DELETE;
    request.url = url;
    return Request(request);
}

// =====================================================================
// ADVANCED REQUEST
// =====================================================================

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::Request(const HTTPRequest& request) {
    HTTPResponse response;
    
    // Parse URL
    HTTPRequest req = request;
    if (!ParseURL(req.url, req.host, req.port, req.path)) {
        response.errorMessage = "Invalid URL";
        return response;
    }
    
    // Apply defaults
    if (req.timeoutMs == 0) {
        req.timeoutMs = m_DefaultTimeout;
    }
    
    // Add default headers
    for (const auto& header : m_DefaultHeaders) {
        bool found = false;
        for (const auto& h : req.headers) {
            if (h.name == header.first) {
                found = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (!found) {
            req.AddHeader(header.first, header.second);
        }
    }
    
    // Send request
    return SendRequest(req);
}

// =====================================================================
// IMPLEMENTATION
// =====================================================================

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::SendRequest(const HTTPRequest& request) {
    HTTPResponse response;
    
    // Create socket
    TCPSocket socket;
    
    // Connect
    NetworkError error = socket.Connect(request.host, request.port, request.timeoutMs);
    if (error.HasError()) {
        response.errorMessage = "Connection failed: " + error.GetMessage();
        return response;
    }
    
    // Build request
    std::string requestStr = BuildRequestString(request);
    
    // Send request
    int sent = socket.SendAll(requestStr.c_str(), requestStr.length());
    if (sent < 0) {
        response.errorMessage = "Failed to send request";
        return response;
    }
    
    // Receive response
    std::string responseData;
    char buffer[4096];
    
    while (true) {
        int received = socket.Receive(buffer, sizeof(buffer) - 1);
        if (received <= 0) break;
        
        buffer[received] = '\0';
        responseData += buffer;
        
        // Check if we have complete response (simple check)
        if (responseData.find("\r\n\r\n") != std::string::npos) {
            // Check Content-Length
            size_t headerEnd = responseData.find("\r\n\r\n");
            std::string headers = responseData.substr(0, headerEnd);
            
            size_t clPos = headers.find("Content-Length:");
            if (clPos != std::string::npos) {
                size_t clEnd = headers.find("\r\n", clPos);
                std::string clStr = headers.substr(clPos + 15, clEnd - clPos - 15);
                int contentLength = std::stoi(clStr);
                
                size_t bodyStart = headerEnd + 4;
                if (responseData.length() >= bodyStart + contentLength) {
                    break;
                }
            } else {
                // No Content-Length, assume chunked or connection close
                // For simplicity, we'll just break after a short timeout
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    socket.Disconnect();
    
    // Parse response
    response = ParseResponse(responseData);
    response.success = (response.statusCode >= 200 && response.statusCode < 300);
    
    return response;
}

bool HTTPClient::ParseURL(const std::string& url, std::string& host, 
                         uint16& port, std::string& path) {
    // Simple URL parser
    // Format: http://host:port/path or http://host/path
    
    size_t schemeEnd = url.find("://");
    if (schemeEnd == std::string::npos) {
        return false;
    }
    
    size_t hostStart = schemeEnd + 3;
    size_t pathStart = url.find('/', hostStart);
    
    if (pathStart == std::string::npos) {
        path = "/";
        pathStart = url.length();
    } else {
        path = url.substr(pathStart);
    }
    
    std::string hostPart = url.substr(hostStart, pathStart - hostStart);
    
    size_t portPos = hostPart.find(':');
    if (portPos != std::string::npos) {
        host = hostPart.substr(0, portPos);
        port = static_cast<uint16>(std::stoi(hostPart.substr(portPos + 1)));
    } else {
        host = hostPart;
        port = 80;
    }
    
    return true;
}

std::string HTTPClient::BuildRequestString(const HTTPRequest& request) {
    std::ostringstream ss;
    
    // Request line
    const char* method = "GET";
    switch (request.method) {
        case HTTPMethod::GET: method = "GET"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::POST: method = "POST"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::PUT: method = "PUT"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::DELETE: method = "DELETE"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::HEAD: method = "HEAD"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::PATCH: method = "PATCH"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::OPTIONS: method = "OPTIONS"; break;
    }
    
    ss << method << " " << request.path << " HTTP/1.1\r\n";
    
    // Host header
    ss << "Host: " << request.host;
    if (request.port != 80) {
        ss << ":" << request.port;
    }
    ss << "\r\n";
    
    // Headers
    for (const auto& header : request.headers) {
        ss << header.name << ": " << header.value << "\r\n";
    }
    
    // Content-Length for body
    if (!request.body.empty()) {
        ss << "Content-Length: " << request.body.length() << "\r\n";
    }
    
    ss << "\r\n";
    
    // Body
    if (!request.body.empty()) {
        ss << request.body;
    }
    
    return ss.str();
}

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::ParseResponse(const std::string& responseData) {
    HTTPResponse response;
    
    // Find header/body separator
    size_t headerEnd = responseData.find("\r\n\r\n");
    if (headerEnd == std::string::npos) {
        response.errorMessage = "Invalid HTTP response";
        return response;
    }
    
    std::string headerSection = responseData.substr(0, headerEnd);
    response.body = responseData.substr(headerEnd + 4);
    
    // Parse status line
    size_t lineEnd = headerSection.find("\r\n");
    std::string statusLine = headerSection.substr(0, lineEnd);
    
    std::istringstream statusStream(statusLine);
    std::string httpVersion;
    statusStream >> httpVersion >> response.statusCode;
    std::getline(statusStream, response.statusMessage);
    
    // Trim status message
    if (!response.statusMessage.empty() && response.statusMessage[0] == ' ') {
        response.statusMessage = response.statusMessage.substr(1);
    }
    
    // Parse headers
    size_t pos = lineEnd + 2;
    while (pos < headerSection.length()) {
        size_t nextLine = headerSection.find("\r\n", pos);
        if (nextLine == std::string::npos) break;
        
        std::string line = headerSection.substr(pos, nextLine - pos);
        size_t colonPos = line.find(':');
        
        if (colonPos != std::string::npos) {
            std::string name = line.substr(0, colonPos);
            std::string value = line.substr(colonPos + 1);
            
            // Trim whitespace
            value.erase(0, value.find_first_not_of(" \t"));
            value.erase(value.find_last_not_of(" \t") + 1);
            
            response.headers[name] = value;
        }
        
        pos = nextLine + 2;
    }
    
    return response;
}

void HTTPClient::SetDefaultHeader(const std::string& name, const std::string& value) {
    m_DefaultHeaders[name] = value;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 64. TCP SERVER

### Core/Network/TCPServer.h

```cpp
// Core/Network/TCPServer.h
#pragma once

#include "NetworkCore.h"
#include "TCPSocket.h"
#include <thread>
#include <atomic>
#include <functional>
#include <vector>
#include <mutex>

namespace nkentseu {

class TCPClient {
public:
    TCPClient(TCPSocket* socket, const EndPoint& endpoint)
        : m_Socket(socket), m_Endpoint(endpoint), m_Connected(true) {}
    
    ~TCPClient() {
        Disconnect();
        delete m_Socket;
    }
    
    int Send(const void* data, size_t size) {
        if (!m_Connected) return -1;
        return m_Socket->Send(data, size);
    }
    
    int Receive(void* buffer, size_t size) {
        if (!m_Connected) return -1;
        return m_Socket->Receive(buffer, size);
    }
    
    void Disconnect() {
        if (m_Connected) {
            m_Socket->Disconnect();
            m_Connected = false;
        }
    }
    
    bool IsConnected() const { return m_Connected; }
    EndPoint GetEndPoint() const { return m_Endpoint; }
    TCPSocket* GetSocket() { return m_Socket; }
    
private:
    TCPSocket* m_Socket;
    EndPoint m_Endpoint;
    bool m_Connected;
};

class TCPServer {
public:
    using ClientConnectedCallback = std::function<void(TCPClient*)>;
    using ClientDisconnectedCallback = std::function<void(TCPClient*)>;
    using DataReceivedCallback = std::function<void(TCPClient*, const uint8*, size_t)>;
    
    TCPServer();
    ~TCPServer();
    
    // Server control
    bool Start(uint16 port, int backlog = 10);
    bool Start(const EndPoint& endpoint, int backlog = 10);
    void Stop();
    
    bool IsRunning() const { return m_Running; }
    EndPoint GetLocalEndPoint() const;
    
    // Client management
    void DisconnectClient(TCPClient* client);
    void DisconnectAll();
    void BroadcastData(const void* data, size_t size);
    
    std::vector<TCPClient*> GetClients();
    size_t GetClientCount() const;
    
    // Callbacks
    void SetClientConnectedCallback(ClientConnectedCallback callback) {
        m_OnClientConnected = callback;
    }
    
    void SetClientDisconnectedCallback(ClientDisconnectedCallback callback) {
        m_OnClientDisconnected = callback;
    }
    
    void SetDataReceivedCallback(DataReceivedCallback callback) {
        m_OnDataReceived = callback;
    }
    
    // Configuration
    void SetMaxClients(size_t max) { m_MaxClients = max; }
    size_t GetMaxClients() const { return m_MaxClients; }
    
private:
    void AcceptLoop();
    void ClientLoop(TCPClient* client);
    void RemoveClient(TCPClient* client);
    
    TCPSocket m_ListenSocket;
    std::atomic<bool> m_Running;
    
    std::thread m_AcceptThread;
    std::vector<std::thread> m_ClientThreads;
    
    std::vector<TCPClient*> m_Clients;
    std::mutex m_ClientsMutex;
    
    size_t m_MaxClients = 100;
    
    ClientConnectedCallback m_OnClientConnected;
    ClientDisconnectedCallback m_OnClientDisconnected;
    DataReceivedCallback m_OnDataReceived;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 65. TCP SERVER IMPLEMENTATION

### Core/Network/TCPServer.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Network/TCPServer.cpp
#include "TCPServer.h"
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

TCPServer::TCPServer()
    : m_Running(false) {
}

TCPServer::~TCPServer() {
    Stop();
}

// =====================================================================
// SERVER CONTROL
// =====================================================================

bool TCPServer::Start(uint16 port, int backlog) {
    return Start(EndPoint(IPAddress::Any(), port), backlog);
}

bool TCPServer::Start(const EndPoint& endpoint, int backlog) {
    if (m_Running) {
        printf("Server already running\n");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Bind socket
    NetworkError error = m_ListenSocket.Bind(endpoint);
    if (error.HasError()) {
        printf("Failed to bind: %s\n", error.GetMessage().c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    // Listen
    error = m_ListenSocket.Listen(backlog);
    if (error.HasError()) {
        printf("Failed to listen: %s\n", error.GetMessage().c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    m_Running = true;
    
    // Start accept thread
    m_AcceptThread = std::thread(&TCPServer::AcceptLoop, this);
    
    printf("TCP Server started on %s\n", endpoint.ToString().c_str());
    
    return true;
}

void TCPServer::Stop() {
    if (!m_Running) return;
    
    m_Running = false;
    
    // Disconnect all clients
    DisconnectAll();
    
    // Close listen socket
    m_ListenSocket.Disconnect();
    
    // Wait for accept thread
    if (m_AcceptThread.joinable()) {
        m_AcceptThread.join();
    }
    
    // Wait for all client threads
    for (auto& thread : m_ClientThreads) {
        if (thread.joinable()) {
            thread.join();
        }
    }
    m_ClientThreads.clear();
    
    printf("TCP Server stopped\n");
}

EndPoint TCPServer::GetLocalEndPoint() const {
    return m_ListenSocket.GetLocalEndPoint();
}

// =====================================================================
// CLIENT MANAGEMENT
// =====================================================================

void TCPServer::DisconnectClient(TCPClient* client) {
    if (!client) return;
    
    client->Disconnect();
    RemoveClient(client);
}

void TCPServer::DisconnectAll() {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    
    for (auto* client : m_Clients) {
        client->Disconnect();
    }
}

void TCPServer::BroadcastData(const void* data, size_t size) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    
    for (auto* client : m_Clients) {
        if (client->IsConnected()) {
            client->Send(data, size);
        }
    }
}

std::vector<TCPClient*> TCPServer::GetClients() {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    return m_Clients;
}

size_t TCPServer::GetClientCount() const {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    return m_Clients.size();
}

// =====================================================================
// INTERNAL
// =====================================================================

void TCPServer::AcceptLoop() {
    // Set non-blocking for periodic checks
    m_ListenSocket.SetBlocking(false);
    
    while (m_Running) {
        EndPoint clientEndpoint;
        TCPSocket* clientSocket = m_ListenSocket.Accept(&clientEndpoint);
        
        if (clientSocket) {
            // Check max clients
            if (GetClientCount() >= m_MaxClients) {
                printf("Max clients reached, rejecting connection from %s\n", 
                       clientEndpoint.ToString().c_str());
                delete clientSocket;
                continue;
            }
            
            // Create client
            TCPClient* client = new TCPClient(clientSocket, clientEndpoint);
            
            {
                std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
                m_Clients.push_back(client);
            }
            
            printf("Client connected: %s\n", clientEndpoint.ToString().c_str());
            
            // Callback
            if (m_OnClientConnected) {
                m_OnClientConnected(client);
            }
            
            // Start client thread
            m_ClientThreads.emplace_back(&TCPServer::ClientLoop, this, client);
        }
        
        // Sleep briefly to avoid busy-waiting
        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(10));
    }
}

void TCPServer::ClientLoop(TCPClient* client) {
    const size_t bufferSize = 4096;
    uint8 buffer[bufferSize];
    
    // Set non-blocking
    client->GetSocket()->SetBlocking(false);
    
    while (m_Running && client->IsConnected()) {
        int received = client->Receive(buffer, bufferSize);
        
        if (received > 0) {
            // Data received
            if (m_OnDataReceived) {
                m_OnDataReceived(client, buffer, received);
            }
        } else if (received == 0) {
            // Connection closed
            break;
        } else {
            // Check error
            NetworkError error = client->GetSocket()->GetLastError();
            if (error.GetCode() != NetworkError::OperationWouldBlock) {
                // Real error
                break;
            }
        }
        
        // Sleep briefly
        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(10));
    }
    
    printf("Client disconnected: %s\n", client->GetEndPoint().ToString().c_str());
    
    // Callback
    if (m_OnClientDisconnected) {
        m_OnClientDisconnected(client);
    }
    
    // Remove client
    RemoveClient(client);
}

void TCPServer::RemoveClient(TCPClient* client) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    
    auto it = std::find(m_Clients.begin(), m_Clients.end(), client);
    if (it != m_Clients.end()) {
        m_Clients.erase(it);
        delete client;
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 66. WEBSOCKET (Basic Implementation)

### Core/Network/WebSocket.h

```cpp
// Core/Network/WebSocket.h
#pragma once

#include "NetworkCore.h"
#include "TCPSocket.h"
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

enum class WebSocketOpcode {
    Continuation = 0x0,
    Text = 0x1,
    Binary = 0x2,
    Close = 0x8,
    Ping = 0x9,
    Pong = 0xA
};

enum class WebSocketState {
    Connecting,
    Open,
    Closing,
    Closed
};

struct WebSocketFrame {
    bool fin = true;
    WebSocketOpcode opcode = WebSocketOpcode::Text;
    bool masked = false;
    std::vector<uint8> payload;
};

class WebSocket {
public:
    using MessageCallback = std::function<void(const std::string&)>;
    using BinaryCallback = std::function<void(const uint8*, size_t)>;
    using ErrorCallback = std::function<void(const std::string&)>;
    
    WebSocket();
    ~WebSocket();
    
    // Connection
    bool Connect(const std::string& url);
    void Disconnect();
    
    bool IsConnected() const { return m_State == WebSocketState::Open; }
    WebSocketState GetState() const { return m_State; }
    
    // Send
    bool SendText(const std::string& message);
    bool SendBinary(const uint8* data, size_t size);
    bool SendPing();
    bool SendPong();
    
    // Receive (call periodically)
    void Poll();
    
    // Callbacks
    void SetMessageCallback(MessageCallback callback) { m_OnMessage = callback; }
    void SetBinaryCallback(BinaryCallback callback) { m_OnBinary = callback; }
    void SetErrorCallback(ErrorCallback callback) { m_OnError = callback; }
    
private:
    bool PerformHandshake(const std::string& host, const std::string& path);
    bool SendFrame(const WebSocketFrame& frame);
    bool ReceiveFrame(WebSocketFrame& frame);
    
    std::string GenerateWebSocketKey();
    
    TCPSocket m_Socket;
    WebSocketState m_State = WebSocketState::Closed;
    
    MessageCallback m_OnMessage;
    BinaryCallback m_OnBinary;
    ErrorCallback m_OnError;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 67. COMPLETE CHAT EXAMPLE

### Examples/NetworkChat/ChatProtocol.h

```cpp
// Examples/NetworkChat/ChatProtocol.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstring>

namespace chat {

enum class MessageType : uint8 {
    Join = 0,
    Leave = 1,
    Chat = 2,
    UserList = 3,
    PrivateMessage = 4,
    ServerInfo = 5
};

struct ChatMessage {
    MessageType type;
    char username[32];
    char content[256];
    uint64 timestamp;
    
    ChatMessage() {
        std::memset(this, 0, sizeof(ChatMessage));
    }
    
    size_t GetSize() const {
        return sizeof(MessageType) + sizeof(username) + sizeof(content) + sizeof(timestamp);
    }
    
    void Serialize(uint8* buffer) const {
        std::memcpy(buffer, this, GetSize());
    }
    
    static ChatMessage Deserialize(const uint8* buffer) {
        ChatMessage msg;
        std::memcpy(&msg, buffer, msg.GetSize());
        return msg;
    }
};

inline ChatMessage CreateJoinMessage(const std::string& username) {
    ChatMessage msg;
    msg.type = MessageType::Join;
    strncpy(msg.username, username.c_str(), sizeof(msg.username) - 1);
    msg.timestamp = std::time(nullptr);
    return msg;
}

inline ChatMessage CreateChatMessage(const std::string& username, const std::string& content) {
    ChatMessage msg;
    msg.type = MessageType::Chat;
    strncpy(msg.username, username.c_str(), sizeof(msg.username) - 1);
    strncpy(msg.content, content.c_str(), sizeof(msg.content) - 1);
    msg.timestamp = std::time(nullptr);
    return msg;
}

inline ChatMessage CreateLeaveMessage(const std::string& username) {
    ChatMessage msg;
    msg.type = MessageType::Leave;
    strncpy(msg.username, username.c_str(), sizeof(msg.username) - 1);
    msg.timestamp = std::time(nullptr);
    return msg;
}

} // namespace chat
```

### Examples/NetworkChat/ChatServer.cpp

```cpp
// Examples/NetworkChat/ChatServer.cpp
#include <Network/TCPServer.h>
#include "ChatProtocol.h"
#include <iostream>
#include <unordered_map>

using namespace nkentseu;
using namespace chat;

class ChatServer {
public:
    void Run(uint16 port) {
        if (!NetworkSystem::Init()) {
            std::cerr << "Failed to initialize network system\n";
            return;
        }
        
        m_Server.SetClientConnectedCallback([this](TCPClient* client) {
            OnClientConnected(client);
        });
        
        m_Server.SetClientDisconnectedCallback([this](TCPClient* client) {
            OnClientDisconnected(client);
        });
        
        m_Server.SetDataReceivedCallback([this](TCPClient* client, const uint8* data, size_t size) {
            OnDataReceived(client, data, size);
        });
        
        if (!m_Server.Start(port)) {
            std::cerr << "Failed to start server\n";
            return;
        }
        
        std::cout << "Chat server started on port " << port << "\n";
        std::cout << "Press Enter to stop...\n";
        
        std::cin.get();
        
        m_Server.Stop();
        NetworkSystem::Shutdown();
    }
    
private:
    void OnClientConnected(TCPClient* client) {
        std::cout << "New connection from " << client->GetEndPoint().ToString() << "\n";
    }
    
    void OnClientDisconnected(TCPClient* client) {
        auto it = m_Usernames.find(client);
        if (it != m_Usernames.end()) {
            std::cout << "User '" << it->second << "' disconnected\n";
            
            // Broadcast leave message
            ChatMessage leaveMsg = CreateLeaveMessage(it->second);
            BroadcastMessage(leaveMsg, client);
            
            m_Usernames.erase(it);
        }
    }
    
    void OnDataReceived(TCPClient* client, const uint8* data, size_t size) {
        if (size < sizeof(ChatMessage)) return;
        
        ChatMessage msg = ChatMessage::Deserialize(data);
        
        switch (msg.type) {
            case MessageType::Join:
                HandleJoin(client, msg);
                break;
            
            case MessageType::Chat:
                HandleChat(client, msg);
                break;
            
            case MessageType::Leave:
                HandleLeave(client, msg);
                break;
            
            default:
                break;
        }
    }
    
    void HandleJoin(TCPClient* client, const ChatMessage& msg) {
        std::string username = msg.username;
        m_Usernames[client] = username;
        
        std::cout << "User '" << username << "' joined\n";
        
        // Broadcast join message
        BroadcastMessage(msg, nullptr);
        
        // Send user list
        SendUserList(client);
    }
    
    void HandleChat(TCPClient* client, const ChatMessage& msg) {
        std::cout << "[" << msg.username << "]: " << msg.content << "\n";
        
        // Broadcast to all clients
        BroadcastMessage(msg, nullptr);
    }
    
    void HandleLeave(TCPClient* client, const ChatMessage& msg) {
        std::cout << "User '" << msg.username << "' left\n";
        
        BroadcastMessage(msg, client);
        
        m_Usernames.erase(client);
    }
    
    void BroadcastMessage(const ChatMessage& msg, TCPClient* exclude = nullptr) {
        uint8 buffer[512];
        msg.Serialize(buffer);
        
        for (auto* client : m_Server.GetClients()) {
            if (client != exclude && client->IsConnected()) {
                client->Send(buffer, msg.GetSize());
            }
        }
    }
    
    void SendUserList(TCPClient* client) {
        ChatMessage msg;
        msg.type = MessageType::UserList;
        
        std::string userList;
        for (const auto& pair : m_Usernames) {
            if (!userList.empty()) userList += ",";
            userList += pair.second;
        }
        
        strncpy(msg.content, userList.c_str(), sizeof(msg.content) - 1);
        
        uint8 buffer[512];
        msg.Serialize(buffer);
        
        client->Send(buffer, msg.GetSize());
    }
    
    TCPServer m_Server;
    std::unordered_map<TCPClient*, std::string> m_Usernames;
};

int main(int argc, char* argv[]) {
    uint16 port = 8888;
    
    if (argc > 1) {
        port = static_cast<uint16>(std::atoi(argv[1]));
    }
    
    ChatServer server;
    server.Run(port);
    
    return 0;
}
```

### Examples/NetworkChat/ChatClient.cpp

```cpp
// Examples/NetworkChat/ChatClient.cpp
#include <Network/TCPSocket.h>
#include "ChatProtocol.h"
#include <iostream>
#include <thread>
#include <atomic>

using namespace nkentseu;
using namespace chat;

class ChatClient {
public:
    bool Connect(const std::string& host, uint16 port, const std::string& username) {
        if (!NetworkSystem::Init()) {
            std::cerr << "Failed to initialize network system\n";
            return false;
        }
        
        m_Username = username;
        
        NetworkError error = m_Socket.Connect(host, port);
        if (error.HasError()) {
            std::cerr << "Connection failed: " << error.GetMessage() << "\n";
            return false;
        }
        
        std::cout << "Connected to " << host << ":" << port << "\n";
        
        // Send join message
        ChatMessage joinMsg = CreateJoinMessage(username);
        SendMessage(joinMsg);
        
        m_Running = true;
        
        // Start receive thread
        m_ReceiveThread = std::thread(&ChatClient::ReceiveLoop, this);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    void Disconnect() {
        if (m_Running) {
            // Send leave message
            ChatMessage leaveMsg = CreateLeaveMessage(m_Username);
            SendMessage(leaveMsg);
            
            m_Running = false;
            
            if (m_ReceiveThread.joinable()) {
                m_ReceiveThread.join();
            }
            
            m_Socket.Disconnect();
            NetworkSystem::Shutdown();
        }
    }
    
    void Run() {
        std::cout << "Type messages and press Enter. Type '/quit' to exit.\n\n";
        
        std::string input;
        while (m_Running && std::getline(std::cin, input)) {
            if (input.empty()) continue;
            
            if (input == "/quit") {
                break;
            }
            
            // Send chat message
            ChatMessage msg = CreateChatMessage(m_Username, input);
            SendMessage(msg);
        }
        
        Disconnect();
    }
    
private:
    void SendMessage(const ChatMessage& msg) {
        uint8 buffer[512];
        msg.Serialize(buffer);
        m_Socket.Send(buffer, msg.GetSize());
    }
    
    void ReceiveLoop() {
        uint8 buffer[512];
        
        while (m_Running) {
            int received = m_Socket.Receive(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
            
            if (received > 0 && received >= sizeof(ChatMessage)) {
                ChatMessage msg = ChatMessage::Deserialize(buffer);
                HandleMessage(msg);
            } else if (received == 0) {
                std::cout << "\nConnection closed by server\n";
                m_Running = false;
                break;
            }
            
            std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(10));
        }
    }
    
    void HandleMessage(const ChatMessage& msg) {
        switch (msg.type) {
            case MessageType::Join:
                std::cout << "*** " << msg.username << " joined the chat\n";
                break;
            
            case MessageType::Leave:
                std::cout << "*** " << msg.username << " left the chat\n";
                break;
            
            case MessageType::Chat:
                if (std::string(msg.username) != m_Username) {
                    std::cout << "[" << msg.username << "]: " << msg.content << "\n";
                }
                break;
            
            case MessageType::UserList:
                std::cout << "Users online: " << msg.content << "\n";
                break;
            
            default:
                break;
        }
    }
    
    TCPSocket m_Socket;
    std::string m_Username;
    std::atomic<bool> m_Running{false};
    std::thread m_ReceiveThread;
};

int main(int argc, char* argv[]) {
    std::string host = "localhost";
    uint16 port = 8888;
    std::string username;
    
    if (argc > 1) {
        host = argv[1];
    }
    if (argc > 2) {
        port = static_cast<uint16>(std::atoi(argv[2]));
    }
    
    std::cout << "Enter your username: ";
    std::getline(std::cin, username);
    
    if (username.empty()) {
        username = "Anonymous";
    }
    
    ChatClient client;
    if (client.Connect(host, port, username)) {
        client.Run();
    }
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 68. HTTP SERVER (Simple)

### Core/Network/HTTPServer.h

```cpp
// Core/Network/HTTPServer.h
#pragma once

#include "TCPServer.h"
#include <functional>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

struct HTTPServerRequest {
    std::string method;
    std::string path;
    std::string version;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> headers;
    std::string body;
    
    std::string GetHeader(const std::string& name) const {
        auto it = headers.find(name);
        return it != headers.end() ? it->second : "";
    }
};

struct HTTPServerResponse {
    int statusCode = 200;
    std::string statusMessage = "OK";
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> headers;
    std::string body;
    
    void SetHeader(const std::string& name, const std::string& value) {
        headers[name] = value;
    }
    
    void SetContentType(const std::string& contentType) {
        SetHeader("Content-Type", contentType);
    }
    
    std::string Build() const {
        std::ostringstream ss;
        ss << "HTTP/1.1 " << statusCode << " " << statusMessage << "\r\n";
        
        for (const auto& header : headers) {
            ss << header.first << ": " << header.second << "\r\n";
        }
        
        ss << "Content-Length: " << body.length() << "\r\n";
        ss << "\r\n";
        ss << body;
        
        return ss.str();
    }
};

class HTTPServer {
public:
    using RouteHandler = std::function<void(const HTTPServerRequest&, HTTPServerResponse&)>;
    
    HTTPServer();
    ~HTTPServer();
    
    bool Start(uint16 port);
    void Stop();
    
    // Routing
    void GET(const std::string& path, RouteHandler handler);
    void POST(const std::string& path, RouteHandler handler);
    void PUT(const std::string& path, RouteHandler handler);
    void DELETE(const std::string& path, RouteHandler handler);
    
    // Static files
    void ServeStatic(const std::string& path, const std::string& directory);
    
private:
    void HandleClient(TCPClient* client, const uint8* data, size_t size);
    HTTPServerRequest ParseRequest(const std::string& requestData);
    
    TCPServer m_Server;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, RouteHandler> m_Routes;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> m_StaticPaths;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 65. TCP SERVER IMPLEMENTATION

### Core/Network/TCPServer.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Network/TCPServer.cpp
#include "TCPServer.h"
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

TCPServer::TCPServer()
    : m_Running(false) {
}

TCPServer::~TCPServer() {
    Stop();
}

// =====================================================================
// SERVER CONTROL
// =====================================================================

bool TCPServer::Start(uint16 port, int backlog) {
    return Start(EndPoint(IPAddress::Any(), port), backlog);
}

bool TCPServer::Start(const EndPoint& endpoint, int backlog) {
    if (m_Running) {
        printf("Server already running\n");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Bind socket
    NetworkError error = m_ListenSocket.Bind(endpoint);
    if (error.HasError()) {
        printf("Failed to bind: %s\n", error.GetMessage().c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    // Set reuse address
    m_ListenSocket.SetReuseAddress(true);
    
    // Start listening
    error = m_ListenSocket.Listen(backlog);
    if (error.HasError()) {
        printf("Failed to listen: %s\n", error.GetMessage().c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    m_Running = true;
    
    // Start accept thread
    m_AcceptThread = std::thread(&TCPServer::AcceptLoop, this);
    
    printf("TCP Server started on %s\n", endpoint.ToString().c_str());
    
    return true;
}

void TCPServer::Stop() {
    if (!m_Running) return;
    
    m_Running = false;
    
    // Disconnect all clients
    DisconnectAll();
    
    // Close listen socket
    m_ListenSocket.Disconnect();
    
    // Wait for accept thread
    if (m_AcceptThread.joinable()) {
        m_AcceptThread.join();
    }
    
    // Wait for client threads
    for (auto& thread : m_ClientThreads) {
        if (thread.joinable()) {
            thread.join();
        }
    }
    m_ClientThreads.clear();
    
    printf("TCP Server stopped\n");
}

EndPoint TCPServer::GetLocalEndPoint() const {
    return m_ListenSocket.GetLocalEndPoint();
}

// =====================================================================
// CLIENT MANAGEMENT
// =====================================================================

void TCPServer::DisconnectClient(TCPClient* client) {
    if (!client) return;
    
    client->Disconnect();
    RemoveClient(client);
}

void TCPServer::DisconnectAll() {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    
    for (auto* client : m_Clients) {
        client->Disconnect();
    }
}

void TCPServer::BroadcastData(const void* data, size_t size) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    
    for (auto* client : m_Clients) {
        if (client->IsConnected()) {
            client->Send(data, size);
        }
    }
}

std::vector<TCPClient*> TCPServer::GetClients() {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    return m_Clients;
}

size_t TCPServer::GetClientCount() const {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(const_cast<std::mutex&>(m_ClientsMutex));
    return m_Clients.size();
}

// =====================================================================
// THREADS
// =====================================================================

void TCPServer::AcceptLoop() {
    while (m_Running) {
        // Accept client
        EndPoint clientEndpoint;
        TCPSocket* clientSocket = m_ListenSocket.Accept(&clientEndpoint);
        
        if (!clientSocket) {
            if (m_Running) {
                printf("Accept failed: %s\n", m_ListenSocket.GetLastError().GetMessage().c_str());
            }
            continue;
        }
        
        // Check max clients
        {
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
            if (m_Clients.size() >= m_MaxClients) {
                printf("Max clients reached, rejecting connection from %s\n", 
                       clientEndpoint.ToString().c_str());
                delete clientSocket;
                continue;
            }
        }
        
        // Create client
        TCPClient* client = new TCPClient(clientSocket, clientEndpoint);
        
        {
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
            m_Clients.push_back(client);
        }
        
        printf("Client connected: %s (%zu total)\n", 
               clientEndpoint.ToString().c_str(), GetClientCount());
        
        // Callback
        if (m_OnClientConnected) {
            m_OnClientConnected(client);
        }
        
        // Start client thread
        m_ClientThreads.push_back(std::thread(&TCPServer::ClientLoop, this, client));
    }
}

void TCPServer::ClientLoop(TCPClient* client) {
    const size_t BUFFER_SIZE = 4096;
    uint8 buffer[BUFFER_SIZE];
    
    while (m_Running && client->IsConnected()) {
        int received = client->Receive(buffer, BUFFER_SIZE);
        
        if (received <= 0) {
            // Connection closed or error
            break;
        }
        
        // Callback
        if (m_OnDataReceived) {
            m_OnDataReceived(client, buffer, received);
        }
    }
    
    // Client disconnected
    printf("Client disconnected: %s (%zu remaining)\n", 
           client->GetEndPoint().ToString().c_str(), GetClientCount() - 1);
    
    // Callback
    if (m_OnClientDisconnected) {
        m_OnClientDisconnected(client);
    }
    
    RemoveClient(client);
}

void TCPServer::RemoveClient(TCPClient* client) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_ClientsMutex);
    
    auto it = std::find(m_Clients.begin(), m_Clients.end(), client);
    if (it != m_Clients.end()) {
        m_Clients.erase(it);
        delete client;
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 66. WEBSOCKET (Basic Implementation)

### Core/Network/WebSocket.h

```cpp
// Core/Network/WebSocket.h
#pragma once

#include "NetworkCore.h"
#include "TCPSocket.h"
#include <string>
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

enum class WebSocketOpcode {
    Continuation = 0x0,
    Text = 0x1,
    Binary = 0x2,
    Close = 0x8,
    Ping = 0x9,
    Pong = 0xA
};

enum class WebSocketState {
    Connecting,
    Open,
    Closing,
    Closed
};

struct WebSocketFrame {
    bool fin = true;
    WebSocketOpcode opcode = WebSocketOpcode::Text;
    bool masked = false;
    uint8 maskingKey[4] = {0};
    std::vector<uint8> payload;
};

class WebSocket {
public:
    using MessageCallback = std::function<void(const std::string&)>;
    using BinaryCallback = std::function<void(const uint8*, size_t)>;
    using ErrorCallback = std::function<void(const std::string&)>;
    
    WebSocket();
    ~WebSocket();
    
    // Connection
    bool Connect(const std::string& url);
    void Disconnect();
    
    bool IsConnected() const { return m_State == WebSocketState::Open; }
    WebSocketState GetState() const { return m_State; }
    
    // Send
    void SendText(const std::string& message);
    void SendBinary(const void* data, size_t size);
    void SendPing();
    void SendPong();
    
    // Receive (blocking)
    bool Receive(std::string& message);
    
    // Callbacks
    void SetMessageCallback(MessageCallback callback) { m_OnMessage = callback; }
    void SetBinaryCallback(BinaryCallback callback) { m_OnBinary = callback; }
    void SetErrorCallback(ErrorCallback callback) { m_OnError = callback; }
    
private:
    bool PerformHandshake(const std::string& host, const std::string& path);
    void SendFrame(const WebSocketFrame& frame);
    bool ReceiveFrame(WebSocketFrame& frame);
    
    std::string GenerateWebSocketKey();
    std::string ComputeAcceptKey(const std::string& key);
    
    TCPSocket m_Socket;
    WebSocketState m_State = WebSocketState::Closed;
    
    MessageCallback m_OnMessage;
    BinaryCallback m_OnBinary;
    ErrorCallback m_OnError;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 67. CHAT DEMO COMPLET - Client & Server

### Sandbox/ChatServer.cpp

```cpp
// Sandbox/ChatServer.cpp
#include <Network/NetworkCore.h>
#include <Network/TCPServer.h>
#include <iostream>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <mutex>

using namespace nkentseu;

struct ChatMessage {
    std::string username;
    std::string message;
    
    std::string Serialize() const {
        return username + ": " + message;
    }
};

class ChatServer {
public:
    void Start(uint16 port = 8080) {
        NetworkSystem::Init();
        
        m_Server.SetMaxClients(50);
        
        m_Server.SetClientConnectedCallback([this](TCPClient* client) {
            OnClientConnected(client);
        });
        
        m_Server.SetClientDisconnectedCallback([this](TCPClient* client) {
            OnClientDisconnected(client);
        });
        
        m_Server.SetDataReceivedCallback([this](TCPClient* client, const uint8* data, size_t size) {
            OnDataReceived(client, data, size);
        });
        
        if (m_Server.Start(port)) {
            printf("Chat server started on port %d\n", port);
            printf("Waiting for clients...\n\n");
            
            // Main loop
            std::string input;
            while (true) {
                std::getline(std::cin, input);
                
                if (input == "quit" || input == "exit") {
                    break;
                }
                else if (input == "clients") {
                    ListClients();
                }
                else if (input == "broadcast") {
                    printf("Message: ");
                    std::getline(std::cin, input);
                    BroadcastServerMessage(input);
                }
                else if (input == "help") {
                    ShowHelp();
                }
            }
            
            m_Server.Stop();
        } else {
            printf("Failed to start server\n");
        }
        
        NetworkSystem::Shutdown();
    }
    
private:
    void OnClientConnected(TCPClient* client) {
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_UsersMutex);
        
        // Request username
        std::string welcomeMsg = "Welcome to Chat Server! Please enter your username:\n";
        client->Send(welcomeMsg.c_str(), welcomeMsg.length());
    }
    
    void OnClientDisconnected(TCPClient* client) {
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_UsersMutex);
        
        auto it = m_Users.find(client);
        if (it != m_Users.end()) {
            std::string username = it->second;
            m_Users.erase(it);
            
            std::string msg = "*** " + username + " has left the chat ***\n";
            BroadcastMessage(msg);
            
            printf("%s disconnected\n", username.c_str());
        }
    }
    
    void OnDataReceived(TCPClient* client, const uint8* data, size_t size) {
        std::string message(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data), size);
        
        // Remove trailing newline
        if (!message.empty() && message.back() == '\n') {
            message.pop_back();
        }
        if (!message.empty() && message.back() == '\r') {
            message.pop_back();
        }
        
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_UsersMutex);
        
        auto it = m_Users.find(client);
        
        if (it == m_Users.end()) {
            // First message is username
            if (IsUsernameValid(message)) {
                m_Users[client] = message;
                
                std::string welcomeMsg = "Welcome, " + message + "! Type /help for commands.\n";
                client->Send(welcomeMsg.c_str(), welcomeMsg.length());
                
                std::string joinMsg = "*** " + message + " has joined the chat ***\n";
                BroadcastMessage(joinMsg, client);
                
                printf("%s joined the chat\n", message.c_str());
            } else {
                std::string errorMsg = "Invalid username. Please try again:\n";
                client->Send(errorMsg.c_str(), errorMsg.length());
            }
        } else {
            // Regular message
            std::string username = it->second;
            
            if (message.empty()) {
                return;
            }
            
            // Check for commands
            if (message[0] == '/') {
                HandleCommand(client, username, message);
            } else {
                // Broadcast message
                std::string fullMsg = username + ": " + message + "\n";
                BroadcastMessage(fullMsg);
                
                printf("%s\n", fullMsg.c_str());
            }
        }
    }
    
    void HandleCommand(TCPClient* client, const std::string& username, const std::string& command) {
        if (command == "/help") {
            std::string help = 
                "Commands:\n"
                "  /help - Show this help\n"
                "  /users - List online users\n"
                "  /quit - Disconnect\n";
            client->Send(help.c_str(), help.length());
        }
        else if (command == "/users") {
            std::string userList = "Online users:\n";
            for (const auto& pair : m_Users) {
                userList += "  - " + pair.second + "\n";
            }
            client->Send(userList.c_str(), userList.length());
        }
        else if (command == "/quit") {
            client->Disconnect();
        }
        else {
            std::string error = "Unknown command. Type /help for available commands.\n";
            client->Send(error.c_str(), error.length());
        }
    }
    
    bool IsUsernameValid(const std::string& username) {
        if (username.empty() || username.length() > 20) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Check if already taken
        for (const auto& pair : m_Users) {
            if (pair.second == username) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        
        // Check for valid characters
        for (char c : username) {
            if (!isalnum(c) && c != '_' && c != '-') {
                return false;
            }
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    void BroadcastMessage(const std::string& message, TCPClient* exclude = nullptr) {
        for (const auto& pair : m_Users) {
            if (pair.first != exclude) {
                pair.first->Send(message.c_str(), message.length());
            }
        }
    }
    
    void BroadcastServerMessage(const std::string& message) {
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_UsersMutex);
        std::string fullMsg = "[SERVER]: " + message + "\n";
        BroadcastMessage(fullMsg);
        printf("%s", fullMsg.c_str());
    }
    
    void ListClients() {
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_UsersMutex);
        
        printf("Connected clients (%zu):\n", m_Users.size());
        for (const auto& pair : m_Users) {
            printf("  - %s (%s)\n", 
                   pair.second.c_str(), 
                   pair.first->GetEndPoint().ToString().c_str());
        }
        printf("\n");
    }
    
    void ShowHelp() {
        printf("Server commands:\n");
        printf("  clients   - List connected clients\n");
        printf("  broadcast - Broadcast a message to all clients\n");
        printf("  help      - Show this help\n");
        printf("  quit/exit - Stop the server\n\n");
    }
    
    TCPServer m_Server;
    std::unordered_map<TCPClient*, std::string> m_Users;
    std::mutex m_UsersMutex;
};

int main(int argc, char* argv[]) {
    uint16 port = 8080;
    
    if (argc > 1) {
        port = static_cast<uint16>(std::atoi(argv[1]));
    }
    
    ChatServer server;
    server.Start(port);
    
    return 0;
}
```

### Sandbox/ChatClient.cpp

```cpp
// Sandbox/ChatClient.cpp
#include <Network/NetworkCore.h>
#include <Network/TCPSocket.h>
#include <iostream>
#include <thread>
#include <atomic>

using namespace nkentseu;

class ChatClient {
public:
    void Connect(const std::string& host, uint16 port) {
        NetworkSystem::Init();
        
        printf("Connecting to %s:%d...\n", host.c_str(), port);
        
        NetworkError error = m_Socket.Connect(host, port, 5000);
        if (error.HasError()) {
            printf("Failed to connect: %s\n", error.GetMessage().c_str());
            NetworkSystem::Shutdown();
            return;
        }
        
        printf("Connected!\n\n");
        
        m_Running = true;
        
        // Start receive thread
        std::thread receiveThread([this]() {
            ReceiveLoop();
        });
        
        // Send loop
        SendLoop();
        
        m_Running = false;
        
        if (receiveThread.joinable()) {
            receiveThread.join();
        }
        
        m_Socket.Disconnect();
        NetworkSystem::Shutdown();
    }
    
private:
    void ReceiveLoop() {
        const size_t BUFFER_SIZE = 4096;
        char buffer[BUFFER_SIZE];
        
        while (m_Running) {
            int received = m_Socket.Receive(buffer, BUFFER_SIZE - 1);
            
            if (received <= 0) {
                if (m_Running) {
                    printf("\nDisconnected from server\n");
                }
                m_Running = false;
                break;
            }
            
            buffer[received] = '\0';
            printf("%s", buffer);
            fflush(stdout);
        }
    }
    
    void SendLoop() {
        std::string input;
        
        while (m_Running) {
            std::getline(std::cin, input);
            
            if (!m_Running) break;
            
            if (input.empty()) continue;
            
            if (input == "/quit") {
                m_Running = false;
                break;
            }
            
            input += "\n";
            int sent = m_Socket.Send(input.c_str(), input.length());
            
            if (sent <= 0) {
                printf("Failed to send message\n");
                m_Running = false;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    TCPSocket m_Socket;
    std::atomic<bool> m_Running;
};

int main(int argc, char* argv[]) {
    std::string host = "localhost";
    uint16 port = 8080;
    
    if (argc > 1) {
        host = argv[1];
    }
    if (argc > 2) {
        port = static_cast<uint16>(std::atoi(argv[2]));
    }
    
    ChatClient client;
    client.Connect(host, port);
    
    return 0;
}
```

---

## 68. PACKET SYSTEM (Pour protocols personnalisés)

### Core/Network/Packet.h

```cpp
// Core/Network/Packet.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

enum class PacketType : uint16 {
    Invalid = 0,
    Ping,
    Pong,
    Connect,
    Disconnect,
    Message,
    Binary,
    Custom = 1000
};

class Packet {
public:
    Packet();
    Packet(PacketType type);
    ~Packet();
    
    // Type
    void SetType(PacketType type) { m_Type = type; }
    PacketType GetType() const { return m_Type; }
    
    // Writing
    void WriteBool(bool value);
    void WriteInt8(int8 value);
    void WriteUInt8(uint8 value);
    void WriteInt16(int16 value);
    void WriteUInt16(uint16 value);
    void WriteInt32(int32 value);
    void WriteUInt32(uint32 value);
    void WriteInt64(int64 value);
    void WriteUInt64(uint64 value);
    void WriteFloat(float value);
    void WriteDouble(double value);
    void WriteString(const std::string& value);
    void WriteBytes(const void* data, size_t size);
    
    // Reading
    bool ReadBool();
    int8 ReadInt8();
    uint8 ReadUInt8();
    int16 ReadInt16();
    uint16 ReadUInt16();
    int32 ReadInt32();
    uint32 ReadUInt32();
    int64 ReadInt64();
    uint64 ReadUInt64();
    float ReadFloat();
    double ReadDouble();
    std::string ReadString();
    size_t ReadBytes(void* buffer, size_t size);
    
    // Data access
    const uint8* GetData() const { return m_Data.data(); }
    size_t GetSize() const { return m_Data.size(); }
    
    void Clear();
    void Reset(); // Reset read position
    
    // Serialization
    std::vector<uint8> Serialize() const;
    bool Deserialize(const uint8* data, size_t size);
    
private:
    template<typename T>
    void Write(T value);
    
    template<typename T>
    T Read();
    
    PacketType m_Type = PacketType::Invalid;
    std::vector<uint8> m_Data;
    size_t m_ReadPos = 0;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Network/Packet.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Network/Packet.cpp
#include "Packet.h"
#include <cstring>

namespace nkentseu {

Packet::Packet() {
}

Packet::Packet(PacketType type)
    : m_Type(type) {
}

Packet::~Packet() {
}

void Packet::Clear() {
    m_Data.clear();
    m_ReadPos = 0;
}

void Packet::Reset() {
    m_ReadPos = 0;
}

// =====================================================================
// WRITING
// =====================================================================

template<typename T>
void Packet::Write(T value) {
    size_t oldSize = m_Data.size();
    m_Data.resize(oldSize + sizeof(T));
    std::memcpy(m_Data.data() + oldSize, &value, sizeof(T));
}

void Packet::WriteBool(bool value) { Write<uint8>(value ? 1 : 0); }
void Packet::WriteInt8(int8 value) { Write<int8>(value); }
void Packet::WriteUInt8(uint8 value) { Write<uint8>(value); }
void Packet::WriteInt16(int16 value) { Write<int16>(value); }
void Packet::WriteUInt16(uint16 value) { Write<uint16>(value); }
void Packet::WriteInt32(int32 value) { Write<int32>(value); }
void Packet::WriteUInt32(uint32 value) { Write<uint32>(value); }
void Packet::WriteInt64(int64 value) { Write<int64>(value); }
void Packet::WriteUInt64(uint64 value) { Write<uint64>(value); }
void Packet::WriteFloat(float value) { Write<float>(value); }
void Packet::WriteDouble(double value) { Write<double>(value); }

void Packet::WriteString(const std::string& value) {
    WriteUInt32(static_cast<uint32>(value.length()));
    WriteBytes(value.data(), value.length());
}

void Packet::WriteBytes(const void* data, size_t size) {
    size_t oldSize = m_Data.size();
    m_Data.resize(oldSize + size);
    std::memcpy(m_Data.data() + oldSize, data, size);
}

// =====================================================================
// READING
// =====================================================================

template<typename T>
T Packet::Read() {
    if (m_ReadPos + sizeof(T) > m_Data.size()) {
        return T();
    }
    
    T value;
    std::memcpy(&value, m_Data.data() + m_ReadPos, sizeof(T));
    m_ReadPos += sizeof(T);
    return value;
}

bool Packet::ReadBool() { return Read<uint8>() != 0; }
int8 Packet::ReadInt8() { return Read<int8>(); }
uint8 Packet::ReadUInt8() { return Read<uint8>(); }
int16 Packet::ReadInt16() { return Read<int16>(); }
uint16 Packet::ReadUInt16() { return Read<uint16>(); }
int32 Packet::ReadInt32() { return Read<int32>(); }
uint32 Packet::ReadUInt32() { return Read<uint32>(); }
int64 Packet::ReadInt64() { return Read<int64>(); }
uint64 Packet::ReadUInt64() { return Read<uint64>(); }
float Packet::ReadFloat() { return Read<float>(); }
double Packet::ReadDouble() { return Read<double>(); }

std::string Packet::ReadString() {
    uint32 length = ReadUInt32();
    if (m_ReadPos + length > m_Data.size()) {
        return "";
    }
    
    std::string value(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(m_Data.data() + m_ReadPos), length);
    m_ReadPos += length;
    return value;
}

size_t Packet::ReadBytes(void* buffer, size_t size) {
    size_t available = m_Data.size() - m_ReadPos;
    size_t toRead = std::min(size, available);
    
    std::memcpy(buffer, m_Data.data() + m_ReadPos, toRead);
    m_ReadPos += toRead;
    
    return toRead;
}

// =====================================================================
// SERIALIZATION
// =====================================================================

std::vector<uint8> Packet::Serialize() const {
    std::vector<uint8> result;
    
    // Header: [Size(4)] [Type(2)]
    uint32 totalSize = static_cast<uint32>(m_Data.size() + 6);
    result.resize(totalSize);
    
    std::memcpy(result.data(), &totalSize, 4);
    std::memcpy(result.data() + 4, &m_Type, 2);
    std::memcpy(result.data() + 6, m_Data.data(), m_Data.size());
    
    return result;
}

bool Packet::Deserialize(const uint8* data, size_t size) {
    if (size < 6) {
        return false;
    }
    
    uint32 packetSize;
    std::memcpy(&packetSize, data, 4);
    
    if (packetSize != size) {
        return false;
    }
    
    std::memcpy(&m_Type, data + 4, 2);
    
    m_Data.clear();
    m_Data.resize(size - 6);
    std::memcpy(m_Data.data(), data + 6, size - 6);
    
    m_ReadPos = 0;
    
    return true;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```
