# Suite - Physics Engine (From Scratch)

---

## 69. PHYSICS CORE - Architecture

### Core/Physics/PhysicsCore.h

```cpp
// Core/Physics/PhysicsCore.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector2.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector3.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Matrix4.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Quaternion.h>

namespace nkentseu {

// Physics constants
namespace PhysicsConstants {
    constexpr float Gravity = 9.81f;
    constexpr float DefaultDensity = 1.0f;
    constexpr float DefaultRestitution = 0.5f;
    constexpr float DefaultFriction = 0.3f;
    constexpr float SleepEpsilon = 0.01f;
    constexpr float Epsilon = 0.0001f;
}

enum class PhysicsShapeType {
    None,
    Box,
    Sphere,
    Capsule,
    Cylinder,
    Cone,
    Plane,
    Mesh,
    Heightfield
};

enum class PhysicsBodyType {
    Static,
    Dynamic,
    Kinematic
};

struct PhysicsMaterial {
    float density = PhysicsConstants::DefaultDensity;
    float restitution = PhysicsConstants::DefaultRestitution;
    float staticFriction = PhysicsConstants::DefaultFriction;
    float dynamicFriction = PhysicsConstants::DefaultFriction;
};

struct RaycastHit {
    bool hit = false;
    maths::Vector3f point;
    maths::Vector3f normal;
    float distance = 0.0f;
    void* userData = nullptr;
};

// AABB (Axis-Aligned Bounding Box)
struct AABB {
    maths::Vector3f min;
    maths::Vector3f max;
    
    AABB() = default;
    AABB(const maths::Vector3f& min, const maths::Vector3f& max)
        : min(min), max(max) {}
    
    maths::Vector3f GetCenter() const {
        return (min + max) * 0.5f;
    }
    
    maths::Vector3f GetExtents() const {
        return (max - min) * 0.5f;
    }
    
    bool Contains(const maths::Vector3f& point) const {
        return point.x >= min.x && point.x <= max.x &&
               point.y >= min.y && point.y <= max.y &&
               point.z >= min.z && point.z <= max.z;
    }
    
    bool Intersects(const AABB& other) const {
        return (min.x <= other.max.x && max.x >= other.min.x) &&
               (min.y <= other.max.y && max.y >= other.min.y) &&
               (min.z <= other.max.z && max.z >= other.min.z);
    }
    
    void Expand(const maths::Vector3f& point) {
        min.x = std::min(min.x, point.x);
        min.y = std::min(min.y, point.y);
        min.z = std::min(min.z, point.z);
        max.x = std::max(max.x, point.x);
        max.y = std::max(max.y, point.y);
        max.z = std::max(max.z, point.z);
    }
    
    void Merge(const AABB& other) {
        Expand(other.min);
        Expand(other.max);
    }
};

// Transform
struct PhysicsTransform {
    maths::Vector3f position;
    maths::Quaternion rotation;
    
    PhysicsTransform()
        : position(0, 0, 0), rotation(0, 0, 0, 1) {}
    
    PhysicsTransform(const maths::Vector3f& pos, const maths::Quaternion& rot)
        : position(pos), rotation(rot) {}
    
    maths::Matrix4 ToMatrix() const {
        maths::Matrix4 result = maths::Matrix4::Identity();
        result = result * maths::Matrix4::Translate(position);
        result = result * rotation.ToMatrix4();
        return result;
    }
    
    maths::Vector3f TransformPoint(const maths::Vector3f& point) const {
        return rotation.RotateVector(point) + position;
    }
    
    maths::Vector3f TransformDirection(const maths::Vector3f& direction) const {
        return rotation.RotateVector(direction);
    }
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 70. PHYSICS SHAPES (Colliders)

### Core/Physics/PhysicsShape.h

```cpp
// Core/Physics/PhysicsShape.h
#pragma once

#include "PhysicsCore.h"
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

class PhysicsShape {
public:
    virtual ~PhysicsShape() = default;
    
    virtual PhysicsShapeType GetType() const = 0;
    virtual AABB ComputeAABB(const PhysicsTransform& transform) const = 0;
    virtual float ComputeVolume() const = 0;
    virtual maths::Vector3f ComputeCenterOfMass() const = 0;
    virtual maths::Matrix3 ComputeInertia(float mass) const = 0;
    
    void SetMaterial(const PhysicsMaterial& material) { m_Material = material; }
    const PhysicsMaterial& GetMaterial() const { return m_Material; }
    
protected:
    PhysicsMaterial m_Material;
};

// Box Shape
class BoxShape : public PhysicsShape {
public:
    BoxShape(const maths::Vector3f& halfExtents)
        : m_HalfExtents(halfExtents) {}
    
    PhysicsShapeType GetType() const override { return PhysicsShapeType::Box; }
    
    AABB ComputeAABB(const PhysicsTransform& transform) const override {
        // Transform all 8 corners
        maths::Vector3f corners[8] = {
            {-m_HalfExtents.x, -m_HalfExtents.y, -m_HalfExtents.z},
            { m_HalfExtents.x, -m_HalfExtents.y, -m_HalfExtents.z},
            {-m_HalfExtents.x,  m_HalfExtents.y, -m_HalfExtents.z},
            { m_HalfExtents.x,  m_HalfExtents.y, -m_HalfExtents.z},
            {-m_HalfExtents.x, -m_HalfExtents.y,  m_HalfExtents.z},
            { m_HalfExtents.x, -m_HalfExtents.y,  m_HalfExtents.z},
            {-m_HalfExtents.x,  m_HalfExtents.y,  m_HalfExtents.z},
            { m_HalfExtents.x,  m_HalfExtents.y,  m_HalfExtents.z}
        };
        
        AABB aabb;
        aabb.min = transform.TransformPoint(corners[0]);
        aabb.max = aabb.min;
        
        for (int i = 1; i < 8; i++) {
            aabb.Expand(transform.TransformPoint(corners[i]));
        }
        
        return aabb;
    }
    
    float ComputeVolume() const override {
        return 8.0f * m_HalfExtents.x * m_HalfExtents.y * m_HalfExtents.z;
    }
    
    maths::Vector3f ComputeCenterOfMass() const override {
        return maths::Vector3f(0, 0, 0);
    }
    
    maths::Matrix3 ComputeInertia(float mass) const override {
        float x2 = m_HalfExtents.x * m_HalfExtents.x;
        float y2 = m_HalfExtents.y * m_HalfExtents.y;
        float z2 = m_HalfExtents.z * m_HalfExtents.z;
        
        float factor = mass / 3.0f;
        
        maths::Matrix3 inertia;
        inertia.m[0][0] = factor * (y2 + z2);
        inertia.m[1][1] = factor * (x2 + z2);
        inertia.m[2][2] = factor * (x2 + y2);
        
        return inertia;
    }
    
    const maths::Vector3f& GetHalfExtents() const { return m_HalfExtents; }
    
private:
    maths::Vector3f m_HalfExtents;
};

// Sphere Shape
class SphereShape : public PhysicsShape {
public:
    SphereShape(float radius) : m_Radius(radius) {}
    
    PhysicsShapeType GetType() const override { return PhysicsShapeType::Sphere; }
    
    AABB ComputeAABB(const PhysicsTransform& transform) const override {
        maths::Vector3f extents(m_Radius, m_Radius, m_Radius);
        return AABB(transform.position - extents, transform.position + extents);
    }
    
    float ComputeVolume() const override {
        return (4.0f / 3.0f) * 3.14159265f * m_Radius * m_Radius * m_Radius;
    }
    
    maths::Vector3f ComputeCenterOfMass() const override {
        return maths::Vector3f(0, 0, 0);
    }
    
    maths::Matrix3 ComputeInertia(float mass) const override {
        float inertia = (2.0f / 5.0f) * mass * m_Radius * m_Radius;
        
        maths::Matrix3 result;
        result.m[0][0] = inertia;
        result.m[1][1] = inertia;
        result.m[2][2] = inertia;
        
        return result;
    }
    
    float GetRadius() const { return m_Radius; }
    
private:
    float m_Radius;
};

// Capsule Shape
class CapsuleShape : public PhysicsShape {
public:
    CapsuleShape(float radius, float height)
        : m_Radius(radius), m_Height(height) {}
    
    PhysicsShapeType GetType() const override { return PhysicsShapeType::Capsule; }
    
    AABB ComputeAABB(const PhysicsTransform& transform) const override {
        float halfHeight = m_Height * 0.5f;
        maths::Vector3f top = transform.TransformPoint({0, halfHeight, 0});
        maths::Vector3f bottom = transform.TransformPoint({0, -halfHeight, 0});
        
        AABB aabb;
        aabb.min = maths::Vector3f(
            std::min(top.x, bottom.x) - m_Radius,
            std::min(top.y, bottom.y) - m_Radius,
            std::min(top.z, bottom.z) - m_Radius
        );
        aabb.max = maths::Vector3f(
            std::max(top.x, bottom.x) + m_Radius,
            std::max(top.y, bottom.y) + m_Radius,
            std::max(top.z, bottom.z) + m_Radius
        );
        
        return aabb;
    }
    
    float ComputeVolume() const override {
        float cylinderVolume = 3.14159265f * m_Radius * m_Radius * m_Height;
        float sphereVolume = (4.0f / 3.0f) * 3.14159265f * m_Radius * m_Radius * m_Radius;
        return cylinderVolume + sphereVolume;
    }
    
    maths::Vector3f ComputeCenterOfMass() const override {
        return maths::Vector3f(0, 0, 0);
    }
    
    maths::Matrix3 ComputeInertia(float mass) const override {
        float r2 = m_Radius * m_Radius;
        float h2 = m_Height * m_Height;
        
        float Ix = (1.0f / 12.0f) * mass * (3.0f * r2 + h2);
        float Iy = (1.0f / 2.0f) * mass * r2;
        
        maths::Matrix3 result;
        result.m[0][0] = Ix;
        result.m[1][1] = Iy;
        result.m[2][2] = Ix;
        
        return result;
    }
    
    float GetRadius() const { return m_Radius; }
    float GetHeight() const { return m_Height; }
    
private:
    float m_Radius;
    float m_Height;
};

// Plane Shape (infinite plane)
class PlaneShape : public PhysicsShape {
public:
    PlaneShape(const maths::Vector3f& normal, float distance)
        : m_Normal(normal.Normalized()), m_Distance(distance) {}
    
    PhysicsShapeType GetType() const override { return PhysicsShapeType::Plane; }
    
    AABB ComputeAABB(const PhysicsTransform& transform) const override {
        // Infinite plane
        float inf = std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
        return AABB({-inf, -inf, -inf}, {inf, inf, inf});
    }
    
    float ComputeVolume() const override {
        return std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
    }
    
    maths::Vector3f ComputeCenterOfMass() const override {
        return m_Normal * m_Distance;
    }
    
    maths::Matrix3 ComputeInertia(float mass) const override {
        // Infinite inertia
        float inf = std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
        maths::Matrix3 result;
        result.m[0][0] = inf;
        result.m[1][1] = inf;
        result.m[2][2] = inf;
        return result;
    }
    
    const maths::Vector3f& GetNormal() const { return m_Normal; }
    float GetDistance() const { return m_Distance; }
    
private:
    maths::Vector3f m_Normal;
    float m_Distance;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 71. RIGID BODY

### Core/Physics/RigidBody.h

```cpp
// Core/Physics/RigidBody.h
#pragma once

#include "PhysicsCore.h"
#include "PhysicsShape.h"
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

class RigidBody {
public:
    RigidBody(PhysicsShape* shape, PhysicsBodyType type = PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic);
    ~RigidBody();
    
    // Transform
    void SetPosition(const maths::Vector3f& position);
    maths::Vector3f GetPosition() const { return m_Transform.position; }
    
    void SetRotation(const maths::Quaternion& rotation);
    maths::Quaternion GetRotation() const { return m_Transform.rotation; }
    
    PhysicsTransform GetTransform() const { return m_Transform; }
    void SetTransform(const PhysicsTransform& transform);
    
    // Velocity
    void SetLinearVelocity(const maths::Vector3f& velocity);
    maths::Vector3f GetLinearVelocity() const { return m_LinearVelocity; }
    
    void SetAngularVelocity(const maths::Vector3f& velocity);
    maths::Vector3f GetAngularVelocity() const { return m_AngularVelocity; }
    
    // Forces
    void AddForce(const maths::Vector3f& force);
    void AddForceAtPoint(const maths::Vector3f& force, const maths::Vector3f& point);
    void AddTorque(const maths::Vector3f& torque);
    void AddImpulse(const maths::Vector3f& impulse);
    void AddImpulseAtPoint(const maths::Vector3f& impulse, const maths::Vector3f& point);
    
    void ClearForces();
    
    // Mass properties
    void SetMass(float mass);
    float GetMass() const { return m_Mass; }
    float GetInverseMass() const { return m_InvMass; }
    
    void SetInertia(const maths::Matrix3& inertia);
    maths::Matrix3 GetInertia() const { return m_Inertia; }
    maths::Matrix3 GetInverseInertia() const { return m_InvInertia; }
    
    maths::Matrix3 GetWorldInverseInertia() const;
    
    // Body type
    void SetBodyType(PhysicsBodyType type);
    PhysicsBodyType GetBodyType() const { return m_BodyType; }
    
    bool IsStatic() const { return m_BodyType == PhysicsBodyType::Static; }
    bool IsDynamic() const { return m_BodyType == PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic; }
    bool IsKinematic() const { return m_BodyType == PhysicsBodyType::Kinematic; }
    
    // Properties
    void SetGravityScale(float scale) { m_GravityScale = scale; }
    float GetGravityScale() const { return m_GravityScale; }
    
    void SetLinearDamping(float damping) { m_LinearDamping = damping; }
    float GetLinearDamping() const { return m_LinearDamping; }
    
    void SetAngularDamping(float damping) { m_AngularDamping = damping; }
    float GetAngularDamping() const { return m_AngularDamping; }
    
    void SetSleepingEnabled(bool enabled) { m_SleepingEnabled = enabled; }
    bool IsSleepingEnabled() const { return m_SleepingEnabled; }
    
    bool IsAwake() const { return m_Awake; }
    void SetAwake(bool awake);
    
    // Shape
    PhysicsShape* GetShape() const { return m_Shape; }
    AABB GetAABB() const;
    
    // Integration
    void Integrate(float deltaTime);
    
    // User data
    void SetUserData(void* data) { m_UserData = data; }
    void* GetUserData() const { return m_UserData; }
    
private:
    void UpdateInertia();
    void UpdateSleepState(float deltaTime);
    
    PhysicsShape* m_Shape;
    PhysicsBodyType m_BodyType;
    
    PhysicsTransform m_Transform;
    
    maths::Vector3f m_LinearVelocity;
    maths::Vector3f m_AngularVelocity;
    
    maths::Vector3f m_Force;
    maths::Vector3f m_Torque;
    
    float m_Mass;
    float m_InvMass;
    maths::Matrix3 m_Inertia;
    maths::Matrix3 m_InvInertia;
    
    float m_GravityScale = 1.0f;
    float m_LinearDamping = 0.01f;
    float m_AngularDamping = 0.01f;
    
    bool m_SleepingEnabled = true;
    bool m_Awake = true;
    float m_SleepTime = 0.0f;
    
    void* m_UserData = nullptr;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Physics/RigidBody.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Physics/RigidBody.cpp
#include "RigidBody.h"
#include <cmath>

namespace nkentseu {

RigidBody::RigidBody(PhysicsShape* shape, PhysicsBodyType type)
    : m_Shape(shape)
    , m_BodyType(type)
    , m_Mass(1.0f)
    , m_InvMass(1.0f)
{
    if (m_BodyType == PhysicsBodyType::Static) {
        m_Mass = 0.0f;
        m_InvMass = 0.0f;
    } else {
        float volume = m_Shape->ComputeVolume();
        m_Mass = volume * m_Shape->GetMaterial().density;
        m_InvMass = m_Mass > 0.0f ? 1.0f / m_Mass : 0.0f;
    }
    
    UpdateInertia();
}

RigidBody::~RigidBody() {
    delete m_Shape;
}

// =====================================================================
// TRANSFORM
// =====================================================================

void RigidBody::SetPosition(const maths::Vector3f& position) {
    m_Transform.position = position;
    SetAwake(true);
}

void RigidBody::SetRotation(const maths::Quaternion& rotation) {
    m_Transform.rotation = rotation.Normalized();
    SetAwake(true);
}

void RigidBody::SetTransform(const PhysicsTransform& transform) {
    m_Transform = transform;
    m_Transform.rotation = m_Transform.rotation.Normalized();
    SetAwake(true);
}

// =====================================================================
// VELOCITY
// =====================================================================

void RigidBody::SetLinearVelocity(const maths::Vector3f& velocity) {
    if (m_BodyType == PhysicsBodyType::Static) return;
    m_LinearVelocity = velocity;
    SetAwake(true);
}

void RigidBody::SetAngularVelocity(const maths::Vector3f& velocity) {
    if (m_BodyType == PhysicsBodyType::Static) return;
    m_AngularVelocity = velocity;
    SetAwake(true);
}

// =====================================================================
// FORCES
// =====================================================================

void RigidBody::AddForce(const maths::Vector3f& force) {
    if (m_BodyType != PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic) return;
    m_Force = m_Force + force;
    SetAwake(true);
}

void RigidBody::AddForceAtPoint(const maths::Vector3f& force, const maths::Vector3f& point) {
    if (m_BodyType != PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic) return;
    
    m_Force = m_Force + force;
    
    maths::Vector3f r = point - m_Transform.position;
    m_Torque = m_Torque + r.Cross(force);
    
    SetAwake(true);
}

void RigidBody::AddTorque(const maths::Vector3f& torque) {
    if (m_BodyType != PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic) return;
    m_Torque = m_Torque + torque;
    SetAwake(true);
}

void RigidBody::AddImpulse(const maths::Vector3f& impulse) {
    if (m_BodyType != PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic) return;
    m_LinearVelocity = m_LinearVelocity + impulse * m_InvMass;
    SetAwake(true);
}

void RigidBody::AddImpulseAtPoint(const maths::Vector3f& impulse, const maths::Vector3f& point) {
    if (m_BodyType != PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic) return;
    
    m_LinearVelocity = m_LinearVelocity + impulse * m_InvMass;
    
    maths::Vector3f r = point - m_Transform.position;
    maths::Vector3f angularImpulse = r.Cross(impulse);
    
    maths::Matrix3 invInertia = GetWorldInverseInertia();
    m_AngularVelocity = m_AngularVelocity + invInertia * angularImpulse;
    
    SetAwake(true);
}

void RigidBody::ClearForces() {
    m_Force = {0, 0, 0};
    m_Torque = {0, 0, 0};
}

// =====================================================================
// MASS PROPERTIES
// =====================================================================

void RigidBody::SetMass(float mass) {
    if (m_BodyType == PhysicsBodyType::Static) {
        m_Mass = 0.0f;
        m_InvMass = 0.0f;
        return;
    }
    
    m_Mass = mass;
    m_InvMass = mass > 0.0f ? 1.0f / mass : 0.0f;
    UpdateInertia();
}

void RigidBody::SetInertia(const maths::Matrix3& inertia) {
    m_Inertia = inertia;
    m_InvInertia = inertia.Inverse();
}

maths::Matrix3 RigidBody::GetWorldInverseInertia() const {
    maths::Matrix3 R = m_Transform.rotation.ToMatrix3();
    maths::Matrix3 RT = R.Transpose();
    return R * m_InvInertia * RT;
}

void RigidBody::UpdateInertia() {
    if (m_BodyType == PhysicsBodyType::Static) {
        m_Inertia = maths::Matrix3::Zero();
        m_InvInertia = maths::Matrix3::Zero();
        return;
    }
    
    m_Inertia = m_Shape->ComputeInertia(m_Mass);
    m_InvInertia = m_Inertia.Inverse();
}

// =====================================================================
// BODY TYPE
// =====================================================================

void RigidBody::SetBodyType(PhysicsBodyType type) {
    if (m_BodyType == type) return;
    
    m_BodyType = type;
    
    if (type == PhysicsBodyType::Static) {
        m_Mass = 0.0f;
        m_InvMass = 0.0f;
        m_LinearVelocity = {0, 0, 0};
        m_AngularVelocity = {0, 0, 0};
        ClearForces();
    } else {
        float volume = m_Shape->ComputeVolume();
        m_Mass = volume * m_Shape->GetMaterial().density;
        m_InvMass = m_Mass > 0.0f ? 1.0f / m_Mass : 0.0f;
    }
    
    UpdateInertia();
}

// =====================================================================
// SLEEP
// =====================================================================

void RigidBody::SetAwake(bool awake) {
    if (awake) {
        m_Awake = true;
        m_SleepTime = 0.0f;
    } else {
        m_Awake = false;
        m_LinearVelocity = {0, 0, 0};
        m_AngularVelocity = {0, 0, 0};
        ClearForces();
    }
}

void RigidBody::UpdateSleepState(float deltaTime) {
    if (!m_SleepingEnabled || m_BodyType != PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic) {
        return;
    }
    
    float linearSpeed = m_LinearVelocity.Length();
    float angularSpeed = m_AngularVelocity.Length();
    
    if (linearSpeed < PhysicsConstants::SleepEpsilon && 
        angularSpeed < PhysicsConstants::SleepEpsilon) {
        m_SleepTime += deltaTime;
        
        if (m_SleepTime > 0.5f) {
            SetAwake(false);
        }
    } else {
        m_SleepTime = 0.0f;
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// SHAPE
// =====================================================================

AABB RigidBody::GetAABB() const {
    return m_Shape->ComputeAABB(m_Transform);
}

// =====================================================================
// INTEGRATION
// =====================================================================

void RigidBody::Integrate(float deltaTime) {
    if (!m_Awake || m_BodyType != PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic) {
        return;
    }
    
    // Linear integration
    maths::Vector3f acceleration = m_Force * m_InvMass;
    m_LinearVelocity = m_LinearVelocity + acceleration * deltaTime;
    m_Transform.position = m_Transform.position + m_LinearVelocity * deltaTime;
    
    // Apply damping
    m_LinearVelocity = m_LinearVelocity * std::pow(1.0f - m_LinearDamping, deltaTime);
    
    // Angular integration
    maths::Matrix3 invInertiaWorld = GetWorldInverseInertia();
    maths::Vector3f angularAcceleration = invInertiaWorld * m_Torque;
    m_AngularVelocity = m_AngularVelocity + angularAcceleration * deltaTime;
    
    // Update rotation
    maths::Quaternion angularVelocityQuat(
        m_AngularVelocity.x,
        m_AngularVelocity.y,
        m_AngularVelocity.z,
        0.0f
    );
    
    maths::Quaternion spin = angularVelocityQuat * m_Transform.rotation * 0.5f;
    m_Transform.rotation = m_Transform.rotation + spin * deltaTime;
    m_Transform.rotation = m_Transform.rotation.Normalized();
    
    // Apply angular damping
    m_AngularVelocity = m_AngularVelocity * std::pow(1.0f - m_AngularDamping, deltaTime);
    
    // Clear forces
    ClearForces();
    
    // Update sleep state
    UpdateSleepState(deltaTime);
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

Je continue avec le système de collision detection et le PhysicsWorld dans le prochain message...

# Suite - Collision Detection & Physics World

---

## 72. COLLISION DETECTION

### Core/Physics/CollisionDetection.h

```cpp
// Core/Physics/CollisionDetection.h
#pragma once

#include "PhysicsCore.h"
#include "PhysicsShape.h"
#include "RigidBody.h"
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

struct ContactPoint {
    maths::Vector3f point;
    maths::Vector3f normal;
    float penetration;
    RigidBody* bodyA;
    RigidBody* bodyB;
};

struct CollisionManifold {
    RigidBody* bodyA;
    RigidBody* bodyB;
    std::vector<ContactPoint> contacts;
    
    void AddContact(const ContactPoint& contact) {
        contacts.push_back(contact);
    }
    
    void Clear() {
        contacts.clear();
    }
};

class CollisionDetection {
public:
    // Narrow phase collision detection
    static bool TestCollision(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB, CollisionManifold& manifold);
    
    // Shape vs Shape tests
    static bool TestSphereVsSphere(const SphereShape* sphereA, const PhysicsTransform& transformA,
                                   const SphereShape* sphereB, const PhysicsTransform& transformB,
                                   CollisionManifold& manifold);
    
    static bool TestBoxVsBox(const BoxShape* boxA, const PhysicsTransform& transformA,
                            const BoxShape* boxB, const PhysicsTransform& transformB,
                            CollisionManifold& manifold);
    
    static bool TestSphereVsBox(const SphereShape* sphere, const PhysicsTransform& sphereTransform,
                               const BoxShape* box, const PhysicsTransform& boxTransform,
                               CollisionManifold& manifold);
    
    static bool TestSphereVsPlane(const SphereShape* sphere, const PhysicsTransform& sphereTransform,
                                 const PlaneShape* plane, const PhysicsTransform& planeTransform,
                                 CollisionManifold& manifold);
    
    static bool TestBoxVsPlane(const BoxShape* box, const PhysicsTransform& boxTransform,
                              const PlaneShape* plane, const PhysicsTransform& planeTransform,
                              CollisionManifold& manifold);
    
    // Raycast
    static bool Raycast(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                       float maxDistance, RigidBody* body, RaycastHit& hit);
    
    static bool RaycastSphere(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                             const SphereShape* sphere, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                             RaycastHit& hit);
    
    static bool RaycastBox(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                          const BoxShape* box, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                          RaycastHit& hit);
    
    static bool RaycastPlane(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                            const PlaneShape* plane, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                            RaycastHit& hit);
    
private:
    // SAT (Separating Axis Theorem) helpers
    static bool TestSAT(const std::vector<maths::Vector3f>& axes,
                       const std::vector<maths::Vector3f>& verticesA,
                       const std::vector<maths::Vector3f>& verticesB);
    
    static void ProjectOnAxis(const std::vector<maths::Vector3f>& vertices,
                             const maths::Vector3f& axis,
                             float& min, float& max);
    
    static maths::Vector3f ClosestPointOnBox(const maths::Vector3f& point,
                                             const BoxShape* box,
                                             const PhysicsTransform& transform);
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Physics/CollisionDetection.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Physics/CollisionDetection.cpp
#include "CollisionDetection.h"
#include <algorithm>
#include <limits>

namespace nkentseu {

bool CollisionDetection::TestCollision(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB, CollisionManifold& manifold) {
    manifold.bodyA = bodyA;
    manifold.bodyB = bodyB;
    manifold.Clear();
    
    PhysicsShapeType typeA = bodyA->GetShape()->GetType();
    PhysicsShapeType typeB = bodyB->GetShape()->GetType();
    
    // Sphere vs Sphere
    if (typeA == PhysicsShapeType::Sphere && typeB == PhysicsShapeType::Sphere) {
        return TestSphereVsSphere(
            static_cast<const SphereShape*>(bodyA->GetShape()),
            bodyA->GetTransform(),
            static_cast<const SphereShape*>(bodyB->GetShape()),
            bodyB->GetTransform(),
            manifold
        );
    }
    
    // Box vs Box
    if (typeA == PhysicsShapeType::Box && typeB == PhysicsShapeType::Box) {
        return TestBoxVsBox(
            static_cast<const BoxShape*>(bodyA->GetShape()),
            bodyA->GetTransform(),
            static_cast<const BoxShape*>(bodyB->GetShape()),
            bodyB->GetTransform(),
            manifold
        );
    }
    
    // Sphere vs Box
    if (typeA == PhysicsShapeType::Sphere && typeB == PhysicsShapeType::Box) {
        return TestSphereVsBox(
            static_cast<const SphereShape*>(bodyA->GetShape()),
            bodyA->GetTransform(),
            static_cast<const BoxShape*>(bodyB->GetShape()),
            bodyB->GetTransform(),
            manifold
        );
    }
    
    if (typeA == PhysicsShapeType::Box && typeB == PhysicsShapeType::Sphere) {
        bool result = TestSphereVsBox(
            static_cast<const SphereShape*>(bodyB->GetShape()),
            bodyB->GetTransform(),
            static_cast<const BoxShape*>(bodyA->GetShape()),
            bodyA->GetTransform(),
            manifold
        );
        // Swap bodies in manifold
        std::swap(manifold.bodyA, manifold.bodyB);
        for (auto& contact : manifold.contacts) {
            contact.normal = contact.normal * -1.0f;
            std::swap(contact.bodyA, contact.bodyB);
        }
        return result;
    }
    
    // Sphere vs Plane
    if (typeA == PhysicsShapeType::Sphere && typeB == PhysicsShapeType::Plane) {
        return TestSphereVsPlane(
            static_cast<const SphereShape*>(bodyA->GetShape()),
            bodyA->GetTransform(),
            static_cast<const PlaneShape*>(bodyB->GetShape()),
            bodyB->GetTransform(),
            manifold
        );
    }
    
    // Box vs Plane
    if (typeA == PhysicsShapeType::Box && typeB == PhysicsShapeType::Plane) {
        return TestBoxVsPlane(
            static_cast<const BoxShape*>(bodyA->GetShape()),
            bodyA->GetTransform(),
            static_cast<const PlaneShape*>(bodyB->GetShape()),
            bodyB->GetTransform(),
            manifold
        );
    }
    
    return false;
}

// =====================================================================
// SPHERE VS SPHERE
// =====================================================================

bool CollisionDetection::TestSphereVsSphere(const SphereShape* sphereA, const PhysicsTransform& transformA,
                                           const SphereShape* sphereB, const PhysicsTransform& transformB,
                                           CollisionManifold& manifold) {
    maths::Vector3f delta = transformB.position - transformA.position;
    float distanceSq = delta.LengthSquared();
    float radiusSum = sphereA->GetRadius() + sphereB->GetRadius();
    
    if (distanceSq >= radiusSum * radiusSum) {
        return false;
    }
    
    float distance = std::sqrt(distanceSq);
    
    ContactPoint contact;
    contact.bodyA = manifold.bodyA;
    contact.bodyB = manifold.bodyB;
    
    if (distance > PhysicsConstants::Epsilon) {
        contact.normal = delta / distance;
    } else {
        contact.normal = {0, 1, 0};
    }
    
    contact.penetration = radiusSum - distance;
    contact.point = transformA.position + contact.normal * sphereA->GetRadius();
    
    manifold.AddContact(contact);
    
    return true;
}

// =====================================================================
// BOX VS BOX (Simplified SAT)
// =====================================================================

bool CollisionDetection::TestBoxVsBox(const BoxShape* boxA, const PhysicsTransform& transformA,
                                     const BoxShape* boxB, const PhysicsTransform& transformB,
                                     CollisionManifold& manifold) {
    // Get box vertices
    maths::Vector3f halfExtentsA = boxA->GetHalfExtents();
    maths::Vector3f halfExtentsB = boxB->GetHalfExtents();
    
    // Get axes
    std::vector<maths::Vector3f> axes;
    
    // Box A axes
    axes.push_back(transformA.TransformDirection({1, 0, 0}));
    axes.push_back(transformA.TransformDirection({0, 1, 0}));
    axes.push_back(transformA.TransformDirection({0, 0, 1}));
    
    // Box B axes
    axes.push_back(transformB.TransformDirection({1, 0, 0}));
    axes.push_back(transformB.TransformDirection({0, 1, 0}));
    axes.push_back(transformB.TransformDirection({0, 0, 1}));
    
    // Cross products (edge-edge axes)
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
            maths::Vector3f axis = axes[i].Cross(axes[j + 3]);
            if (axis.LengthSquared() > PhysicsConstants::Epsilon) {
                axes.push_back(axis.Normalized());
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Generate vertices for both boxes
    std::vector<maths::Vector3f> verticesA;
    std::vector<maths::Vector3f> verticesB;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        maths::Vector3f vertex(
            (i & 1) ? halfExtentsA.x : -halfExtentsA.x,
            (i & 2) ? halfExtentsA.y : -halfExtentsA.y,
            (i & 4) ? halfExtentsA.z : -halfExtentsA.z
        );
        verticesA.push_back(transformA.TransformPoint(vertex));
    }
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        maths::Vector3f vertex(
            (i & 1) ? halfExtentsB.x : -halfExtentsB.x,
            (i & 2) ? halfExtentsB.y : -halfExtentsB.y,
            (i & 4) ? halfExtentsB.z : -halfExtentsB.z
        );
        verticesB.push_back(transformB.TransformPoint(vertex));
    }
    
    // Test all axes
    if (!TestSAT(axes, verticesA, verticesB)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Collision detected - generate contact point (simplified)
    ContactPoint contact;
    contact.bodyA = manifold.bodyA;
    contact.bodyB = manifold.bodyB;
    contact.normal = (transformB.position - transformA.position).Normalized();
    contact.point = (transformA.position + transformB.position) * 0.5f;
    contact.penetration = 0.1f; // TODO: Calculate actual penetration
    
    manifold.AddContact(contact);
    
    return true;
}

// =====================================================================
// SPHERE VS BOX
// =====================================================================

bool CollisionDetection::TestSphereVsBox(const SphereShape* sphere, const PhysicsTransform& sphereTransform,
                                        const BoxShape* box, const PhysicsTransform& boxTransform,
                                        CollisionManifold& manifold) {
    // Find closest point on box to sphere center
    maths::Vector3f closestPoint = ClosestPointOnBox(sphereTransform.position, box, boxTransform);
    
    maths::Vector3f delta = sphereTransform.position - closestPoint;
    float distanceSq = delta.LengthSquared();
    float radius = sphere->GetRadius();
    
    if (distanceSq >= radius * radius) {
        return false;
    }
    
    float distance = std::sqrt(distanceSq);
    
    ContactPoint contact;
    contact.bodyA = manifold.bodyA;
    contact.bodyB = manifold.bodyB;
    
    if (distance > PhysicsConstants::Epsilon) {
        contact.normal = delta / distance;
    } else {
        // Sphere center inside box - use closest axis
        contact.normal = {0, 1, 0};
    }
    
    contact.penetration = radius - distance;
    contact.point = closestPoint;
    
    manifold.AddContact(contact);
    
    return true;
}

// =====================================================================
// SPHERE VS PLANE
// =====================================================================

bool CollisionDetection::TestSphereVsPlane(const SphereShape* sphere, const PhysicsTransform& sphereTransform,
                                          const PlaneShape* plane, const PhysicsTransform& planeTransform,
                                          CollisionManifold& manifold) {
    maths::Vector3f planeNormal = planeTransform.TransformDirection(plane->GetNormal());
    float planeDistance = plane->GetDistance();
    
    float distance = planeNormal.Dot(sphereTransform.position) - planeDistance;
    
    if (distance >= sphere->GetRadius()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    ContactPoint contact;
    contact.bodyA = manifold.bodyA;
    contact.bodyB = manifold.bodyB;
    contact.normal = planeNormal;
    contact.penetration = sphere->GetRadius() - distance;
    contact.point = sphereTransform.position - planeNormal * distance;
    
    manifold.AddContact(contact);
    
    return true;
}

// =====================================================================
// BOX VS PLANE
// =====================================================================

bool CollisionDetection::TestBoxVsPlane(const BoxShape* box, const PhysicsTransform& boxTransform,
                                       const PlaneShape* plane, const PhysicsTransform& planeTransform,
                                       CollisionManifold& manifold) {
    maths::Vector3f planeNormal = planeTransform.TransformDirection(plane->GetNormal());
    float planeDistance = plane->GetDistance();
    
    maths::Vector3f halfExtents = box->GetHalfExtents();
    
    // Test all 8 corners
    bool hasContact = false;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        maths::Vector3f corner(
            (i & 1) ? halfExtents.x : -halfExtents.x,
            (i & 2) ? halfExtents.y : -halfExtents.y,
            (i & 4) ? halfExtents.z : -halfExtents.z
        );
        
        maths::Vector3f worldCorner = boxTransform.TransformPoint(corner);
        float distance = planeNormal.Dot(worldCorner) - planeDistance;
        
        if (distance < 0.0f) {
            hasContact = true;
            
            ContactPoint contact;
            contact.bodyA = manifold.bodyA;
            contact.bodyB = manifold.bodyB;
            contact.normal = planeNormal;
            contact.penetration = -distance;
            contact.point = worldCorner - planeNormal * distance;
            
            manifold.AddContact(contact);
        }
    }
    
    return hasContact;
}

// =====================================================================
// SAT HELPERS
// =====================================================================

bool CollisionDetection::TestSAT(const std::vector<maths::Vector3f>& axes,
                                 const std::vector<maths::Vector3f>& verticesA,
                                 const std::vector<maths::Vector3f>& verticesB) {
    for (const auto& axis : axes) {
        float minA, maxA, minB, maxB;
        
        ProjectOnAxis(verticesA, axis, minA, maxA);
        ProjectOnAxis(verticesB, axis, minB, maxB);
        
        if (maxA < minB || maxB < minA) {
            return false; // Separating axis found
        }
    }
    
    return true; // No separating axis found - collision
}

void CollisionDetection::ProjectOnAxis(const std::vector<maths::Vector3f>& vertices,
                                      const maths::Vector3f& axis,
                                      float& min, float& max) {
    min = max = axis.Dot(vertices[0]);
    
    for (size_t i = 1; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
        float projection = axis.Dot(vertices[i]);
        min = std::min(min, projection);
        max = std::max(max, projection);
    }
}

maths::Vector3f CollisionDetection::ClosestPointOnBox(const maths::Vector3f& point,
                                                      const BoxShape* box,
                                                      const PhysicsTransform& transform) {
    // Transform point to box local space
    maths::Matrix4 worldToLocal = transform.ToMatrix().Inverse();
    maths::Vector3f localPoint = worldToLocal.TransformPoint(point);
    
    // Clamp to box extents
    maths::Vector3f halfExtents = box->GetHalfExtents();
    maths::Vector3f closest;
    closest.x = std::clamp(localPoint.x, -halfExtents.x, halfExtents.x);
    closest.y = std::clamp(localPoint.y, -halfExtents.y, halfExtents.y);
    closest.z = std::clamp(localPoint.z, -halfExtents.z, halfExtents.z);
    
    // Transform back to world space
    return transform.TransformPoint(closest);
}

// =====================================================================
// RAYCAST
// =====================================================================

bool CollisionDetection::Raycast(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                                 float maxDistance, RigidBody* body, RaycastHit& hit) {
    PhysicsShapeType type = body->GetShape()->GetType();
    
    if (type == PhysicsShapeType::Sphere) {
        return RaycastSphere(origin, direction,
                           static_cast<const SphereShape*>(body->GetShape()),
                           body->GetTransform(), hit);
    }
    else if (type == PhysicsShapeType::Box) {
        return RaycastBox(origin, direction,
                        static_cast<const BoxShape*>(body->GetShape()),
                        body->GetTransform(), hit);
    }
    else if (type == PhysicsShapeType::Plane) {
        return RaycastPlane(origin, direction,
                          static_cast<const PlaneShape*>(body->GetShape()),
                          body->GetTransform(), hit);
    }
    
    return false;
}

bool CollisionDetection::RaycastSphere(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                                      const SphereShape* sphere, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                                      RaycastHit& hit) {
    maths::Vector3f m = origin - transform.position;
    float b = m.Dot(direction);
    float c = m.Dot(m) - sphere->GetRadius() * sphere->GetRadius();
    
    if (c > 0.0f && b > 0.0f) {
        return false;
    }
    
    float discriminant = b * b - c;
    
    if (discriminant < 0.0f) {
        return false;
    }
    
    float t = -b - std::sqrt(discriminant);
    
    if (t < 0.0f) {
        t = 0.0f;
    }
    
    hit.hit = true;
    hit.distance = t;
    hit.point = origin + direction * t;
    hit.normal = (hit.point - transform.position).Normalized();
    
    return true;
}

bool CollisionDetection::RaycastBox(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                                   const BoxShape* box, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                                   RaycastHit& hit) {
    // Transform ray to box local space
    maths::Matrix4 worldToLocal = transform.ToMatrix().Inverse();
    maths::Vector3f localOrigin = worldToLocal.TransformPoint(origin);
    maths::Vector3f localDir = worldToLocal.TransformDirection(direction);
    
    maths::Vector3f halfExtents = box->GetHalfExtents();
    
    float tmin = -std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
    float tmax = std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
    
    // Test each axis
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        float invD = 1.0f / localDir[i];
        float t1 = (-halfExtents[i] - localOrigin[i]) * invD;
        float t2 = (halfExtents[i] - localOrigin[i]) * invD;
        
        if (t1 > t2) std::swap(t1, t2);
        
        tmin = std::max(tmin, t1);
        tmax = std::min(tmax, t2);
        
        if (tmin > tmax) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    
    hit.hit = true;
    hit.distance = tmin > 0.0f ? tmin : tmax;
    hit.point = origin + direction * hit.distance;
    
    // Calculate normal (simplified)
    maths::Vector3f localHit = worldToLocal.TransformPoint(hit.point);
    maths::Vector3f localNormal(0, 0, 0);
    
    float minDist = std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        float dist = std::abs(std::abs(localHit[i]) - halfExtents[i]);
        if (dist < minDist) {
            minDist = dist;
            localNormal = {0, 0, 0};
            localNormal[i] = localHit[i] > 0 ? 1.0f : -1.0f;
        }
    }
    
    hit.normal = transform.TransformDirection(localNormal);
    
    return true;
}

bool CollisionDetection::RaycastPlane(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                                     const PlaneShape* plane, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                                     RaycastHit& hit) {
    maths::Vector3f planeNormal = transform.TransformDirection(plane->GetNormal());
    float planeDistance = plane->GetDistance();
    
    float denom = planeNormal.Dot(direction);
    
    if (std::abs(denom) < PhysicsConstants::Epsilon) {
        return false; // Ray parallel to plane
    }
    
    float t = (planeDistance - planeNormal.Dot(origin)) / denom;
    
    if (t < 0.0f) {
        return false;
    }
    
    hit.hit = true;
    hit.distance = t;
    hit.point = origin + direction * t;
    hit.normal = planeNormal;
    
    return true;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 73. COLLISION RESOLUTION

### Core/Physics/CollisionResolution.h

```cpp
// Core/Physics/CollisionResolution.h
#pragma once

#include "CollisionDetection.h"

namespace nkentseu {

class CollisionResolution {
public:
    static void ResolveCollision(CollisionManifold& manifold);
    
private:
    static void ResolveContact(const ContactPoint& contact);
    static void ApplyImpulse(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB,
                           const maths::Vector3f& normal,
                           const maths::Vector3f& contactPoint,
                           float restitution);
    
    static void PositionalCorrection(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB,
                                    const maths::Vector3f& normal,
                                    float penetration);
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Physics/CollisionResolution.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Physics/CollisionResolution.cpp
#include "CollisionResolution.h"

namespace nkentseu {

void CollisionResolution::ResolveCollision(CollisionManifold& manifold) {
    for (const auto& contact : manifold.contacts) {
        ResolveContact(contact);
    }
}

void CollisionResolution::ResolveContact(const ContactPoint& contact) {
    RigidBody* bodyA = contact.bodyA;
    RigidBody* bodyB = contact.bodyB;
    
    if (!bodyA || !bodyB) return;
    
    // Skip if both static
    if (bodyA->IsStatic() && bodyB->IsStatic()) return;
    
    // Calculate restitution
    float restitution = std::min(
        bodyA->GetShape()->GetMaterial().restitution,
        bodyB->GetShape()->GetMaterial().restitution
    );
    
    // Apply impulse
    ApplyImpulse(bodyA, bodyB, contact.normal, contact.point, restitution);
    
    // Positional correction
    PositionalCorrection(bodyA, bodyB, contact.normal, contact.penetration);
}

void CollisionResolution::ApplyImpulse(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB,
                                      const maths::Vector3f& normal,
                                      const maths::Vector3f& contactPoint,
                                      float restitution) {
    // Calculate relative velocity at contact point
    maths::Vector3f rA = contactPoint - bodyA->GetPosition();
    maths::Vector3f rB = contactPoint - bodyB->GetPosition();
    
    maths::Vector3f vA = bodyA->GetLinearVelocity() + bodyA->GetAngularVelocity().Cross(rA);
    maths::Vector3f vB = bodyB->GetLinearVelocity() + bodyB->GetAngularVelocity().Cross(rB);
    
    maths::Vector3f relativeVelocity = vB - vA;
    float velocityAlongNormal = relativeVelocity.Dot(normal);
    
    // Don't resolve if velocities are separating
    if (velocityAlongNormal > 0) return;
    
    // Calculate impulse scalar
    float invMassA = bodyA->GetInverseMass();
    float invMassB = bodyB->GetInverseMass();
    
    maths::Matrix3 invInertiaA = bodyA->GetWorldInverseInertia();
    maths::Matrix3 invInertiaB = bodyB->GetWorldInverseInertia();
    
    maths::Vector3f rAcrossN = rA.Cross(normal);
    maths::Vector3f rBcrossN = rB.Cross(normal);
    
    float angularA = (invInertiaA * rAcrossN).Cross(rA).Dot(normal);
    float angularB = (invInertiaB * rBcrossN).Cross(rB).Dot(normal);
    
    float j = -(1.0f + restitution) * velocityAlongNormal;
    j /= invMassA + invMassB + angularA + angularB;
    
    maths::Vector3f impulse = normal * j;
    
    // Apply impulse
    bodyA->AddImpulseAtPoint(impulse * -1.0f, contactPoint);
    bodyB->AddImpulseAtPoint(impulse, contactPoint);
    
    // Friction
    maths::Vector3f tangent = relativeVelocity - normal * velocityAlongNormal;
    
    if (tangent.LengthSquared() > PhysicsConstants::Epsilon) {
        tangent = tangent.Normalized();
        
        float friction = std::sqrt(
            bodyA->GetShape()->GetMaterial().dynamicFriction *
            bodyB->GetShape()->GetMaterial().dynamicFriction
        );
        
        float jt = -relativeVelocity.Dot(tangent);
        jt /= invMassA + invMassB + angularA + angularB;
        
        maths::Vector3f frictionImpulse;
        if (std::abs(jt) < j * friction) {
            frictionImpulse = tangent * jt;
        } else {
            frictionImpulse = tangent * -j * friction;
        }
        
        bodyA->AddImpulseAtPoint(frictionImpulse * -1.0f, contactPoint);
        bodyB->AddImpulseAtPoint(frictionImpulse, contactPoint);
    }
}

void CollisionResolution::PositionalCorrection(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB,
                                              const maths::Vector3f& normal,
                                              float penetration) {
    const float percent = 0.2f;
    const float slop = 0.01f;
    
    float correctionAmount = std::max(penetration - slop, 0.0f) / 
                            (bodyA->GetInverseMass() + bodyB->GetInverseMass()) * percent;
    
    maths::Vector3f correction = normal * correctionAmount;
    
    if (!bodyA->IsStatic()) {
        bodyA->SetPosition(bodyA->GetPosition() - correction * bodyA->GetInverseMass());
    }
    
    if (!bodyB->IsStatic()) {
        bodyB->SetPosition(bodyB->GetPosition() + correction * bodyB->GetInverseMass());
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 74. PHYSICS WORLD

### Core/Physics/PhysicsWorld.h

```cpp
// Core/Physics/PhysicsWorld.h
#pragma once

#include "PhysicsCore.h"
#include "RigidBody.h"
#include "CollisionDetection.h"
#include "CollisionResolution.h"
#include <vector>
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

struct PhysicsWorldSettings {
    maths::Vector3f gravity = {0.0f, -9.81f, 0.0f};
    uint32 velocityIterations = 8;
    uint32 positionIterations = 3;
    float fixedTimeStep = 1.0f / 60.0f;
    bool enableSleeping = true;
    bool enableContinuousCollision = false;
};

class PhysicsWorld {
public:
    using CollisionCallback = std::function<void(RigidBody*, RigidBody*, const CollisionManifold&)>;
    
    PhysicsWorld(const PhysicsWorldSettings& settings = PhysicsWorldSettings());
    ~PhysicsWorld();
    
    // Rigid bodies
    RigidBody* CreateRigidBody(PhysicsShape* shape, PhysicsBodyType type = PhysicsBodyType::Dynamic);
    void DestroyRigidBody(RigidBody* body);
    
    // Simulation
    void Step(float deltaTime);
    void FixedStep();
    
    // Queries
    bool Raycast(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                float maxDistance, RaycastHit& hit);
    
    std::vector<RigidBody*> QueryAABB(const AABB& aabb);
    std::vector<RigidBody*> QuerySphere(const maths::Vector3f& center, float radius);
    
    // Settings
    void SetGravity(const maths::Vector3f& gravity) { m_Settings.gravity = gravity; }
    maths::Vector3f GetGravity() const { return m_Settings.gravity; }
    
    PhysicsWorldSettings& GetSettings() { return m_Settings; }
    
    // Callbacks
    void SetCollisionCallback(CollisionCallback callback) { m_OnCollision = callback; }
    
    // Info
    const std::vector<RigidBody*>& GetBodies() const { return m_Bodies; }
    size_t GetBodyCount() const { return m_Bodies.size(); }
    
    // Debug
    void SetDebugDrawEnabled(bool enabled) { m_DebugDrawEnabled = enabled; }
    bool IsDebugDrawEnabled() const { return m_DebugDrawEnabled; }
    
private:
    void IntegrateForces(float deltaTime);
    void IntegrateVelocities(float deltaTime);
    void BroadPhase();
    void NarrowPhase();
    void ResolveCollisions();
    void UpdateSleepState(float deltaTime);
    
    PhysicsWorldSettings m_Settings;
    std::vector<RigidBody*> m_Bodies;
    std::vector<CollisionManifold> m_Manifolds;
    
    float m_Accumulator = 0.0f;
    
    CollisionCallback m_OnCollision;
    bool m_DebugDrawEnabled = false;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Physics/PhysicsWorld.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Physics/PhysicsWorld.cpp
#include "PhysicsWorld.h"
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

PhysicsWorld::PhysicsWorld(const PhysicsWorldSettings& settings)
    : m_Settings(settings) {
}

PhysicsWorld::~PhysicsWorld() {
    for (auto* body : m_Bodies) {
        delete body;
    }
    m_Bodies.clear();
}

// =====================================================================
// RIGID BODIES
// =====================================================================

RigidBody* PhysicsWorld::CreateRigidBody(PhysicsShape* shape, PhysicsBodyType type) {
    RigidBody* body = new RigidBody(shape, type);
    m_Bodies.push_back(body);
    return body;
}

void PhysicsWorld::DestroyRigidBody(RigidBody* body) {
    auto it = std::find(m_Bodies.begin(), m_Bodies.end(), body);
    if (it != m_Bodies.end()) {
        m_Bodies.erase(it);
        delete body;
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// SIMULATION
// =====================================================================

void PhysicsWorld::Step(float deltaTime) {
    // Fixed timestep
    m_Accumulator += deltaTime;
    
    while (m_Accumulator >= m_Settings.fixedTimeStep) {
        FixedStep();
        m_Accumulator -= m_Settings.fixedTimeStep;
    }
}

void PhysicsWorld::FixedStep() {
    float dt = m_Settings.fixedTimeStep;
    
    // Clear manifolds from previous frame
    m_Manifolds.clear();
    
    // Integrate forces (apply gravity, etc.)
    IntegrateForces(dt);
    
    // Broad phase collision detection
    BroadPhase();
    
    // Narrow phase collision detection
    NarrowPhase();
    
    // Resolve collisions
    ResolveCollisions();
    
    // Integrate velocities (update positions)
    IntegrateVelocities(dt);
    
    // Update sleep state
    if (m_Settings.enableSleeping) {
        UpdateSleepState(dt);
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// INTEGRATION
// =====================================================================

void PhysicsWorld::IntegrateForces(float deltaTime) {
    for (auto* body : m_Bodies) {
        if (!body->IsAwake() || body->IsStatic()) {
            continue;
        }
        
        // Apply gravity
        if (body->IsDynamic()) {
            maths::Vector3f gravity = m_Settings.gravity * body->GetGravityScale();
            body->AddForce(gravity * body->GetMass());
        }
        
        // Semi-implicit Euler integration for forces
        // (handled in RigidBody::Integrate)
    }
}

void PhysicsWorld::IntegrateVelocities(float deltaTime) {
    for (auto* body : m_Bodies) {
        if (!body->IsAwake() || body->IsStatic()) {
            continue;
        }
        
        body->Integrate(deltaTime);
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// COLLISION DETECTION
// =====================================================================

void PhysicsWorld::BroadPhase() {
    // Simple O(n²) broad phase - can be optimized with spatial partitioning
    for (size_t i = 0; i < m_Bodies.size(); i++) {
        for (size_t j = i + 1; j < m_Bodies.size(); j++) {
            RigidBody* bodyA = m_Bodies[i];
            RigidBody* bodyB = m_Bodies[j];
            
            // Skip if both static
            if (bodyA->IsStatic() && bodyB->IsStatic()) {
                continue;
            }
            
            // Skip if both sleeping
            if (!bodyA->IsAwake() && !bodyB->IsAwake()) {
                continue;
            }
            
            // AABB test
            AABB aabbA = bodyA->GetAABB();
            AABB aabbB = bodyB->GetAABB();
            
            if (aabbA.Intersects(aabbB)) {
                // Potential collision - add to narrow phase
                CollisionManifold manifold;
                manifold.bodyA = bodyA;
                manifold.bodyB = bodyB;
                m_Manifolds.push_back(manifold);
            }
        }
    }
}

void PhysicsWorld::NarrowPhase() {
    for (auto& manifold : m_Manifolds) {
        bool collision = CollisionDetection::TestCollision(
            manifold.bodyA,
            manifold.bodyB,
            manifold
        );
        
        if (collision && m_OnCollision) {
            m_OnCollision(manifold.bodyA, manifold.bodyB, manifold);
        }
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// COLLISION RESOLUTION
// =====================================================================

void PhysicsWorld::ResolveCollisions() {
    // Iterative resolution for stability
    for (uint32 i = 0; i < m_Settings.velocityIterations; i++) {
        for (auto& manifold : m_Manifolds) {
            if (!manifold.contacts.empty()) {
                CollisionResolution::ResolveCollision(manifold);
            }
        }
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// SLEEP
// =====================================================================

void PhysicsWorld::UpdateSleepState(float deltaTime) {
    for (auto* body : m_Bodies) {
        if (body->IsDynamic() && body->IsSleepingEnabled()) {
            // Sleep state is updated in RigidBody::Integrate
        }
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// QUERIES
// =====================================================================

bool PhysicsWorld::Raycast(const maths::Vector3f& origin, const maths::Vector3f& direction,
                           float maxDistance, RaycastHit& hit) {
    hit.hit = false;
    hit.distance = maxDistance;
    
    maths::Vector3f dir = direction.Normalized();
    
    for (auto* body : m_Bodies) {
        RaycastHit bodyHit;
        if (CollisionDetection::Raycast(origin, dir, maxDistance, body, bodyHit)) {
            if (bodyHit.distance < hit.distance) {
                hit = bodyHit;
                hit.userData = body->GetUserData();
            }
        }
    }
    
    return hit.hit;
}

std::vector<RigidBody*> PhysicsWorld::QueryAABB(const AABB& aabb) {
    std::vector<RigidBody*> results;
    
    for (auto* body : m_Bodies) {
        AABB bodyAABB = body->GetAABB();
        if (aabb.Intersects(bodyAABB)) {
            results.push_back(body);
        }
    }
    
    return results;
}

std::vector<RigidBody*> PhysicsWorld::QuerySphere(const maths::Vector3f& center, float radius) {
    std::vector<RigidBody*> results;
    
    float radiusSq = radius * radius;
    
    for (auto* body : m_Bodies) {
        AABB bodyAABB = body->GetAABB();
        maths::Vector3f closestPoint;
        
        closestPoint.x = std::clamp(center.x, bodyAABB.min.x, bodyAABB.max.x);
        closestPoint.y = std::clamp(center.y, bodyAABB.min.y, bodyAABB.max.y);
        closestPoint.z = std::clamp(center.z, bodyAABB.min.z, bodyAABB.max.z);
        
        float distSq = (closestPoint - center).LengthSquared();
        
        if (distSq <= radiusSq) {
            results.push_back(body);
        }
    }
    
    return results;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 75. PHYSICS DEBUG RENDERER

### Core/Physics/PhysicsDebugRenderer.h

```cpp
// Core/Physics/PhysicsDebugRenderer.h
#pragma once

#include "PhysicsWorld.h"
#include <Renderer/Renderer2D.h>

namespace nkentseu {

class PhysicsDebugRenderer {
public:
    static void RenderWorld(PhysicsWorld* world, const maths::Matrix4& viewProjection);
    static void RenderBody(RigidBody* body, const maths::Matrix4& viewProjection);
    static void RenderAABB(const AABB& aabb, const maths::Color& color);
    static void RenderShape(PhysicsShape* shape, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                           const maths::Color& color);
    
private:
    static void RenderSphere(const SphereShape* sphere, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                            const maths::Color& color);
    static void RenderBox(const BoxShape* box, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                         const maths::Color& color);
    static void RenderCapsule(const CapsuleShape* capsule, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                             const maths::Color& color);
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Physics/PhysicsDebugRenderer.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Physics/PhysicsDebugRenderer.cpp
#include "PhysicsDebugRenderer.h"

namespace nkentseu {

void PhysicsDebugRenderer::RenderWorld(PhysicsWorld* world, const maths::Matrix4& viewProjection) {
    if (!world->IsDebugDrawEnabled()) return;
    
    for (auto* body : world->GetBodies()) {
        RenderBody(body, viewProjection);
    }
}

void PhysicsDebugRenderer::RenderBody(RigidBody* body, const maths::Matrix4& viewProjection) {
    maths::Color color;
    
    if (body->IsStatic()) {
        color = maths::Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f);
    } else if (!body->IsAwake()) {
        color = maths::Color(0.3f, 0.3f, 0.8f, 0.5f);
    } else {
        color = maths::Color(0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f, 0.5f);
    }
    
    RenderShape(body->GetShape(), body->GetTransform(), color);
    
    // Render AABB
    AABB aabb = body->GetAABB();
    RenderAABB(aabb, maths::Color(1, 1, 0, 0.3f));
}

void PhysicsDebugRenderer::RenderAABB(const AABB& aabb, const maths::Color& color) {
    // 2D projection for visualization
    maths::Vector2f min2D(aabb.min.x, aabb.min.y);
    maths::Vector2f max2D(aabb.max.x, aabb.max.y);
    
    Renderer2D::DrawRect(min2D, max2D - min2D, color);
}

void PhysicsDebugRenderer::RenderShape(PhysicsShape* shape, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                                      const maths::Color& color) {
    switch (shape->GetType()) {
        case PhysicsShapeType::Sphere:
            RenderSphere(static_cast<const SphereShape*>(shape), transform, color);
            break;
        
        case PhysicsShapeType::Box:
            RenderBox(static_cast<const BoxShape*>(shape), transform, color);
            break;
        
        case PhysicsShapeType::Capsule:
            RenderCapsule(static_cast<const CapsuleShape*>(shape), transform, color);
            break;
        
        default:
            break;
    }
}

void PhysicsDebugRenderer::RenderSphere(const SphereShape* sphere, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                                       const maths::Color& color) {
    maths::Vector2f center(transform.position.x, transform.position.y);
    Renderer2D::DrawCircle(center, sphere->GetRadius(), color);
}

void PhysicsDebugRenderer::RenderBox(const BoxShape* box, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                                    const maths::Color& color) {
    maths::Vector3f halfExtents = box->GetHalfExtents();
    
    // Get 4 corners in 2D
    maths::Vector3f corners[4] = {
        {-halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y, 0},
        { halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y, 0},
        { halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y, 0},
        {-halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y, 0}
    };
    
    // Transform corners
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        corners[i] = transform.TransformPoint(corners[i]);
    }
    
    // Draw lines
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        int next = (i + 1) % 4;
        Renderer2D::DrawLine(
            {corners[i].x, corners[i].y},
            {corners[next].x, corners[next].y},
            color
        );
    }
}

void PhysicsDebugRenderer::RenderCapsule(const CapsuleShape* capsule, const PhysicsTransform& transform,
                                        const maths::Color& color) {
    float radius = capsule->GetRadius();
    float halfHeight = capsule->GetHeight() * 0.5f;
    
    maths::Vector3f top = transform.TransformPoint({0, halfHeight, 0});
    maths::Vector3f bottom = transform.TransformPoint({0, -halfHeight, 0});
    
    // Draw circles
    Renderer2D::DrawCircle({top.x, top.y}, radius, color);
    Renderer2D::DrawCircle({bottom.x, bottom.y}, radius, color);
    
    // Draw connecting lines
    maths::Vector2f right = transform.TransformDirection({1, 0, 0});
    right = right * radius;
    
    Renderer2D::DrawLine(
        {top.x + right.x, top.y + right.y},
        {bottom.x + right.x, bottom.y + right.y},
        color
    );
    
    Renderer2D::DrawLine(
        {top.x - right.x, top.y - right.y},
        {bottom.x - right.x, bottom.y - right.y},
        color
    );
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 76. PHYSICS DEMO COMPLET

### Sandbox/PhysicsDemo.cpp

```cpp
// Sandbox/PhysicsDemo.cpp
#include <Physics/PhysicsWorld.h>
#include <Physics/PhysicsDebugRenderer.h>
#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Renderer/Renderer2D.h>
#include <Renderer/RenderCommand.h>
#include <Event/EventListener.h>

using namespace nkentseu;

class PhysicsDemo {
public:
    void Run() {
        if (!Initialize()) {
            return;
        }
        
        MainLoop();
        
        Shutdown();
    }
    
private:
    bool Initialize() {
        // Create window
        WindowProperties props;
        props.title = "Physics Engine Demo";
        props.size = {1280, 720};
        
        m_Window = Window::Create(props);
        if (!m_Window->Initialize()) {
            return false;
        }
        m_Window->Show();
        
        // Initialize renderer
        RendererConfig cfg;
        cfg.api = RendererAPI::OpenGL;
        cfg.vsync = true;
        
        m_Renderer = m_Window->CreateRenderer(cfg);
        if (!m_Renderer->Initialize(m_Window, cfg)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        RenderCommand::SetRenderer(m_Renderer);
        RenderCommand::Init();
        Renderer2D::Init();
        
        // Create physics world
        PhysicsWorldSettings settings;
        settings.gravity = {0, -9.81f, 0};
        m_World = new PhysicsWorld(settings);
        m_World->SetDebugDrawEnabled(true);
        
        // Setup camera
        m_Camera.SetOrthographic(20.0f, 16.0f / 9.0f, -1.0f, 1.0f);
        
        // Create ground
        CreateGround();
        
        // Create some objects
        CreateStack(5);
        
        // Setup collision callback
        m_World->SetCollisionCallback([](RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB, const CollisionManifold& manifold) {
            // printf("Collision: %d contacts\n", manifold.contacts.size());
        });
        
        // Event handling
        EventTracker.AddObserver([this](Event& e) {
            HandleEvent(e);
        });
        
        printf("Physics Demo initialized!\n");
        printf("Controls:\n");
        printf("  Space - Spawn sphere\n");
        printf("  B - Spawn box\n");
        printf("  C - Spawn capsule\n");
        printf("  R - Reset\n");
        printf("  D - Toggle debug draw\n");
        printf("  P - Pause/Resume\n");
        printf("  ESC - Quit\n\n");
        
        return true;
    }
    
    void Shutdown() {
        delete m_World;
        
        Renderer2D::Shutdown();
        RenderCommand::Shutdown();
        
        m_Renderer->Shutdown();
        m_Window->Shutdown();
        
        delete m_Renderer;
        delete m_Window;
    }
    
    void HandleEvent(Event& e) {
        if (auto* closed = e.As<WindowStatusEvent>()) {
            if (closed->GetState() == WindowState::Closed) {
                m_Running = false;
            }
        }
        else if (auto* resized = e.As<WindowResizeEvent>()) {
            m_Camera.SetOrthographic(20.0f, 
                static_cast<float>(resized->GetWidth()) / resized->GetHeight(),
                -1.0f, 1.0f);
        }
        else if (auto* key = e.As<KeyboardEvent>()) {
            if (key->IsPressed()) {
                OnKeyPressed(key->GetKeycode());
            }
        }
        else if (auto* mouse = e.As<MouseInputEvent>()) {
            if (mouse->IsPressed() && mouse->GetButton() == 0) {
                OnMouseClick(mouse->GetPosition());
            }
        }
    }
    
    void OnKeyPressed(uint32 key) {
        if (key == Keyboard::Escape) {
            m_Running = false;
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::Space) {
            SpawnSphere();
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::B) {
            SpawnBox();
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::C) {
            SpawnCapsule();
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::R) {
            Reset();
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::D) {
            m_World->SetDebugDrawEnabled(!m_World->IsDebugDrawEnabled());
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::P) {
            m_Paused = !m_Paused;
            printf(m_Paused ? "Paused\n" : "Resumed\n");
        }
    }
    
    void OnMouseClick(const maths::Vector2i& screenPos) {
        // Convert screen to world coordinates
        float x = (screenPos.x / static_cast<float>(m_Window->GetSize().x)) * 20.0f - 10.0f;
        float y = 10.0f - (screenPos.y / static_cast<float>(m_Window->GetSize().y)) * 20.0f * 9.0f / 16.0f;
        
        SpawnSphereAt({x, y, 0});
    }
    
    void MainLoop() {
        float lastTime = 0.0f;
        
        while (m_Running && m_Window->IsOpen()) {
            float currentTime = GetTime();
            float deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;
            
            EventTracker.ProcessQueue();
            
            if (!m_Paused) {
                Update(deltaTime);
            }
            
            Render();
            
            m_FrameCount++;
        }
    }
    
    void Update(float deltaTime) {
        // Clamp delta time to prevent spiral of death
        if (deltaTime > 0.1f) {
            deltaTime = 0.1f;
        }
        
        m_World->Step(deltaTime);
        
        // Remove bodies that fell too far
        auto bodies = m_World->GetBodies();
        for (auto* body : bodies) {
            if (body->GetPosition().y < -20.0f) {
                m_World->DestroyRigidBody(body);
            }
        }
    }
    
    void Render() {
        m_Renderer->BeginFrame();
        
        RenderCommand::SetClearColor({0.1f, 0.1f, 0.15f, 1.0f});
        RenderCommand::Clear();
        
        Renderer2D::BeginScene(m_Camera);
        
        // Render physics debug
        PhysicsDebugRenderer::RenderWorld(m_World, m_Camera.GetViewProjectionMatrix());
        
        // Draw UI
        DrawUI();
        
        Renderer2D::EndScene();
        
        m_Renderer->EndFrame();
        m_Renderer->Present();
    }
    
    void DrawUI() {
        // Stats
        char stats[256];
        snprintf(stats, sizeof(stats), 
                "Bodies: %zu | FPS: %.1f | Frame: %d",
                m_World->GetBodyCount(),
                1.0f / GetDeltaTime(),
                m_FrameCount);
        
        // TODO: Draw text using TextRenderer when available
        // For now, just print to console occasionally
        if (m_FrameCount % 60 == 0) {
            printf("\r%s", stats);
            fflush(stdout);
        }
    }
    
    void CreateGround() {
        PlaneShape* plane = new PlaneShape({0, 1, 0}, 0);
        RigidBody* ground = m_World->CreateRigidBody(plane, PhysicsBodyType::Static);
        ground->SetPosition({0, -5, 0});
    }
    
    void CreateStack(int height) {
        for (int i = 0; i < height; i++) {
            BoxShape* box = new BoxShape({0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f});
            RigidBody* body = m_World->CreateRigidBody(box);
            body->SetPosition({0, -4.0f + i * 1.1f, 0});
        }
    }
    
    void SpawnSphere() {
        SpawnSphereAt({0, 5, 0});
    }
    
    void SpawnSphereAt(const maths::Vector3f& position) {
        SphereShape* sphere = new SphereShape(0.5f);
        RigidBody* body = m_World->CreateRigidBody(sphere);
        body->SetPosition(position);
        
        // Random initial velocity
        float vx = (rand() % 200 - 100) / 100.0f * 2.0f;
        body->SetLinearVelocity({vx, 0, 0});
    }
    
    void SpawnBox() {
        BoxShape* box = new BoxShape({0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f});
        RigidBody* body = m_World->CreateRigidBody(box);
        body->SetPosition({0, 5, 0});
        
        // Random rotation
        float angle = (rand() % 360) * 3.14159f / 180.0f;
        body->SetRotation(maths::Quaternion::FromAxisAngle({0, 0, 1}, angle));
    }
    
    void SpawnCapsule() {
        CapsuleShape* capsule = new CapsuleShape(0.3f, 1.0f);
        RigidBody* body = m_World->CreateRigidBody(capsule);
        body->SetPosition({0, 5, 0});
    }
    
    void Reset() {
        // Destroy all dynamic bodies
        auto bodies = m_World->GetBodies();
        for (auto* body : bodies) {
            if (body->IsDynamic()) {
                m_World->DestroyRigidBody(body);
            }
        }
        
        // Recreate stack
        CreateStack(5);
        
        printf("Reset!\n");
    }
    
    float GetTime() {
        // Simple time tracking
        static auto start = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
        auto now = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
        return std::chrono::duration<float>(now - start).count();
    }
    
    float GetDeltaTime() {
        static float lastTime = GetTime();
        float currentTime = GetTime();
        float dt = currentTime - lastTime;
        lastTime = currentTime;
        return dt;
    }
    
    Window* m_Window = nullptr;
    Renderer* m_Renderer = nullptr;
    PhysicsWorld* m_World = nullptr;
    EditorCamera m_Camera;
    
    bool m_Running = true;
    bool m_Paused = false;
    uint32 m_FrameCount = 0;
};

int nkmain(int argc, char* argv[]) {
    PhysicsDemo demo;
    demo.Run();
    return 0;
}
```

---

## 77. JOINT SYSTEM (Bonus)

### Core/Physics/PhysicsJoint.h

```cpp
// Core/Physics/PhysicsJoint.h
#pragma once

#include "RigidBody.h"

namespace nkentseu {

enum class JointType {
    Fixed,
    Hinge,
    Spring,
    Distance
};

class PhysicsJoint {
public:
    virtual ~PhysicsJoint() = default;
    
    virtual JointType GetType() const = 0;
    virtual void SolveVelocityConstraints(float deltaTime) = 0;
    virtual void SolvePositionConstraints() = 0;
    
    RigidBody* GetBodyA() const { return m_BodyA; }
    RigidBody* GetBodyB() const { return m_BodyB; }
    
protected:
    PhysicsJoint(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB)
        : m_BodyA(bodyA), m_BodyB(bodyB) {}
    
    RigidBody* m_BodyA;
    RigidBody* m_BodyB;
};

// Distance Joint
class DistanceJoint : public PhysicsJoint {
public:
    DistanceJoint(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB, float distance)
        : PhysicsJoint(bodyA, bodyB), m_Distance(distance) {}
    
    JointType GetType() const override { return JointType::Distance; }
    
    void SolveVelocityConstraints(float deltaTime) override {
        // TODO: Implement
    }
    
    void SolvePositionConstraints() override {
        maths::Vector3f delta = m_BodyB->GetPosition() - m_BodyA->GetPosition();
        float currentDistance = delta.Length();
        
        if (currentDistance < 0.0001f) return;
        
        float error = currentDistance - m_Distance;
        maths::Vector3f correction = delta.Normalized() * error * 0.5f;
        
        if (!m_BodyA->IsStatic()) {
            m_BodyA->SetPosition(m_BodyA->GetPosition() + correction * m_BodyA->GetInverseMass());
        }
        
        if (!m_BodyB->IsStatic()) {
            m_BodyB->SetPosition(m_BodyB->GetPosition() - correction * m_BodyB->GetInverseMass());
        }
    }
    
private:
    float m_Distance;
};

// Spring Joint
class SpringJoint : public PhysicsJoint {
public:
    SpringJoint(RigidBody* bodyA, RigidBody* bodyB, float restLength, float stiffness, float damping)
        : PhysicsJoint(bodyA, bodyB)
        , m_RestLength(restLength)
        , m_Stiffness(stiffness)
        , m_Damping(damping) {}
    
    JointType GetType() const override { return JointType::Spring; }
    
    void SolveVelocityConstraints(float deltaTime) override {
        maths::Vector3f posA = m_BodyA->GetPosition();
        maths::Vector3f posB = m_BodyB->GetPosition();
        maths::Vector3f velA = m_BodyA->GetLinearVelocity();
        maths::Vector3f velB = m_BodyB->GetLinearVelocity();
        
        maths::Vector3f delta = posB - posA;
        float distance = delta.Length();
        
        if (distance < 0.0001f) return;
        
        maths::Vector3f direction = delta / distance;
        
        // Spring force: F = -k * (x - x0)
        float displacement = distance - m_RestLength;
        maths::Vector3f springForce = direction * (-m_Stiffness * displacement);
        
        // Damping force: F = -c * v
        maths::Vector3f relativeVelocity = velB - velA;
        maths::Vector3f dampingForce = relativeVelocity * -m_Damping;
        
        maths::Vector3f totalForce = springForce + dampingForce;
        
        m_BodyA->AddForce(totalForce * -1.0f);
        m_BodyB->AddForce(totalForce);
    }
    
    void SolvePositionConstraints() override {
        // Handled in velocity constraints
    }
    
private:
    float m_RestLength;
    float m_Stiffness;
    float m_Damping;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 78. ASSET MANAGER - Core Architecture

### Core/Assets/Asset.h

```cpp
// Core/Assets/Asset.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <string>
#include <memory>

namespace nkentseu {

enum class AssetType {
    None = 0,
    Texture,
    Shader,
    Mesh,
    Material,
    Audio,
    Font,
    Scene,
    Script,
    Prefab,
    Animation,
    Custom
};

enum class AssetState {
    Unloaded,
    Loading,
    Loaded,
    Failed
};

class Asset {
public:
    Asset(const std::string& path, AssetType type)
        : m_Path(path), m_Type(type), m_State(AssetState::Unloaded) {}
    
    virtual ~Asset() = default;
    
    // Loading
    virtual bool Load() = 0;
    virtual void Unload() = 0;
    virtual bool Reload() {
        Unload();
        return Load();
    }
    
    // Info
    const std::string& GetPath() const { return m_Path; }
    AssetType GetType() const { return m_Type; }
    AssetState GetState() const { return m_State; }
    
    bool IsLoaded() const { return m_State == AssetState::Loaded; }
    bool IsLoading() const { return m_State == AssetState::Loading; }
    bool HasFailed() const { return m_State == AssetState::Failed; }
    
    // Metadata
    void SetMetadata(const std::string& key, const std::string& value) {
        m_Metadata[key] = value;
    }
    
    std::string GetMetadata(const std::string& key) const {
        auto it = m_Metadata.find(key);
        return it != m_Metadata.end() ? it->second : "";
    }
    
    // Reference counting
    void AddRef() { m_RefCount++; }
    void Release() { 
        m_RefCount--;
        if (m_RefCount <= 0) {
            Unload();
        }
    }
    int32 GetRefCount() const { return m_RefCount; }
    
    // Handle
    uint64 GetHandle() const { return m_Handle; }
    void SetHandle(uint64 handle) { m_Handle = handle; }
    
protected:
    void SetState(AssetState state) { m_State = state; }
    
    std::string m_Path;
    AssetType m_Type;
    AssetState m_State;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> m_Metadata;
    int32 m_RefCount = 0;
    uint64 m_Handle = 0;
};

// Asset Handle (type-safe reference)
template<typename T>
class AssetHandle {
public:
    AssetHandle() : m_Handle(0) {}
    AssetHandle(uint64 handle) : m_Handle(handle) {}
    
    T* Get() const;
    operator bool() const { return m_Handle != 0; }
    
    uint64 GetHandle() const { return m_Handle; }
    
    bool operator==(const AssetHandle& other) const {
        return m_Handle == other.m_Handle;
    }
    
    bool operator!=(const AssetHandle& other) const {
        return m_Handle != other.m_Handle;
    }
    
private:
    uint64 m_Handle;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```
