## 79. ASSET LOADER

### Core/Assets/AssetLoader.h

```cpp
// Core/Assets/AssetLoader.h
#pragma once

#include "Asset.h"
#include <functional>
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

class AssetLoader {
public:
    virtual ~AssetLoader() = default;
    
    virtual bool CanLoad(const std::string& extension) const = 0;
    virtual Asset* Load(const std::string& path) = 0;
    virtual AssetType GetAssetType() const = 0;
};

// Texture Loader
class TextureAsset : public Asset {
public:
    TextureAsset(const std::string& path)
        : Asset(path, AssetType::Texture), m_Texture(nullptr) {}
    
    ~TextureAsset() override { Unload(); }
    
    bool Load() override;
    void Unload() override;
    
    Texture2D* GetTexture() const { return m_Texture; }
    
private:
    Texture2D* m_Texture;
};

class TextureLoader : public AssetLoader {
public:
    bool CanLoad(const std::string& extension) const override {
        return extension == ".png" || extension == ".jpg" || 
               extension == ".jpeg" || extension == ".bmp" ||
               extension == ".tga" || extension == ".hdr";
    }
    
    Asset* Load(const std::string& path) override;
    AssetType GetAssetType() const override { return AssetType::Texture; }
};

// Shader Loader
class ShaderAsset : public Asset {
public:
    ShaderAsset(const std::string& path)
        : Asset(path, AssetType::Shader), m_Shader(nullptr) {}
    
    ~ShaderAsset() override { Unload(); }
    
    bool Load() override;
    void Unload() override;
    
    Shader* GetShader() const { return m_Shader; }
    
private:
    Shader* m_Shader;
};

class ShaderLoader : public AssetLoader {
public:
    bool CanLoad(const std::string& extension) const override {
        return extension == ".glsl" || extension == ".shader";
    }
    
    Asset* Load(const std::string& path) override;
    AssetType GetAssetType() const override { return AssetType::Shader; }
};

// Mesh Loader
class MeshAsset : public Asset {
public:
    MeshAsset(const std::string& path)
        : Asset(path, AssetType::Mesh), m_Mesh(nullptr) {}
    
    ~MeshAsset() override { Unload(); }
    
    bool Load() override;
    void Unload() override;
    
    Mesh* GetMesh() const { return m_Mesh; }
    
private:
    Mesh* m_Mesh;
};

class MeshLoader : public AssetLoader {
public:
    bool CanLoad(const std::string& extension) const override {
        return extension == ".obj" || extension == ".fbx" || 
               extension == ".gltf" || extension == ".glb";
    }
    
    Asset* Load(const std::string& path) override;
    AssetType GetAssetType() const override { return AssetType::Mesh; }
};

// Audio Loader
class AudioAsset : public Asset {
public:
    AudioAsset(const std::string& path)
        : Asset(path, AssetType::Audio), m_AudioClip(nullptr) {}
    
    ~AudioAsset() override { Unload(); }
    
    bool Load() override;
    void Unload() override;
    
    AudioClip* GetAudioClip() const { return m_AudioClip; }
    
private:
    AudioClip* m_AudioClip;
};

class AudioLoader : public AssetLoader {
public:
    bool CanLoad(const std::string& extension) const override {
        return extension == ".wav" || extension == ".mp3" || 
               extension == ".ogg" || extension == ".flac";
    }
    
    Asset* Load(const std::string& path) override;
    AssetType GetAssetType() const override { return AssetType::Audio; }
};

// Font Loader
class FontAsset : public Asset {
public:
    FontAsset(const std::string& path)
        : Asset(path, AssetType::Font), m_Font(nullptr) {}
    
    ~FontAsset() override { Unload(); }
    
    bool Load() override;
    void Unload() override;
    
    Font* GetFont() const { return m_Font; }
    
private:
    Font* m_Font;
};

class FontLoader : public AssetLoader {
public:
    bool CanLoad(const std::string& extension) const override {
        return extension == ".ttf" || extension == ".otf";
    }
    
    Asset* Load(const std::string& path) override;
    AssetType GetAssetType() const override { return AssetType::Font; }
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Assets/AssetLoader.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Assets/AssetLoader.cpp
#include "AssetLoader.h"
#include <Renderer/Texture.h>
#include <Renderer/Shader.h>
#include <Renderer/Mesh.h>
#include <Audio/AudioEngine.h>
#include <Font/Font.h>

namespace nkentseu {

// =====================================================================
// TEXTURE ASSET
// =====================================================================

bool TextureAsset::Load() {
    SetState(AssetState::Loading);
    
    m_Texture = Texture2D::Create(m_Path);
    
    if (m_Texture && m_Texture->IsLoaded()) {
        SetState(AssetState::Loaded);
        return true;
    }
    
    SetState(AssetState::Failed);
    return false;
}

void TextureAsset::Unload() {
    if (m_Texture) {
        delete m_Texture;
        m_Texture = nullptr;
    }
    SetState(AssetState::Unloaded);
}

Asset* TextureLoader::Load(const std::string& path) {
    TextureAsset* asset = new TextureAsset(path);
    if (asset->Load()) {
        return asset;
    }
    delete asset;
    return nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// SHADER ASSET
// =====================================================================

bool ShaderAsset::Load() {
    SetState(AssetState::Loading);
    
    m_Shader = Shader::Create(m_Path);
    
    if (m_Shader) {
        SetState(AssetState::Loaded);
        return true;
    }
    
    SetState(AssetState::Failed);
    return false;
}

void ShaderAsset::Unload() {
    if (m_Shader) {
        delete m_Shader;
        m_Shader = nullptr;
    }
    SetState(AssetState::Unloaded);
}

Asset* ShaderLoader::Load(const std::string& path) {
    ShaderAsset* asset = new ShaderAsset(path);
    if (asset->Load()) {
        return asset;
    }
    delete asset;
    return nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// MESH ASSET
// =====================================================================

bool MeshAsset::Load() {
    SetState(AssetState::Loading);
    
    // TODO: Implement mesh loading from file
    // For now, create a simple cube
    m_Mesh = Mesh::CreateCube();
    
    if (m_Mesh) {
        SetState(AssetState::Loaded);
        return true;
    }
    
    SetState(AssetState::Failed);
    return false;
}

void MeshAsset::Unload() {
    if (m_Mesh) {
        delete m_Mesh;
        m_Mesh = nullptr;
    }
    SetState(AssetState::Unloaded);
}

Asset* MeshLoader::Load(const std::string& path) {
    MeshAsset* asset = new MeshAsset(path);
    if (asset->Load()) {
        return asset;
    }
    delete asset;
    return nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// AUDIO ASSET
// =====================================================================

bool AudioAsset::Load() {
    SetState(AssetState::Loading);
    
    m_AudioClip = AudioClip::Create();
    
    if (m_AudioClip && m_AudioClip->LoadFromFile(m_Path)) {
        SetState(AssetState::Loaded);
        return true;
    }
    
    SetState(AssetState::Failed);
    return false;
}

void AudioAsset::Unload() {
    if (m_AudioClip) {
        delete m_AudioClip;
        m_AudioClip = nullptr;
    }
    SetState(AssetState::Unloaded);
}

Asset* AudioLoader::Load(const std::string& path) {
    AudioAsset* asset = new AudioAsset(path);
    if (asset->Load()) {
        return asset;
    }
    delete asset;
    return nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// FONT ASSET
// =====================================================================

bool FontAsset::Load() {
    SetState(AssetState::Loading);
    
    m_Font = Font::Create();
    
    if (m_Font && m_Font->LoadFromFile(m_Path, 16)) {
        SetState(AssetState::Loaded);
        return true;
    }
    
    SetState(AssetState::Failed);
    return false;
}

void FontAsset::Unload() {
    if (m_Font) {
        delete m_Font;
        m_Font = nullptr;
    }
    SetState(AssetState::Unloaded);
}

Asset* FontLoader::Load(const std::string& path) {
    FontAsset* asset = new FontAsset(path);
    if (asset->Load()) {
        return asset;
    }
    delete asset;
    return nullptr;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 80. ASSET MANAGER

### Core/Assets/AssetManager.h

```cpp
// Core/Assets/AssetManager.h
#pragma once

#include "Asset.h"
#include "AssetLoader.h"
#include <unordered_map>
#include <vector>
#include <mutex>
#include <thread>
#include <queue>
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

struct AssetLoadRequest {
    std::string path;
    std::function<void(Asset*)> callback;
    bool async = false;
};

class AssetManager {
public:
    static void Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    
    // Loaders
    static void RegisterLoader(AssetLoader* loader);
    static void UnregisterLoader(AssetType type);
    
    // Loading
    template<typename T>
    static AssetHandle<T> Load(const std::string& path, bool async = false);
    
    static Asset* LoadAsset(const std::string& path, bool async = false);
    
    template<typename T>
    static void LoadAsync(const std::string& path, std::function<void(AssetHandle<T>)> callback);
    
    // Getting
    template<typename T>
    static AssetHandle<T> Get(const std::string& path);
    
    static Asset* GetAsset(uint64 handle);
    static Asset* GetAsset(const std::string& path);
    
    // Unloading
    static void Unload(const std::string& path);
    static void Unload(uint64 handle);
    static void UnloadUnused();
    static void UnloadAll();
    
    // Hot reload
    static void EnableHotReload(bool enable);
    static void CheckForChanges();
    
    // Async processing
    static void Update();
    
    // Info
    static size_t GetAssetCount();
    static std::vector<Asset*> GetAllAssets();
    static std::vector<Asset*> GetAssetsByType(AssetType type);
    
    // Paths
    static void SetAssetDirectory(const std::string& directory);
    static std::string GetAssetDirectory();
    
    static std::string ResolvePath(const std::string& path);
    
private:
    static AssetLoader* FindLoader(const std::string& path);
    static std::string GetFileExtension(const std::string& path);
    static uint64 GenerateHandle();
    
    static void AsyncLoadThread();
    static void ProcessLoadRequest(const AssetLoadRequest& request);
    
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, Asset*> s_AssetsByPath;
    static std::unordered_map<uint64, Asset*> s_AssetsByHandle;
    static std::unordered_map<AssetType, AssetLoader*> s_Loaders;
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, uint64> s_FileTimestamps;
    
    static std::string s_AssetDirectory;
    static uint64 s_NextHandle;
    
    static std::mutex s_AssetMutex;
    static std::mutex s_QueueMutex;
    
    static std::queue<AssetLoadRequest> s_LoadQueue;
    static std::thread s_AsyncThread;
    static bool s_AsyncThreadRunning;
    
    static bool s_HotReloadEnabled;
};

// Template implementations
template<typename T>
AssetHandle<T> AssetManager::Load(const std::string& path, bool async) {
    Asset* asset = LoadAsset(path, async);
    if (asset) {
        return AssetHandle<T>(asset->GetHandle());
    }
    return AssetHandle<T>();
}

template<typename T>
void AssetManager::LoadAsync(const std::string& path, std::function<void(AssetHandle<T>)> callback) {
    AssetLoadRequest request;
    request.path = path;
    request.async = true;
    request.callback = [callback](Asset* asset) {
        if (asset) {
            callback(AssetHandle<T>(asset->GetHandle()));
        } else {
            callback(AssetHandle<T>());
        }
    };
    
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_QueueMutex);
    s_LoadQueue.push(request);
}

template<typename T>
AssetHandle<T> AssetManager::Get(const std::string& path) {
    Asset* asset = GetAsset(path);
    if (asset) {
        return AssetHandle<T>(asset->GetHandle());
    }
    return AssetHandle<T>();
}

template<typename T>
T* AssetHandle<T>::Get() const {
    Asset* asset = AssetManager::GetAsset(m_Handle);
    return asset ? dynamic_cast<T*>(asset) : nullptr;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Assets/AssetManager.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Assets/AssetManager.cpp
#include "AssetManager.h"
#include <filesystem>
#include <fstream>

namespace nkentseu {

std::unordered_map<std::string, Asset*> AssetManager::s_AssetsByPath;
std::unordered_map<uint64, Asset*> AssetManager::s_AssetsByHandle;
std::unordered_map<AssetType, AssetLoader*> AssetManager::s_Loaders;
std::unordered_map<std::string, uint64> AssetManager::s_FileTimestamps;

std::string AssetManager::s_AssetDirectory = "Assets";
uint64 AssetManager::s_NextHandle = 1;

std::mutex AssetManager::s_AssetMutex;
std::mutex AssetManager::s_QueueMutex;

std::queue<AssetLoadRequest> AssetManager::s_LoadQueue;
std::thread AssetManager::s_AsyncThread;
bool AssetManager::s_AsyncThreadRunning = false;

bool AssetManager::s_HotReloadEnabled = false;

// =====================================================================
// INITIALIZATION
// =====================================================================

void AssetManager::Init() {
    printf("Initializing Asset Manager...\n");
    
    // Register default loaders
    RegisterLoader(new TextureLoader());
    RegisterLoader(new ShaderLoader());
    RegisterLoader(new MeshLoader());
    RegisterLoader(new AudioLoader());
    RegisterLoader(new FontLoader());
    
    // Start async thread
    s_AsyncThreadRunning = true;
    s_AsyncThread = std::thread(AsyncLoadThread);
    
    printf("Asset Manager initialized\n");
}

void AssetManager::Shutdown() {
    printf("Shutting down Asset Manager...\n");
    
    // Stop async thread
    s_AsyncThreadRunning = false;
    if (s_AsyncThread.joinable()) {
        s_AsyncThread.join();
    }
    
    // Unload all assets
    UnloadAll();
    
    // Delete loaders
    for (auto& pair : s_Loaders) {
        delete pair.second;
    }
    s_Loaders.clear();
    
    printf("Asset Manager shut down\n");
}

// =====================================================================
// LOADERS
// =====================================================================

void AssetManager::RegisterLoader(AssetLoader* loader) {
    AssetType type = loader->GetAssetType();
    
    if (s_Loaders.find(type) != s_Loaders.end()) {
        delete s_Loaders[type];
    }
    
    s_Loaders[type] = loader;
    printf("Registered asset loader for type %d\n", static_cast<int>(type));
}

void AssetManager::UnregisterLoader(AssetType type) {
    auto it = s_Loaders.find(type);
    if (it != s_Loaders.end()) {
        delete it->second;
        s_Loaders.erase(it);
    }
}

AssetLoader* AssetManager::FindLoader(const std::string& path) {
    std::string extension = GetFileExtension(path);
    
    for (auto& pair : s_Loaders) {
        if (pair.second->CanLoad(extension)) {
            return pair.second;
        }
    }
    
    return nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// LOADING
// =====================================================================

Asset* AssetManager::LoadAsset(const std::string& path, bool async) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    // Check if already loaded
    auto it = s_AssetsByPath.find(path);
    if (it != s_AssetsByPath.end()) {
        it->second->AddRef();
        return it->second;
    }
    
    if (async) {
        AssetLoadRequest request;
        request.path = path;
        request.async = true;
        
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> queueLock(s_QueueMutex);
        s_LoadQueue.push(request);
        
        return nullptr;
    }
    
    // Find loader
    AssetLoader* loader = FindLoader(path);
    if (!loader) {
        printf("No loader found for: %s\n", path.c_str());
        return nullptr;
    }
    
    // Load asset
    std::string fullPath = ResolvePath(path);
    Asset* asset = loader->Load(fullPath);
    
    if (asset) {
        uint64 handle = GenerateHandle();
        asset->SetHandle(handle);
        asset->AddRef();
        
        s_AssetsByPath[path] = asset;
        s_AssetsByHandle[handle] = asset;
        
        // Store timestamp for hot reload
        if (std::filesystem::exists(fullPath)) {
            auto writeTime = std::filesystem::last_write_time(fullPath);
            s_FileTimestamps[path] = writeTime.time_since_epoch().count();
        }
        
        printf("Loaded asset: %s (handle: %llu)\n", path.c_str(), handle);
    } else {
        printf("Failed to load asset: %s\n", path.c_str());
    }
    
    return asset;
}

// =====================================================================
// GETTING
// =====================================================================

Asset* AssetManager::GetAsset(uint64 handle) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    auto it = s_AssetsByHandle.find(handle);
    if (it != s_AssetsByHandle.end()) {
        return it->second;
    }
    
    return nullptr;
}

Asset* AssetManager::GetAsset(const std::string& path) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    auto it = s_AssetsByPath.find(path);
    if (it != s_AssetsByPath.end()) {
        return it->second;
    }
    
    return nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// UNLOADING
// =====================================================================

void AssetManager::Unload(const std::string& path) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    auto it = s_AssetsByPath.find(path);
    if (it != s_AssetsByPath.end()) {
        Asset* asset = it->second;
        asset->Release();
        
        if (asset->GetRefCount() <= 0) {
            s_AssetsByHandle.erase(asset->GetHandle());
            s_AssetsByPath.erase(it);
            delete asset;
            
            printf("Unloaded asset: %s\n", path.c_str());
        }
    }
}

void AssetManager::Unload(uint64 handle) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    auto it = s_AssetsByHandle.find(handle);
    if (it != s_AssetsByHandle.end()) {
        Asset* asset = it->second;
        asset->Release();
        
        if (asset->GetRefCount() <= 0) {
            s_AssetsByPath.erase(asset->GetPath());
            s_AssetsByHandle.erase(it);
            delete asset;
            
            printf("Unloaded asset: %llu\n", handle);
        }
    }
}

void AssetManager::UnloadUnused() {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    std::vector<Asset*> toDelete;
    
    for (auto& pair : s_AssetsByHandle) {
        if (pair.second->GetRefCount() <= 0) {
            toDelete.push_back(pair.second);
        }
    }
    
    for (auto* asset : toDelete) {
        s_AssetsByPath.erase(asset->GetPath());
        s_AssetsByHandle.erase(asset->GetHandle());
        delete asset;
    }
    
    if (!toDelete.empty()) {
        printf("Unloaded %zu unused assets\n", toDelete.size());
    }
}

void AssetManager::UnloadAll() {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    for (auto& pair : s_AssetsByHandle) {
        delete pair.second;
    }
    
    s_AssetsByPath.clear();
    s_AssetsByHandle.clear();
    s_FileTimestamps.clear();
    
    printf("Unloaded all assets\n");
}

// =====================================================================
// HOT RELOAD
// =====================================================================

void AssetManager::EnableHotReload(bool enable) {
    s_HotReloadEnabled = enable;
    printf("Hot reload %s\n", enable ? "enabled" : "disabled");
}

void AssetManager::CheckForChanges() {
    if (!s_HotReloadEnabled) return;
    
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    for (auto& pair : s_FileTimestamps) {
        const std::string& path = pair.first;
        uint64 oldTimestamp = pair.second;
        
        std::string fullPath = ResolvePath(path);
        
        if (std::filesystem::exists(fullPath)) {
            auto writeTime = std::filesystem::last_write_time(fullPath);
            uint64 newTimestamp = writeTime.time_since_epoch().count();
            
            if (newTimestamp != oldTimestamp) {
                printf("File changed, reloading: %s\n", path.c_str());
                
                auto it = s_AssetsByPath.find(path);
                if (it != s_AssetsByPath.end()) {
                    Asset* asset = it->second;
                    asset->Reload();
                    pair.second = newTimestamp;
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// ASYNC PROCESSING
// =====================================================================

void AssetManager::Update() {
    // Process completed async loads
    CheckForChanges();
}

void AssetManager::AsyncLoadThread() {
    while (s_AsyncThreadRunning) {
        AssetLoadRequest request;
        
        {
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_QueueMutex);
            
            if (!s_LoadQueue.empty()) {
                request = s_LoadQueue.front();
                s_LoadQueue.pop();
            } else {
                std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(10));
                continue;
            }
        }
        
        ProcessLoadRequest(request);
    }
}

void AssetManager::ProcessLoadRequest(const AssetLoadRequest& request) {
    Asset* asset = LoadAsset(request.path, false);
    
    if (request.callback) {
        request.callback(asset);
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// INFO
// =====================================================================

size_t AssetManager::GetAssetCount() {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    return s_AssetsByHandle.size();
}

std::vector<Asset*> AssetManager::GetAllAssets() {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    std::vector<Asset*> assets;
    for (auto& pair : s_AssetsByHandle) {
        assets.push_back(pair.second);
    }
    
    return assets;
}

std::vector<Asset*> AssetManager::GetAssetsByType(AssetType type) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(s_AssetMutex);
    
    std::vector<Asset*> assets;
    for (auto& pair : s_AssetsByHandle) {
        if (pair.second->GetType() == type) {
            assets.push_back(pair.second);
        }
    }
    
    return assets;
}

// =====================================================================
// PATHS
// =====================================================================

void AssetManager::SetAssetDirectory(const std::string& directory) {
    s_AssetDirectory = directory;
}

std::string AssetManager::GetAssetDirectory() {
    return s_AssetDirectory;
}

std::string AssetManager::ResolvePath(const std::string& path) {
    if (std::filesystem::path(path).is_absolute()) {
        return path;
    }
    
    return s_AssetDirectory + "/" + path;
}

// =====================================================================
// HELPERS
// =====================================================================

std::string AssetManager::GetFileExtension(const std::string& path) {
    size_t dotPos = path.find_last_of('.');
    if (dotPos != std::string::npos) {
        return path.substr(dotPos);
    }
    return "";
}

uint64 AssetManager::GenerateHandle() {
    return s_NextHandle++;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

# Suite - Asset Registry, Serialization & Demo Complet

---

## 81. ASSET REGISTRY (Metadata & Dependencies)

### Core/Assets/AssetRegistry.h

```cpp
// Core/Assets/AssetRegistry.h
#pragma once

#include "Asset.h"
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_set>

namespace nkentseu {

struct AssetMetadata {
    std::string path;
    AssetType type;
    uint64 handle;
    uint64 fileSize;
    uint64 lastModified;
    std::string checksum;
    
    std::vector<uint64> dependencies;
    std::unordered_set<std::string> tags;
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> customData;
};

class AssetRegistry {
public:
    static void Init();
    static void Shutdown();
    
    // Registry
    static void RegisterAsset(Asset* asset);
    static void UnregisterAsset(uint64 handle);
    
    // Metadata
    static AssetMetadata* GetMetadata(uint64 handle);
    static AssetMetadata* GetMetadata(const std::string& path);
    
    static void SetMetadata(uint64 handle, const AssetMetadata& metadata);
    
    // Dependencies
    static void AddDependency(uint64 handle, uint64 dependency);
    static void RemoveDependency(uint64 handle, uint64 dependency);
    static std::vector<uint64> GetDependencies(uint64 handle);
    static std::vector<uint64> GetDependents(uint64 handle);
    
    // Tags
    static void AddTag(uint64 handle, const std::string& tag);
    static void RemoveTag(uint64 handle, const std::string& tag);
    static bool HasTag(uint64 handle, const std::string& tag);
    static std::vector<uint64> FindAssetsByTag(const std::string& tag);
    
    // Search
    static std::vector<uint64> FindAssets(const std::string& query);
    static std::vector<uint64> FindAssetsByType(AssetType type);
    
    // Serialization
    static bool SaveRegistry(const std::string& path);
    static bool LoadRegistry(const std::string& path);
    
private:
    static std::unordered_map<uint64, AssetMetadata> s_Registry;
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, uint64> s_PathToHandle;
    static std::unordered_map<std::string, std::vector<uint64>> s_TagIndex;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Assets/AssetRegistry.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Assets/AssetRegistry.cpp
#include "AssetRegistry.h"
#include <fstream>
#include <filesystem>
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

std::unordered_map<uint64, AssetMetadata> AssetRegistry::s_Registry;
std::unordered_map<std::string, uint64> AssetRegistry::s_PathToHandle;
std::unordered_map<std::string, std::vector<uint64>> AssetRegistry::s_TagIndex;

void AssetRegistry::Init() {
    printf("Asset Registry initialized\n");
}

void AssetRegistry::Shutdown() {
    s_Registry.clear();
    s_PathToHandle.clear();
    s_TagIndex.clear();
}

// =====================================================================
// REGISTRY
// =====================================================================

void AssetRegistry::RegisterAsset(Asset* asset) {
    if (!asset) return;
    
    uint64 handle = asset->GetHandle();
    std::string path = asset->GetPath();
    
    AssetMetadata metadata;
    metadata.path = path;
    metadata.type = asset->GetType();
    metadata.handle = handle;
    
    // Get file info
    std::string fullPath = AssetManager::ResolvePath(path);
    if (std::filesystem::exists(fullPath)) {
        metadata.fileSize = std::filesystem::file_size(fullPath);
        auto writeTime = std::filesystem::last_write_time(fullPath);
        metadata.lastModified = writeTime.time_since_epoch().count();
        
        // TODO: Calculate checksum
        metadata.checksum = "";
    }
    
    s_Registry[handle] = metadata;
    s_PathToHandle[path] = handle;
}

void AssetRegistry::UnregisterAsset(uint64 handle) {
    auto it = s_Registry.find(handle);
    if (it != s_Registry.end()) {
        s_PathToHandle.erase(it->second.path);
        
        // Remove from tag index
        for (const auto& tag : it->second.tags) {
            auto& handles = s_TagIndex[tag];
            handles.erase(std::remove(handles.begin(), handles.end(), handle), handles.end());
        }
        
        s_Registry.erase(it);
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// METADATA
// =====================================================================

AssetMetadata* AssetRegistry::GetMetadata(uint64 handle) {
    auto it = s_Registry.find(handle);
    return it != s_Registry.end() ? &it->second : nullptr;
}

AssetMetadata* AssetRegistry::GetMetadata(const std::string& path) {
    auto it = s_PathToHandle.find(path);
    if (it != s_PathToHandle.end()) {
        return GetMetadata(it->second);
    }
    return nullptr;
}

void AssetRegistry::SetMetadata(uint64 handle, const AssetMetadata& metadata) {
    s_Registry[handle] = metadata;
}

// =====================================================================
// DEPENDENCIES
// =====================================================================

void AssetRegistry::AddDependency(uint64 handle, uint64 dependency) {
    auto* metadata = GetMetadata(handle);
    if (metadata) {
        if (std::find(metadata->dependencies.begin(), metadata->dependencies.end(), dependency) 
            == metadata->dependencies.end()) {
            metadata->dependencies.push_back(dependency);
        }
    }
}

void AssetRegistry::RemoveDependency(uint64 handle, uint64 dependency) {
    auto* metadata = GetMetadata(handle);
    if (metadata) {
        auto& deps = metadata->dependencies;
        deps.erase(std::remove(deps.begin(), deps.end(), dependency), deps.end());
    }
}

std::vector<uint64> AssetRegistry::GetDependencies(uint64 handle) {
    auto* metadata = GetMetadata(handle);
    return metadata ? metadata->dependencies : std::vector<uint64>();
}

std::vector<uint64> AssetRegistry::GetDependents(uint64 handle) {
    std::vector<uint64> dependents;
    
    for (const auto& pair : s_Registry) {
        const auto& deps = pair.second.dependencies;
        if (std::find(deps.begin(), deps.end(), handle) != deps.end()) {
            dependents.push_back(pair.first);
        }
    }
    
    return dependents;
}

// =====================================================================
// TAGS
// =====================================================================

void AssetRegistry::AddTag(uint64 handle, const std::string& tag) {
    auto* metadata = GetMetadata(handle);
    if (metadata) {
        metadata->tags.insert(tag);
        s_TagIndex[tag].push_back(handle);
    }
}

void AssetRegistry::RemoveTag(uint64 handle, const std::string& tag) {
    auto* metadata = GetMetadata(handle);
    if (metadata) {
        metadata->tags.erase(tag);
        
        auto& handles = s_TagIndex[tag];
        handles.erase(std::remove(handles.begin(), handles.end(), handle), handles.end());
    }
}

bool AssetRegistry::HasTag(uint64 handle, const std::string& tag) {
    auto* metadata = GetMetadata(handle);
    return metadata && metadata->tags.find(tag) != metadata->tags.end();
}

std::vector<uint64> AssetRegistry::FindAssetsByTag(const std::string& tag) {
    auto it = s_TagIndex.find(tag);
    return it != s_TagIndex.end() ? it->second : std::vector<uint64>();
}

// =====================================================================
// SEARCH
// =====================================================================

std::vector<uint64> AssetRegistry::FindAssets(const std::string& query) {
    std::vector<uint64> results;
    
    std::string lowerQuery = query;
    std::transform(lowerQuery.begin(), lowerQuery.end(), lowerQuery.begin(), ::tolower);
    
    for (const auto& pair : s_Registry) {
        std::string lowerPath = pair.second.path;
        std::transform(lowerPath.begin(), lowerPath.end(), lowerPath.begin(), ::tolower);
        
        if (lowerPath.find(lowerQuery) != std::string::npos) {
            results.push_back(pair.first);
        }
    }
    
    return results;
}

std::vector<uint64> AssetRegistry::FindAssetsByType(AssetType type) {
    std::vector<uint64> results;
    
    for (const auto& pair : s_Registry) {
        if (pair.second.type == type) {
            results.push_back(pair.first);
        }
    }
    
    return results;
}

// =====================================================================
// SERIALIZATION
// =====================================================================

bool AssetRegistry::SaveRegistry(const std::string& path) {
    std::ofstream file(path, std::ios::binary);
    if (!file.is_open()) {
        printf("Failed to save registry: %s\n", path.c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    // Header
    uint32 version = 1;
    uint32 assetCount = static_cast<uint32>(s_Registry.size());
    
    file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&version), sizeof(version));
    file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&assetCount), sizeof(assetCount));
    
    // Assets
    for (const auto& pair : s_Registry) {
        const AssetMetadata& metadata = pair.second;
        
        // Handle
        file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&metadata.handle), sizeof(metadata.handle));
        
        // Path
        uint32 pathLen = static_cast<uint32>(metadata.path.length());
        file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&pathLen), sizeof(pathLen));
        file.write(metadata.path.c_str(), pathLen);
        
        // Type
        file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&metadata.type), sizeof(metadata.type));
        
        // File info
        file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&metadata.fileSize), sizeof(metadata.fileSize));
        file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&metadata.lastModified), sizeof(metadata.lastModified));
        
        // Checksum
        uint32 checksumLen = static_cast<uint32>(metadata.checksum.length());
        file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&checksumLen), sizeof(checksumLen));
        file.write(metadata.checksum.c_str(), checksumLen);
        
        // Dependencies
        uint32 depCount = static_cast<uint32>(metadata.dependencies.size());
        file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&depCount), sizeof(depCount));
        for (uint64 dep : metadata.dependencies) {
            file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&dep), sizeof(dep));
        }
        
        // Tags
        uint32 tagCount = static_cast<uint32>(metadata.tags.size());
        file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&tagCount), sizeof(tagCount));
        for (const auto& tag : metadata.tags) {
            uint32 tagLen = static_cast<uint32>(tag.length());
            file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&tagLen), sizeof(tagLen));
            file.write(tag.c_str(), tagLen);
        }
    }
    
    file.close();
    
    printf("Saved asset registry: %s (%u assets)\n", path.c_str(), assetCount);
    return true;
}

bool AssetRegistry::LoadRegistry(const std::string& path) {
    std::ifstream file(path, std::ios::binary);
    if (!file.is_open()) {
        printf("Failed to load registry: %s\n", path.c_str());
        return false;
    }
    
    // Clear current registry
    s_Registry.clear();
    s_PathToHandle.clear();
    s_TagIndex.clear();
    
    // Header
    uint32 version;
    uint32 assetCount;
    
    file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&version), sizeof(version));
    file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&assetCount), sizeof(assetCount));
    
    // Assets
    for (uint32 i = 0; i < assetCount; i++) {
        AssetMetadata metadata;
        
        // Handle
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&metadata.handle), sizeof(metadata.handle));
        
        // Path
        uint32 pathLen;
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&pathLen), sizeof(pathLen));
        metadata.path.resize(pathLen);
        file.read(&metadata.path[0], pathLen);
        
        // Type
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&metadata.type), sizeof(metadata.type));
        
        // File info
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&metadata.fileSize), sizeof(metadata.fileSize));
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&metadata.lastModified), sizeof(metadata.lastModified));
        
        // Checksum
        uint32 checksumLen;
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&checksumLen), sizeof(checksumLen));
        metadata.checksum.resize(checksumLen);
        file.read(&metadata.checksum[0], checksumLen);
        
        // Dependencies
        uint32 depCount;
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&depCount), sizeof(depCount));
        metadata.dependencies.resize(depCount);
        for (uint32 j = 0; j < depCount; j++) {
            file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&metadata.dependencies[j]), sizeof(uint64));
        }
        
        // Tags
        uint32 tagCount;
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&tagCount), sizeof(tagCount));
        for (uint32 j = 0; j < tagCount; j++) {
            uint32 tagLen;
            file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&tagLen), sizeof(tagLen));
            
            std::string tag;
            tag.resize(tagLen);
            file.read(&tag[0], tagLen);
            
            metadata.tags.insert(tag);
            s_TagIndex[tag].push_back(metadata.handle);
        }
        
        s_Registry[metadata.handle] = metadata;
        s_PathToHandle[metadata.path] = metadata.handle;
    }
    
    file.close();
    
    printf("Loaded asset registry: %s (%u assets)\n", path.c_str(), assetCount);
    return true;
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 82. ASSET BROWSER (UI Component)

### Core/Assets/AssetBrowser.h

```cpp
// Core/Assets/AssetBrowser.h
#pragma once

#include "AssetManager.h"
#include "AssetRegistry.h"
#include <UI/UIContext.h>
#include <functional>

namespace nkentseu {

class AssetBrowser {
public:
    using SelectionCallback = std::function<void(Asset*)>;
    
    AssetBrowser();
    ~AssetBrowser();
    
    void Render();
    
    void SetSelectionCallback(SelectionCallback callback) {
        m_OnSelection = callback;
    }
    
    void SetCurrentDirectory(const std::string& path);
    std::string GetCurrentDirectory() const { return m_CurrentDirectory; }
    
    void Refresh();
    
private:
    void RenderToolbar();
    void RenderDirectoryTree();
    void RenderAssetGrid();
    void RenderAssetDetails();
    void RenderContextMenu();
    
    std::string m_CurrentDirectory;
    std::string m_SearchQuery;
    AssetType m_FilterType = AssetType::None;
    
    Asset* m_SelectedAsset = nullptr;
    SelectionCallback m_OnSelection;
    
    std::vector<std::string> m_DirectoryHistory;
    int m_HistoryIndex = -1;
    
    float m_ThumbnailSize = 64.0f;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Assets/AssetBrowser.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Assets/AssetBrowser.cpp
#include "AssetBrowser.h"
#include <filesystem>

namespace nkentseu {

AssetBrowser::AssetBrowser() {
    m_CurrentDirectory = AssetManager::GetAssetDirectory();
}

AssetBrowser::~AssetBrowser() {
}

void AssetBrowser::Render() {
    if (UI::Begin("Asset Browser", nullptr, {800, 600})) {
        RenderToolbar();
        
        UI::Separator();
        
        // Split view
        UI::BeginHorizontalLayout();
        
        // Directory tree (left)
        if (UI::BeginChild("DirectoryTree", {200, 0}, true)) {
            RenderDirectoryTree();
            UI::EndChild();
        }
        
        // Asset grid (center)
        if (UI::BeginChild("AssetGrid", {0, 400}, true)) {
            RenderAssetGrid();
            UI::EndChild();
        }
        
        UI::EndHorizontalLayout();
        
        // Asset details (bottom)
        if (m_SelectedAsset) {
            UI::Separator();
            RenderAssetDetails();
        }
        
        UI::End();
    }
}

void AssetBrowser::RenderToolbar() {
    // Navigation buttons
    if (UI::Button("<")) {
        if (m_HistoryIndex > 0) {
            m_HistoryIndex--;
            m_CurrentDirectory = m_DirectoryHistory[m_HistoryIndex];
        }
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    if (UI::Button(">")) {
        if (m_HistoryIndex < static_cast<int>(m_DirectoryHistory.size()) - 1) {
            m_HistoryIndex++;
            m_CurrentDirectory = m_DirectoryHistory[m_HistoryIndex];
        }
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    if (UI::Button("^")) {
        // Go to parent directory
        std::filesystem::path path(m_CurrentDirectory);
        if (path.has_parent_path()) {
            SetCurrentDirectory(path.parent_path().string());
        }
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    // Current path
    UI::Text(m_CurrentDirectory);
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    // Search
    UI::InputText("Search", m_SearchQuery);
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    // Filter by type
    if (UI::BeginCombo("Filter", "All")) {
        if (UI::Selectable("All")) m_FilterType = AssetType::None;
        if (UI::Selectable("Textures")) m_FilterType = AssetType::Texture;
        if (UI::Selectable("Shaders")) m_FilterType = AssetType::Shader;
        if (UI::Selectable("Meshes")) m_FilterType = AssetType::Mesh;
        if (UI::Selectable("Audio")) m_FilterType = AssetType::Audio;
        if (UI::Selectable("Fonts")) m_FilterType = AssetType::Font;
        UI::EndCombo();
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    if (UI::Button("Refresh")) {
        Refresh();
    }
}

void AssetBrowser::RenderDirectoryTree() {
    UI::Text("Directories");
    UI::Separator();
    
    // TODO: Render directory tree
    std::filesystem::path basePath(AssetManager::GetAssetDirectory());
    
    if (UI::TreeNode(basePath.filename().string())) {
        for (const auto& entry : std::filesystem::recursive_directory_iterator(basePath)) {
            if (entry.is_directory()) {
                std::string name = entry.path().filename().string();
                
                if (UI::Selectable(name)) {
                    SetCurrentDirectory(entry.path().string());
                }
            }
        }
        UI::TreePop();
    }
}

void AssetBrowser::RenderAssetGrid() {
    // Get assets in current directory
    auto assets = AssetManager::GetAllAssets();
    
    UI::BeginGridLayout(4, 8.0f, 8.0f);
    
    for (auto* asset : assets) {
        if (!asset) continue;
        
        // Filter
        if (m_FilterType != AssetType::None && asset->GetType() != m_FilterType) {
            continue;
        }
        
        // Search
        if (!m_SearchQuery.empty()) {
            std::string path = asset->GetPath();
            std::transform(path.begin(), path.end(), path.begin(), ::tolower);
            std::string query = m_SearchQuery;
            std::transform(query.begin(), query.end(), query.begin(), ::tolower);
            
            if (path.find(query) == std::string::npos) {
                continue;
            }
        }
        
        // Render asset thumbnail
        bool selected = (m_SelectedAsset == asset);
        
        UI::BeginCard({m_ThumbnailSize, m_ThumbnailSize + 30});
        
        // Icon/Thumbnail
        maths::Color color;
        switch (asset->GetType()) {
            case AssetType::Texture: color = {1, 0, 0, 1}; break;
            case AssetType::Shader: color = {0, 1, 0, 1}; break;
            case AssetType::Mesh: color = {0, 0, 1, 1}; break;
            case AssetType::Audio: color = {1, 1, 0, 1}; break;
            case AssetType::Font: color = {1, 0, 1, 1}; break;
            default: color = {0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1}; break;
        }
        
        if (selected) {
            UI::AddRectFilled(
                UI::GetCursorPos(),
                UI::GetCursorPos() + maths::Vector2f(m_ThumbnailSize, m_ThumbnailSize),
                maths::Color(0.3f, 0.6f, 1.0f, 0.3f)
            );
        }
        
        UI::AddRectFilled(
            UI::GetCursorPos() + maths::Vector2f(10, 10),
            UI::GetCursorPos() + maths::Vector2f(m_ThumbnailSize - 10, m_ThumbnailSize - 10),
            color
        );
        
        // Name
        std::filesystem::path path(asset->GetPath());
        std::string name = path.filename().string();
        
        UI::SetCursorPos(UI::GetCursorPos() + maths::Vector2f(0, m_ThumbnailSize));
        UI::Text(name);
        
        UI::EndCard();
        
        // Handle click
        if (UI::IsItemClicked()) {
            m_SelectedAsset = asset;
            
            if (m_OnSelection) {
                m_OnSelection(asset);
            }
        }
        
        UI::NextGridCell();
    }
    
    UI::EndGridLayout();
}

void AssetBrowser::RenderAssetDetails() {
    if (!m_SelectedAsset) return;
    
    UI::Text("Asset Details");
    UI::Separator();
    
    UI::Text("Path: " + m_SelectedAsset->GetPath());
    UI::Text("Type: " + std::to_string(static_cast<int>(m_SelectedAsset->GetType())));
    UI::Text("State: " + std::to_string(static_cast<int>(m_SelectedAsset->GetState())));
    UI::Text("Refs: " + std::to_string(m_SelectedAsset->GetRefCount()));
    
    UI::Separator();
    
    if (UI::Button("Reload")) {
        m_SelectedAsset->Reload();
    }
    
    UI::SameLine();
    
    if (UI::Button("Unload")) {
        AssetManager::Unload(m_SelectedAsset->GetHandle());
        m_SelectedAsset = nullptr;
    }
}

void AssetBrowser::RenderContextMenu() {
    // TODO: Implement context menu
}

void AssetBrowser::SetCurrentDirectory(const std::string& path) {
    m_CurrentDirectory = path;
    
    // Update history
    if (m_HistoryIndex < static_cast<int>(m_DirectoryHistory.size()) - 1) {
        m_DirectoryHistory.erase(
            m_DirectoryHistory.begin() + m_HistoryIndex + 1,
            m_DirectoryHistory.end()
        );
    }
    
    m_DirectoryHistory.push_back(path);
    m_HistoryIndex = static_cast<int>(m_DirectoryHistory.size()) - 1;
}

void AssetBrowser::Refresh() {
    // Reload current directory
    printf("Refreshing asset browser...\n");
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

## 83. ASSET DEMO COMPLET

### Sandbox/AssetManagerDemo.cpp

```cpp
// Sandbox/AssetManagerDemo.cpp
#include <Assets/AssetManager.h>
#include <Assets/AssetRegistry.h>
#include <Assets/AssetBrowser.h>
#include <Window/Window.h>
#include <Renderer/Renderer2D.h>
#include <UI/UIContext.h>

using namespace nkentseu;

class AssetManagerDemo {
public:
    void Run() {
        if (!Initialize()) {
            return;
        }
        
        MainLoop();
        
        Shutdown();
    }
    
private:
    bool Initialize() {
        // Create window
        WindowProperties props;
        props.title = "Asset Manager Demo";
        props.size = {1600, 900};
        
        m_Window = Window::Create(props);
        if (!m_Window->Initialize()) {
            return false;
        }
        m_Window->Show();
        
        // Initialize renderer
        RendererConfig cfg;
        cfg.api = RendererAPI::OpenGL;
        cfg.vsync = true;
        
        m_Renderer = m_Window->CreateRenderer(cfg);
        if (!m_Renderer->Initialize(m_Window, cfg)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        RenderCommand::SetRenderer(m_Renderer);
        RenderCommand::Init();
        Renderer2D::Init();
        
        // Initialize UI
        FontLibrary::Init();
        m_Font = FontLibrary::Load("default", "Assets/Fonts/Roboto-Regular.ttf", 16);
        
        UIThemeManager::Init();
        UI::Init(m_Window, m_Font);
        
        // Initialize Asset Manager
        AssetManager::Init();
        AssetRegistry::Init();
        
        AssetManager::SetAssetDirectory("Assets");
        AssetManager::EnableHotReload(true);
        
        // Create asset browser
        m_AssetBrowser = new AssetBrowser();
        m_AssetBrowser->SetSelectionCallback([this](Asset* asset) {
            OnAssetSelected(asset);
        });
        
        // Load some assets
        LoadDemoAssets();
        
        // Event handling
        EventTracker.AddObserver([this](Event& e) {
            UI::ProcessEvent(e);
            HandleEvent(e);
        });
        
        printf("Asset Manager Demo initialized!\n");
        printf("Controls:\n");
        printf("  L - Load random texture\n");
        printf("  U - Unload unused assets\n");
        printf("  R - Reload all assets\n");
        printf("  S - Save registry\n");
        printf("  ESC - Quit\n\n");
        
        return true;
    }
    
    void Shutdown() {
        delete m_AssetBrowser;
        
        // Save registry
        AssetRegistry::SaveRegistry("asset_registry.bin");
        
        AssetRegistry::Shutdown();
        AssetManager::Shutdown();
        
        UI::Shutdown();
        UIThemeManager::Shutdown();
        FontLibrary::Shutdown();
        
        Renderer2D::Shutdown();
        RenderCommand::Shutdown();
        
        m_Renderer->Shutdown();
        m_Window->Shutdown();
        
        delete m_Renderer;
        delete m_Window;
    }
    
    void HandleEvent(Event& e) {
        if (auto* closed = e.As<WindowStatusEvent>()) {
            if (closed->GetState() == WindowState::Closed) {
                m_Running = false;
            }
        }
        else if (auto* key = e.As<KeyboardEvent>()) {
            if (key->IsPressed()) {
                OnKeyPressed(key->GetKeycode());
            }
        }
    }
    
    void OnKeyPressed(uint32 key) {
        if (key == Keyboard::Escape) {
            m_Running = false;
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::L) {
            LoadRandomTexture();
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::U) {
            AssetManager::UnloadUnused();
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::R) {
            ReloadAllAssets();
        }
        else if (key == Keyboard::S) {
            AssetRegistry::SaveRegistry("asset_registry.bin");
        }
    }
    
    void MainLoop() {
        while (m_Running && m_Window->IsOpen()) {
            EventTracker.ProcessQueue();
            
            Update();
            Render();
        }
    }
    
    void Update() {
        AssetManager::Update();
    }
    
    void Render() {
        m_Renderer->BeginFrame();
        
        RenderCommand::SetClearColor({0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 1.0f});
        RenderCommand::Clear();
        
        UI::NewFrame();
        
        // Render UI
        RenderUI();
        
        UI::Render();
        
        m_Renderer->EndFrame();
        m_Renderer->Present();
    }
    
    void RenderUI() {
        // Asset browser
        m_AssetBrowser->Render();
        
        // Stats window
        if (UI::Begin("Asset Stats", nullptr, {300, 200})) {
            UI::Text("Total Assets: " + std::to_string(AssetManager::GetAssetCount()));
            
            UI::Separator();
            
            auto textures = AssetManager::GetAssetsByType(AssetType::Texture);
            UI::Text("Textures: " + std::to_string(textures.size()));
            
            auto shaders = AssetManager::GetAssetsByType(AssetType::Shader);
            UI::Text("Shaders: " + std::to_string(shaders.size()));
            
            auto meshes = AssetManager::GetAssetsByType(AssetType::Mesh);
            UI::Text("Meshes: " + std::to_string(meshes.size()));
            
            auto audio = AssetManager::GetAssetsByType(AssetType::Audio);
            UI::Text("Audio: " + std::to_string(audio.size()));
            
            UI::Separator();
            
            if (UI::Button("Unload Unused")) {
                AssetManager::UnloadUnused();
            }
            
            if (UI::Button("Reload All")) {
                ReloadAllAssets();
            }
            
            if (UI::Button("Save Registry")) {
                AssetRegistry::SaveRegistry("asset_registry.bin");
            }
            
            UI::End();
        }
        
        // Selected asset preview
        if (m_SelectedAsset && UI::Begin("Asset Preview", nullptr, {400, 300})) {
            UI::Text("Path: " + m_SelectedAsset->GetPath());
            UI::Text("Type: " + std::to_string(static_cast<int>(m_SelectedAsset->GetType())));
            UI::Text("Handle: " + std::to_string(m_SelectedAsset->GetHandle()));
            UI::Text("Refs: " + std::to_string(m_SelectedAsset->GetRefCount()));
            
            UI::Separator();
            
            // Type-specific info
            if (m_SelectedAsset->GetType() == AssetType::Texture) {
                TextureAsset* texAsset = static_cast<TextureAsset*>(m_SelectedAsset);
                if (texAsset->GetTexture()) {
                    UI::Text("Size: " + 
                            std::to_string(texAsset->GetTexture()->GetWidth()) + " x " +
                            std::to_string(texAsset->GetTexture()->GetHeight()));
                    
                    // TODO: Render texture preview
                }
            }
            
            UI::End();
        }
    }
    
    void LoadDemoAssets() {
        printf("Loading demo assets...\n");
        
        // Load some textures
        AssetHandle<TextureAsset> tex1 = AssetManager::Load<TextureAsset>("Textures/test.png");
        AssetHandle<TextureAsset> tex2 = AssetManager::Load<TextureAsset>("Textures/icon.png");
        
        // Load shader
        AssetHandle<ShaderAsset> shader = AssetManager::Load<ShaderAsset>("Shaders/basic.glsl");
        
        // Add tags
        if (tex1.Get()) {
            AssetRegistry::RegisterAsset(tex1.Get());
            AssetRegistry::AddTag(tex1.Get()->GetHandle(), "texture");
            AssetRegistry::AddTag(tex1.Get()->GetHandle(), "test");
        }
        
        printf("Demo assets loaded\n");
    }
    
    void LoadRandomTexture() {
        static int counter = 0;
        std::string path = "Textures/random_" + std::to_string(counter++) + ".png";
        
        auto handle = AssetManager::Load<TextureAsset>(path, true);
        
        printf("Loading texture: %s\n", path.c_str());
    }
    
    void ReloadAllAssets() {
        auto assets = AssetManager::GetAllAssets();
        
        for (auto* asset : assets) {
            if (asset) {
                asset->Reload();
            }
        }
        
        printf("Reloaded all assets\n");
    }
    
    void OnAssetSelected(Asset* asset) {
        m_SelectedAsset = asset;
        printf("Selected: %s\n", asset ? asset->GetPath().c_str() : "None");
    }
    
    Window* m_Window = nullptr;
    Renderer* m_Renderer = nullptr;
    Font* m_Font = nullptr;
    
    AssetBrowser* m_AssetBrowser = nullptr;
    Asset* m_SelectedAsset = nullptr;
    
    bool m_Running = true;
};

int nkmain(int argc, char* argv[]) {
    AssetManagerDemo demo;
    demo.Run();
    return 0;
}
```

## 84. ANIMATION CORE

### Core/Animation/Animation.h

```cpp
// Core/Animation/Animation.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Types.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector3.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Quaternion.h>
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

// Animation keyframe types
enum class KeyframeInterpolation {
    Step,       // No interpolation
    Linear,     // Linear interpolation
    Cubic       // Cubic interpolation
};

// Transform keyframes
struct PositionKeyframe {
    float time;
    maths::Vector3f value;
};

struct RotationKeyframe {
    float time;
    maths::Quaternion value;
};

struct ScaleKeyframe {
    float time;
    maths::Vector3f value;
};

// Animation channel (affects one bone/node)
struct AnimationChannel {
    std::string targetName;  // Bone/node name
    
    std::vector<PositionKeyframe> positionKeys;
    std::vector<RotationKeyframe> rotationKeys;
    std::vector<ScaleKeyframe> scaleKeys;
    
    KeyframeInterpolation interpolation = KeyframeInterpolation::Linear;
    
    maths::Vector3f SamplePosition(float time) const;
    maths::Quaternion SampleRotation(float time) const;
    maths::Vector3f SampleScale(float time) const;
};

// Animation clip
class AnimationClip {
public:
    AnimationClip(const std::string& name, float duration)
        : m_Name(name), m_Duration(duration) {}
    
    const std::string& GetName() const { return m_Name; }
    float GetDuration() const { return m_Duration; }
    
    void AddChannel(const AnimationChannel& channel);
    const std::vector<AnimationChannel>& GetChannels() const { return m_Channels; }
    
    const AnimationChannel* FindChannel(const std::string& targetName) const;
    
    void SetLooping(bool looping) { m_Looping = looping; }
    bool IsLooping() const { return m_Looping; }
    
private:
    std::string m_Name;
    float m_Duration;
    bool m_Looping = true;
    std::vector<AnimationChannel> m_Channels;
};

// Animation state
enum class AnimationState {
    Stopped,
    Playing,
    Paused
};

// Animation instance (runtime)
class AnimationInstance {
public:
    AnimationInstance(AnimationClip* clip);
    
    void Play();
    void Pause();
    void Stop();
    void Reset();
    
    void Update(float deltaTime);
    
    AnimationState GetState() const { return m_State; }
    float GetTime() const { return m_Time; }
    float GetNormalizedTime() const;
    
    void SetTime(float time);
    void SetSpeed(float speed) { m_Speed = speed; }
    float GetSpeed() const { return m_Speed; }
    
    AnimationClip* GetClip() const { return m_Clip; }
    
private:
    AnimationClip* m_Clip;
    AnimationState m_State = AnimationState::Stopped;
    float m_Time = 0.0f;
    float m_Speed = 1.0f;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Animation/Animation.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Animation/Animation.cpp
#include "Animation.h"
#include <algorithm>

namespace nkentseu {

// =====================================================================
// ANIMATION CHANNEL
// =====================================================================

maths::Vector3f AnimationChannel::SamplePosition(float time) const {
    if (positionKeys.empty()) {
        return {0, 0, 0};
    }
    
    if (positionKeys.size() == 1 || time <= positionKeys.front().time) {
        return positionKeys.front().value;
    }
    
    if (time >= positionKeys.back().time) {
        return positionKeys.back().value;
    }
    
    // Find keyframes to interpolate between
    for (size_t i = 0; i < positionKeys.size() - 1; i++) {
        if (time >= positionKeys[i].time && time <= positionKeys[i + 1].time) {
            const auto& key0 = positionKeys[i];
            const auto& key1 = positionKeys[i + 1];
            
            float t = (time - key0.time) / (key1.time - key0.time);
            
            if (interpolation == KeyframeInterpolation::Step) {
                return key0.value;
            } else {
                return maths::Vector3f::Lerp(key0.value, key1.value, t);
            }
        }
    }
    
    return positionKeys.back().value;
}

maths::Quaternion AnimationChannel::SampleRotation(float time) const {
    if (rotationKeys.empty()) {
        return maths::Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 1);
    }
    
    if (rotationKeys.size() == 1 || time <= rotationKeys.front().time) {
        return rotationKeys.front().value;
    }
    
    if (time >= rotationKeys.back().time) {
        return rotationKeys.back().value;
    }
    
    // Find keyframes to interpolate between
    for (size_t i = 0; i < rotationKeys.size() - 1; i++) {
        if (time >= rotationKeys[i].time && time <= rotationKeys[i + 1].time) {
            const auto& key0 = rotationKeys[i];
            const auto& key1 = rotationKeys[i + 1];
            
            float t = (time - key0.time) / (key1.time - key0.time);
            
            if (interpolation == KeyframeInterpolation::Step) {
                return key0.value;
            } else {
                return maths::Quaternion::Slerp(key0.value, key1.value, t);
            }
        }
    }
    
    return rotationKeys.back().value;
}

maths::Vector3f AnimationChannel::SampleScale(float time) const {
    if (scaleKeys.empty()) {
        return {1, 1, 1};
    }
    
    if (scaleKeys.size() == 1 || time <= scaleKeys.front().time) {
        return scaleKeys.front().value;
    }
    
    if (time >= scaleKeys.back().time) {
        return scaleKeys.back().value;
    }
    
    // Find keyframes to interpolate between
    for (size_t i = 0; i < scaleKeys.size() - 1; i++) {
        if (time >= scaleKeys[i].time && time <= scaleKeys[i + 1].time) {
            const auto& key0 = scaleKeys[i];
            const auto& key1 = scaleKeys[i + 1];
            
            float t = (time - key0.time) / (key1.time - key0.time);
            
            if (interpolation == KeyframeInterpolation::Step) {
                return key0.value;
            } else {
                return maths::Vector3f::Lerp(key0.value, key1.value, t);
            }
        }
    }
    
    return scaleKeys.back().value;
}

// =====================================================================
// ANIMATION CLIP
// =====================================================================

void AnimationClip::AddChannel(const AnimationChannel& channel) {
    m_Channels.push_back(channel);
}

const AnimationChannel* AnimationClip::FindChannel(const std::string& targetName) const {
    for (const auto& channel : m_Channels) {
        if (channel.targetName == targetName) {
            return &channel;
        }
    }
    return nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// ANIMATION INSTANCE
// =====================================================================

AnimationInstance::AnimationInstance(AnimationClip* clip)
    : m_Clip(clip) {
}

void AnimationInstance::Play() {
    m_State = AnimationState::Playing;
}

void AnimationInstance::Pause() {
    if (m_State == AnimationState::Playing) {
        m_State = AnimationState::Paused;
    }
}

void AnimationInstance::Stop() {
    m_State = AnimationState::Stopped;
    m_Time = 0.0f;
}

void AnimationInstance::Reset() {
    m_Time = 0.0f;
}

void AnimationInstance::Update(float deltaTime) {
    if (m_State != AnimationState::Playing || !m_Clip) {
        return;
    }
    
    m_Time += deltaTime * m_Speed;
    
    float duration = m_Clip->GetDuration();
    
    if (m_Time >= duration) {
        if (m_Clip->IsLooping()) {
            m_Time = std::fmod(m_Time, duration);
        } else {
            m_Time = duration;
            m_State = AnimationState::Stopped;
        }
    }
}

float AnimationInstance::GetNormalizedTime() const {
    if (!m_Clip || m_Clip->GetDuration() <= 0.0f) {
        return 0.0f;
    }
    return m_Time / m_Clip->GetDuration();
}

void AnimationInstance::SetTime(float time) {
    m_Time = time;
    
    if (m_Clip) {
        float duration = m_Clip->GetDuration();
        if (m_Time < 0.0f) {
            m_Time = 0.0f;
        } else if (m_Time > duration) {
            m_Time = m_Clip->IsLooping() ? std::fmod(m_Time, duration) : duration;
        }
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 85. SKELETON & BONES

### Core/Animation/Skeleton.h

```cpp
// Core/Animation/Skeleton.h
#pragma once

#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Matrix4.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Vector3.h>
#include <Nkentseu/Maths/Quaternion.h>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

namespace nkentseu {

// Bone/Joint
struct Bone {
    std::string name;
    int32 parentIndex = -1;
    
    maths::Vector3f localPosition;
    maths::Quaternion localRotation;
    maths::Vector3f localScale = {1, 1, 1};
    
    maths::Matrix4 offsetMatrix;  // Bind pose inverse
    
    // Runtime
    maths::Matrix4 localTransform;
    maths::Matrix4 globalTransform;
};

// Skeleton
class Skeleton {
public:
    Skeleton() = default;
    
    // Building
    int32 AddBone(const std::string& name, int32 parentIndex = -1);
    void SetBoneLocalTransform(int32 boneIndex, 
                               const maths::Vector3f& position,
                               const maths::Quaternion& rotation,
                               const maths::Vector3f& scale);
    void SetBoneOffsetMatrix(int32 boneIndex, const maths::Matrix4& offset);
    
    // Query
    int32 GetBoneCount() const { return static_cast<int32>(m_Bones.size()); }
    const Bone* GetBone(int32 index) const;
    Bone* GetBone(int32 index);
    int32 FindBoneIndex(const std::string& name) const;
    
    const std::vector<Bone>& GetBones() const { return m_Bones; }
    
    // Hierarchy
    void UpdateGlobalTransforms();
    void UpdateGlobalTransforms(const maths::Matrix4& rootTransform);
    
    // Final transforms for skinning
    void GetSkinningMatrices(std::vector<maths::Matrix4>& outMatrices) const;
    
private:
    std::vector<Bone> m_Bones;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Animation/Skeleton.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Animation/Skeleton.cpp
#include "Skeleton.h"

namespace nkentseu {

int32 Skeleton::AddBone(const std::string& name, int32 parentIndex) {
    Bone bone;
    bone.name = name;
    bone.parentIndex = parentIndex;
    bone.localPosition = {0, 0, 0};
    bone.localRotation = {0, 0, 0, 1};
    bone.localScale = {1, 1, 1};
    bone.offsetMatrix = maths::Matrix4::Identity();
    bone.localTransform = maths::Matrix4::Identity();
    bone.globalTransform = maths::Matrix4::Identity();
    
    m_Bones.push_back(bone);
    return static_cast<int32>(m_Bones.size()) - 1;
}

void Skeleton::SetBoneLocalTransform(int32 boneIndex,
                                     const maths::Vector3f& position,
                                     const maths::Quaternion& rotation,
                                     const maths::Vector3f& scale) {
    if (boneIndex < 0 || boneIndex >= GetBoneCount()) {
        return;
    }
    
    Bone& bone = m_Bones[boneIndex];
    bone.localPosition = position;
    bone.localRotation = rotation;
    bone.localScale = scale;
    
    // Calculate local transform matrix
    bone.localTransform = maths::Matrix4::Identity();
    bone.localTransform = bone.localTransform * maths::Matrix4::Translate(position);
    bone.localTransform = bone.localTransform * rotation.ToMatrix4();
    bone.localTransform = bone.localTransform * maths::Matrix4::Scale(scale);
}

void Skeleton::SetBoneOffsetMatrix(int32 boneIndex, const maths::Matrix4& offset) {
    if (boneIndex < 0 || boneIndex >= GetBoneCount()) {
        return;
    }
    
    m_Bones[boneIndex].offsetMatrix = offset;
}

const Bone* Skeleton::GetBone(int32 index) const {
    if (index < 0 || index >= GetBoneCount()) {
        return nullptr;
    }
    return &m_Bones[index];
}

Bone* Skeleton::GetBone(int32 index) {
    if (index < 0 || index >= GetBoneCount()) {
        return nullptr;
    }
    return &m_Bones[index];
}

int32 Skeleton::FindBoneIndex(const std::string& name) const {
    for (int32 i = 0; i < GetBoneCount(); i++) {
        if (m_Bones[i].name == name) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

void Skeleton::UpdateGlobalTransforms() {
    UpdateGlobalTransforms(maths::Matrix4::Identity());
}

void Skeleton::UpdateGlobalTransforms(const maths::Matrix4& rootTransform) {
    for (int32 i = 0; i < GetBoneCount(); i++) {
        Bone& bone = m_Bones[i];
        
        if (bone.parentIndex < 0) {
            // Root bone
            bone.globalTransform = rootTransform * bone.localTransform;
        } else {
            // Child bone
            const Bone& parent = m_Bones[bone.parentIndex];
            bone.globalTransform = parent.globalTransform * bone.localTransform;
        }
    }
}

void Skeleton::GetSkinningMatrices(std::vector<maths::Matrix4>& outMatrices) const {
    outMatrices.resize(m_Bones.size());
    
    for (size_t i = 0; i < m_Bones.size(); i++) {
        const Bone& bone = m_Bones[i];
        outMatrices[i] = bone.globalTransform * bone.offsetMatrix;
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 86. ANIMATOR (Animation Controller)

### Core/Animation/Animator.h

```cpp
// Core/Animation/Animator.h
#pragma once

#include "Animation.h"
#include "Skeleton.h"
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nkentseu {

// Animator applies animations to a skeleton
class Animator {
public:
    Animator(Skeleton* skeleton);
    ~Animator();
    
    // Animation playback
    void Play(const std::string& clipName);
    void Stop();
    void Pause();
    void Resume();
    
    void Update(float deltaTime);
    
    // Clips
    void AddClip(AnimationClip* clip);
    void RemoveClip(const std::string& name);
    AnimationClip* GetClip(const std::string& name);
    
    // Current animation
    AnimationInstance* GetCurrentAnimation() const { return m_CurrentAnimation; }
    
    // Blending
    void CrossFade(const std::string& targetClip, float duration);
    bool IsBlending() const { return m_Blending; }
    
    // Skeleton
    Skeleton* GetSkeleton() const { return m_Skeleton; }
    
    // Final transforms
    void GetSkinningMatrices(std::vector<maths::Matrix4>& outMatrices);
    
private:
    void ApplyAnimation(AnimationInstance* animation, float weight = 1.0f);
    void UpdateBlending(float deltaTime);
    
    Skeleton* m_Skeleton;
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, AnimationClip*> m_Clips;
    AnimationInstance* m_CurrentAnimation = nullptr;
    
    // Blending
    bool m_Blending = false;
    AnimationInstance* m_BlendSource = nullptr;
    AnimationInstance* m_BlendTarget = nullptr;
    float m_BlendTime = 0.0f;
    float m_BlendDuration = 0.3f;
    
    // Cached bone transforms
    struct BoneTransform {
        maths::Vector3f position;
        maths::Quaternion rotation;
        maths::Vector3f scale;
    };
    std::vector<BoneTransform> m_BoneTransforms;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```

### Core/Animation/Animator.cpp

```cpp
// Core/Animation/Animator.cpp
#include "Animator.h"

namespace nkentseu {

Animator::Animator(Skeleton* skeleton)
    : m_Skeleton(skeleton) {
    
    if (m_Skeleton) {
        m_BoneTransforms.resize(m_Skeleton->GetBoneCount());
    }
}

Animator::~Animator() {
    delete m_CurrentAnimation;
    delete m_BlendSource;
    delete m_BlendTarget;
    
    for (auto& pair : m_Clips) {
        delete pair.second;
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// PLAYBACK
// =====================================================================

void Animator::Play(const std::string& clipName) {
    AnimationClip* clip = GetClip(clipName);
    if (!clip) {
        printf("Animation clip not found: %s\n", clipName.c_str());
        return;
    }
    
    if (m_CurrentAnimation) {
        delete m_CurrentAnimation;
    }
    
    m_CurrentAnimation = new AnimationInstance(clip);
    m_CurrentAnimation->Play();
    
    m_Blending = false;
}

void Animator::Stop() {
    if (m_CurrentAnimation) {
        m_CurrentAnimation->Stop();
    }
    m_Blending = false;
}

void Animator::Pause() {
    if (m_CurrentAnimation) {
        m_CurrentAnimation->Pause();
    }
}

void Animator::Resume() {
    if (m_CurrentAnimation) {
        m_CurrentAnimation->Play();
    }
}

void Animator::Update(float deltaTime) {
    if (!m_Skeleton) return;
    
    if (m_Blending) {
        UpdateBlending(deltaTime);
    } else if (m_CurrentAnimation) {
        m_CurrentAnimation->Update(deltaTime);
        ApplyAnimation(m_CurrentAnimation);
    }
    
    m_Skeleton->UpdateGlobalTransforms();
}

// =====================================================================
// CLIPS
// =====================================================================

void Animator::AddClip(AnimationClip* clip) {
    if (clip) {
        m_Clips[clip->GetName()] = clip;
    }
}

void Animator::RemoveClip(const std::string& name) {
    auto it = m_Clips.find(name);
    if (it != m_Clips.end()) {
        delete it->second;
        m_Clips.erase(it);
    }
}

AnimationClip* Animator::GetClip(const std::string& name) {
    auto it = m_Clips.find(name);
    return it != m_Clips.end() ? it->second : nullptr;
}

// =====================================================================
// BLENDING
// =====================================================================

void Animator::CrossFade(const std::string& targetClip, float duration) {
    AnimationClip* clip = GetClip(targetClip);
    if (!clip) {
        printf("Target animation clip not found: %s\n", targetClip.c_str());
        return;
    }
    
    if (m_BlendSource) {
        delete m_BlendSource;
    }
    if (m_BlendTarget) {
        delete m_BlendTarget;
    }
    
    m_BlendSource = m_CurrentAnimation;
    m_BlendTarget = new AnimationInstance(clip);
    m_BlendTarget->Play();
    
    m_Blending = true;
    m_BlendTime = 0.0f;
    m_BlendDuration = duration;
    
    m_CurrentAnimation = nullptr;
}

void Animator::UpdateBlending(float deltaTime) {
    if (!m_BlendSource || !m_BlendTarget) {
        m_Blending = false;
        return;
    }
    
    m_BlendTime += deltaTime;
    float t = std::min(m_BlendTime / m_BlendDuration, 1.0f);
    
    // Update both animations
    m_BlendSource->Update(deltaTime);
    m_BlendTarget->Update(deltaTime);
    
    // Apply blended animation
    float sourceWeight = 1.0f - t;
    float targetWeight = t;
    
    // Clear bone transforms
    for (auto& transform : m_BoneTransforms) {
        transform.position = {0, 0, 0};
        transform.rotation = {0, 0, 0, 1};
        transform.scale = {0, 0, 0};
    }
    
    // Blend source
    ApplyAnimation(m_BlendSource, sourceWeight);
    
    // Blend target
    ApplyAnimation(m_BlendTarget, targetWeight);
    
    // Apply to skeleton
    for (int32 i = 0; i < m_Skeleton->GetBoneCount(); i++) {
        const auto& transform = m_BoneTransforms[i];
        m_Skeleton->SetBoneLocalTransform(i, transform.position, transform.rotation, transform.scale);
    }
    
    // Check if blending is complete
    if (t >= 1.0f) {
        m_Blending = false;
        
        delete m_BlendSource;
        m_BlendSource = nullptr;
        
        m_CurrentAnimation = m_BlendTarget;
        m_BlendTarget = nullptr;
    }
}

// =====================================================================
// APPLICATION
// =====================================================================

void Animator::ApplyAnimation(AnimationInstance* animation, float weight) {
    if (!animation || !animation->GetClip()) return;
    
    AnimationClip* clip = animation->GetClip();
    float time = animation->GetTime();
    
    for (const auto& channel : clip->GetChannels()) {
        int32 boneIndex = m_Skeleton->FindBoneIndex(channel.targetName);
        if (boneIndex < 0) continue;
        
        maths::Vector3f position = channel.SamplePosition(time);
        maths::Quaternion rotation = channel.SampleRotation(time);
        maths::Vector3f scale = channel.SampleScale(time);
        
        if (weight < 1.0f) {
            // Blend with existing transform
            auto& transform = m_BoneTransforms[boneIndex];
            
            transform.position = transform.position + position * weight;
            transform.rotation = maths::Quaternion::Slerp(transform.rotation, rotation, weight);
            transform.scale = transform.scale + scale * weight;
        } else {
            // Direct application
            m_Skeleton->SetBoneLocalTransform(boneIndex, position, rotation, scale);
        }
    }
}

void Animator::GetSkinningMatrices(std::vector<maths::Matrix4>& outMatrices) {
    if (m_Skeleton) {
        m_Skeleton->GetSkinningMatrices(outMatrices);
    }
}

} // namespace nkentseu
```

---

## 87. BLEND TREE (Advanced Animation Blending)

### Core/Animation/BlendTree.h

```cpp
// Core/Animation/BlendTree.h
#pragma once

#include "Animation.h"
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

namespace nkentseu {

// Blend tree node types
enum class BlendNodeType {
    Clip,           // Single animation clip
    Blend1D,        // 1D blend (e.g., walk to run based on speed)
    Blend2D,        // 2D blend (e.g., locomotion based on direction and speed)
    Additive,       // Additive blending
    Override        // Override specific bones
};

// Base blend node
class BlendNode {
public:
    virtual ~BlendNode() = default;
    
    virtual BlendNodeType GetType() const = 0;
    virtual void Evaluate(float deltaTime, Skeleton* skeleton) = 0;
    
    void SetWeight(float weight) { m_Weight = weight; }
    float GetWeight() const { return m_Weight; }
    
protected:
    float m_Weight = 1.0f;
};

// Clip node
class ClipNode : public BlendNode {
public:
    ClipNode(AnimationClip* clip);
    
    BlendNodeType GetType() const override { return BlendNodeType::Clip; }
    void Evaluate(float deltaTime, Skeleton* skeleton) override;
    
    AnimationInstance* GetInstance() { return m_Instance; }
    
private:
    AnimationClip* m_Clip;
    AnimationInstance* m_Instance;
};

// 1D Blend node
class Blend1DNode : public BlendNode {
public:
    struct BlendPoint {
        float threshold;
        BlendNode* node;
    };
    
    Blend1DNode();
    ~Blend1DNode() override;
    
    BlendNodeType GetType() const override { return BlendNodeType::Blend1D; }
    void Evaluate(float deltaTime, Skeleton* skeleton) override;
    
    void AddBlendPoint(float threshold, BlendNode* node);
    void SetParameter(float value) { m_Parameter = value; }
    
private:
    std::vector<BlendPoint> m_BlendPoints;
    float m_Parameter = 0.0f;
};

// 2D Blend node
class Blend2DNode : public BlendNode {
public:
    struct BlendPoint2D {
        maths::Vector2f position;
        BlendNode* node;
    };
    
    Blend2DNode();
    ~Blend2DNode() override;
    
    BlendNodeType GetType() const override { return BlendNodeType::Blend2D; }
    void Evaluate(float deltaTime, Skeleton* skeleton) override;
    
    void AddBlendPoint(const maths::Vector2f& position, BlendNode* node);
    void SetParameter(const maths::Vector2f& value) { m_Parameter = value; }
    
private:
    std::vector<BlendPoint2D> m_BlendPoints;
    maths::Vector2f m_Parameter = {0, 0};
};

// Blend tree
class BlendTree {
public:
    BlendTree(Skeleton* skeleton);
    ~BlendTree();
    
    void SetRootNode(BlendNode* root);
    BlendNode* GetRootNode() { return m_RootNode; }
    
    void Update(float deltaTime);
    
    Skeleton* GetSkeleton() { return m_Skeleton; }
    
private:
    Skeleton* m_Skeleton;
    BlendNode* m_RootNode = nullptr;
};

} // namespace nkentseu
```
